Mariannette Miller-Meeks only won by six votes last cycle, and if we don’t post TIP-TOP numbers, The Radical Democrats will weasel their way into Iowa and try to flip Iowa BLUE! WE. CANNOT. LET THIS HAPPEN. With your support, we can build an even bigger red wave. Elliott, Mariannette Miller-Meeks for Congress Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress Miller-Meeks for Congress P.O. It has been an honor and a privilege to serve in Governor Hogan's cabinet for 7 years to Change Maryland for the Better.
Together we have come so far from where we were a few years ago—when most Marylanders wanted to leave our great state.
**Today Maryland is at a crossroads and we cannot afford to go backward.**

Our campaign is about making sure Maryland stays safe, steady, and prosperous while focusing on the issues that Marylanders really care about. Governor Hogan has proven what is possible when you make a commitment to commonsense solutions and putting people first.
If Marylanders want smart, pragmatic leadership in Annapolis, that is exactly what I am pledging to continue.

Don’t forget—Martin O’Malley – our last Democratic governor raised your taxes 40 times in a row.
This is one of the reasons why Governor Hogan was elected. Because people were sick and tired of tax increases.
Under Governor Hogan, we CUT taxes, and made Maryland more affordable.
But there is still so much hard work to do.
**This is the state that I love. This is the state that you love. I can think of no greater calling to continue to fight for Maryland's future and serve you as your next governor. **
With you, we can and will make history.
[Will you join me?](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuHM4TyUiRDjO7WRT-2Bn4igr193XMreDNS7fl2A4g9SL86uG3R-2BMUbQticgBgs-2F2hv9NV09XfMwRYyVymGR0P1ML6kS9QHZYKdO9UyabqST0GgIhxF-2BOpcvKwgO5eAA-2Fl-2Feg-3D-3DgBrS_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6MqfV6LwsQxj97DaHLg55wMTNsHooZqil-2BwbKwHZxwjNzN44TvmXCl8-2FlwWgCSsHqUcxlOsmcI3GY0gh2An382k6BF4xe8thsaT6VWWi4AZqJ3zgkUFLzOiG9cXBMDv35L7IuiCb20oGxDR9MpqbNCcfIcXQ3wIPlOdK0at-2B32r6mHstg7dD5rHxelWsNgh1BLgFfcLvIIMyvlg-2BXevLqSmWS3ZgEooxK7obB9ePRQ-2BQQzy8j-2BQOPKMTrtajUrl3GsIlrAyhUJXTohmwltfkYmfMudPlI-2FW2kNJbxmbx7OO-2BUivtHMJDqb-2BX4n5JGyRWYopAwulxqtJSrY18MEJExxHwSx-2F68HoWn5T7FoHU9oaSxHRJ1I4JnnLIdcA3-2BL0-2BitAhUVhaaDAwQjJXK2oC-2BoJcyV9HrutyTnjW4Zj-2BmvKJ03m6nBlB6AmfxMJG3rfPPF47wlvmY0171BMRQYGLBcaeJTOFBSp4kiuM95c-2F2R1-2BWcozDzGS8Z0M9kDfj7X-2B2STpbTUrY3lA7pJzgkUJyCDEk7YCBqqUeS4p6vZTdce0nGqigGBs1dJlu4s3361vVUqi25fAEQdrqEi9FwfXPV5KXEbV-2Fb97o3AAntTx6wWSuCtrqMBlcjN0y-2BrM4zTOR57hljLb4Ivur-2B-2FhXPxZ-2BdzCjvlMZVas6c5C6Cq02pq0Oge6EWeREQgTPPUv9J819ApyTjqVW2wW7vTuglw1AQ-2BcbqbgPINZoOGYR8o7Q-2BqiHwfvyrBFd6Gx20fDWeyCU5dEcCOwi5kgIqLoDGNUxkbJGKL3gz5XUnOP7wt7257YeENMjzpK97LAaFYIqqH7gXwqWTDx2IpET0FOYyopmGw-3D-3D)

clean_body: | | | | Together we have come so far Dear Friend, Yesterday I was honored to receive the official endorsement of Governor Larry Hogan. It has been an honor and a privilege to serve in Governor Hogan's cabinet for 7 years to Change Maryland for the Better. Together we have come so far from where we were a few years ago—when most Marylanders wanted to leave our great state. Today Maryland is at a crossroads and we cannot afford to go backward. Our campaign is about making sure Maryland stays safe, steady, and prosperous while focusing on the issues that Marylanders really care about. Governor Hogan has proven what is possible when you make a commitment to commonsense solutions and putting people first. If Marylanders want smart, pragmatic leadership in Annapolis, that is exactly what I am pledging to continue. Don’t forget—Martin O’Malley – our last Democratic governor raised your taxes 40 times in a row. This is one of the reasons why Governor Hogan was elected. Because people were sick and tired of tax increases. Under Governor Hogan, we CUT taxes, and made Maryland more affordable. But there is still so much hard work to do. This is the state that I love. This is the state that you love. I can think of no greater calling to continue to fight for Maryland's future and serve you as your next governor. With you, we can and will make history. Sincerely, | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20De=20Gregorio?=
subject: De Gregorio Scores Overwhelming Win At Bergen GOP Convention
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICK DE GREGORIO FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
Press Release | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us20.campaign-archive.com/?e=31104c58a7&u=d957ded20397fa5245442e969&id=fe70e82a5e)
---
| |
---
| **PRESS RELEASE
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**CONTACT** : PRESS@NICKFORNJ.COM
---
| |
# De Gregorio Scores Overwhelming Win Amid Blockbuster Turnout at Bergen County Convention
_First-time candidate won with a nearly 200 vote margin over previous nominee_
---
| **FAIR LAWN –** Tonight, Nick De Gregorio, a Marine Veteran and Republican Candidate for Congress in New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District, released the following statement in response to his decisive victory at the Bergen County Republican Organization’s (“BCRO”) Annual Convention.

The vote count was as follows:

**Nick De Gregorio: 302**
Frank Pallotta: 116
Fred Schneiderman: 15
Seb Skenderi: 3

“I am honored beyond words to have received overwhelming support from the place I have called home for my entire life. For months, our campaign of grassroots supporters has worked tirelessly to earn the votes of the Bergen County Committee through hundreds of hours of door knocking and phone calls. Both our success tonight and the enormous turnout at the Convention point to the kind of momentum that will fuel our campaign to victory in the primary and ultimately against Josh Gottheimer this fall. We will proudly fight for Bergen County communities against the Biden-Gottheimer inflationary agenda all the way to victory this November. We will need all hands on deck to defeat Josh Gottheimer, and **I ask my primary opponents to join me in this next phase of this critical campaign.** ” - Nick De Gregorio

De Gregorio, as winner of the BCRO County Convention, has earned a key position on the Republican Party blind in the June primary. In the newly-drawn Fifth Congressional District, Bergen County makes up over 80% of the population, and success there will be crucial to prevailing in both the primary and general elections

De Gregorio had previously won the recommendation of over 70% of the BCRO Policy Committee and was recently named to the National Republican Congressional Committee’s (“NRCC”) Young Guns “On the Radar” recruitment and support program.
---
| CLICK [HERE](https://nickfornj.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d957ded20397fa5245442e969&id=f832a12e81&e=31104c58a7) TO DOWNLOAD A HI-RES PHOTO OF NICK.
**About Nick ** Nick De Gregorio is a lifelong resident of Bergen County, raised in both Glen Rock and Ridgewood. At the age of 16, Nick was sitting in a high school classroom in Oradell when terrorists struck the World Trade Center just 12 miles away. It was then that he made the first adult decision of his life: to serve his country. Nick answered his country’s call to serve in the wake of the 9/11 attacks, and he joined the United States Marine Corps. Over the course of nine years, he deployed four times, fighting in both Iraq and Afghanistan. It was the honor of his lifetime to serve his country. Nick lives in Fair Lawn with his wife Emily, who during the COVID-19 pandemic worked as a nurse on the front lines, along with their two children Siena Reagan and Luca Cordell. He received a Bachelor’sdegree from Bucknell University and MastersDegrees from Georgetown University’s McDonough School of Business and the Walsh School of Foreign Service, with distinction.

---

name: Glenn Beck
subject: We are not powerless to help the people of Ukraine
body:
Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care
| | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=95907493a3f3448aa402a6ee495b0af8&_e=JGcKBg4IgRylcb9l3pa876zKT-RGvQS6bbmpwKyUkMf32xQa-FBMq925Tm3NFyanup5J8UNKSrH_Hr_t8hd0KWvO_1pAiK-XEZ2GxouIrLwCELDRKdlusoXP11kx70qs4JcTXtbpcdYBq1FHOxBlYWIwu7eNhaJnMEnJbUWp2MOrN5LM2vcpRyhIr_FH5hAw3TPyP9qeknnEr-YFoIuSIl-xTpUDjy6DqVuKfAOF-iFKo-rhH9kqfIhLEYHaFMkfykuGHiLvoCdqxhHaW_7X9QhAXpxUYiy0c3o6t8rmVM4T7jvRXw-ya1Fj4wAkbjsy3qy3UYIcIcKfLdTo8h22_lnuCYSAMOD0S0F9N2ryHSI%3D)
---
|
---
Peter,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=95907493a3f3448aa402a6ee495b0af8&_e=JGcKBg4IgRylcb9l3pa876zKT-RGvQS6bbmpwKyUkMf32xQa-FBMq925Tm3NFyanup5J8UNKSrH_Hr_t8hd0KWvO_1pAiK-XEZ2GxouIrLwCELDRKdlusoXP11kx70qs4JcTXtbpcdYBq1FHOxBlYdn9FK0sO0UFOHKRZW8S-9DnYvBJsEUS3s4Jn4tinsB9OMFLapvrIZyrURsVjyM94VvJ6o7yAIjySsBKc0-S_hCNWw3PG77cYbV9AubA2lZeN-lOarJHsIAjsUi3pfmduTURZsc8x2HiZkAbVvq1cbDho3SH4Dv9UIiiDhe7odwP_6sdlHlFImpLaHhyzLkuL7mbVwp-1upypHCIrgWNByQ%3D)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=95907493a3f3448aa402a6ee495b0af8&_e=JGcKBg4IgRylcb9l3pa876zKT-RGvQS6bbmpwKyUkMf32xQa-FBMq925Tm3NFyanup5J8UNKSrH_Hr_t8hd0KWvO_1pAiK-XEZ2GxouIrLwCELDRKdlusoXP11kx70qs4JcTXtbpcdYBq1FHOxBlYSdvK3ybVPDvdH-fgtCwMWXkp6BQY6F7wfRlkmdq0qUKmVCnXD7z5xyMitRjV2rP_YOrOawJneXcqiZ1avY8mDVmK9xDErnv3uiHgG6ezqVEVaZLkTxff8_MkI4UnXAQEJdHnd1THU46n4oQXqoTDg2gUPjrrXE9wZ0F0WhS6KCiMhEddkHhUUslvUmNMyep5HedXzhXdhuNGxlHvoPJuNI%3D)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=95907493a3f3448aa402a6ee495b0af8&_e=JGcKBg4IgRylcb9l3pa876zKT-RGvQS6bbmpwKyUkMf32xQa-FBMq925Tm3NFyanup5J8UNKSrH_Hr_t8hd0KWvO_1pAiK-XEZ2GxouIrLwCELDRKdlusoXP11kx70qs4JcTXtbpcdYBq1FHOxBlYUvGBX0E1EESuzs6KoNaIM_77LAbJrL0TxmJu2FYStYJup4ZXAxaYEnYF8zYK3y6CVwZqHJ1pV8HNAUR721Wb0eq9MDIp19Wdtagx8eIuJEC1bgx2Jm7r3z_7u8xLHVCtcayO0gOndyXw4-_Z-d2EZdyqiETxm2mLKRfgHdODE3ZYnJoetsjuHLPKBwE_5hinosyCGtHwv-suS841a6q6Yg%3D)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Public College Hosts Cop Killer (“Political Prisoner”) with Promoting Excellence in Diversity Grant
body:
In a scandalous example of leftwing dominance in higher education, a public university in New York will hold an event next month featuring a convicted cop killer promoted by the taxpayer-funded institution as a “political prisoner.”

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | March 23, 2022
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58362&L=26968&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHVibGljLWNvbGxlZ2UtaG9zdHMtY29wLWtpbGxlci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)
---
# [Public College Hosts Cop Killer (“Political Prisoner”) with Promoting Excellence in Diversity Grant](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58362&L=26968&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHVibGljLWNvbGxlZ2UtaG9zdHMtY29wLWtpbGxlci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)
In a scandalous example of leftwing dominance in higher education, a public university in New York will hold an event next month featuring a convicted cop killer promoted by the taxpayer-funded institution as a “political prisoner.” The April 6 event at State University of New York (SUNY) at Brockport is titled “History of Black Resistance, U.S. Political Prisoners & Genocide: A Conversation with Jalil Muntaqim” and the school’s announcement conveniently omits Muntaqim’s crimes, though it mentions he “was an avid educator” in prison. Formerly known as Anthony Bottom, Muntaqim was convicted for the murder of two New York Police Department (NYPD) officers in 1971. At the time he was a member of the radical Black Panther Party and Black Liberation Army.

### [Kamala Harris rolls out plan to confront racial bias in home appraisals ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58362&L=26969&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcva2FtYWxhLWhhcnJpcy1yb2xscy1vdXQtcGxhbi10by1jb25mcm9udC1yYWNpYWwtYmlhcy1pbi1ob21lLWFwcHJhaXNhbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=) The Washington Examiner Vice President Kamala Harris detailed a new plan the White House says will help close the racial wealth gap and eliminate racial bias in home appraisals during an event on Wednesday.

“They’ve concocted a program and scheme that will for political purposes inflate the values of homes, making it harder for purchasers and renters to afford housing,” said Tom Fritton, president of Judicial Watch. “It further shows how the [critical race theory] agenda is the animating narrative of the entire Biden administration.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58362&L=26969&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcva2FtYWxhLWhhcnJpcy1yb2xscy1vdXQtcGxhbi10by1jb25mcm9udC1yYWNpYWwtYmlhcy1pbi1ob21lLWFwcHJhaXNhbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)

### [City Under Siege: Staggering New York Crime Wave Roils Politics, Challenges Left ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58362&L=26970&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbnktY3JpbWUtd2F2ZS1yb2lscy1wb2xpdGljcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) Judicial Watch The NYPD’s new anti-gun units hit the streets last week and not a moment too soon. New York City is in the midst of a staggering crime wave. Over the past weekend, 29 people were shot in 24 separate incidents, the Daily News reported. According to the latest NYPD statistics, major felonies in the city increased 58% in February 2022, in year over year comparisons to February 2021. Murders rose 10%. Felony assaults rose 22%. Rapes increased 35%. Robberies increased 56%. Hate crimes—largely against Jews and Asian-Americans—surged 189%. Crimes in the transit systems—mainly the subways—were up 73%. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58362&L=26970&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbnktY3JpbWUtd2F2ZS1yb2lscy1wb2xpdGljcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)

### [Maryland’s highest court moves state primary to July 19 – The Washington Post ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58362&L=26933&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWFyeWxhbmRzLWhpZ2hlc3QtY291cnQtbW92ZXMtc3RhdGUtcHJpbWFyeS10by1qdWx5LTE5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) The Washington Post Maryland’s highest court on Tuesday moved the state’s primary from June 28 to July 19, as courts weigh challenges to the state’s new legislative map as well as Maryland’s congressional map.

clean_body: In a scandalous example of leftwing dominance in higher education, a public university in New York will hold an event next month featuring a convicted cop killer promoted by the taxpayer-funded institution as a “political prisoner.” | | | Because no one is above the law! | March 23, 2022 ---|---|--- | | == == In a scandalous example of leftwing dominance in higher education, a public university in New York will hold an event next month featuring a convicted cop killer promoted by the taxpayer-funded institution as a “political prisoner.” The April 6 event at State University of New York (SUNY) at Brockport is titled “History of Black Resistance, U.S. Political Prisoners & Genocide: A Conversation with Jalil Muntaqim” and the school’s announcement conveniently omits Muntaqim’s crimes, though it mentions he “was an avid educator” in prison. Formerly known as Anthony Bottom, Muntaqim was convicted for the murder of two New York Police Department (NYPD) officers in 1971. At the time he was a member of the radical Black Panther Party and Black Liberation Army. == | | | = The Washington Examiner Vice President Kamala Harris detailed a new plan the White House says will help close the racial wealth gap and eliminate racial bias in home appraisals during an event on Wednesday. “They’ve concocted a program and scheme that will for political purposes inflate the values of homes, making it harder for purchasers and renters to afford housing,” said Tom Fritton, president of Judicial Watch. “It further shows how the [critical race theory] agenda is the animating narrative of the entire Biden administration.” = == Judicial Watch The NYPD’s new anti-gun units hit the streets last week and not a moment too soon. New York City is in the midst of a staggering crime wave. Over the past weekend, 29 people were shot in 24 separate incidents, the Daily News reported. According to the latest NYPD statistics, major felonies in the city increased 58% in February 2022, in year over year comparisons to February 2021. Murders rose 10%. Felony assaults rose 22%. Rapes increased 35%. Robberies increased 56%. Hate crimes—largely against Jews and Asian-Americans—surged 189%. Crimes in the transit systems—mainly the subways—were up 73%. == The Washington Post Maryland’s highest court on Tuesday moved the state’s primary from June 28 to July 19, as courts weigh challenges to the state’s new legislative map as well as Maryland’s congressional map. The trial involves two lawsuits. One was brought by a group of Republican state lawmakers backed by Fair Maps Maryland. The other was brought by the national conservative activist group Judicial Watch. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved = |

body:
Help us spread the word.
#
**Beto has a jobs plan.** It’s a plan that will bring more than one million new high-wage, high-skill jobs to Texas. It’s a plan that will ensure no working Texan has to work a second or third job just to make ends meet.
And it’s a plan that we need every voter in Texas to hear about. That’s why we just launched a new jobs ad.
[Will you watch our brand-new ad and then chip in $3 to help make sure that we’re able to get it in front of as many Texans as possible this week?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54113?refcode=ema20220323-181784&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=181784%2E444211%2EdcAfgx)
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54113?refcode=ema20220323-181784&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=181784%2E444211%2EdcAfgx)
**[Watch + Donate](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54113?refcode=ema20220323-181784&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=181784%2E444211%2EdcAfgx)**
There’s only one candidate in the race for Texas Governor who started a small business and created high-wage, high-skill jobs right here in Texas. That’s Beto.
So unlike Greg Abbott, Beto knows that we need to partner with the working women and men of this state to fight for good wages, great benefits, and dignity on the job at a time when four out of 10 working Texans don’t make a living wage.
While Abbott tries to divide and distract us, we are focused on uniting Texans around a shared vision for a brighter future. Beto’s jobs plan is a crucial part of this vision. Can you help us spread the word and reach voters across Texas?
**[We need your help so that millions of Texans across the state hear Beto’s message. Please watch our new ad and then make your first contribution of $3 right now. We need you with us so we can start strong as we face off against Abbott and his big corporate donors.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54113?refcode=ema20220323-181784&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=181784%2E444211%2EdcAfgx)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54113?refcode=ema20220323-181784&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=181784%2E444211%2EdcAfgx)**
This is a campaign of, by, and for the people of Texas. We’re going to make history together by winning this election. And then we’re going to build a future where everyone in this state can thrive.
Thanks for doing your part,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220323-181784-footer&t=24&refcode2=181784_444211_dcAfgx&akid=181784%2E444211%2EdcAfgx)**

Donald J. Trump March 23rd, 2022
President Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America, will be joined by endorsed candidates, members of the Georgia Congressional Delegation, and other special guests on Saturday, March 26th, 2022, in Commerce, GA.

This Save America rally is a continuation of President Trump’s unprecedented effort to advance the MAGA agenda by energizing voters and highlighting America First candidates and causes.

_**Saturday, March 26, 2022, at 7:00PM EDT**_
President Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America, Delivers Remarks.

_**Venue:**_
Banks County Dragway
500 East Ridgeway Road
Commerce, GA, 30529

_**Special Guest Speakers:**_
David Perdue, _Former United States Senator from Georgia and Candidate for Governor of Georgia_
State Senator Burt Jones, _State Senator from Georgia and Candidate for Lieutenant Governor of Georgia_
Herschel Walker, _Heisman Trophy Winner and Candidate for United States Senate from Georgia_
Representative Jody Hice, _U.S. Representative from Georgia’s 10th Congressional District and Candidate for Secretary of State of Georgia_
Representative Marjorie Taylor Greene, _U.S. Representative from Georgia’s 14th Congressional District_
Representative Andrew Clyde, _U.S. Representative from Georgia’s 9th Congressional District_
Vernon Jones, _Former State Representative from Georgia and Candidate for Georgia’s 10th Congressional District_
Mr. John Gordon, _Candidate for Attorney General of Georgia_
Patrick Witt, _Candidate for Insurance and Safety Fire Commissioner of Georgia_
Tom Homan, _Former Acting Director of U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement_
Todd Starnes, _Conservative Columnist, Commentator, Author, and Radio Host_

_**Timeline of Events:**_
8:00AM – Parking Opens
2:00PM – Doors Open
4:00PM – Program Begins
7:00PM – 45th President of the United States Donald J. Trump Delivers Remarks

Donald J. Trump March 23rd, 2022
Mo Brooks of Alabama made a horrible mistake recently when he went “woke” and stated, referring to the 2020 Presidential Election Scam, “Put that behind you, put that behind you,” despite the fact that the Election was rife with fraud and irregularities. If we forget, the Radical Left Democrats will continue to Cheat and Steal Elections. Just look at what is happening in Wisconsin, Arizona, Pennsylvania, Georgia, and elsewhere, but tremendous progress has been made that will help us in 2022 and 2024. The 2020 Election was rigged, and we can’t let them get away with it.

When I endorsed Mo Brooks, he took a 44-point lead and was unstoppable. He then hired a new campaign staff who “brilliantly” convinced him to "stop talking about the 2020 Election.” He listened to them. Then, according to the polls, Mo’s 44-point lead totally evaporated all based on his “2020” statement made at our massive rally in Cullman, Alabama. When I heard his statement, I said, “Mo, you just blew the Election, and there’s nothing you can do about it.” Very sad but, since he decided to go in another direction, so have I, and I am hereby withdrawing my Endorsement of Mo Brooks for the Senate. I don’t think the great people of Alabama will disagree with me. Election Fraud must be captured and stopped, or we won’t have a Country anymore. I will be making a new Endorsement in the near future!

name: Rep. Andy Biggs
subject: Help Me Lower Gas Prices
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIGGS FOR CONGRESS**
body:
Dear Peter, Don't be fooled for a minute that prices are shooting up only because of the Ukraine conflict. Biden and his liberal allies are using Ukraine as a smokescreen for the real culprit - their America Last energy policies and their out-of-control spending. Despite record inflation, Biden and the Left pushed through another $1.5 trillion in government funding riddled with pork and wasteful spending. And no matter what the Democrats will tell you, this will push our debt well past the $30 trillion it already is. Biden and the Left want to blame Ukraine for this. But the truth is Ukraine only made it worse. Biden's Radical Agenda is the real cause of this crisis. Trillions of dollars have already been borrowed and spent under Biden's Marxist social reengineering plan. And that has put our country's inflation at the highest rate in over 40 years. If we don't put a stop to Biden, Pelosi, and the rest of the Democrats' spending spree soon, we could see inflation shoot even higher. **[But if you help me reach my fundraising goal with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today, we'll scare these liberals straight when they see donors flocking to conservatives like me.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59918102:Jmfx86oNp:m:1:3103520637:3CC3B60EEA2F7C2670F39E0F7E6C4457:r "But if you help me reach my fundraising goal with your $25, $50, or
$100 donation today, we’ll scare these liberals straight when they see donors flocking to conservatives like me.")** Wrong as they may be, Pelosi and Biden are smart politicians. They run away from an issue the moment they see it's pulling them down. Just look at how they pivoted 180 degrees from Defund The Police when they saw it was hurting them. For once, let's use their desire to win at any cost against them to get our fiscal house back in order. clean_body: Dear Peter, Don't be fooled for a minute that prices are shooting up only because of the Ukraine conflict. Biden and his liberal allies are using Ukraine as a smokescreen for the real culprit - their America Last energy policies and their out-of-control spending. Despite record inflation, Biden and the Left pushed through another $1.5 trillion in government funding riddled with pork and wasteful spending. And no matter what the Democrats will tell you, this will push our debt well past the $30 trillion it already is. Biden and the Left want to blame Ukraine for this. body:
| | | | Peter, I signed a very limited number of copies of my new book, _Do What You Said You Would Do._

As an elite Conservative Patriot, I know you need to have one - so I set one aside for you until midnight tonight._As I said, there are an extremely limited number of signed copies and this is your only chance to grab one._

---

**This book is an essential must-read for any America First patriot who wants to understand Donald J. Trump 's successful four years as president.**

President Trump showed us how to win. He said he was going to cut taxes, he did. He said he was going to reduce regulations, he did. Do what you told them you were going to do. That's the model that works.

**[By ordering your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59924019:JmIgk6oNu:m:1:3253819041:290F0D9C09E448072F52823924299C1D:r "By ordering your
copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority. ")**

Pelosi's targeting conservatives across America and she has more money than she knows what to do with. Pelosi will do everything in her power to make sure we FAIL, including dragging conservatives in ALL 50 states through the mud.

Taking back the House is the key to saving America. Without the House, our country will be lost forever to Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left.

**[So please don't pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed copy of my book! The copies I've signed won't last long, so order yours immediately.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59924019:JmIgk6oNu:m:1:3253819041:290F0D9C09E448072F52823924299C1D:r "So please don't
pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed copy of
my book! The copies I’ve signed won’t last long, so order yours immediately.")**

I stand with House Conservatives who fight for freedom in the swamp and do what they said they would do.

**[Do you?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59924019:JmIgk6oNu:m:1:3253819041:290F0D9C09E448072F52823924299C1D:r "Do you?")**

Thank you,

Jim Jordan

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

name: Sarah
subject: hey there!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hey there!
This is Sarah at Republican HQ. I just combed through the responses on our Official 2022 Government Satisfaction Survey for our top supporters only... and I didn't see your name. [**Do you have a quick minute to fill it out before I send the results over to House leadership?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928468:6Dbjp6oPN:m:1:3299561967:F461E3037E85A402BB4A711170DB6B02:r)
I know you're busy so I can promise you it will only take one or two minutes to fill out.
_Here are a handful of questions you can expect:_
**Official 2022 Government Satisfaction Survey**
1. [**Do you think the country is headed in the right direction or on the wrong track?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928468:6Dbjp6oPN:m:1:3299561967:F461E3037E85A402BB4A711170DB6B02:r)
2. [**Do you approve of Joe Biden's time in office so far?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928468:6Dbjp6oPN:m:1:3299561967:F461E3037E85A402BB4A711170DB6B02:r)
3. [**How would you rate the federal government's performance?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928468:6Dbjp6oPN:m:1:3299561967:F461E3037E85A402BB4A711170DB6B02:r)
4. [**How important is it for Republicans to take back the House?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928468:6Dbjp6oPN:m:1:3299561967:F461E3037E85A402BB4A711170DB6B02:r)
5. [**What should the GOP prioritize for the rest of the year?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928468:6Dbjp6oPN:m:1:3299561967:F461E3037E85A402BB4A711170DB6B02:r)
6. [**Do you have anything else to share with leaders in the Republican Party?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928468:6Dbjp6oPN:m:1:3299561967:F461E3037E85A402BB4A711170DB6B02:r)

****[ADD YOUR RESPONSE >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928468:6Dbjp6oPN:m:1:3299561967:F461E3037E85A402BB4A711170DB6B02:r)****
---
This is your chance to be open and honest with House Republican leadership.
I'm not reaching out to everyone -- just a handful of our top supporters.**So can I look for your response in the next few minutes?**
Thank you!
\-- Sarah
_(From Republican HQ -- Team Scalise)_
* * *
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928469:6Dbjp6oPN:m:1:3299561967:F461E3037E85A402BB4A711170DB6B02:r)
Congratulations!
Because of your proud support of President Trump and our America first movement, you have qualified for a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.
As a small token of our appreciation, we're giving you the chance to have a face-to-face dinner with President Donald J. Trump.
Oh, and did we mention we'll pay for the dinner + the flight + the hotel?
You have 90 minutes from the time you opened this email to enter.
**[ENTER TO WIN HERE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928469:6Dbjp6oPN:m:1:3299561967:F461E3037E85A402BB4A711170DB6B02:r)**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928470:6Dbjp6oPN:m:1:3299561967:F461E3037E85A402BB4A711170DB6B02:r)
We asked nicely, now we're BEGGING! Republicans need 42 Patriots to give $35 -- if not, we'll MISS tonight's goal! PLEASE do your part!
**[CHIP IN $35 NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928470:6Dbjp6oPN:m:1:3299561967:F461E3037E85A402BB4A711170DB6B02:r)**
How important is it to you that Republicans flip the House? Republicans only need *five* seats to WIN the House. Will you do your part? [**Chip in $35 as soon as you can.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928470:6Dbjp6oPN:m:1:3299561967:F461E3037E85A402BB4A711170DB6B02:r)
Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003
---
NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Wednesday, March 16th, 2022 at 12:00 am Eastern Time and ends on Sunday, May 1st, 2022 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Sunday, May 1st, 2022. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) tickets to the May 9th NRCC 2022 Majority Dinner; transportation for two (2), made at the discretion of the Team Scalise, within the continental United States to event location and from winners home location, with an approximate retail value of $1,500; one (1) one-night hotel stay at a Dallas, Texas hotel, with an approximate retail value of $500. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $2,500. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Restrictions and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply, they are listed in the [**Official Rules.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928471:6Dbjp6oPN:m:1:3299561967:F461E3037E85A402BB4A711170DB6B02:r) The Sponsor is Team Scalise, 320 First St SE, Washington, DC 20003.
Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.
320 First Street SE
Washington, DC 20003

Oh, and did we mention we'll pay for the dinner + the flight + the hotel? You have 90 minutes from the time you opened this email to enter. We asked nicely, now we're BEGGING! Republicans need 42 Patriots to give $35 -- if not, we'll MISS tonight's goal! PLEASE do your part! How important is it to you that Republicans flip the House? Republicans only need five seats to WIN the House. Will you do your part? Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Wednesday, March 16th, 2022 at 12:00 am Eastern Time and ends on Sunday, May 1st, 2022 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Sunday, May 1st, 2022. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) tickets to the May 9th NRCC 2022 Majority Dinner; transportation for two (2), made at the discretion of the Team Scalise, within the continental United States to event location and from winners home location, with an approximate retail value of $1,500; one (1) one-night hotel stay at a Dallas, Texas hotel, with an approximate retail value of $500. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $2,500. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Restrictions and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply, they are listed in the The Sponsor is Team Scalise, 320 First St SE, Washington, DC 20003. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. name: Ron Johnson
subject: DECISION MADE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
| |
---
| | | Peter,

This is a longer email than usual but for the past months, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.

I have been smeared again and again by media companies like The New York Times, Washington Post, and the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say.

I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech.

Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me.
And that is why I decided to run for re-election.

I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Peter. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me.

Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can. The Democrats even placed a $2M ad buy just moments after I announced my campaign for re-election.

And that's why I need your help.

_**[Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.

Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928349:Jjw4L6oNS:m:1:3317145305:E951A4CA1EF386179363E3BAD33E88D7:r "Any help you can provide will make
an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It
will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right
now.")**_

Ron Johnson
---
| | | [Fight for Freedom](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928349:Jjw4L6oNS:m:1:3317145305:E951A4CA1EF386179363E3BAD33E88D7:r "Fight for Freedom")
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928349:Jjw4L6oNS:m:1:3317145305:E951A4CA1EF386179363E3BAD33E88D7:r "RonJon Announcement")
---
| Peter, It's Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928349:Jjw4L6oNS:m:1:3317145305:E951A4CA1EF386179363E3BAD33E88D7:r "Please click
here to donate now")**
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928349:Jjw4L6oNS:m:1:3317145305:E951A4CA1EF386179363E3BAD33E88D7:r "SAVE THE SENATE")
---
| Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc.
---
PO Box 1159
Oshkosh, WI 54903-1159
[Privacy Policy](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928350:Jjw4L6oNS:m:1:3317145305:E951A4CA1EF386179363E3BAD33E88D7:r)

If you would prefer to donate by mail, please send your contribution to the following address.

RON JOHNSON FOR SENATE, INC.
PO Box 1159
Oshkosh, WI 54903-1159

body:
|

| | | Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 2 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?

| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928485:JOna16oNp:m:1:3299561967:F8466E643C32A2FC014399CCE17A722D:r "RENEW
MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections is the toughest battle we've seen yet. This sets the stage for what's to come for Republicans in 2024. If we fail to win back a Republican Majority in Congress, we will never take back the White House.

Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team, **[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2022 Republican Membership.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928485:JOna16oNp:m:1:3299561967:F8466E643C32A2FC014399CCE17A722D:r "but you only have
until midnight tonight to renew your 2022 Republican Membership.")**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928485:JOna16oNp:m:1:3299561967:F8466E643C32A2FC014399CCE17A722D:r "RENEW
MEMBERSHIP")
---

You've fought with us for two consecutive years, and we need you to stick back our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't win this fight without you. **[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928485:JOna16oNp:m:1:3299561967:F8466E643C32A2FC014399CCE17A722D:r "Renew your
membership before it’s too late >>>")**

---

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2022 Membership Services
Date: Tues, March 22, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: **We hate to see you go.**

**ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen, **but we have bad news for you.**

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928485:JOna16oNp:m:1:3299561967:F8466E643C32A2FC014399CCE17A722D:r "11:59 PM TONIGHT")**.

**[Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustain Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928485:JOna16oNp:m:1:3299561967:F8466E643C32A2FC014399CCE17A722D:r "Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustain Republican Member for 2
consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?")**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928485:JOna16oNp:m:1:3299561967:F8466E643C32A2FC014399CCE17A722D:r "RENEW MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928485:JOna16oNp:m:1:3299561967:F8466E643C32A2FC014399CCE17A722D:r)
---

We're approaching the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections will be the toughest election we've seen yet, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We're already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

You only have until **[11:59 PM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928485:JOna16oNp:m:1:3299561967:F8466E643C32A2FC014399CCE17A722D:r "11:59 PM")** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **[Renew before it's too late >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928485:JOna16oNp:m:1:3299561967:F8466E643C32A2FC014399CCE17A722D:r "Renew before
it’s too late >>>")**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

---

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59928486:JOna16oNp:m:1:3299561967:F8466E643C32A2FC014399CCE17A722D:r "Can we count on
you to step up?")**********

name: Sarah
subject: hey there!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hey there!
This is Sarah at Republican HQ. I just combed through the responses on our Official 2022 Government Satisfaction Survey for our top supporters only... and I didn't see your name. [**Do you have a quick minute to fill it out before I send the results over to House leadership?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929197:JxOum6oNL:m:1:3317145305:151AACDE16AAAE868C11AD20D54A19D9:r)
I know you're busy so I can promise you it will only take one or two minutes to fill out.
_Here are a handful of questions you can expect:_
**Official 2022 Government Satisfaction Survey**
1. [**Do you think the country is headed in the right direction or on the wrong track?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929197:JxOum6oNL:m:1:3317145305:151AACDE16AAAE868C11AD20D54A19D9:r)
2. [**Do you approve of Joe Biden's time in office so far?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929197:JxOum6oNL:m:1:3317145305:151AACDE16AAAE868C11AD20D54A19D9:r)
3. [**How would you rate the federal government's performance?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929197:JxOum6oNL:m:1:3317145305:151AACDE16AAAE868C11AD20D54A19D9:r)
4. [**How important is it for Republicans to take back the House?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929197:JxOum6oNL:m:1:3317145305:151AACDE16AAAE868C11AD20D54A19D9:r)
5. [**What should the GOP prioritize for the rest of the year?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929197:JxOum6oNL:m:1:3317145305:151AACDE16AAAE868C11AD20D54A19D9:r)
6. [**Do you have anything else to share with leaders in the Republican Party?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929197:JxOum6oNL:m:1:3317145305:151AACDE16AAAE868C11AD20D54A19D9:r)

****[ADD YOUR RESPONSE >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929197:JxOum6oNL:m:1:3317145305:151AACDE16AAAE868C11AD20D54A19D9:r)****
---
This is your chance to be open and honest with House Republican leadership.
I'm not reaching out to everyone -- just a handful of our top supporters.**So can I look for your response in the next few minutes?**
Thank you!
\-- Sarah
_(From Republican HQ -- Team Scalise)_
* * *
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929198:JxOum6oNL:m:1:3317145305:151AACDE16AAAE868C11AD20D54A19D9:r)
Congratulations!
Because of your proud support of President Trump and our America first movement, you have qualified for a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.
As a small token of our appreciation, we're giving you the chance to have a face-to-face dinner with President Donald J. Trump.
Oh, and did we mention we'll pay for the dinner + the flight + the hotel?
You have 90 minutes from the time you opened this email to enter.
**[ENTER TO WIN HERE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929198:JxOum6oNL:m:1:3317145305:151AACDE16AAAE868C11AD20D54A19D9:r)**
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929199:JxOum6oNL:m:1:3317145305:151AACDE16AAAE868C11AD20D54A19D9:r)
We asked nicely, now we're BEGGING! Republicans need 42 Patriots to give $35 -- if not, we'll MISS tonight's goal! PLEASE do your part!
**[CHIP IN $35 NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929199:JxOum6oNL:m:1:3317145305:151AACDE16AAAE868C11AD20D54A19D9:r)**
How important is it to you that Republicans flip the House? Republicans only need *five* seats to WIN the House. Will you do your part? [**Chip in $35 as soon as you can.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929199:JxOum6oNL:m:1:3317145305:151AACDE16AAAE868C11AD20D54A19D9:r)

name: Deirdre Gilbert
subject: VOLUNTEER MEETING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Committee to Elect Gilbert for Governor [Preferences](https://gilbertforgovernor
body:
Friendly reminder for TEAM GILBERT'S weekly meeting on Thursday !! [](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bthujz-iduiyhurdd-r/)
# Volunteer Meeting Reminder
# WE NEED EVERYONE ON THE CALL
### **We Need Your Help!**
**NEW ZOOM LINK AT THE BOTTOM ** Well we have made a huge leap as you know and are now in another dimension as running for Governor on the independent ticket. This has become a mountain that we had not expected, but we are prepared for the challenge of climbing that mountain. We have been told that no one has ever achieved the goal of getting in the race as an independent because of the ballot access barriers put into place by the different parties. In this case the Democratic party.As an independent, I must acquire 83,000 signatures to get on the ballot in November. Texas has made it very difficult to run as a third party candidate, where the independent candidate is the only third party required to petition that many signatures. They are also going so far to contest petitions to keep candidates from being able to run for office. The question is do we allow these barriers to hinder us or do we keep moving and fight to the bitter end? I think we should fight back because Texas voters have the right to their candidate of choice. If you want to help us with this, please send an email to info@gilbert4gov.com. We truly believe if we weren't consider a threat that we would not have to fight this battle. Can we depend on you?Deirdre Gilbert is inviting you to a scheduled Zoom meeting.
Zoom Link: https://zoom.us/j/93010022377?pwd=V3h4NG1FZkZwRnVxb0pVdmJSK0dPZz09Meeting ID: 930 1002 2377 Passcode: 835429 [](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bthujz-iduiyhurdd-y/)
## * Registration *
### **VOLUNTEER LINK**
[SIGN UP TODAY!](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bthujz-iduiyhurdd-j/)
## * Donation *
### **WE NEED YOUR SUPPORT!**
[DONATE TO HELP US WIN!](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bthujz-iduiyhurdd-t/) | [ Share ](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-fb-bthujz-iduiyhurdd-i/) | [ Tweet ](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-tw-bthujz-iduiyhurdd-d/) | [ Share ](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-li-bthujz-iduiyhurdd-h/) | [ Forward ](https://gilbertforgovernor.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-iduiyhurdd-E305D3C8-bthujz-l-k)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Reading this takes 2 mins.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
This will take two minutes to read, so please read all the way through.
|
---
| | | Peter, this will take two minutes to read, so please read all the way through.
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929231:64Czy6ojN:m:1:3317145305:772A5062F792BA7023D8405621D6CD02:r)
---

I have been outraised by my opponent every single quarter, and now, **I 'm facing my FIRST End of Quarter Deadline of 2022.** Lately, it's seemed like people think this race doesn't even matter, so I just wanted to give you a quick rundown on this race:
1. **This race is currently separated by 2%, which means it is essentially a toss-up**
2. **_Fox News_ has said this race will be the most expensive in U.S. history**
3. **_Roll Call_ said this race will determine who controls the Senate **
4. **And most recently,_MSNBC_ called my opponent a "breakout fundraising star"**

If we want to have a chance at fighting back and defeating my well-funded liberal opponent, I need to reach my Quarterly Deadline.

**[I'm pleading with you, Peter, even if it is $8...will you give today? People think they need to write huge checks in order to make a difference but that's just not true. I need folks who can give $8, $10, $12.55 or even $17 today to reach my End of Quarter Goal.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929231:64Czy6ojN:m:1:3317145305:772A5062F792BA7023D8405621D6CD02:r "I'm pleading with you, Peter, even if it is $8...will you give today? People think they need to write huge
checks in order to make a difference but that's just not true. I need folks who can give $8, $10, $12.55 or even $17 today to reach my End of Quarter
Goal. ")**
---
| | | [YES, MARCO, I'LL HELP YOU!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929231:64Czy6ojN:m:1:3317145305:772A5062F792BA7023D8405621D6CD02:r "YES, MARCO, I’LL HELP YOU!")
---
I really do hate coming to you for help, but your support truly is the backbone of my campaign. If you've given anything from a dollar to a thousand dollars, please know I am so grateful. My team is so grateful, too.

Thank you for your time,
Marco Rubio

---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929232:64Czy6ojN:m:1:3317145305:772A5062F792BA7023D8405621D6CD02:r "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _A personal note from Marco Rubio_ :

Peter, did you see what my former Trump Impeachment Manager opponent said about our race?

Demings is a do-nothing Democrat with a laughable record. Schumer and his cronies are propping her up with their multi-million dollar warchests all because they know she'll be a RUBBER STAMP for their radical agenda. If we let up and the Democrats win in Florida, they will KEEP control of the Senate and continue to force their dangerous agenda through Congress. So here's the deal:

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929232:64Czy6ojN:m:1:3317145305:772A5062F792BA7023D8405621D6CD02:r "Footer Gif")

I really do need your help, Peter. People think they need to write huge checks in order to make a difference but that's just not true. I need folks who can give $8, $10, $12.55 or even $17 today.

You know I've reached out a lot, so don't complain if we lose. I'm committed to winning. Are you?
| | [I'M COMMITTED TO WINNING](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929232:64Czy6ojN:m:1:3317145305:772A5062F792BA7023D8405621D6CD02:r "I'M COMMITTED TO
WINNING")
---

| Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate

Miami, FL 33153

Here’s where things stand right now: → A recent Listener Group poll shows Charlie OUTRIGHT BEATING DeSantis! → A USA Today/Suffolk University poll shows DeSantis FAILS to reach 50% against Charlie , another clear sign we can win in November. → And a recent Democratic primary poll showed Charlie leading in every region of Florida, making him the candidate best positioned to DEFEAT Ron DeSantis! = We won’t sugarcoat the situation: While these polls are great news for Charlie, DeSantis and his right-wing billionaire pals can see them too — and they’ll be doubling down on their attacks and flooding the state with even more money to fight back. So we have to fight even harder. With your grassroots support, we can keep up the momentum and finally start building a Florida that works for ALL Floridians, so please pitch in now to help Charlie WIN this November:** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = – Team Crist = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

Hello,
I’ll get right to it: I’m emailing to ask you to help me defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue by giving $5 right now to my campaign.
At midnight on March 31st, we’re facing our first end-of-quarter FEC deadline of the year. You’ve probably heard about these deadlines before – and for good reason.
After March 31st, my campaign is required by federal law to publicly report our fundraising totals. Everyone will be scouring our report. Reporters will write about how much we’ve raised. Advocacy groups will take notice. Chuck Grassley will see the strength of the people-powered campaign we’ve been building. And Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs will be watching, ready to pounce at any sign of weakness.
This deadline isn’t just about meeting the goals we need to hit to fund our campaign operations. It’ll show the world whether or not Democrats are prepared to defend our Senate majority – and our very democracy.

At midnight on March 31st, we’re facing our first end-of-quarter FEC deadline of the year. You’ve probably heard about these deadlines before – and for good reason. After March 31st, my campaign is required by federal law to publicly report our fundraising totals. Everyone will be scouring our report. Reporters will write about how much we’ve raised. Advocacy groups will take notice. Chuck Grassley will see the strength of the people-powered campaign we’ve been building. And Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs will be watching, ready to pounce at any sign of weakness. This deadline isn’t just about meeting the goals we need to hit to fund our campaign operations. It’ll show the world whether or not Democrats are prepared to defend our Senate majority – and our very democracy. The polls show my race could be one of the closest in the country. But we still need to raise another $203,075 to hit our $1,000,000 goal, and I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to take on the Super PACs and win: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Whether or not we hit our goal, our fundraising total will set the tone for the rest of the entire campaign. I’m so grateful for your trust in me and support of democratic ideals, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Twitter and we need your help
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929238:6v-Bu6o4N:m:1:3253819041:3269962560C46A8693DD138BBB694E71:r) Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush, we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. You may have seen that, just a few days ago, the Babylon Bee, a popular conservative news satire publication was suspended indefinitely for calling Rachel Levine, Joe Biden's transgender Assistant Secretary for Health, the "Man of the Year." This is the post in question: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929238:6v-Bu6o4N:m:1:3253819041:3269962560C46A8693DD138BBB694E71:r) This hypocrisy is so rich. Twitter banned the Babylon Bee for satire. ...**While The Taliban, a terrorist organization, is allowed to stay on Twitter.** What's worse is my team at the Center for American Liberty has discovered that powerful elected politicians are colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we've caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. ** ** **That's why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties,****and we need your help to win.** [**Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929238:6v-Bu6o4N:m:1:3253819041:3269962560C46A8693DD138BBB694E71:r) Let me explain. Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O'Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns over the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929238:6v-Bu6o4N:m:1:3253819041:3269962560C46A8693DD138BBB694E71:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929238:6v-Bu6o4N:m:1:3253819041:3269962560C46A8693DD138BBB694E71:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929238:6v-Bu6o4N:m:1:3253819041:3269962560C46A8693DD138BBB694E71:r) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for "violating the government's rules about election integrity." _In other words, Rogan was censored for his political beliefs. _ But it gets much worse. When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to remove his tweets/posts. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris' vacated seat in the U.S. Senate, and you and I both know that Rogan's tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed Twitter to shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929238:6v-Bu6o4N:m:1:3253819041:3269962560C46A8693DD138BBB694E71:r) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929238:6v-Bu6o4N:m:1:3253819041:3269962560C46A8693DD138BBB694E71:r) That's why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other leftists for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59929238:6v-Bu6o4N:m:1:3253819041:3269962560C46A8693DD138BBB694E71:r) What makes all of this so much worse is that Rogan is not the only victim of this blatant viewpoint censorship. subject: They Won’t Silence Me

body:
Peter: COVID is such a weird virus. We magically now don't need masks to stop its spread in restaurants, offices, churches, and schools. But for some reason, COVID still is susceptible to attack Americans when they ride on buses, trains, and airplanes... unless we wear a cloth mask... whose pores are 800 times bigger than the infinitesimally small COVID virus. This is the idiocy of the Biden Administration which keeps putting America last. There's no thought to follow the science but to exert control through these ridiculous mandates. That's why I've filed a lawsuit to force the FDA to end this unconstitutional mask mandate immediately. It's time Pelosi and Grandpa Joe practice what they preach and FOLLOW. THE. REAL. SCIENCE. **You know, the science that says cloth masks don 't work, the vaccines didn't stop the spread, and natural immunity is better at stopping COVID.** But they don't care. Grandpa Joe is out of control - which I why I'm calling for the Impeachment of Joe Biden! **[I'm working overtime to impeach Joe Biden so we can restore America's freedoms from the left's disastrous control over our lives, but this fight has made me a target by the left and their RINO allies. Will you help me continue my fight for freedom with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59931059:JFnLl6oAN:m:1:3317145305:E27F0C41312BBB4ED58210847D2A8D20:r "I’m working overtime to impeach Joe Biden so we can restore America’s freedoms from the left’s disastrous control over our
lives, but this fight has made me a target by the left and their RINO allies. Will you help me continue my fight for freedom with your $25, $50, or
$100 donation today?")** The mask and vaccine mandates have never been about the science. Simply put, it's about controlling us. Just look at I have been fined nearly $100,000 by Nancy Pelosi for refusing to wear a mask, but Pelosi goes maskless to cocktail parties around town. By the way, Congress' own physician said masks weren't necessary last June. Their mandates have always been about taking your freedoms away and they're winning which is why we must double down on our fight. Biden isn't **[Join me with your donation of $50, $100 or $250 TODAY and let's keep working to impeach Joe Biden so we can save America from his tyranny!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59931059:JFnLl6oAN:m:1:3317145305:E27F0C41312BBB4ED58210847D2A8D20:r "Join me with your donation of $50, $100 or $250 TODAY and
let’s keep working to impeach Joe Biden so we can save America from his tyranny!")** Funny how after the Democrats got back disastrous polling results over their mask and vaccine mandates that suddenly the "science" changed. But that's how the Democrats work. They don't give one care about the truth, only what benefits them, and we won't tolerate their actions any longer. And that's why they're coming after me with a vengeance. They've banned me from Twitter. They kicked me off all Congressional committees. They saddled me with fines that cost more than what the average person makes in a year! **And no one seems to care that Joe Biden is letting his friends in China fund Russia 's war against Ukraine or that his sanctions haven't caused Putin to stop killing innocent women and children.** Unlike those cowards, I refuse to back down and get in line. So now they're unleashing millions to defeat me at the ballot box and that's why I need your help to ensure I end this quarter with a fundraising amount that will send Sleepy Joe to the fainting couch and cause Pelosi to binge eat more of her ice cream. **[We need to raise $52,321.82 by March 31 st. That will put me where I need to fight back against the Never-Trumpers and Leftist Loons gunning for my seat. I'm so close, but with your donation of $250, $500, or $1,000 today, that will help put me over the top.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59931059:JFnLl6oAN:m:1:3317145305:E27F0C41312BBB4ED58210847D2A8D20:r "We
need to raise $52,321.82 by March 31st. That will put me where I need to fight back against the Never-Trumpers and Leftist Loons gunning for my seat.
I’m so close, but with your donation of $250, $500, or $1,000 today, that will help put me over the top.")** Help me show Biden and his Oppressive Leftists Regime that citizens are taking this country back and we're going to impeach him in the process. Thank you. God Bless America.
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA) P.S. I'm facing a double dose of attacks both in the primary and general elections. **[I need your help to fight back against these RINOs and Leftists trying to unseat me with your $100, $250, or $500 donation today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59931059:JFnLl6oAN:m:1:3317145305:E27F0C41312BBB4ED58210847D2A8D20:r "I need your help to fight back against

disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Carrick Flynn for Oregon
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43315505/336684615/-203931063?refcode=fl_email_pt_202202xxwelcome1_CF_new_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTM2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODFmYzA2ZS03OGFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H_u79Ooh6OqYYzGkHcqz03xu2M-yEi97TjclCw99ksE=)
---
Friend, I’m Carrick Flynn, and I grew up in rural Oregon, where life was tough. I faced significant hardships including homelessness, a broken home, and poverty for most of my childhood. It shaped me into who I am. It motivated me to dedicate my life to fighting for the most vulnerable. **That’s why I’m running to represent Oregon’s 6th district in the U.S. House of Representatives.** [Friend, please join me on this journey by adding your name in support of my campaign for Oregon’s 6th Congressional District →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43315506/336684617/1797090043?refcode=fl_email_pt_202202xxwelcome1_CF_new_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTM2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODFmYzA2ZS03OGFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H_u79Ooh6OqYYzGkHcqz03xu2M-yEi97TjclCw99ksE=&emci=c56d7a0a-6584-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=281fc06e-78ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=11900688) | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43315508/336684618/1797090043?refcode=fl_email_pt_202202xxwelcome1_CF_new_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTM2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODFmYzA2ZS03OGFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H_u79Ooh6OqYYzGkHcqz03xu2M-yEi97TjclCw99ksE=&emci=c56d7a0a-6584-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=281fc06e-78ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=11900688)
---
I’ve spent most of my career focusing on economic development, both abroad and here in America, advising on legislation to bring thousands of good-paying, family-supporting jobs back to Oregon. I know firsthand how life-changing these jobs can be and what a difference they can make.
With the help of kind strangers, I went to college and eventually Yale Law School, which opened the door to a completely different life. I got that one in a thousand chance out of poverty, but that’s the problem. You should not have to get as lucky as I did in order to reach a basic level of security and stability. This should be available to _everyone._
We need more people in elected office who understand the kind of stress and strain insecurity and poverty has on a family—and what a good-paying middle-class job can mean.
We need representatives in Congress who understand what it’s like to live without a safety net. Representatives who know what it’s like to have a medical diagnosis financially bankrupt their family or know what it's like to experience homelessness after a disaster. I’ve experienced these things firsthand, and I know how it can change your life and how difficult or impossible it can be to come back from. That’s why I’m running for Congress.
If I’m elected, I promise to build a stronger and safer Oregon for all. I’ll fight to strengthen our economy so that more Oregonians have the opportunity to escape poverty the same way I did. I’ll fight to protect our environment because we all know our most vulnerable communities suffer the most when natural disasters strike. I’ll fight for all of us.
[I’m so glad you’re on this journey with me. Add your name in support of my campaign to build a better future for Oregon.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43315511/336684621/1797090043?refcode=fl_email_pt_202202xxwelcome1_CF_new_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTM2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODFmYzA2ZS03OGFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H_u79Ooh6OqYYzGkHcqz03xu2M-yEi97TjclCw99ksE=&emci=c56d7a0a-6584-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=281fc06e-78ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=11900688)
Thanks so much,
Carrick Flynn

clean_body: | = Friend, I’m Carrick Flynn, and I grew up in rural Oregon, where life was tough. I faced significant hardships including homelessness, a broken home, and poverty for most of my childhood. It shaped me into who I am. It motivated me to dedicate my life to fighting for the most vulnerable. That’s why I’m running to represent Oregon’s 6th district in the U.S. House of Representatives. | I’ve spent most of my career focusing on economic development, both abroad and here in America, advising on legislation to bring thousands of good-paying, family-supporting jobs back to Oregon. I know firsthand how life-changing these jobs can be and what a difference they can make. With the help of kind strangers, I went to college and eventually Yale Law School, which opened the door to a completely different life. I got that one in a thousand chance out of poverty, but that’s the problem. You should not have to get as lucky as I did in order to reach a basic level of security and stability. This should be available to everyone. We need more people in elected office who understand the kind of stress and strain insecurity and poverty has on a family—and what a good-paying middle-class job can mean. We need representatives in Congress who understand what it’s like to live without a safety net. Representatives who know what it’s like to have a medical diagnosis financially bankrupt their family or know what it's like to experience homelessness after a disaster. I’ve experienced these things firsthand, and I know how it can change your life and how difficult or impossible it can be to come back from. That’s why I’m running for Congress. If I’m elected, I promise to build a stronger and safer Oregon for all. I’ll fight to strengthen our economy so that more Oregonians have the opportunity to escape poverty the same way I did. I’ll fight to protect our environment because we all know our most vulnerable communities suffer the most when natural disasters strike. I’ll fight for all of us. Thanks so much, Carrick Flynn | Our campaign is powered by supporters like you. Can you give $25 or whatever you can right now to help us stay on track on our campaign costs? Chip in to Carrick’s campaign today. = | = | Paid for and authorized by Carrick Flynn for Oregon Carrick Flynn for Congress 2557 NE Chalmers Way McMinnville, OR 97128 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .
