name: Aramis Ayala
subject: Thanks for signing up! Our campaign for justice needs you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Aramis Ayala Democrat for Attorney General
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90869/images/AAyala-Logo-RGB-FINAL-OL.png]
Hi Peter,
You recently signed up to volunteer through Aramis Ayala’s website, and I couldn’t be more excited to welcome you. Our entire team recognizes the generosity of contributing your time and energy to the work of justice reform and the protections of our civil rights. Thank you.
In light of the legislative crisis in Florida right now, which has produced attacks on women’s reproductive rights, attempted silencing of LGBTQ+ people and their supporters, and the formation of “election police” who will serve as a form of voter intimidation- I knew it was my duty to stay and fight on the frontlines. My campaign for Attorney General will allow me to serve the people of Florida in a much more direct and powerful way during what I consider a state of emergency for human rights.
As Attorney General I can provide a wall between DeSantis’s assaults on civil rights, the environment, and the people.
I’ll be empowered to refuse to provide state defense for Ron Desantis’s unconstitutional attacks on human rights - making it possible for advocacy groups to fight bad policies in court. I can impose legal consequences for attempts to undermine the U.S. Constitution. I will be the chief enforcer of environmental protections in our state
We won’t have to wait for justice to come from DC. We can get the job done here and now.
Will you help me get the word out and build a powerful campaign capable of taking on our opposition? We have our first phone banking event this weekend, Saturday, March 26, and your help would be so valuable.
Our event will start with a brief training to ensure your experience is easy and comfortable. And then we’ll get to work! All you need is a phone, wifi, and a computer. Click below and we’ll get in touch with more details.
RSVP Here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/9UrZcRdTKE-iyiiKf8QqZw2]
Thank you so much for being part of our movement for justice! Let's keep Florida moving forward!
Onward,
Aramis
Aramis Ayala, Democrat, for Attorney General
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/484A484A35482F4A3376416C527A7662386F69447072796671626277502F4E4B36764A47703033584D64495055582F5146382B305157376F6D7A554C4173576A/editor_images/Screen%20Shot%202022-03-21%20at%209.01.00%20PM_1.png]
Aramis Ayala Democrat for Attorney General
P.O. Box 691581
Orlando, FL 32869
United States
Paid for by Aramis Ayala Democrat for Attorney General
Aramis Ayala is an award-winning advocate for justice reform and human rights. As Florida’s first Black State Attorney, she has devoted more than two decades to public service and building safer, healthier communities. Aramis’s unflinching commitment to justice earned national headlines when she went head-to-head against former governor Rick Scott to oppose the death penalty. She has successfully established innovative pre-trial diversion programs, published a historic Brady list of questionable police, advanced public transparency, and accountability of law enforcement, halted pre-trial deportations, and expanded support for survivors of domestic violence and human trafficking. Her work has won accolades from the Florida ACLU’s Campaign for Criminal Justice Reform, and the Southern Poverty Law Center. An educator, cancer survivor, and mother of two, Aramis is running for Attorney General of Florida to deliver a bold, forward-focused vision that restores public trust and guarantees an equitable future for all of us.

subject: Respectfully asking for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032422_B1_AC_30D [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032422_B1_AC_30D]
Hi Team – I know you’ve gotten a lot of fundraising emails from our team recently.
But believe me, we wouldn’t keep emailing if the stakes weren’t so high. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032422_B1_AC_30D]
In exactly one week we face our first quarterly deadline of the year, but right now our fundraising numbers just aren’t where they need to be. Can I count on you to rush $20 right now to help DASS hit our goal and continue to protect voting rights across the country? >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032422_B1_AC_30D]
CHIP IN NOW >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032422_B1_AC_30D]
Soon, our numbers will be made public, and you better believe our opponents at the RSLC will be poring over them for any sign of weakness.
With 27 Secretaries of State races across the country this November, we have our work cut out for us. But the RSLC is raking in enormous sums of cash from the far-right’s vast donor network.
Last year, they announced a record-breaking fundraising haul of over $33 MILLION – and who knows how much they’ll bring in this quarter! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032422_B1_AC_30D]
I spoke with Kim and the fundraising team, and if we can raise another $75,000 from grassroots donors like you before midnight on the 31st, we’ll be in a good spot to fight back against the RSLC and win in November.
Now, I know that doesn’t seem like a lot compared to what the RSLC is bringing in from mega-donors and extremist interest groups.
But when regular people commit to protecting our democracy by chiping in $10 or $20 at a time, we build a grassroots movement far more powerful than one propped up by blank checks. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032422_B1_AC_30D]
And with anti-democratic extremist candidates like Mark Finchem, Jody Hice, Kristina Karamo, and Tina Peters having a very real chance of winning this year, we can’t afford to sit out on the sidelines – the future of our democracy itself is on the line. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032422_B1_AC_30D]
So, now that you know the stakes and what we’re up against, I have a personal request: Will you rush $20 to help us hit our critical Q1 goal and elect Democratic Secretaries across the country? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032422_B1_AC_30D]
RUSH $5 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=5&refcode=EM_FR_032422_B1_AC_30D]
RUSH $20 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032422_B1_AC_30D]
RUSH $50 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=50&refcode=EM_FR_032422_B1_AC_30D]
RUSH $100 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=100&refcode=EM_FR_032422_B1_AC_30D]
ANOTHER AMOUNT >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?refcode=EM_FR_032422_B1_AC_30D&amount=100]
Thank you,
Jena Griswold
DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections.
Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=footer-button&amount=25]

subject: The U.S. government trusts our ENEMIES more than our soldiers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United American Patriots |
body:
What if one of our war heroes was convicted of 16 counts of murder after having evidence ignored, witnesses tampered with, and e
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zicos5rqmg1a9tm3jpf3mra05nkc6vuv2eq381qo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj60ob1cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tb4m5rm3cbkelpjeodnchrb9djhcdge2t3566r72t9me6p30pr2m3h39p33c8o6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup30pjgmapm0pti6hj30s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zosjq8a9qnvkmv6hr0hoj5uvd7reveei44a25fao_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj60ob1cph2bs)
---
Fellow patriot, What if one of our war heroes was convicted of 16 counts of murder after having evidence ignored, witnesses tampered with, and enemy combatants believed over our soldiers? _You’d be enraged, right? _ **Well...that is exactly what happened with Staff Sergeant Robert Bales. ** **Is _this_ how our Warriors should be treated?**
---
[**LET US KNOW NOW!**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2pajrgg0ih90lri5suj77460iooe2vn1u86l14g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj60ob1cph2bs)
---
Bales was serving overseas in Afghanistan when he conducted an airstrike he believed to be a preemptive strike against Taliban fighters. The Afghans claimed Bales killed 16 “civilians,” including women and children. Bales claimed he killed 20, including Taliban enemy combatants. Before charges were even brought forth, the U.S. government and military justice system operated with extreme bias - ignoring testimonies and failing to identify any victims. **Unfortunately, this barely scrapes the surface of the injustices committed by the Military Justice System in Staff Sergeant Bales’ case. Keep reading to find out more. ** Throughout the investigation and trial of Sergeant Bales, the U.S. government created four _major_ issues that they use to hide the truth.
1. **ENEMY COMBATANTS AS WITNESSES** : U.S. Army prosecutors used Taliban as witnesses during hearing to gain the death penalty and then flew 9 Afghans in to testify against Bales during sentencing. Despite the fact that the DNA from 5 had been found on IEDs used against Americans, the State Department worked to conceal the identities of these Taliban and placed them on Delta Airlines flights, among unaware U.S. civilians.
2. **COLLATERAL DAMAGE** : The outcome for Bales may have been very different had the U.S. Government conducted autopsies, forensics, or biometric assessments and confirmed that any of those Bales killed were actually enemy combatants. The alleged “civilians” Bales killed might then have been considered “collateral damage”.
3. **POLITICAL EXPEDIENCY** : The media’s coverage of Bales’ killings stoked Afghan anger toward the U.S.. A quick conviction was sought to facilitate President Obama getting President Karzai to sign the Strategic Partnership Agreement (SPA) between Afghanistan and America.
4. **MEFLOQUINE** : Bales was on orders from his superiors to take Mefloquine, a drug that causes behavioral issues, including suicidal and homicidal thoughts. The Army stopped administering Mefloquine after Bales’ incident, but the prosecution did not disclose that Bales was ordered to take Mefloquine. If Bales was laboring under the psychotic effects of Mefloquine poisoning, his “mens rea,” (mindset/intent for murder) is called into question and Bales might have been found not guilty due to diminished mental capacity and responsibility.

---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqlcn70u5c12so9i3pt692qqqa1mo06sn0vamfao_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj60ob1cph2bs)
---
**Do you think Staff Sergeant Bales was treated fairly?**
---
[**************TELL US HERE!**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlfrie5d9ka6kt15nlshnh15qlr9d51o0hleel58_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj60ob1cph2bs)
---
Tragically, Staff Sergeant Bales is only one of dozens of similar cases we here at United American Patriots are working to fix. **Our mission is simple:****_Defend our Defenders_****. ** As you are reading this email, some of America’s best and bravest Warriors are being heinously punished for war crimes they didn’t even commit. Now, they are fighting tooth and nail to clear their names. And Fellow patriot, if you’re like me, you think this is downright deplorable. That’s why I want to ask you: **[Is this the treatment our Warriors deserve?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkb4kqi16mpfnt235e25fggmght4oerfqa0msbt8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj60ob1cph2bs)**
---
[**WEIGH IN HERE**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm7m8mbm66mmch2ilbj3mn4m5ple9e3kuq8c078o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj60ob1cph2bs)
---
| | Semper Fi’
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlpadin94o7cf4vuhjf6khaof5qehu8vlo0jaj80_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj60ob1cph2bs)
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zshcnl42vnlkuasgenpbq26pinik3asjemhpbpm0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj60ob1cph2bs)
---
David “Bull” GurfeinLtCol., USMCR (Ret.) CEO, United American Patriots

name: Ron Johnson
subject: DECISION MADE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
| |
---
| | | Patriot,

This is a longer email than usual but for the past months, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.

I have been smeared again and again by media companies like The New York Times, Washington Post, and the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say.

I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech.

Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me.
And that is why I decided to run for re-election.

I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Patriot. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me.

Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can. The Democrats even placed a $2M ad buy just moments after I announced my campaign for re-election.

And that's why I need your help.

_**[Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.

Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59931544:6o6yE6oNf:m:1:3299561967:9E863EC273F779337F56437D698AC526:r "Any help you can provide will make an
enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will
take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.")**_

Ron Johnson

| Patriot, It's Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59931544:6o6yE6oNf:m:1:3299561967:9E863EC273F779337F56437D698AC526:r "Please click

clean_body: | | | | | Patriot, This is a longer email than usual but for the past months, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube. I have been smeared again and again by media companies like The New York Times, Washington Post, and the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say. I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech. Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me. And that is why I decided to run for re-election. I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Patriot. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me. Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can. The Democrats even placed a $2M ad buy just moments after I announced my campaign for re-election. And that's why I need your help. "Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now." name: Nikki Fried
subject: Look what happens when we step up
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,

On Tuesday night, I told you about the Florida Democratic Party’s plan to host the annual Leadership Blue Gala at Disney, even after Disney workers walked out to protest Disney’s tepid response to the “Don’t Say Gay” bill.

Then, just a few hours later, the Florida Democratic Party reversed course and announced they would change venues to show solidarity with the LGBTQ+ community.

You stepped up, Peter. Together with the LGBTQ+ community, we stood up for what was right, and we got results.

This just goes to show that when we step up and stand together, we can make real progress. And the same goes for the Governor’s race!

This year, we can beat the odds, prove the political insiders wrong, and bring something new to Florida. But we can only do that if we all step up and stand together. Can you stand with me and chip in $10 to support our grassroots movement? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?refcode=324disney2]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=324disney2] Express Donate $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=324disney2] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=324disney2] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=324disney2] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=324disney2] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?refcode=324disney2]

I’m so proud of this team, Peter. I’m so proud of everything we’ve achieved together. And I know that we can do so much more between now and November 8th.

Thank you for standing with me.

— Nikki

name: Chief Val Demings
subject: my 27 years of dedicated service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I took an oath to protect and serve

---
| | Friend: This is an especially important message about my 27 years of dedicated service as a police officer. As Marco Rubio launches desperate attacks on my law enforcement career, I hope you'll read this to the end.
---
I entered the police academy because I loved my community and wanted to protect it from harm. After graduating at the top of my class, I woke up and put on my uniform every day, ready to risk my life because _ _ I took an oath to protect and serve the people of Florida.
**While I was working the midnight shift, Marco Rubio was plotting his trajectory as a career politician. **I’ll put my record up against his any day – but the problem is, Rubio has the powerful influence of the GOP dark-money machine on his side.
As national Republicans spend millions of dollars on attack ads that question my loyalty to the men and women in law enforcement, I need your help today to set the record straight: [**Will you donate $5 or more to help me reach more voters and flip Florida blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43321568/336704308/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk2725-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDRlMzY5NC03ZmFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QcJro4FsnlXOX-nGh3vkRc_vqdn_tIVWC_AhjdPBV4I=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43321569/336704309/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2725-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDRlMzY5NC03ZmFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QcJro4FsnlXOX-nGh3vkRc_vqdn_tIVWC_AhjdPBV4I=)
Back in 1983, **I was one of only three women in my police academy class**. But after years of hard work and dedication, I rose to the top of the department and became the first woman to serve as Orlando's chief of police.
My story doesn't stop there. When I was appointed chief of police, Orlando was in crisis. The murder rate was at an all-time high, but I brought the department together and built relationships within the community. Standing with the brave men and women of the Orlando Police Department, we reduced violent crime by 40%.
To protect the city of Orlando, it took long, sleepless nights. And if I'm elected to the Senate, I'm ready to spend long nights protecting our right to vote, reproductive rights, access to health care and so much more.
I'll never stop fighting to protect and serve. If you're with me, please donate $5 or whatever you can right now to flip Florida blue.

Here's the best link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43321570/336704310/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2725-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDRlMzY5NC03ZmFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QcJro4FsnlXOX-nGh3vkRc_vqdn_tIVWC_AhjdPBV4I=)**
From the bottom of my heart, thank you for joining this grassroots movement.

Val Demings
| | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, **[click here if you’re on mobile](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43321571/336704311/1417698435?refcode=jtk2725-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDRlMzY5NC03ZmFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QcJro4FsnlXOX-nGh3vkRc_vqdn_tIVWC_AhjdPBV4I=&emci=43c8e9b0-acaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=944e3694-7fab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100) or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates.**

# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device

Dangerous Blackout

If last year taught us anything...
It's not IF you need a backup plan... it's **WHEN.**
It's sad, but facts are facts...
A deadly pandemic, blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids.
**Crisis mode has become the new normal.**
And you see the need to protect yourself and your family.
Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._
One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're fully ready, even when the power goes out.
Nothing feels more vulnerable than when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout.
Imagine all your critical devices, communications, comfort and protection, suddenly on borrowed time.
That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS.
**You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget.**
Well now you can...
Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device...
That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run.
But if you want one, you better hurry...
Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market.
And now that the first batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long.
You're among the first to know about...

# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=150349&L=81741&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI1LmNvbS9jbGljaz90cnZpZD0xMjQxMyZBRklEPTEwOTUmYWZmX3N1Yj0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMzIyLXMwMDNjMDAzLUJ1bmRsZTEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVBQUy0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMzIyLXMwMDNjMDAzLUJ1bmRsZTE=)

_Craig W.
Police Officer_
Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more!
You'll also be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets...
**And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.**
You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot.
So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes.
* $190 in FREE Bonuses
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you:
[**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=150349&L=81741&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI1LmNvbS9jbGljaz90cnZpZD0xMjQxMyZBRklEPTEwOTUmYWZmX3N1Yj0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMzIyLXMwMDNjMDAzLUJ1bmRsZTEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVBQUy0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMzIyLXMwMDNjMDAzLUJ1bmRsZTE=)

name: EEE
subject: The "Lindsey Graham" on your school board
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Educators Everywhere PAC
body:
Educators and Allies,

The way Lindsey Graham attacked, interrupted, and disrespected Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson was indefensible.

His misguided fury, unwillingness to understand reality, and inability to control his own emotions reminds us of what we've seen from some of the worst School Board protestors over the last couple of years.

Public debate and civic engagement are wonderful American traditions, but today, too many school board members are subject to harassment, intimidation, and threats of physical violence, just for doing their jobs.

We can't afford 10,000 Lindsey Grahams on local school boards all over America, so we're helping selfless educators win instead.

Let's be honest - none of us can make Lindsey Graham treat people more kindly, or take the privilege of public service more seriously. But we can support local candidates who do treat people respectfully, and are focused on doing right by students and educators.

Sadly, we know there are a conspiracy theory-fueled extremists who are inspired by Lindsey Graham, and are planning to do something similar to their local school board members. And we also know there are committed educators who will run for the school board because their dedication to students outweighs their fear of being attacked and threatened.

The question for all of us is simple - who's side are we on?

Donate here to help >>>> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eee-sb

Thanks for your support,
Elect Educators Everywhere

Elect Educators Everywhere is designed to help elect teachers, school counselors, college faculty, and all types of public educators to office from coast to coast. With your help, we can ensure that educators have a seat at the table when it comes to making policy decisions in this country.
Give Now ➞ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eee-sb]

https://www.facebook.com/ElectEducatorsEverywhere/ [https://www.facebook.com/ElectEducatorsEverywhere/] https://twitter.com/electeducators [https://twitter.com/electeducators] https://www.instagram.com/electeducatorseverywhere/ [https://www.instagram.com/electeducatorseverywhere/]

Paid for by Elect Educators Everywhere PAC

Contributions or gifts to Elect Educators Everywhere are not tax deductible. Your contribution will be deposited in Elect Educators Everywhere’s Contribution Account. Individuals and Federal PACs may contribute $5,000 per calendar year to Elect Educators Everywhere’s Contribution Account. Corporations, labor organizations, and other federally prohibited sources may not contribute to Elect Educators Everywhere’s Contribution Account.

Here’s Jackson’s Record on Sex Offenders and Other Criminals" | "Poll: Americans Want More Domestic Energy Production" | "The Ruling Class’s Response To Inflation Tells You It’s Only Going To Get Worse" | "It Takes a Village of Bureaucrats to Implement Despotism" | "VIDEO: The Renewable Energy Fail" | "THE DAILY NEWS ROUNDUP" | "PETER SCHWEIZER: Red Handed: How American Elites Get Rich Helping China Win" | "MIRANDA DEVINE: Laptop from Hell: Hunter Biden, Big Tech, and the Dirty Secrets the President Tried to Hide" | "MOLLY HEMINGWAY: Rigged: How the Media, Big Tech, and the Democrats Seized Our Elections" | "ALEX BERENSON: Pandemia: How Coronavirus Hysteria Took Over Our Government, Rights, and Lives" | "VICTOR DAVIS HANSON: The Dying Citizen" | "MARK LEVIN: American Marxism" | Dear Reader - Thank you for opening this email. We at The Prickly Pear () hope you find this site informative and helpful to you in the search for accurate and fact-based news and citizen opinion. We are growing rapidly and suggest bookmarking and reading new and timely content each day reflecting our mission to “inform, educate and advocate about the principles of limited government and personal liberty”. Regards, | |

name: TammyDuckworth.com
subject: If you knew this little girl would grow up to be a U.S. Senator, wouldn't you contribute to show your support?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Growing up, this little girl learned that through hard work, she could break barriers and achieve anything she set her mind to.
| | |
---
Growing up, this little girl learned that through hard work, she could break barriers and achieve anything she set her mind to.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43325777/336714347/-653173868?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk774-bu-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzEwOWZjOC04M2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dygbul7OK1T1Bt17Ya-42-UFDCydwTQriWI6RLR3myE=)
So after becoming a commissioned officer in the U.S. Military, she learned to fly a helicopter and became one of the first handful of women to fly combat missions in Operation Iraqi Freedom.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43325778/336714348/-653173868?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk774-bu-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzEwOWZjOC04M2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dygbul7OK1T1Bt17Ya-42-UFDCydwTQriWI6RLR3myE=)
Then her Blackhawk was shot down over Iraq, costing her both legs and partial use of her right arm. She spent a long, painful year in Walter Reed Hospital undergoing surgeries and intensive physical therapy to relearn how to walk on her new prosthetic legs.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43325779/336714349/-653173868?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk774-bu-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzEwOWZjOC04M2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dygbul7OK1T1Bt17Ya-42-UFDCydwTQriWI6RLR3myE=)
But Tammy is a fighter, so she turned these experiences into an opportunity to become a champion for Veterans. She ran for Congress and eventually won a seat in the U.S. Senate, where she is still breaking barriers. In 2018, she became the first sitting Senator to give birth and bring a baby onto the Senate floor so she could care for her child and do her job at the same time.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43325780/336714350/-653173868?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk774-bu-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzEwOWZjOC04M2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dygbul7OK1T1Bt17Ya-42-UFDCydwTQriWI6RLR3myE=)
Tammy has overcome so many obstacles and continues to be a fierce advocate for our troops, Veterans and military families in Washington. But Tammy is facing a tough re-election battle and needs your help to stay in the Senate. So please:
**[Can you split a contribution today between Senator Tammy Duckworth and Senator Maggie Hassan so they can continue this important work? We are asking for $5, but any amount you can give will go a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43325781/336714351/-653173868?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk774-bu-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzEwOWZjOC04M2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dygbul7OK1T1Bt17Ya-42-UFDCydwTQriWI6RLR3myE=)**
Thank you for being on our team.

All our best,
Team Duckworth

clean_body: Growing up, this little girl learned that through hard work, she could break barriers and achieve anything she set her mind to. | | | Growing up, this little girl learned that through hard work, she could break barriers and achieve anything she set her mind to. = So after becoming a commissioned officer in the U.S. Military, she learned to fly a helicopter and became one of the first handful of women to fly combat missions in Operation Iraqi Freedom. = Then her Blackhawk was shot down over Iraq, costing her both legs and partial use of her right arm. She spent a long, painful year in Walter Reed Hospital undergoing surgeries and intensive physical therapy to relearn how to walk on her new prosthetic legs. = But Tammy is a fighter, so she turned these experiences into an opportunity to become a champion for Veterans. She ran for Congress and eventually won a seat in the U.S. Senate, where she is still breaking barriers. In 2018, she became the first sitting Senator to give birth and bring a baby onto the Senate floor so she could care for her child and do her job at the same time. = Tammy has overcome so many obstacles and continues to be a fierce advocate for our troops, Veterans and military families in Washington. But Tammy is facing a tough re-election battle and needs your help to stay in the Senate. So please: = Thank you for being on our team. All our best, Team Duckworth | | = | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. name: Jane Doe [REDACTED]
subject: I’m keeping my real name a secret...Here’s why.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
Radical leftists are targeting my children.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn2vq5omh24qkbr9uc0om6lc81p5qb1v32lsbvg8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj62or3cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfecbkm5h70sr0s5g78cpm6iq64oj0eupj0pr2map7cdljcopr8sbk6lj63c3lm3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8o6cs5imdh6fcjmcoo71cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
You and I haven’t met. And I can’t even share with you my real name today...
But I’m praying that my story will touch your heart and inspire you to help me save my children.
Before I go on, let me explain why I have to keep my name a secret:
**_I’m keeping my name secret because I’m afraid radical leftists in my children’s school will send Child Protective Services back to my house if they find out I’m asking for your help to replace them._**
I love my children more than anything in this world. I’m a good mother and I have always done everything in my power to give my kids the best life possible.
That’s why I started working with an organization whose mission is to find, remove, and replace the radical leftist psychopaths who’ve hidden themselves deep inside our nation’s schools.
**[And that’s why I hope you’ll join me in supporting them with a donation of $25 or more today.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1ij817rebh0h2bls4fa52nuksgtlqiob4m8n73g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj62or3cph2bs)**
Let me take a step back and tell you a little about my story.
Recently, I found out that teachers at my children’s school groomed my daughter to believe that she’s actually a “bisexual” boy.
They convinced her that she couldn’t trust me...
They changed her gender on all official school documentation...
They demanded that I begin referring to my daughter as “he” and use the new “boy” name that they helped her pick out...
All the while, they were making sure that my daughter never told me about any of these changes.
They instructed her to lie to me to give themselves more time to sink their disgusting lies into my daughter’s impressionable mind.
What’s worse is that the people I had trusted to teach my daughter math and science lied to my face about what they were REALLY teaching her.
When I discovered all of this, I was understandably upset.
So, I spoke at my local school board meeting and begged them to make sure this didn’t happen to anyone else.
My pleas fell on deaf ears, and unbeknownst to me, put a massive target on my back.
It wasn’t long before Child Protective Services showed up at my front door to determine whether my children needed to be removed from my home.
But the scariest part about this is that over the last few months, stories just like mine have started popping up ALL OVER the country.
Thousands of parents have discovered that their children are being fed disgusting left-wing propaganda, or worse.... They’re being groomed like my daughter was.
The only way we can put an end to this is by tracking down these leftists on our local school boards and send them packing.
**[The organization I’m working with has a plan to do that... I hope that you’ll chip in $25 or more to help them carry out their plan to find and remove radical leftists from our schools.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd096gp6hditqt70ln71ijut6bms8irv9pde6qj0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj62or3cph2bs)**
You might assume that this vile indoctrination is only happening in places like Portland, San Francisco, or other super-liberal cities....
...But you’d be wrong.
Whether your hometown is red, blue, or purple, there’s a strong chance that this is happening RIGHT under your nose to your children or grandchildren.
_**That’s why I’m standing up. This isn’t just about my kids. This is about the future of our country.**_
Right now, the 1776 Project PAC is mounting the largest conservative school board takeover effort in American history, and they **[DESPERATELY need your support to ensure that they’re successful.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq771hmm02it3q8896157d5n673r4d1nkjblh30o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj62or3cph2bs)**
You see, for the last 40 years, leftist billionaires have been funneling astonishing amounts of money into local government (school board) races to make sure that even the most conservative communities are represented by transgender-pushing, CRT-shoveling, socialist activists.
More specifically, they’ve flooded our school boards with INSANE leftist activists all over the country.
School board members get to decide what curriculum is taught in schools....
They decide who the superintendent is....
They choose principals, teachers, and administrative staff...
Once a school board has been infiltrated by radical leftists, they basically have unlimited power to teach your kids WHATEVER they want.
But grooming children and lying to parents isn’t all that they do...
It’s a proven fact that schools in EVERY STATE teach vile anti-American propaganda to our kids.
They teach our kids that America is deeply racist, evil, and must be destroyed and rebuilt.
That white people are all evil oppressors.
And that all people of color are oppressed and helpless.

After learning that what happened to my daughter was actually happening all over the country, I felt defeated, helpless and abandoned.
But one evening I was watching _**Tucker Carlson Tonight. **_He was hosting Ryan Girdusky to talk about the best way to change your community's school.

Girdusky also explained that his PAC, the 1776 Project PAC was an organization that helped sane, America-loving citizens like you and replace leftist activists on school boards across America, I thought this could be the answer to my prayers.

He explained that he has a plan to take back our schools, district by district and town by town with the help of ordinary American just like you and I.
**[Tucker even said: “If you’re thinking of writing a check, you should think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky.” (Ryan is the founder of the 1776 Project PAC)](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2za1irbjhum9551hvgjii32i6av5fl453cqbif12o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj62or3cph2bs)**
When I first found out that my daughter had been abused like this, I was dumbstruck and heartbroken.
And it only got worse when I found out that my little girl wasn’t the only one impacted by these radicals.
But hearing about Ryan Girdusky and the 1776 Project PAC was an unexpected ray of hope to me.
After Tucker suggested supporting 1776 Project PAC, I found out that Ryan’s team at the 1776 Project PAC has been wildly successful.
They’ve won nearly 75% of the races they’ve ever been involved in, **and they have the most campaign wins per dollar raised than any other Political Action Committee in the country!**
The left wing may have their leftist billionaires... But Ryan’s team can win a school board for $3,000!
After learning all this, I wanted to know how I could help. So I reached out to 1776 Project PAC.
They told me that the biggest way I could help was by sharing my story and asking fellow patriots like you to contribute what you can.

**[Please click here to donate to the 1776 Project PAC today... Before your children or grandchildren get wrapped up in one of these leftist schemes.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8g2oehdm039mddh8r2ipveh26nrp8p9sk24r28g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj62or3cph2bs)**
I’m not normally someone who is comfortable with asking for money or speaking out about political issues....
But the plain and simple of this whole story is that children are being abused and brainwashed by teachers nationwide, and we don’t have a choice but to put an end to it.
I don’t want this to happen to my child again, and I certainly don’t want it to happen to your children and grandchildren.
**[But we don’t have any time to waste. Because of local election rules, 1776 Project PAC is working on races as early as May, 7th this year. That’s why I hope you’ll send in a donation of $25 IMMEDIATELY to the 1776 Project PAC.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znvnetplmh2en7f5ff3j1mdjjgbkq740vitjlnq0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj62or3cph2bs)**
If you’ve read this far, I cannot thank you enough for hearing me out. Even though you don’t know my name, I’m glad you’ve heard my story.
With your action today, you’ll not only answer the prayers of desperate parents like me, but also ensure we restore sanity in our nation’s schools.
Sincerely,
Jane Doe
P.S. I know you don’t know me and you don’t even know my real name.
So if you don’t want to take my word for it, I hope you’ll trust the endorsements of the 1776 Project PAC from conservatives like Tucker Carlson, Donald Trump Jr., and Laura Ingraham.
They all recognize that we must do something RIGHT NOW if we hope to ensure the next generation of Americans are not completely brainwashed by these radical leftists.
**Laura Ingraham:** "For all the parents out there looking to reclaim your local school boards from radical leftists, help is on the way from a new political action committee called the _**1776 Project.”**_
**Donald Trump Jr.:** “The 1776 Project PAC is the very first Political Action Committee of its kind -- specifically created to take local school boards out of the hands of these America-hating, radical liberals... **Because the truth is, the 1776 Project PAC is doing what the politicians on Capitol Hill can't and won't."**
They’re stepping up to the plate, going state to state, and making education SANE again.”
So please, if you don’t want to see your children or grandchildren brainwashed to hate America, I hope you’ll consider making a donation of $25 or more to the 1776 Project PAC today.
**[DONATE](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0efh4jfjt6topvb8poh9rl1c1449uluhj5ck9dg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj62or3cph2bs)**

\----------------

[**Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpljd3u79cv3fbpbokafasb8nbbi98kcdl8f0mr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj62or3cph2bs)

_— Begin Forwarded Message —_

Folks,

I won my 2020 election by the smallest margin of any Congressional Democrat and thanks to you, we were able to keep our House majority. But with our new district map, I need your help more than ever.

We’ve been able to achieve so much with that narrow majority in Congress – the fastest job growth in American history, a historic decline in poverty, lower health care costs, and the biggest investment in modernizing America’s infrastructure in decades. Meanwhile, the Republicans are running with no governing agenda, while calling the violence of January 6th “legitimate discourse.” The contrast, and stakes, could not be more clear.

**To stay on track, we have to win tough races like mine. Everything we raise before our first FEC deadline of 2022 at the end of the month will help us go head to head with our likely opponent, Tom Kean Jr., for a second time and it will help us combat these constant attack ads from the GOP.**

Our margin in the House to continue passing progressive legislation is so narrow — and the GOP campaign to take back my seat continues to grow stronger, especially with this new district map. They’ve already spent millions of dollars on attack ads against me and it won’t stop there. Tom Kean Jr. — the same opponent who came within 5,000 votes of winning in 2020 — is back for a rematch and the most recent polls show us in a dead heat!

**That’s why all eyes are going to be on our fundraising numbers after this FEC deadline. Everything we raise is going to go public, and will be seen as a sign of whether we’re on track to win in November!**

The choice this year is clear: between the party of infrastructure and the party of insurrection; between those focused on creating jobs and those hell-bent on creating chaos. I look forward to running with a party that welcomes patriotic Americans of differing policy views while always putting our country first.

But to get that message out and defend our seat, I’ll be counting on you. I would be immensely grateful for your support in building a strong grassroots campaign that will win again in New Jersey’s Seventh District. Did you see this email from Tom? = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = — Begin Forwarded Message — Folks, I won my 2020 election by the smallest margin of any Congressional Democrat and thanks to you, we were able to keep our House majority. We’ve been able to achieve so much with that narrow majority in Congress – the fastest job growth in American history, a historic decline in poverty, lower health care costs, and the biggest investment in modernizing America’s infrastructure in decades. Meanwhile, the Republicans are running with no governing agenda, while calling the violence of January 6th “legitimate discourse.” The contrast, and stakes, could not be more clear. To stay on track, we have to win tough races like mine. Everything we raise before our first FEC deadline of 2022 at the end of the month will help us go head to head with our likely opponent, Tom Kean Jr., for a second time and it will help us combat these constant attack ads from the GOP. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = Our margin in the House to continue passing progressive legislation is so narrow — and the GOP campaign to take back my seat continues to grow stronger, especially with this new district map. They’ve already spent millions of dollars on attack ads against me and it won’t stop there. Tom Kean Jr. — the same opponent who came within 5,000 votes of winning in 2020 — is back for a rematch and the most recent polls show us in a dead heat! That’s why all eyes are going to be on our fundraising numbers after this FEC deadline. Everything we raise is going to go public, and will be seen as a sign of whether we’re on track to win in November! The choice this year is clear: between the party of infrastructure and the party of insurrection; between those focused on creating jobs and those hell-bent on creating chaos. I look forward to running with a party that welcomes patriotic Americans of differing policy views while always putting our country first. But to get that message out and defend our seat, I’ll be counting on you. subject: I’m keeping my real name a secret...Here’s why.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
Radical leftists are targeting my children.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztfuqnp3boucpi82alspu6k123o56ijmkm4jt3t8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj66pj7cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf2s35ctg78tdhc6qjeo76mhge6tr1egpj2d5nm6oras31mhj6ct9nmdqjbdlkeurt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8o6cs5imdhm0slncooj1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
You and I haven’t met. And I can’t even share with you my real name today...
But I’m praying that my story will touch your heart and inspire you to help me save my children.
Before I go on, let me explain why I have to keep my name a secret:
**_I’m keeping my name secret because I’m afraid radical leftists in my children’s school will send Child Protective Services back to my house if they find out I’m asking for your help to replace them._**
I love my children more than anything in this world. I’m a good mother and I have always done everything in my power to give my kids the best life possible.
That’s why I started working with an organization whose mission is to find, remove, and replace the radical leftist psychopaths who’ve hidden themselves deep inside our nation’s schools.
**[And that’s why I hope you’ll join me in supporting them with a donation of $25 or more today.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvrm5pje5st3mgp5ouvfqmqu4f06qvkrbru9nc7o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj66pj7cdh2bs)**
Let me take a step back and tell you a little about my story.
Recently, I found out that teachers at my children’s school groomed my daughter to believe that she’s actually a “bisexual” boy.
They convinced her that she couldn’t trust me...
They changed her gender on all official school documentation...
They demanded that I begin referring to my daughter as “he” and use the new “boy” name that they helped her pick out...
All the while, they were making sure that my daughter never told me about any of these changes.
They instructed her to lie to me to give themselves more time to sink their disgusting lies into my daughter’s impressionable mind.
What’s worse is that the people I had trusted to teach my daughter math and science lied to my face about what they were REALLY teaching her.
When I discovered all of this, I was understandably upset.
So, I spoke at my local school board meeting and begged them to make sure this didn’t happen to anyone else.
My pleas fell on deaf ears, and unbeknownst to me, put a massive target on my back.
It wasn’t long before Child Protective Services showed up at my front door to determine whether my children needed to be removed from my home.
But the scariest part about this is that over the last few months, stories just like mine have started popping up ALL OVER the country.
Thousands of parents have discovered that their children are being fed disgusting left-wing propaganda, or worse.... They’re being groomed like my daughter was.
The only way we can put an end to this is by tracking down these leftists on our local school boards and send them packing.
**[The organization I’m working with has a plan to do that... I hope that you’ll chip in $25 or more to help them carry out their plan to find and remove radical leftists from our schools.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgi0f7qm7sjfsv18dih7bgvpdq1hn984oh8cmmro_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj66pj7cdh2bs)**
You might assume that this vile indoctrination is only happening in places like Portland, San Francisco, or other super-liberal cities....
...But you’d be wrong.
Whether your hometown is red, blue, or purple, there’s a strong chance that this is happening RIGHT under your nose to your children or grandchildren.
_**That’s why I’m standing up. This isn’t just about my kids. This is about the future of our country.**_
Right now, the 1776 Project PAC is mounting the largest conservative school board takeover effort in American history, and they **[DESPERATELY need your support to ensure that they’re successful.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z882dagva4082ndh15ev56v2fdh6jsgpktcaifag_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj66pj7cdh2bs)**
You see, for the last 40 years, leftist billionaires have been funneling astonishing amounts of money into local government (school board) races to make sure that even the most conservative communities are represented by transgender-pushing, CRT-shoveling, socialist activists.
More specifically, they’ve flooded our school boards with INSANE leftist activists all over the country.
School board members get to decide what curriculum is taught in schools....
They decide who the superintendent is....
They choose principals, teachers, and administrative staff...
Once a school board has been infiltrated by radical leftists, they basically have unlimited power to teach your kids WHATEVER they want.
But grooming children and lying to parents isn’t all that they do...
It’s a proven fact that schools in EVERY STATE teach vile anti-American propaganda to our kids.
They teach our kids that America is deeply racist, evil, and must be destroyed and rebuilt.
That white people are all evil oppressors.
And that all people of color are oppressed and helpless.

After learning that what happened to my daughter was actually happening all over the country, I felt defeated, helpless and abandoned.
But one evening I was watching _**Tucker Carlson Tonight. **_He was hosting Ryan Girdusky to talk about the best way to change your community's school.

Girdusky also explained that his PAC, the 1776 Project PAC was an organization that helped sane, America-loving citizens like you and replace leftist activists on school boards across America, I thought this could be the answer to my prayers.

He explained that he has a plan to take back our schools, district by district and town by town with the help of ordinary American just like you and I.
**[Tucker even said: “If you’re thinking of writing a check, you should think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky.” (Ryan is the founder of the 1776 Project PAC)](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1usbtfpot32apfr54fv7pqsk9l9vpr8qsu2iifg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj66pj7cdh2bs)**
When I first found out that my daughter had been abused like this, I was dumbstruck and heartbroken.
And it only got worse when I found out that my little girl wasn’t the only one impacted by these radicals.
But hearing about Ryan Girdusky and the 1776 Project PAC was an unexpected ray of hope to me.
After Tucker suggested supporting 1776 Project PAC, I found out that Ryan’s team at the 1776 Project PAC has been wildly successful.
They’ve won nearly 75% of the races they’ve ever been involved in, **and they have the most campaign wins per dollar raised than any other Political Action Committee in the country!**
The left wing may have their leftist billionaires... But Ryan’s team can win a school board for $3,000!
After learning all this, I wanted to know how I could help. So I reached out to 1776 Project PAC.
They told me that the biggest way I could help was by sharing my story and asking fellow patriots like you to contribute what you can.

**[Please click here to donate to the 1776 Project PAC today... Before your children or grandchildren get wrapped up in one of these leftist schemes.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpp3aujo497hqg9d8n2iqggs8nklll9qs8qbo2pg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj66pj7cdh2bs)**
I’m not normally someone who is comfortable with asking for money or speaking out about political issues....
But the plain and simple of this whole story is that children are being abused and brainwashed by teachers nationwide, and we don’t have a choice but to put an end to it.
I don’t want this to happen to my child again, and I certainly don’t want it to happen to your children and grandchildren.
**[But we don’t have any time to waste. Because of local election rules, 1776 Project PAC is working on races as early as May, 7th this year. That’s why I hope you’ll send in a donation of $25 IMMEDIATELY to the 1776 Project PAC.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqjq0urros6jj84715l96ige17j5fr0fpd0cdsog_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj66pj7cdh2bs)**
If you’ve read this far, I cannot thank you enough for hearing me out. Even though you don’t know my name, I’m glad you’ve heard my story.
With your action today, you’ll not only answer the prayers of desperate parents like me, but also ensure we restore sanity in our nation’s schools.
Sincerely,
Jane Doe
P.S. I know you don’t know me and you don’t even know my real name.
So if you don’t want to take my word for it, I hope you’ll trust the endorsements of the 1776 Project PAC from conservatives like Tucker Carlson, Donald Trump Jr., and Laura Ingraham.
They all recognize that we must do something RIGHT NOW if we hope to ensure the next generation of Americans are not completely brainwashed by these radical leftists.
**Laura Ingraham:** "For all the parents out there looking to reclaim your local school boards from radical leftists, help is on the way from a new political action committee called the _**1776 Project.”**_
**Donald Trump Jr.:** “The 1776 Project PAC is the very first Political Action Committee of its kind -- specifically created to take local school boards out of the hands of these America-hating, radical liberals... **Because the truth is, the 1776 Project PAC is doing what the politicians on Capitol Hill can't and won't."**
They’re stepping up to the plate, going state to state, and making education SANE again.”
So please, if you don’t want to see your children or grandchildren brainwashed to hate America, I hope you’ll consider making a donation of $25 or more to the 1776 Project PAC today.
**[DONATE](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9t1k0hmvhne7a98bhlaigolaieqce3q0cdqsrv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj66pj7cdh2bs)**

\----------------

[**Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zj0m661e6q31iseamkgcmjfqqjinaq2hnfd95928_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj66pj7cdh2bs)

name: Jane Doe [REDACTED]
subject: I’m keeping my real name a secret...Here’s why.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
Radical leftists are targeting my children.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zetfhchqal6c2fb1am4orcjtv693363u1bkhl6kg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj6ao72clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tjnm1rr8sjlesor2o3hesq3asb1e2rbcd9j62q3ap3gehg76cr3mljb6c3lc5o6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3appl63g75db66pgb6p1nm2qmash5u)
You and I haven’t met. And I can’t even share with you my real name today...
But I’m praying that my story will touch your heart and inspire you to help me save my children.
Before I go on, let me explain why I have to keep my name a secret:
**_I’m keeping my name secret because I’m afraid radical leftists in my children’s school will send Child Protective Services back to my house if they find out I’m asking for your help to replace them._**
I love my children more than anything in this world. I’m a good mother and I have always done everything in my power to give my kids the best life possible.
That’s why I started working with an organization whose mission is to find, remove, and replace the radical leftist psychopaths who’ve hidden themselves deep inside our nation’s schools.
**[And that’s why I hope you’ll join me in supporting them with a donation of $25 or more today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhvpimbjje1ndii4j6m3k9fesnov5mr9jsp0pk40_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj6ao72clh2bs)**
Let me take a step back and tell you a little about my story.
Recently, I found out that teachers at my children’s school groomed my daughter to believe that she’s actually a “bisexual” boy.
They convinced her that she couldn’t trust me...
They changed her gender on all official school documentation...
They demanded that I begin referring to my daughter as “he” and use the new “boy” name that they helped her pick out...
All the while, they were making sure that my daughter never told me about any of these changes.
They instructed her to lie to me to give themselves more time to sink their disgusting lies into my daughter’s impressionable mind.
What’s worse is that the people I had trusted to teach my daughter math and science lied to my face about what they were REALLY teaching her.
When I discovered all of this, I was understandably upset.
So, I spoke at my local school board meeting and begged them to make sure this didn’t happen to anyone else.
My pleas fell on deaf ears, and unbeknownst to me, put a massive target on my back.
It wasn’t long before Child Protective Services showed up at my front door to determine whether my children needed to be removed from my home.
But the scariest part about this is that over the last few months, stories just like mine have started popping up ALL OVER the country.
Thousands of parents have discovered that their children are being fed disgusting left-wing propaganda, or worse.... They’re being groomed like my daughter was.
The only way we can put an end to this is by tracking down these leftists on our local school boards and send them packing.
**[The organization I’m working with has a plan to do that... I hope that you’ll chip in $25 or more to help them carry out their plan to find and remove radical leftists from our schools.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjjlv1qa77vv00uhph9779ntok8t6nspouoiosfo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj6ao72clh2bs)**
You might assume that this vile indoctrination is only happening in places like Portland, San Francisco, or other super-liberal cities....
...But you’d be wrong.
Whether your hometown is red, blue, or purple, there’s a strong chance that this is happening RIGHT under your nose to your children or grandchildren.
_**That’s why I’m standing up. This isn’t just about my kids. This is about the future of our country.**_
Right now, the 1776 Project PAC is mounting the largest conservative school board takeover effort in American history, and they **[DESPERATELY need your support to ensure that they’re successful.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpko9urutm0uh0eppjtn0ctk4obkb48p8gjl96bo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj6ao72clh2bs)**
You see, for the last 40 years, leftist billionaires have been funneling astonishing amounts of money into local government (school board) races to make sure that even the most conservative communities are represented by transgender-pushing, CRT-shoveling, socialist activists.
More specifically, they’ve flooded our school boards with INSANE leftist activists all over the country.
School board members get to decide what curriculum is taught in schools....
They decide who the superintendent is....
They choose principals, teachers, and administrative staff...
Once a school board has been infiltrated by radical leftists, they basically have unlimited power to teach your kids WHATEVER they want.
But grooming children and lying to parents isn’t all that they do...
It’s a proven fact that schools in EVERY STATE teach vile anti-American propaganda to our kids.
They teach our kids that America is deeply racist, evil, and must be destroyed and rebuilt.
That white people are all evil oppressors.
And that all people of color are oppressed and helpless.

After learning that what happened to my daughter was actually happening all over the country, I felt defeated, helpless and abandoned.
But one evening I was watching _**Tucker Carlson Tonight. **_He was hosting Ryan Girdusky to talk about the best way to change your community's school.

Girdusky also explained that his PAC, the 1776 Project PAC was an organization that helped sane, America-loving citizens like you and replace leftist activists on school boards across America, I thought this could be the answer to my prayers.

He explained that he has a plan to take back our schools, district by district and town by town with the help of ordinary American just like you and I.
**[Tucker even said: “If you’re thinking of writing a check, you should think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky.” (Ryan is the founder of the 1776 Project PAC)](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z57i47uem15ibs35suph1ch8brn7jggo90j17i1g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj6ao72clh2bs)**
When I first found out that my daughter had been abused like this, I was dumbstruck and heartbroken.
And it only got worse when I found out that my little girl wasn’t the only one impacted by these radicals.
But hearing about Ryan Girdusky and the 1776 Project PAC was an unexpected ray of hope to me.
After Tucker suggested supporting 1776 Project PAC, I found out that Ryan’s team at the 1776 Project PAC has been wildly successful.
They’ve won nearly 75% of the races they’ve ever been involved in, **and they have the most campaign wins per dollar raised than any other Political Action Committee in the country!**
The left wing may have their leftist billionaires... But Ryan’s team can win a school board for $3,000!
After learning all this, I wanted to know how I could help. So I reached out to 1776 Project PAC.
They told me that the biggest way I could help was by sharing my story and asking fellow patriots like you to contribute what you can.

**[Please click here to donate to the 1776 Project PAC today... Before your children or grandchildren get wrapped up in one of these leftist schemes.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z45q2ltio4t14dma04g37sconghl0q5b528j2b7g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj6ao72clh2bs)**
I’m not normally someone who is comfortable with asking for money or speaking out about political issues....
But the plain and simple of this whole story is that children are being abused and brainwashed by teachers nationwide, and we don’t have a choice but to put an end to it.
I don’t want this to happen to my child again, and I certainly don’t want it to happen to your children and grandchildren.
**[But we don’t have any time to waste. Because of local election rules, 1776 Project PAC is working on races as early as May, 7th this year. That’s why I hope you’ll send in a donation of $25 IMMEDIATELY to the 1776 Project PAC.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsubvqnmaho9dtpmm4874cjf5t37kije392vott0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj6ao72clh2bs)**
If you’ve read this far, I cannot thank you enough for hearing me out. Even though you don’t know my name, I’m glad you’ve heard my story.
With your action today, you’ll not only answer the prayers of desperate parents like me, but also ensure we restore sanity in our nation’s schools.
Sincerely,
Jane Doe
P.S. I know you don’t know me and you don’t even know my real name.
So if you don’t want to take my word for it, I hope you’ll trust the endorsements of the 1776 Project PAC from conservatives like Tucker Carlson, Donald Trump Jr., and Laura Ingraham.
They all recognize that we must do something RIGHT NOW if we hope to ensure the next generation of Americans are not completely brainwashed by these radical leftists.
**Laura Ingraham:** "For all the parents out there looking to reclaim your local school boards from radical leftists, help is on the way from a new political action committee called the _**1776 Project.”**_
**Donald Trump Jr.:** “The 1776 Project PAC is the very first Political Action Committee of its kind -- specifically created to take local school boards out of the hands of these America-hating, radical liberals... **Because the truth is, the 1776 Project PAC is doing what the politicians on Capitol Hill can't and won't."**
They’re stepping up to the plate, going state to state, and making education SANE again.”
So please, if you don’t want to see your children or grandchildren brainwashed to hate America, I hope you’ll consider making a donation of $25 or more to the 1776 Project PAC today.
**[DONATE](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3chpigaqenuf5qthpr41e29mc7v5cro2dhec5i0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj6ao72clh2bs)**

\----------------

[**Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0kd3gvi6pl639r49gsanc9u2qm8cgvjajtjfdro_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shj6ao72clh2bs)

subject: Four years later
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
Today, we want to take a minute of your time to talk about the four year anniversary of the first March for Our Lives.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43327326/336721866/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220324-b1_fr_full-MA_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220324-b1_fr_full-MA_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220324&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=MA_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=5408e3c5-8aab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDA4ZTNjNS04YWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DpRGGfuG7zOTZ7P7p-MTb8YuglDa0dZCYeyx81eUgSg=)

| Hi Peter, We’re Amina and Mireya King, AKA John’s daughters. **Today, we want to take a minute of your time to talk about the four year anniversary of the first March for Our Lives.** Back in 2018, we both participated in walkouts at our public schools in Montgomery County, Maryland. Kids our age had been hearing about school shootings for our entire lives, and it felt like nothing was being done about them. After the horrific shooting in Parkland, FL, students like us around the country finally decided it was time to take action — _**[and if you want to join our day of action this year, we made a petition that you can sign to protect our schools and stop gun violence >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43327327/336721867/750467974?contactdata=R71hNmEihi4gCga%2BwSD0nBympuq4e91xI%2BRj%2FaFOhkAtdHYgbfeWidPsEV7Oxz3vioCuGYC7so3nPgfkU5PHrGtPU9FLSi7OKPERq2lib2DLHxHK0VJjKZLcYFRQiXN0%2FTB6tvcEPEgZ%2FlsgbBSV%2FjAZ8B%2FioCSlidUV504n88NPDRngE%2FzMJDVVDfEdKQVl2TEvJ2C99LzFv5D%2BnQOWZQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDA4ZTNjNS04YWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DpRGGfuG7zOTZ7P7p-MTb8YuglDa0dZCYeyx81eUgSg=&emci=6d543719-d4aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=5408e3c5-8aab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)**_ | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43327328/336721868/750467974?contactdata=R71hNmEihi4gCga%2BwSD0nBympuq4e91xI%2BRj%2FaFOhkAtdHYgbfeWidPsEV7Oxz3vioCuGYC7so3nPgfkU5PHrGtPU9FLSi7OKPERq2lib2DLHxHK0VJjKZLcYFRQiXN0%2FTB6tvcEPEgZ%2FlsgbBSV%2FjAZ8B%2FioCSlidUV504n88NPDRngE%2FzMJDVVDfEdKQVl2TEvJ2C99LzFv5D%2BnQOWZQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDA4ZTNjNS04YWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DpRGGfuG7zOTZ7P7p-MTb8YuglDa0dZCYeyx81eUgSg=&emci=6d543719-d4aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=5408e3c5-8aab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)

We have seen the pain in the survivors who spoke on TV, the grief of families of the victims who shared memories of their loved ones, and the fear of students at our own schools who discuss where we should hide in case a shooter walked into our school. When we saw so many people scared and angry that things weren’t changing, we knew it was time to show everyone how much change means to us.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43327329/336721869/750467974?contactdata=R71hNmEihi4gCga%2BwSD0nBympuq4e91xI%2BRj%2FaFOhkAtdHYgbfeWidPsEV7Oxz3vioCuGYC7so3nPgfkU5PHrGtPU9FLSi7OKPERq2lib2DLHxHK0VJjKZLcYFRQiXN0%2FTB6tvcEPEgZ%2FlsgbBSV%2FjAZ8B%2FioCSlidUV504n88NPDRngE%2FzMJDVVDfEdKQVl2TEvJ2C99LzFv5D%2BnQOWZQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDA4ZTNjNS04YWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DpRGGfuG7zOTZ7P7p-MTb8YuglDa0dZCYeyx81eUgSg=&emci=6d543719-d4aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=5408e3c5-8aab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)
_Mireya led Takoma Park Middle School Students in a school wide protest in 2018_
The two of us are still worried about ourselves and others, and we will continue to support the fight for common-sense gun legislation to stop the violence in our country’s schools. This issue will not go away on its own, and our generation will not stop fighting until those in power do something about it. If you want to join us, _**[you can add your name to the petition today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43327332/336721872/750467974?contactdata=R71hNmEihi4gCga%2BwSD0nBympuq4e91xI%2BRj%2FaFOhkAtdHYgbfeWidPsEV7Oxz3vioCuGYC7so3nPgfkU5PHrGtPU9FLSi7OKPERq2lib2DLHxHK0VJjKZLcYFRQiXN0%2FTB6tvcEPEgZ%2FlsgbBSV%2FjAZ8B%2FioCSlidUV504n88NPDRngE%2FzMJDVVDfEdKQVl2TEvJ2C99LzFv5D%2BnQOWZQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDA4ZTNjNS04YWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DpRGGfuG7zOTZ7P7p-MTb8YuglDa0dZCYeyx81eUgSg=&emci=6d543719-d4aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=5408e3c5-8aab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)**_

clean_body: Today, we want to take a minute of your time to talk about the four year anniversary of the first March for Our Lives. | = | Hi Peter, We’re Amina and Mireya King, AKA John’s daughters. Today, we want to take a minute of your time to talk about the four year anniversary of the first March for Our Lives. Back in 2018, we both participated in walkouts at our public schools in Montgomery County, Maryland. Kids our age had been hearing about school shootings for our entire lives, and it felt like nothing was being done about them. After the horrific shooting in Parkland, FL, students like us around the country finally decided it was time to take action — | | We have seen the pain in the survivors who spoke on TV, the grief of families of the victims who shared memories of their loved ones, and the fear of students at our own schools who discuss where we should hide in case a shooter walked into our school. When we saw so many people scared and angry that things weren’t changing, we knew it was time to show everyone how much change means to us. Mireya led Takoma Park Middle School Students in a school wide protest in 2018 The two of us are still worried about ourselves and others, and we will continue to support the fight for common-sense gun legislation to stop the violence in our country’s schools. This issue will not go away on its own, and our generation will not stop fighting until those in power do something about it. If you want to join us, | Thank you, Amina and Mireya * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . name: Marisa Wood
subject: I need your help, friend.
body:
I'm campaigning directly against GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in his district. | _We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy.
