clean_body: Earlier this week, Republicans in the Kentucky legislature voted to override Andy's veto of bills to end the COVID-19 state of emergency and cut jobless benefits. Peter, Earlier this week, Republicans in the Kentucky legislature voted to override Andy's veto of bills to end the COVID-19 state of emergency and cut jobless benefits. Let us be clear: this decision by lawmakers will have harmful consequences for thousands of Kentuckians. By ending the state of emergency, Kentuckians will miss out on millions of dollars in food support at a time when they need it the most. These vetoes mean Kentuckians will see a loss of $50 million in food benefits from the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program. This comes out to an average of about $100 a month for recipients at a time when we're seeing the cost of food rising due to supply chain issues. Unemployed Kentuckians will also see their benefits cut. The reduction of jobless benefits positions our state to be one of the least helpful when a worker loses a job at no fault of their own and disproportionately impacts our rural communities. The legislature's vetoes are cruel and kick struggling Kentuckians while they're down. Now more than ever, our communities need support to get back on their feet. Thanks, Team Beshear | | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign? = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

**Politics & Eggs with former NJ Governor Chris Christie**

Governor Chris Christie appears on "Politics & Eggs" with Saint Anselm College and the New Hampshire Institute of Politics to discuss current politics and the future of the Republican Party.

[_Watch Here_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=f2ab1f47b7&e=65ae29fa7e)

**NH Today with Chris Ryan**

**NJ Governor Chris Christie**

Ahead of his appearance at "Politics and Eggs", former NJ Governor Chris Christie spoke to Chris about the possibility of a POTUS run (again), what he disagrees with former President Trump on and much more!

[_Listen Now_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=e5b5986998&e=65ae29fa7e)

| **Harvard Kennedy School Institute of Politics**

**A Conversation with Governor Chris Christie on the Future of the Republican Party**

On Monday, March 21, the John F. Kennedy Jr. Forum hosted former New Jersey Governor Chris Christie to discuss what he sees as the top Republican priorities looking to the 2022 midterms and beyond. In a conversation moderated by the Kennedy School’s David Gergen (HLS '67) and Bridget Toomey ‘23, Governor Christie analyzes today’s GOP and what lies ahead for his party.

[_Watch Here_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=1fa1d75e5e&e=65ae29fa7e)

---
| **Fox News**

**Christie, in New Hampshire, calls Trump’s initial comments praising Putin ‘not just wrong’ but ‘dangerous’**

Christie, a 2016 GOP presidential candidate who’s mulling another run, made his comments as he headlined the first edition of ‘Politics and Eggs’ in the 2024 election cycle. The speaking series at the New Hampshire Institute of Politics at Saint Anselm College over the past two decades has become a must stop for White House hopefuls visiting the state that for a century’s held the first primary in the presidential nominating calendar.

Friend,

It’s Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy, and I need your immediate help.

This upcoming election is our best shot to restore the Republican House Majority and steer America back on the right track. But the Democrats aren’t making it easy on us...

**The Democrat Machine is flooding our targeted districts, like Nevada CD-3 where steadfast conservative, April Becker is fighting to flip this seat RED.**

name: Ann Marie Staudenmaier
subject: In 2022, women count
body:
We’ve seen again and again how the burdens of the pandemic and rising costs fall disproportionately on women.
#

Peter — over the last two years, we’ve seen again and again how the burdens of the pandemic and of rising costs fall disproportionately on women.
And yet, we’ve also seen how, here in Maryland, the issues that are most critical to women’s success have been pushed to the back burner by the current Republican administration.
**It’s not enough to simply flip Maryland blue. We deserve a Governor who will make it a priority, day in and day out, to ensure that all women have access to opportunity. And without a doubt, that leader is my husband Tom Perez.**
It’s not just me saying this, Peter. This week, Tom was endorsed by more than 230 women across the state of Maryland — incredible public servants, community leaders, and progressive activists who are on the front lines on issues like reproductive freedom, pay equity, health care, and economic opportunity.
These Maryland women have come together to found Women for Tom because Tom has been a champion of these issues throughout his career. From working as a civil rights attorney, to fighting for equity as President Obama’s Secretary of Labor — to being the most dedicated supporter and cheerleader our daughters and I could ever ask for — Tom has been advocating for women in every corner of Maryland and the nation.
And personally, I think that’s exactly what we need in our next Governor.
**[If you agree with me that it’s time for a Governor who won’t just talk about opportunity for women but actually make it a priority, I would be so grateful if you could pitch in a few dollars to Tom’s campaign. Will you stand with us — and with the hundreds of women across Maryland who are throwing their support behind Tom today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43333111/336749521/1234338550?refcode=email_032422_womenfortom&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWNlMTBjNi05Y2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CGofG2QtCHvdOs-jlpnilMz2ERU0aiVeG8sIWuZukuQ=)**

Peter — over the last two years, we’ve seen again and again how the burdens of the pandemic and of rising costs fall disproportionately on women. And yet, we’ve also seen how, here in Maryland, the issues that are most critical to women’s success have been pushed to the back burner by the current Republican administration. It’s not enough to simply flip Maryland blue. We deserve a Governor who will make it a priority, day in and day out, to ensure that all women have access to opportunity. And without a doubt, that leader is my husband Tom Perez. It’s not just me saying this, Peter. This week, Tom was endorsed by more than 230 women across the state of Maryland — incredible public servants, community leaders, and progressive activists who are on the front lines on issues like reproductive freedom, pay equity, health care, and economic opportunity. These Maryland women have come together to found Women for Tom because Tom has been a champion of these issues throughout his career. From working as a civil rights attorney, to fighting for equity as President Obama’s Secretary of Labor — to being the most dedicated supporter and cheerleader our daughters and I could ever ask for — Tom has been advocating for women in every corner of Maryland and the nation. And personally, I think that’s exactly what we need in our next Governor. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you so much, Peter. Sincerely, Ann Marie Staudenmaier ****=** Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. Botts, Treasurer. Tom Perez for Maryland PO BOX 5389 TAKOMA PARK, MD 20913-5389 United States

name: Imani Oakley
subject: I’m standing with Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter,

This week marked the beginning of Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s Senate confirmation hearing.

Although it’s long overdue, I’m proud to be witnessing history as the Senate considers the FIRST EVER Black woman to serve on the U.S. Supreme Court. And I’m proud that, with your support, I’ll join her in making history as the FIRST EVER Black woman to represent NJ-10.

Peter, I’m standing with Ketanji Brown Jackson, because I know firsthand how Black women have been left behind. It’s time to change that here in NJ-10, and it’s time to change that in Washington. If you agree, click here to add your name and stand with Ketanji Brown Jackson. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/K-oDR3MXwEqqFnPbE7juVw2]

Add Your Name [https://secure.ngpvan.com/K-oDR3MXwEqqFnPbE7juVw2]

When Black women start pushing for representation, there are always people who will do anything they can to keep us down.

Right now, the GOP is doing everything in their power to tar Ketanji Brown Jackson’s reputation, questioning her qualifications, degrading her experience, and casting doubt on her abilities. And Rep. Payne Jr. and his New Jersey machine allies are doing the exact same thing to me.

They’re calling both of us unqualified. They’re calling both of us inexperienced. And in both cases, they’re dead wrong.

We need to stand together and support Black women making history. And we can start by proudly showing our support for Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s historic nomination. Click here to add your name today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/K-oDR3MXwEqqFnPbE7juVw2]

Thank you for standing with us.

— Imani

Volunteer [https://secure.ngpvan.com/fSla6aV0ykacNaDdJCf_Pw2]

Paid for by Oakley for Congress

name: Glenn Beck
subject: Emergency request for Ukraine:
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentime
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zssuuoe0i15nltamt44nbhafns1d42ddtfqqpubg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shgm2o74c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s35elobat3ge8qm1p32chqm4pr56orr1cb0e2r35dlme9qe8d33c1hb9olgcao6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup30pjgmsqr4ptnc5j3co5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9mas0mvita37r0eknjlr3494gscv8o9871npi9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shgm2o74c3h2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc2tcuq4tp2dp3aqf09bf969doj73udn02b7rbe0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shgm2o74c3h2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zng5nbvou7g9elf7vj0iclijhco8gdctckuem0mg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shgm2o74c3h2bs)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7nh15mtprcsmopplov5eorrgued79ee7vk66iv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shgm2o74c3h2bs)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1roang8d0qehisga1uhau7rdjsn5df22ut721d0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shgm2o74c3h2bs)

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: I know this isn’t what you want to hear right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
| | | Patriot, It's Dan Crenshaw. I just got this text and my heart sank:

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59933303:JqcWd6oN2:m:1:3299561967:635FCF7B6BA23728DFCB4EB768BCADCB:r)
---

This is bad. _Really bad._

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: _**but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good.**_

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59933303:JqcWd6oN2:m:1:3299561967:635FCF7B6BA23728DFCB4EB768BCADCB:r "Generic Button")
---

I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country. I know you won't either, which is why today I'm coming to you with a humble request:

**[Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59933303:JqcWd6oN2:m:1:3299561967:635FCF7B6BA23728DFCB4EB768BCADCB:r "Can I count on you
to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the
fundraising gap.")**

I can't extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time - but it's critical you rush support before the deadline. _If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it 's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. _

**[BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we'll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59933303:JqcWd6oN2:m:1:3299561967:635FCF7B6BA23728DFCB4EB768BCADCB:r "BUT, if every
patriot who gets this email chips in, we’ll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in
the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>")**

---

---

We're in a great position to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi - we're just FIVE SEATS AWAY from restoring an America First Agenda in Washington. But Pelosi knows it, just as well as we do, _and she 's panicking._

_She 's dialing up dark money donors.

She's depositing max-out checks.

And last month she outspent and outraised us by MILLIONS._

**Pelosi 's working day and night to ensure we fail. If we fall short of our goal, the Left will BURY us. We can't let Pelosi win, simply because she outspent us. **

There's no way we make our mark without you.

**[I can't extend this deadline again - even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59933303:JqcWd6oN2:m:1:3299561967:635FCF7B6BA23728DFCB4EB768BCADCB:r "I can’t extend this deadline again – even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the
link closes in 45 min.")**

Thank you,

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59933303:JqcWd6oN2:m:1:3299561967:635FCF7B6BA23728DFCB4EB768BCADCB:r)
---
Dan Crenshaw

---

Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59933304:JqcWd6oN2:m:1:3299561967:635FCF7B6BA23728DFCB4EB768BCADCB:r "Can we count on

clean_body: Mark is my best friend, my partner, and my rock. I feel so lucky to have him by my side every day. | | | = | | = Derek, Mark is my best friend, my partner, and my rock. I feel so lucky to have him by my side every day. He has helped me through my darkest moments and he always fights for what is right. At war, he flew in combat, and at peace he joined NASA and commanded the space shuttle twice. Mark never planned to be a Senator, but he knows when it’s time to serve. He’s served his family, our country, and now the great state of Arizona. But if he’s going to win re-election, he needs your help. And the next 48 hours are critical. Because tomorrow at midnight, we end our end-of-quarter fundraising drive. And since this is an FEC deadline month, we’re legally required to report our fundraising numbers. And we need a strong showing today to catch up to where we need to be. So, please. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I can’t thank you enough for the amount of support you’ve shown so far — now let’s keep up the momentum! In courage, Gabby Giffords (This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. Peter,

I’ve got some good news and some bad news to share with you today. I’ll start with the good news: **last week in Washington, D.C. Leader McCarthy added me and my campaign to their “Young Guns** ,” which you may recall from earlier emails is a program which works to help campaigns that have met criteria deemed by the national party as indicative of having a game plan to win in the country’s most competitive districts.

**The good news is that the national party is ALL-IN on our race, and EARLY**.

Then on Tuesday, the Congressional Leadership Fund – the super PAC endorsed by Leader Kevin McCarthy and all of the House GOP Leadership – announced their endorsement of my campaign.

All good news.

The bad news is that Democrats – needing to hold onto this seat if they stand any chance of holding onto their tenuous House majority – are going to spend millions to defeat me.

**In 2020, Democrat super PACs outspent my campaign 7 to one. They poured more than $2.58 million into this race to stop me from winning, and they’ll do it again.**

name: Conservatives Against Joe Biden
subject: Can America’s patriots count on you, Peter?
body:
Peter,
Millions of hardworking Americans have felt the wrath of the Biden administration’s socialist agenda.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: my decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/XtW4bh5N9DG9l3r8m37q6PIZJpGEUuWBhMh_xdsvne0=/NFzExM6kp-YDTRibFO9QMJECvj1Pvow9eSTHaBjGCBQ=)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/XtW4bh5N9DG9l3r8m37q6PIZJpGEUuWBhMh_xdsvne0=/vTj7HBsE7wvmnjPsGr6Om_qkq6GXjWOzSkIwfB-F7XY=?refcode=X_032422_MarkKelly)
Friend --

I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn't sound like a lot of time, but with a schedule like mine I can assure you it's a gift.

**I want to take a few of those minutes to tell you about my decision to run for Senate in the first place, and ask you to split a donation between my re-election campaign and Congressman Stanton 's campaign. Your support is so important to our success.**

The truth is, when Gabby and I first started talking about running, we weren't sure what to expect. We knew that Arizona needed new leadership in the Senate -- someone who would always put the people of our state first, who was willing to work across the aisle to deliver real results, and who would prioritize building bridges between parties -- not burning them down.

We also knew we had some friends who would help us out. But when you're talking about such a big campaign, we'd need support from a lot of people we hadn't met yet as well.

You know the rest... we won in 2020 in large part because we ran the biggest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen.

But now we have a new mission: Re-election.

**And right now, the polls are really tight. If we 're going to win again and keep control of Congress, it's going to take a similar level of grassroots support from people like you.**

So please:

[**Will you split a $50 contribution between my re-election campaign and Congressman Stanton 's? We can't win and protect our Congressional majority without your support.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/XtW4bh5N9DG9l3r8m37q6PIZJpGEUuWBhMh_xdsvne0=/cETlhgr9bhjKy-OsG2winyHhOC85_5p1fpLEDJBbYgQ=?refcode=X_032422_MarkKelly&amount=50)
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/XtW4bh5N9DG9l3r8m37q6PIZJpGEUuWBhMh_xdsvne0=/cETlhgr9bhjKy-OsG2winyHhOC85_5p1fpLEDJBbYgQ=?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=X_032422_MarkKelly) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/XtW4bh5N9DG9l3r8m37q6PIZJpGEUuWBhMh_xdsvne0=/cETlhgr9bhjKy-OsG2winyHhOC85_5p1fpLEDJBbYgQ=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=X_032422_MarkKelly)
---|---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/XtW4bh5N9DG9l3r8m37q6PIZJpGEUuWBhMh_xdsvne0=/cETlhgr9bhjKy-OsG2winyHhOC85_5p1fpLEDJBbYgQ=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=X_032422_MarkKelly) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/XtW4bh5N9DG9l3r8m37q6PIZJpGEUuWBhMh_xdsvne0=/cETlhgr9bhjKy-OsG2winyHhOC85_5p1fpLEDJBbYgQ=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=X_032422_MarkKelly)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/XtW4bh5N9DG9l3r8m37q6PIZJpGEUuWBhMh_xdsvne0=/cETlhgr9bhjKy-OsG2winyHhOC85_5p1fpLEDJBbYgQ=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=X_032422_MarkKelly) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/XtW4bh5N9DG9l3r8m37q6PIZJpGEUuWBhMh_xdsvne0=/cETlhgr9bhjKy-OsG2winyHhOC85_5p1fpLEDJBbYgQ=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_032422_MarkKelly)
Thank you again. For everything.

_-- Mark Kelly_

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Twitter and we need your help
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59932881:JkppH6oN_:m:1:3317145305:B20F432685463347728B8F5917386C2B:r) Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush, we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. You may have seen that, just a few days ago, the Babylon Bee, a popular conservative news satire publication was suspended indefinitely for calling Rachel Levine, Joe Biden's transgender Assistant Secretary for Health, the "Man of the Year." This is the post in question: [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59932881:JkppH6oN_:m:1:3317145305:B20F432685463347728B8F5917386C2B:r) This hypocrisy is so rich. Twitter banned the Babylon Bee for satire. ...**While The Taliban, a terrorist organization, is allowed to stay on Twitter.** What's worse is my team at the Center for American Liberty has discovered that powerful elected politicians are colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we've caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. ** ** **That's why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties,****and we need your help to win.** [**Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59932881:JkppH6oN_:m:1:3317145305:B20F432685463347728B8F5917386C2B:r) Let me explain. Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O'Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns over the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59932881:JkppH6oN_:m:1:3317145305:B20F432685463347728B8F5917386C2B:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59932881:JkppH6oN_:m:1:3317145305:B20F432685463347728B8F5917386C2B:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59932881:JkppH6oN_:m:1:3317145305:B20F432685463347728B8F5917386C2B:r) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for "violating the government's rules about election integrity." _In other words, Rogan was censored for his political beliefs. _ But it gets much worse. When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to remove his tweets/posts. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris' vacated seat in the U.S. Senate, and you and I both know that Rogan's tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed Twitter to shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59932881:JkppH6oN_:m:1:3317145305:B20F432685463347728B8F5917386C2B:r) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59932881:JkppH6oN_:m:1:3317145305:B20F432685463347728B8F5917386C2B:r) That's why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other leftists for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59932881:JkppH6oN_:m:1:3317145305:B20F432685463347728B8F5917386C2B:r) What makes all of this so much worse is that Rogan is not the only victim of this blatant viewpoint censorship. The New York Post was censored when it posted factual information about Hunter Biden's laptop just weeks before the 2020 election. The Babylon Bee was shut down for a satirical post about Rachel Levine being a man. And Rogan O'Handley has been banned for spreading "misinformation," while Twitter allows Vladimir Putin and the Kremlin remain on the platform. At this point, we know that these bans are nothing more than a corrupt, bad faith attempt to control the information available to the American people, and to protect leftists inside of our government. **That's why the Center for American Liberty needs your help to sue Twitter today. This battle won't be cheap, and we are running out of time to raise the funds needed to keep this case alive before filing this case at the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals. Would you please chip in $25 or more today**? But let me take a step back and introduce myself. My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Just over two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed. We've taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, criminalized going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes, out of school, during the pandemic. We've taken on Antifa for viciously attacking and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo, who exposed Antifa's vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we're taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O'Handley's freedom of speech. ** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians. _ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59932881:JkppH6oN_:m:1:3317145305:B20F432685463347728B8F5917386C2B:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this may be the legal battle that will define our generation, and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? **Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.** Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59932881:JkppH6oN_:m:1:3317145305:B20F432685463347728B8F5917386C2B:r) [**DONATE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59932881:JkppH6oN_:m:1:3317145305:B20F432685463347728B8F5917386C2B:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59932881:JkppH6oN_:m:1:3317145305:B20F432685463347728B8F5917386C2B:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59932881:JkppH6oN_:m:1:3317145305:B20F432685463347728B8F5917386C2B:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
Â(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59932882:JkppH6oN_:m:1:3317145305:B20F432685463347728B8F5917386C2B:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 Click here to [unsubscribe.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})
---

So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed Twitter to shut Rogan up. From: California Secretary of State Communications Department To: Twitter Date: Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: From user @DCDraino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. That's why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other leftists for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. What makes all of this so much worse is that Rogan is not the only victim of this blatant viewpoint censorship. The New York Post was censored when it posted factual information about Hunter Biden's laptop just weeks before the 2020 election. The Babylon Bee was shut down for a satirical post about Rachel Levine being a man. And Rogan O'Handley has been banned for spreading "misinformation," while Twitter allows Vladimir Putin and the Kremlin remain on the platform. At this point, we know that these bans are nothing more than a corrupt, bad faith attempt to control the information available to the American people, and to protect leftists inside of our government. That's why the Center for American Liberty needs your help to sue Twitter today. This battle won't be cheap, and we are running out of time to raise the funds needed to keep this case alive before filing this case at the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals. Would you please chip in $25 or more today? But let me take a step back and introduce myself. My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Just over two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed. We've taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, criminalized going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes, out of school, during the pandemic. We've taken on Antifa for viciously attacking and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo, who exposed Antifa's vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. And now, we're taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O'Handley's freedom of speech. But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians. I'm not exaggerating when I say that this may be the legal battle that will define our generation, and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends. | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Jake Monssen, jake@strahanforcongress.com
---
| | **ENDORSEMENT ALERT: Associated General Contractors of America PAC Endorses Jennifer Strahan**
---
| **DALLAS, Ga** : Today, the Associated General Contractors of America Political Action Committee (AGC PAC) endorsed Jennifer Strahan in her race for U.S. House in Georgia's 14th Congressional district.

"Supporting our construction workers and businesses is paramount in our district. With inflation, supply chain issues, and workforce shortages, our district needs someone who will work to find substantive results in order to ease the burdens of the current economy on our constituents," **said Jennifer Strahan**. "I am honored to have the support of the AGC PAC and look forward to being an effective voice for our construction companies while in Washington."

The AGC itself represents more than 27,000 firms including America's leading general contractors, specialty contractors, service providers, and suppliers. Regarded as "The Construction Association," AGC is the industry's leading association dedicated to furthering the ever-changing agenda of commercial construction.

By donating through this email, you agree that the first $5,000 of your contribution will be deposited in House Majority PAC's Contribution Account and the remainder in House Majority PAC's Non-Contribution Account. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Let me explain please
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We are in a great position to win this race. The polls are close and our organization is strong.
#

Friends —
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important to our chances.
Here’s the truth:
One week from today we close the books on one of the final FEC fundraising deadlines before people start voting.
The pundits and our opponents will all be wondering how much money we’ve raised and how many donations we’ve received. And we’re going to tell them — and you.
But what we’re trying to do is even more important than that: We’re building the kind of campaign that can take on the entire National Republican establishment and win.
That requires considerable financial resources. And after this deadline hits, we’ll take stock of them and make a lot of important spending decisions — decisions that will decide the fate of this campaign.
So with this deadline fast approaching, I’m asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to our campaign before this FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close? I would not ask if it were not so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220324-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=2419_6688874_Tbidfo&akid=2419%2E6688874%2ETbidfo)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220324-1-subs&t=20&refcode2=2419_6688874_Tbidfo&akid=2419%2E6688874%2ETbidfo)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em220324-1-subs&t=21&refcode2=2419_6688874_Tbidfo&akid=2419%2E6688874%2ETbidfo)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220324-1-subs&t=22&refcode2=2419_6688874_Tbidfo&akid=2419%2E6688874%2ETbidfo)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220324-1-subs&t=23&refcode2=2419_6688874_Tbidfo&akid=2419%2E6688874%2ETbidfo)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em220324-1-subs&t=24&refcode2=2419_6688874_Tbidfo&akid=2419%2E6688874%2ETbidfo)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?express_lane=true&refcode=em220324-1-subs&t=25&refcode2=2419_6688874_Tbidfo&akid=2419%2E6688874%2ETbidfo)**
---
****
We are in a great position to win this race. The polls are close and our organization is strong. But the attacks we have yet to face will be unprecedented — and we have to be ready. And if you chip in to help, I know we will be.
Thank you,
Mark Kelly
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220324-1-subs&t=26&refcode2=2419_6688874_Tbidfo&akid=2419%2E6688874%2ETbidfo)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=2419%2E6688874%2ETbidfo).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

clean_body: | | | = We’ve got good news and bad news, Peter. The good: This change to Maryland’s gubernatorial primary means that we have more time to introduce Laura to voters, spread her message across the state, and motivate folks to get to the polls on Election Day. The bad: This also means that we have to adjust our campaign strategy to be able to extend our budget for an extra three weeks. That might not sound like a significant amount of time, but we’re going to have to rethink our campaign budget in order to keep our digital program running, volunteers on the ground, and staff paid until July. That’s where you come in – = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Team Neuman | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Glenn Beck
subject: [URGENT] A personal request for Ukraine
body:
| | | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=76d4e0bac91d49a69a38766722231402&_e=HQRmMkO5Rf3yfjjTo9Pq6AeYAiKymRmR-0taMhoSx0ewlzp4FNhV1-zkvqXMIzpDeQRLOONF2_IXO0-HIMvY-NqfHU4VbOXDCROT6pK8PErzHxKMdrD2Wj0XI8EynNe2p11nMX9L3Ba6sZ7LSnwuLJhHrTLO7L9JcMYH4xKDrN7K4pN6iLJPu9qgvtB93q2Ud2pU2II-BGOJkfdj8SwVKrJCq9Ny-XCEr-lo7kaqE-vF-kJc6Bn845kpOCMhCMsJs_tt8OtaEiW7pMRZFHwBaSb6qzS2UTP1YtdmYlnPP9ACc2cT9U_1-XKoA3qATx0tGr30TcwKUAsacdEDv8fNosd8WVK6XatD9U20J3p-uIUHAiyOynK_cRX86MdsD3vlb1fF8GaSVL4s-0rBmW5vVw%3D%3D)
---
|
---
Friend,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=76d4e0bac91d49a69a38766722231402&_e=HQRmMkO5Rf3yfjjTo9Pq6AeYAiKymRmR-0taMhoSx0ewlzp4FNhV1-zkvqXMIzpDeQRLOONF2_IXO0-HIMvY-NqfHU4VbOXDCROT6pK8PErzHxKMdrD2Wj0XI8EynNe2p11nMX9L3Ba6sZ7LSnwuLJhHrTLO7L9JcMYH4xKDrN7K4pN6iLJPu9qgvtB93q2UMmegtBzQH1mPtDn51-gtBn8BBRvp-icWoYdZaUSJUZiP5FoO3GFxSLhTL46Xf0aYEUnWaCnDe7neRT5DvNrK35TWgtF4jZ2BCHr2x3pP6lvTUjn95MKJj547Ce1VQ7wAWQzuI7w2CE6fPAFB5k4dQ2ShQaDwWYMpfdqr27ZjiLMxzgPC-D83xwP_pwNN3xcj4I8iN5s8hFvWcqbWUYLgDQ%3D%3D)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=76d4e0bac91d49a69a38766722231402&_e=HQRmMkO5Rf3yfjjTo9Pq6AeYAiKymRmR-0taMhoSx0ewlzp4FNhV1-zkvqXMIzpDeQRLOONF2_IXO0-HIMvY-NqfHU4VbOXDCROT6pK8PErzHxKMdrD2Wj0XI8EynNe2p11nMX9L3Ba6sZ7LSnwuLJhHrTLO7L9JcMYH4xKDrN7K4pN6iLJPu9qgvtB93q2U57rVnY-DJFJxQKbvGO7C-n8-BpylPgbMb9uFp1dceki2XDaHYvwJTMBFtL25edwlz3hkeDAdbQMFrOnvO33FFPLqad7VLEqLLCWANVLT8kRyJRiew9ns1hukYt7M1yyIYM7ttWsJ8TJr8najoblj82XXsZVN0ZCveEg-9qX8wTkK95D5AzBPC8O11FbhlNQgMPtQF3podOEyN7zRyZs5XA%3D%3D)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=76d4e0bac91d49a69a38766722231402&_e=HQRmMkO5Rf3yfjjTo9Pq6AeYAiKymRmR-0taMhoSx0ewlzp4FNhV1-zkvqXMIzpDeQRLOONF2_IXO0-HIMvY-NqfHU4VbOXDCROT6pK8PErzHxKMdrD2Wj0XI8EynNe2p11nMX9L3Ba6sZ7LSnwuLJhHrTLO7L9JcMYH4xKDrN7K4pN6iLJPu9qgvtB93q2UIjOkr4TzivJlZ2Wslv7ugHGImxkSX62DfA2q4ChJJQQhZcNFd4bXygCdt7re3UNV0txGgef_bBtiWK66EjDgo4J0jo3bM7DACC9Ee5Xlw7P_DonKOBO7iGUph1rIRxH1d8a88WEFianLJdTlEoAutsnAmyL8oi0ay8dyArNZzFcKAvZF4tDzQP-edUGArgJB1eE4TDV_XbVKyaCKw6wVxw%3D%3D)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|

| In just one week, we get our next chance to prove that the Silent Majority of MAGA Conservatives is stronger than the Swamp Super PACs.
The first fundraising quarter of this election year is wrapping up, and we can bet that the RINOs and Democrats will be BEGGING their lobbyists like dogs to cut them a big enough check to beat our grassroots, America First movement!
Want to help spoil their plans AGAIN? [Even just a boost of $2 or more can make that happen with how many patriots we have on our team...](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017DgTXlV1MkpnZ4W0_F5B_qDCojXNWcc8ivDcr0A5o_l0K_xJXMdGz_buEKADlsp_gIs4rRo-Hn0AyHWrCe-Hu6uDLuEZuWL4pKd25I4Hcq6R0rRxnV0Cg-NhundZT1jDwYEaGAQOP2H6ysLtnxGBCfmxSDByvNbzV1dHyWaflymfaBNl4I3hkkni5FFXYf4m&c=T5E5tYM_JYxzYOXT17JvGjTecM_P8RvjeJQh3JFNgZqLtK2KZR8qAw==&ch=U-uKAq7IliBoN0NC5F9f-16UVqgWnYkP1ZpyyXAjs1TSQ_cNurq7Ow==)
So send in yours today, and let's crush their fundraising numbers again on the way to a 2022 America First victory!

| This is as good a time as any to make a grassroots contribution towards our fight...
Not only is this important deadline coming up soon - but we're also seeing more and more Swamp politicians trying to use federal law enforcement to target Americans!
Whether it was the targeting of parents who attended school board meetings or the unselect 1/6 committee targeting anyone who took a selfie near the Capitol, they're getting more and more meddlesome in your affairs every day. They want me, Trump, you, and anyone who knows the truth about their corrupt schemes GONE.
We have to stop them by getting our resources in order for a victory - [can I count on you to step up before the deadline next week?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017DgTXlV1MkpnZ4W0_F5B_qDCojXNWcc8ivDcr0A5o_l0K_xJXMdGz_buEKADlsp_gIs4rRo-Hn0AyHWrCe-Hu6uDLuEZuWL4pKd25I4Hcq6R0rRxnV0Cg-NhundZT1jDwYEaGAQOP2H6ysLtnxGBCfmxSDByvNbzV1dHyWaflymfaBNl4I3hkkni5FFXYf4m&c=T5E5tYM_JYxzYOXT17JvGjTecM_P8RvjeJQh3JFNgZqLtK2KZR8qAw==&ch=U-uKAq7IliBoN0NC5F9f-16UVqgWnYkP1ZpyyXAjs1TSQ_cNurq7Ow==)

body:
Yesterday the board of elections released the results | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0a4ZLzkfrFqdtVKuNIuwQsn0c91jgEdSA5OANsq926BffC7faAQGaBY74u73WFJVk788-WoyULHLL-PIc1ZRHAIjU1xMVOE6RbfeWrra391NoJMRWAKY597HSC3HCI2k--LZj2YnS3LeR5_aILF6DPWGxa7oEKdv_Aah8v1fw48pyxdhdtNp0khNbjLqD628EsSzvfxCt0GCqTCeHwP2OeaLE9E9vDCdD5-KM3UK9I1Q27f74POvS61PfDzuNmasdY/3km/dcAiRvpzRTWoidpvYeSyig/h0/wxJ9yoZgboHjGfUpZZ_xJT2ibpLsJFUCjfcqtNH4QlY) Dear team, With the help of over 100 volunteer petition circulators, our campaign submitted six times the minimum number of petitions required to get on the ballot. But to be first on the ballot in Illinois, you have to win a lottery. Literally. **Well, guess what? We WON the lottery. Yesterday, we found out that my name will be listed first on the ballot on June 28th. Above the incumbent!** This is a huge opportunity for our campaign. [Studies suggest](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/1XQbiUZqIgkFRQxQopJGKWawlgMbhqx_Ld5aTwXmC4qYbABqf86N7RurwV75rZP5nswdUQoGasMrlyhOx4V-bdeG_s_0k4uFyGSNslrbR-grzThMIpHPhhDDolVTWqPdUAHTNUS84yOG2ei3a3lvykRestJNodEdjT22X2bWagCGQyvZD0mpdQtgduMs-JM2VbB5A4xdIow2GrHMdp47MFo3_5Eo6x_FljqRHVFFo4s8CLn6-gtgs1iTjp39iv197HiELl1tZ35zB98ei2m-IydB1WXdLjjSFwXiP_1Nk5Yn8y-RiPRXxn5jGjyvyFn8/3km/dcAiRvpzRTWoidpvYeSyig/h1/J8GgB9EdwynsklD0qu6Q7GgEzxs1C-pF49h9wDonc4Y) that being first on the ballot can add as much as 10% to a candidate's vote share. [**We have momentum on our side, but we are still competing with a corporate-backed incumbent who can outraise our campaign with a few phone calls. We need 132 people to donate before midnight on March 31st. Can you pitch in?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxES33GwZKvSkBjFs1ppL9aNFBq6eEXxEJ9alvkn34-giPJVpT9FXWnMU7Z6deDagMZ3nc-1XiF-V0Ntu2evkIsWZn3TS24-fCNvSImZsFdj4HsZh8cL_ttpv8w09i2mG1w7aYjR2lhgvl_OOIRXLmVTuMl0lnaXEDqlKPhvuPb-8YBhQ5YItwfCly3anNB0sCG5BARlKz2s8dKk38EJrutQa2Suc1EHMNZ5hoDYcvqkn-oiL7v7Hrty3ysl9LzNqLKP3WiMJ0SKZHlNcdYkHia8UA/3km/dcAiRvpzRTWoidpvYeSyig/h2/wrOl13lDGgPfifAmw2toDhl5uQ_2Bb38VPtkia79vSs) [Donate $15](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESfkzbyv68AgEZq8i69Ff04j1y8L55O_EBmBtpOQv8HdbJAH2reFkIVLpBkl90pJW_uI2FEWBgH0pwrBvtd9uNmmhn4fQYole8TT-kJMDfxQIyBNTCBmIFxNb_s6AtyBHwqBzTL1GCHJBhEt99A3u1zKxuNJiSfoyVcJpzi5q0TVdAWdWxofOP-LROLkipDwBond-lltChlFUXW1ST-YveykpcIPvCkjDaYRPCwxnU1N3Kd-cpJhRh_WURlD7U_RmsJtwKoKTjpRf4eE7woJ0mZA/3km/dcAiRvpzRTWoidpvYeSyig/h3/S5_mkdDinhHP8mcPd7Xft7cfxSyolspwYubOXhOgAPk) We are 96 days away from election day, and one week from the end of the last full quarter of our campaign. That deadline is one of our last chances to prove that our campaign is capable of taking on the Chicago Machine, the corporations, and the powerful gravity of the status quo. We need all hands on deck. This is it. [**Chip in $3 or $7 or $15 today.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxES6_hGUewMgm5Ju6chOOp3on6xoSkX_UTT42PzQYp6Tgrm64bHJGS2OEkwEvlzOwNBNxsgt6DT4el_uCJBxHY9qPFuL4Wgm39VDHpoUazaINb1NIp4acfyJQRLIFTFTzk9m-xKqd8qOtmkhJOFuY5EA_-v32PtwD2-tkm0oEeVU3fncUu7aRSwDG5sKIaR-FQBlKaTWsWvAFdm3Pk9ZxXggxMJQlwugTino-5z-vkKo_xer-dly2NerZ0QR6dxKX6QU77RexACg439kU-msYwleA/3km/dcAiRvpzRTWoidpvYeSyig/h4/RbXB4prbJerP8IEGk_-xjeqlQdh83hvyp-IdLGp7UOs) Thank you, Kina Collins

But to be first on the ballot in Illinois, you have to win a lottery. Literally. Well, guess what? We WON the lottery. Yesterday, we found out that my name will be listed first on the ballot on June 28th. Above the incumbent! This is a huge opportunity for our campaign. that being first on the ballot can add as much as 10% to a candidate's vote share. We are 96 days away from election day, and one week from the end of the last full quarter of our campaign. That deadline is one of our last chances to prove that our campaign is capable of taking on the Chicago Machine, the corporations, and the powerful gravity of the status quo. We need all hands on deck. This is it. Thank you, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

name: Malcolm Kenyatta for Senate
subject: Here's the deal:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Our public fundraising report will be one of the last things voters see before they get their ballots
#

Friend,
In a moment, we're going to ask you to make a contribution to Malcolm's historic campaign for United States Senate in Pennsylvania.
But first, we hope you'll give us a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here's the deal:
One week from today, we face our final quarterly FEC reporting deadline before our May 17 primary.
Soon after our deadline passes, we'll have to publicly report not only how much money we've raised in the final stretch of this race, but also the number of contributions our campaign has received.
Our public fundraising report will be one of the last things voters see before they get their ballots, so it's critical that our numbers show the incredible strength of this grassroots coalition.
We need the largest numbers possible, and Malcolm is counting on supporters like you to help us reach the ambitious goals we've set for our campaign.
That's why we need to ask:
[Can you please make a $3 contribution to our campaign ahead of our final quarterly FEC fundraising deadline? Every donation makes a big difference, especially this week.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43324238/336706793/-358086307?refcode2=d7cd3ea0-82ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220324-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2NkM2VhMC04MmFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=spRzDITAcsYB-s1et944iK7jtwqqw46JCzsfg6nyiCQ=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43324240/336706795/-358086307?refcode2=d7cd3ea0-82ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220324-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2NkM2VhMC04MmFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=spRzDITAcsYB-s1et944iK7jtwqqw46JCzsfg6nyiCQ=)**
With your support, we know we’ll have what it takes to win this primary, flip this Senate seat, and bring a new day to Pennsylvania. Thanks in advance for chipping in.
\- Team Malcolm

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC

body:
We are still well short of our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. Nancy Pelosi and liberal mega-donors are going to spend a lot to beat us | | | [ ](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=84dd69cc4f&e=b78e7c4d40)
---
| | Friend,
We are just ONE WEEK away from our CRUCIAL end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, and we are still well short of our goal.

Here’s the reality - we need more of our supporters to step up before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to stay on pace to meet our goal.

Nancy Pelosi and her liberal billionaire allies are already pouring money in this race.

I’m calling on my top supporters to help us fight back. Are you in, Friend?

[Contribute ANY AMOUNT before 11:59 PM TONIGHT to help us reach our goal. >> ](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=09798c906f&e=b78e7c4d40)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $250 ](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=558a442beb&e=b78e7c4d40 "CONTRIBUTE $250 ")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $100](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=d515ab7c3f&e=b78e7c4d40 "CONTRIBUTE $100")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $50](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=8fd51c9017&e=b78e7c4d40 "CONTRIBUTE $50")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $25](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=c703ac8376&e=b78e7c4d40 "CONTRIBUTE $25")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=2feb0ff683&e=b78e7c4d40 "CONTRIBUTE ANOTHER AMOUNT")
---
| I don’t have billionaire mega-donors, that’s why I’m counting on grassroots conservatives like YOU to help us reach our goal.

[Please contribute $25 or more before 11:59 PM TONIGHT. >> ](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=ada42bba5b&e=b78e7c4d40)

Thank you,

Jerry Evans
Republican Candidate of Congress, (IL-11)

---
| [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=58ee036d15&e=b78e7c4d40 "CONTRIBUTE NOW")

name: Ally For Utah
subject: Come Connect with Ally!
body:
#AllyForUtah Update | The latest news from the Ally Isom For U.S. Senate Campaign
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YBXgvtOBZI544MfUsjyY7AD4HFSUFbQvOezz2738Sn20DtFJW3lPN6JUQCaA7sGNz7T0dvJli2pr3r51E7q2kmLMAjEeVIwSE6iRodrZwfMqKii_2_YX7uEfLTExQQw2GQRTMPnzUCMnxf5mkpJTEQ==&c=feY9tMrpzEeUGtaT6tHbyYVCJMNFm4QlE-7oOUIecBw81UumXjPS3g==&ch=v_Y5BVibf5q9IpuBWFxrPlUDVRDZhh4RcafSqhphMpokeCDdl99_Og==)
---
| | Friend,
This week U.S. Senate Candidate Ally Isom connected with Utah families, individuals, and business people across the state. Here is the latest update from the Ally for Utah team.
---
| Ally Update
---
| Ally Isom continued to reach voters through consistent, positive news stories. This week's news media coverage reached more than 94,000 viewers on TV alone, including this interview on Sunday Edition. Online articles have reached millions of readers nationwide as well. [Sunday Edition with Doug Wright](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YBXgvtOBZI544MfUsjyY7AD4HFSUFbQvOezz2738Sn20DtFJW3lPN5bEB2yVS6QDC4-0R38Acta93Qnc1TTeo5zIYDADMhgUZXnkXI2ItSv7WZOdctxrgAyYfVcIgu8d3SI0w9tKWiNgfvgm3Ft7nXbjUQnd01fejtvLPNrnDWG4cL5zVWxlvm7qbM2Z9GWPqIOiLWmgFDb8OxPWN9YhgWhfUk5HM4FxJenVEmcgBbHcajJLvuMoIe4VZESaj-zTQK3EppCTZbxoD9ekWUrAzNOjZBQO8zPEBrd4Hw2Z0yY=&c=feY9tMrpzEeUGtaT6tHbyYVCJMNFm4QlE-7oOUIecBw81UumXjPS3g==&ch=v_Y5BVibf5q9IpuBWFxrPlUDVRDZhh4RcafSqhphMpokeCDdl99_Og==)[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YBXgvtOBZI544MfUsjyY7AD4HFSUFbQvOezz2738Sn20DtFJW3lPN5bEB2yVS6QDC4-0R38Acta93Qnc1TTeo5zIYDADMhgUZXnkXI2ItSv7WZOdctxrgAyYfVcIgu8d3SI0w9tKWiNgfvgm3Ft7nXbjUQnd01fejtvLPNrnDWG4cL5zVWxlvm7qbM2Z9GWPqIOiLWmgFDb8OxPWN9YhgWhfUk5HM4FxJenVEmcgBbHcajJLvuMoIe4VZESaj-zTQK3EppCTZbxoD9ekWUrAzNOjZBQO8zPEBrd4Hw2Z0yY=&c=feY9tMrpzEeUGtaT6tHbyYVCJMNFm4QlE-7oOUIecBw81UumXjPS3g==&ch=v_Y5BVibf5q9IpuBWFxrPlUDVRDZhh4RcafSqhphMpokeCDdl99_Og==)
This week Ally traveled to Utah, Uintah, Davis, and Salt Lake counties, listening to input from Utahns all along the way. To keep up with Ally and her travels be sure to follow her on [social media](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YBXgvtOBZI544MfUsjyY7AD4HFSUFbQvOezz2738Sn20DtFJW3lPN3VIdLu1rQLEeWaE9_xqN6ohUQ8-cpDL1f8Yus3oN3UzokiBqvSjwbzTjVxzVQ3UQF3E2mc60ObpR7glX3jxm77N9hHvoiFYg8MtIJLI-Js4&c=feY9tMrpzEeUGtaT6tHbyYVCJMNFm4QlE-7oOUIecBw81UumXjPS3g==&ch=v_Y5BVibf5q9IpuBWFxrPlUDVRDZhh4RcafSqhphMpokeCDdl99_Og==).
---
| Wired for Connection
---
|
---
| Over the weekend, Ally was a featured speaker at the Mormon Transhumanist Association conference in Provo's beautiful city library. In brief, the group focuses on how religion, doing good in the world, and technology intersect. Ally addressed the audience as a former executive in Utah's tech sector. Her remarks focused on how we, as human beings, are wired for connection, and how meaningful, real connection makes us more resilient in challenging times.
She said, "As we come out of this pandemic, if we seek connection -- individually and collectively -- now, today -- we will be better equipped to face the next big challenge ... and the next and the next. We will resist the paralyzing grip of fear, uncertainty, distrust, and hopelessness. What the world needs now is real, meaningful and lasting connection."
Read more about her address [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YBXgvtOBZI544MfUsjyY7AD4HFSUFbQvOezz2738Sn20DtFJW3lPN5bEB2yVS6QD3u9O-p-Gqb16CZmPYSjwkDWJkjYXCG__jMalwlc2ET4RNuIBOorr_9j1eHbz_3u6rQBpl81D8fMfR66QtsFXF15iHVYR1SyHKvLrM3ix_EPO_rNqZvfMJw==&c=feY9tMrpzEeUGtaT6tHbyYVCJMNFm4QlE-7oOUIecBw81UumXjPS3g==&ch=v_Y5BVibf5q9IpuBWFxrPlUDVRDZhh4RcafSqhphMpokeCDdl99_Og==).
---
| Catch Up With Ally
---
|
---
| Come chat with Ally at one of the following upcoming events:

* Thursday, March 24th: Meet the Candidate Event at the [Lindon Community Center](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YBXgvtOBZI544MfUsjyY7AD4HFSUFbQvOezz2738Sn20DtFJW3lPN5bEB2yVS6QDubBhOL4HKUB20FFdyehv4zi6zhORGgPgaV-BbVf3Edhc1o4hKmBQg2wmmz_NIBm24nsYfUix-Ob9YaXteeJQGTkWgOay7gL4MGpxasrke2nVYhH9EWjqR6hd4MjFsidKsLWJCknct6y_zRfpNIu7R8qof6Zjipsmb00JQBIUYxXpJOkOpixFJNC08q8FWCKdnxyzyA2E5FjdOmXx8HMAHNUapodtYxLC6TTfVbxK5RA__eYx6cIFQIPpsk7zB0g5o9ml_B7p_4jyoGwsL89zHYpEAiapbHupEDBO-5tGIFmzBuMdlqPa8dc2er0pV6M8bKNVemkueQk=&c=feY9tMrpzEeUGtaT6tHbyYVCJMNFm4QlE-7oOUIecBw81UumXjPS3g==&ch=v_Y5BVibf5q9IpuBWFxrPlUDVRDZhh4RcafSqhphMpokeCDdl99_Og==), 7:00-8:30pm.
* Tuesday, March 29th: Utah County GOP Meet the Candidates Event at [Willowcreek Middle School](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YBXgvtOBZI544MfUsjyY7AD4HFSUFbQvOezz2738Sn20DtFJW3lPN5bEB2yVS6QDZMoppQgFAxIcaYA-UDrxtNQZ6yGYGEVrCD7yTygbRkprcVYQfhKKu2A20LAyI3xt_OHusBtzqOjC-W3XEutuVJONgnRBgwvvYk_3CiH-HEeLED6c1oteyCLxV9y3KPNlni3DlfZrlQfUt4HHh4pdJgmaF3XSsX5WjUBHtLGHV-wOvlOou9-b1WIA4i2P5ApEKJVSg3E7PYXgEWlrVVTm7RKYbg8SAZQQoAk0KFN8gQC9zaG3SLgm0zVIAG8PVfpJQ_-VKw9k9PZiTtLumm3lFFOa3U7PUqkHAceduxG0h38006-ruWCvdqsJoZlnPUdS61lAA09WvheyGPmm6jGau56zWOMuJqH1vOrKpvKs3VQ=&c=feY9tMrpzEeUGtaT6tHbyYVCJMNFm4QlE-7oOUIecBw81UumXjPS3g==&ch=v_Y5BVibf5q9IpuBWFxrPlUDVRDZhh4RcafSqhphMpokeCDdl99_Og==) in Lehi from 6:30 to 8:30pm.

Save the dates for upcoming digital delegate cottage meetings (details to come): Monday, March 28, 7pm Tuesday, April 12, 7pm Saturday, April 16, 10am
---
| Ally Joins the Utah Federation of Republican Women
---
| This Friday Ally will be speaking at the Utah Federation of Republican Women luncheon. Everyone is Welcome! The event will be held in downtown Salt Lake City on Friday, March 25th at 12pm. Click [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YBXgvtOBZI544MfUsjyY7AD4HFSUFbQvOezz2738Sn20DtFJW3lPN5bEB2yVS6QDvFZJ4HLCZQgucQduhEg18RooFvpmlAM_XBkiuRBXROKsuBAKHmW36sE-8PiDLb-wxAY0wee4l9AKjSCs7qsX4xkxzRnEdne6SXw9USCdJl7TGRoHcHQafr_gWxEIHSKkWVKGzvtn3aMJtKInfT7okLC5ipLBKYRa3vwgYnN2IVJc3bSaVYYtiLB9d8BqFG3KSD5RZKftXmyDWjH2ToqtkQLz9Jh8Fs9oiHF4cqrOS8nQIVKquffj2JWJtYJvIxtCDFS8EBVx4yI=&c=feY9tMrpzEeUGtaT6tHbyYVCJMNFm4QlE-7oOUIecBw81UumXjPS3g==&ch=v_Y5BVibf5q9IpuBWFxrPlUDVRDZhh4RcafSqhphMpokeCDdl99_Og==) to buy a ticket and get more information. This will be a unique opportunity to learn more about Ally's experiences and approach to leadership. She'll share what she's heard from Utahns on her Walk-a-Mile Listening Tour and talk about her priorities as Utah's next senator. We hope to see you there!
---
| You Look AMAZING in RED!
---
| You know you want your very own red Team Ally t-shirt! They are the latest and best in spring fashion! [Sign Up Now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YBXgvtOBZI544MfUsjyY7AD4HFSUFbQvOezz2738Sn20DtFJW3lPN3VIdLu1rQLEI0TGEPGdP94hXaLH_TnevDUM2KH4PVIbPTAiIemIYNzkW0LV7yC6bzFzEHREyhzy2To2okiGUEXUAJmnh4RZZNfQ4Wpa2haT&c=feY9tMrpzEeUGtaT6tHbyYVCJMNFm4QlE-7oOUIecBw81UumXjPS3g==&ch=v_Y5BVibf5q9IpuBWFxrPlUDVRDZhh4RcafSqhphMpokeCDdl99_Og==) to be a Team Ally volunteer and join us at our upcoming events. From county conventions to cottage meetings to delivering signs, we need your help!
---
|
---
| ... and it takes some GREEN to share Ally's message! If you've been meaning to donate, now is the time! Those convention booths and brochures aren't free. Please help us share our call for a different kind of leadership and a Republican Renaissance. [Donate Today!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YBXgvtOBZI544MfUsjyY7AD4HFSUFbQvOezz2738Sn20DtFJW3lPN5bEB2yVS6QDdn9ezfGBqlMj9awvgvlxA7VpUQ4HXbbywpWRZp-jTo1nOozCn9IUPMizokJantREMpKlj6-kOgi55CPwqghOViKbAP49p6NT&c=feY9tMrpzEeUGtaT6tHbyYVCJMNFm4QlE-7oOUIecBw81UumXjPS3g==&ch=v_Y5BVibf5q9IpuBWFxrPlUDVRDZhh4RcafSqhphMpokeCDdl99_Og==) Everything helps! Ally has been burning through A LOT of fuel- at more than $4 per gallon- as she travels the state, and the campaign isn't paying for any of it. She's fiercely protective of donated funds and wants to make sure we have as much as possible to reach delegates and primary election voters. We do everything we can to make your contribution stretch. While other candidates have huge teams of paid staff, we have a skeleton team and so many dedicated and amazing volunteers (like Jolet- see more below).
---
| Congratulations to Jolet and Troy!
---
| If you volunteer on Team Ally, you may occasionally see Jolet Olsen's name in your inbox. Jolet is a super volunteer and our incredible field director. Honestly, we cannot afford her! She works tirelessly to make sure every detail is in place. She also has an amazingly supportive husband, Troy Barber. Troy and Jolet were married in a quiet ceremony during the Covid lockdown and this week they are finally getting the celebration they deserve. From Team Ally, Congratulations Jolet and Troy!!
---
|
---
| THANK YOU for being a part of #TeamAlly. We couldn't do any of this without you.
---
| | | [DONATE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YBXgvtOBZI544MfUsjyY7AD4HFSUFbQvOezz2738Sn20DtFJW3lPN3VIdLu1rQLEB68m8NVM_ZtFoVKYhPC1n1CTJhU_GDecgrB3mg1l_nSyZDLZSdfmym1_oo_wTl6fXQPAExr_vy_rZc4xqF0hG523zmUrVnMwYbKKa2m3AtoFDFJynbWXzQ==&c=feY9tMrpzEeUGtaT6tHbyYVCJMNFm4QlE-7oOUIecBw81UumXjPS3g==&ch=v_Y5BVibf5q9IpuBWFxrPlUDVRDZhh4RcafSqhphMpokeCDdl99_Og==)
---
| | | [VOLUNTEER](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YBXgvtOBZI544MfUsjyY7AD4HFSUFbQvOezz2738Sn20DtFJW3lPN3VIdLu1rQLEI0TGEPGdP94hXaLH_TnevDUM2KH4PVIbPTAiIemIYNzkW0LV7yC6bzFzEHREyhzy2To2okiGUEXUAJmnh4RZZNfQ4Wpa2haT&c=feY9tMrpzEeUGtaT6tHbyYVCJMNFm4QlE-7oOUIecBw81UumXjPS3g==&ch=v_Y5BVibf5q9IpuBWFxrPlUDVRDZhh4RcafSqhphMpokeCDdl99_Og==)
---
| |
---
| -Team Ally
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YBXgvtOBZI544MfUsjyY7AD4HFSUFbQvOezz2738Sn20DtFJW3lPN3VIdLu1rQLEeWaE9_xqN6ohUQ8-cpDL1f8Yus3oN3UzokiBqvSjwbzTjVxzVQ3UQF3E2mc60ObpR7glX3jxm77N9hHvoiFYg8MtIJLI-Js4&c=feY9tMrpzEeUGtaT6tHbyYVCJMNFm4QlE-7oOUIecBw81UumXjPS3g==&ch=v_Y5BVibf5q9IpuBWFxrPlUDVRDZhh4RcafSqhphMpokeCDdl99_Og==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YBXgvtOBZI544MfUsjyY7AD4HFSUFbQvOezz2738Sn20DtFJW3lPN3VIdLu1rQLEVr7JV-VJeNn8YmeSDqI0YiPB-Jd0nDkjpFj36zwjFzObRmfXTzy0d23RoqqDY07gCEE6ZA60rVgW0GG6oHw6CYmuHV0kgbHf&c=feY9tMrpzEeUGtaT6tHbyYVCJMNFm4QlE-7oOUIecBw81UumXjPS3g==&ch=v_Y5BVibf5q9IpuBWFxrPlUDVRDZhh4RcafSqhphMpokeCDdl99_Og==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YBXgvtOBZI544MfUsjyY7AD4HFSUFbQvOezz2738Sn20DtFJW3lPN3VIdLu1rQLEhDU3f5bKBhkUrn5jXeXPMHyJ_4TX1d7N_vAAasM579PiNFGaa9NQ6NUwRDW7M_-Jt7kY9AFmW2KWkfkkgnlNKgEld4iPsaCXqIuy2pH8JC0=&c=feY9tMrpzEeUGtaT6tHbyYVCJMNFm4QlE-7oOUIecBw81UumXjPS3g==&ch=v_Y5BVibf5q9IpuBWFxrPlUDVRDZhh4RcafSqhphMpokeCDdl99_Og==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YBXgvtOBZI544MfUsjyY7AD4HFSUFbQvOezz2738Sn20DtFJW3lPN3VIdLu1rQLEbLZlrvRySbDBp8h_hlnA6xqSoAJ3OQXSZN8-eprK3YDMgM0TENrXv8yUAJIKuIB9-evYVCwUKXrVZpPLjSpwOMjNbtpiwGoXuoGqD2I4wenp_IOEPOOp2f8fIbDCB9CU&c=feY9tMrpzEeUGtaT6tHbyYVCJMNFm4QlE-7oOUIecBw81UumXjPS3g==&ch=v_Y5BVibf5q9IpuBWFxrPlUDVRDZhh4RcafSqhphMpokeCDdl99_Og==)

From county conventions to cottage meetings to delivering signs, we need your help! | | ... and it takes some GREEN to share Ally's message! If you've been meaning to donate, now is the time! Those convention booths and brochures aren't free. Please help us share our call for a different kind of leadership and a Republican Renaissance. == Everything helps! Ally has been burning through A LOT of fuel- at more than $4 per gallon- as she travels the state, and the campaign isn't paying for any of it. She's fiercely protective of donated funds and wants to make sure we have as much as possible to reach delegates and primary election voters. We do everything we can to make your contribution stretch. While other candidates have huge teams of paid staff, we have a skeleton team and so many dedicated and amazing volunteers (like Jolet- see more below). | Congratulations to Jolet and Troy! | If you volunteer on Team Ally, you may occasionally see Jolet Olsen's name in your inbox. Jolet is a super volunteer and our incredible field director. Honestly, we cannot afford her! She works tirelessly to make sure every detail is in place. She also has an amazingly supportive husband, Troy Barber. Troy and Jolet were married in a quiet ceremony during the Covid lockdown and this week they are finally getting the celebration they deserve. From Team Ally, Congratulations Jolet and Troy!! | | THANK YOU for being a part of #TeamAlly. We couldn't do any of this without you. | | | == | | | == | | | -Team Ally | == == == == | | | | | Ally For Utah | 3350 S. 2940 E. #9032, SLC, UT 84109 | | Sent by mailto:info@allyforutah.com powered by

It’s no wonder our message is resonating with families across our district and the country. Peter,
---
Being the target of witch hunts is nothing new to me. George Soros once paid a radicalized liberal prosecutor and her corrupt investigator to FALSIFY a case against me.
---
But now, anti-Trump RINOs like Mitch McConnell and his swamp operatives are also following Soros’ playbook to try and torpedo my U.S. Senate campaign all because I said I would NOT vote for McConnell as leader.
---
__They’ve stooped to a despicable and unforgivable new low of targeting my family to try and create false allegations against me just like Soros.__
---
**But we defeated Soros’ smear campaign – _with his bought-and-paid-for prosecutor and investigator now facing charges_ – and we will EXPOSE RINO McConnell as well.**
---

Hey, Fellow American, Joe Arpaio here.

I know I’ve been saying this for a long time, and I really hate that we’re still even talking about it, but the real threat to America is an open border and being dependent on foreign energy.

**No real border control equals more drugs and more human trafficking. No American-made energy and we get skyrocketing prices on gas, food, heating bills, and every other basic necessity.**

**_Liberals will never learn,_** that’s why we need to fight for America first policies and get our government back to where it was under Trump - **_thriving and independent._**

[**Can I count on your support to help me take this fight for America straight to the liberals targeting me?**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=9bc48dca0da94483954b00ba709f5b28&_e=R3V46fJ_PiueY65UcANVGfTET_aU9pHRBsGp9kK1FsO9SsT1zfXd-lt5nWfeF1PcUdhDpdmmIHO4-OlYpPxrLdjSLWpNXCK6o2J2BNMYCgqD-uK5Lq5lFUbdZ7ViXPExC2b7-x8bbn7oNCQRJ_1Rsw9nDyuWTGoKnOQ722CTcuaAfpkznn0aNN3y8IiZIMK-gD9AWnKpZXX_knVfwL_lHBjyCDq3ozipe0OAU590YiULwZtWJvNDUweGvK-H5vZT_rQCGos_nEVricLhPE9WeHeM1XUY9R91CG0Hll-cIQ_KrgFbrjQu0eGEU7d0HY4n0MMbhWDd_UEt0a3o6NntPgJIMZMpPMWKnykZezbmWkYczy2zvv3DXjbHDqL4NV4Wm_si7IqBITGdWrAmkfcBLoKqYee4gjwGK2Wv2ZzGttE%3D)

clean_body: Fellow American, don’t you agree that’s what we should be focused on? | No longer want to receive emails from Joe? You may . Hey, Fellow American, Joe Arpaio here. I know I’ve been saying this for a long time, and I really hate that we’re still even talking about it, but the real threat to America is an open border and being dependent on foreign energy. No real border control equals more drugs and more human trafficking. No American-made energy and we get skyrocketing prices on gas, food, heating bills, and every other basic necessity. Liberals will never learn, that’s why we need to fight for America first policies and get our government back to where it was under Trump - thriving and independent. We cannot back down from a fight like this. If you’re with me, then I hope to hear from you soon. Thank you, Joe Arpaio Candidate for Mayor of Fountain Hills Experience. Principles. Leadership. | | Paid for by Joe Arpaio for Fountain Hills, Arizona Mayor. Authorized by Joe Arpaio.

name: Dr. Neil Shah For Governor
subject: You Won't Believe Who Voted for This Omnibus Bill!
body:
| Peter -- Everyone knows Omnibus bills are unconstitutional, but unconstitutional is just another term for business as usual in Saint Paul. It's very clear that Tim Walz and the Radical Left have been destroying Minnesota, but it's hard to believe how it got to be this bad with Republicans in control of the Senate! One of the big reasons is there are too many weak Republicans going along with Tim Walz' terrible omnibus bills. The politicians running for Governor **all** voted to pass almost every single Omnibus Bill they've encountered. Americans know that Omnibus bills are **corrupt in nature** , filled with hundreds or thousands of pages of carefully crafted wording to benefit Lobbyists and Special Interests. Let's look at **HF2414** , the 2019 Health and Human Services (HHS) **Omnibus Bill** that funded Planned Parenthood, grew the government by nearly $2 Billion, and violated the Constitution. _Senators Jensen, Benson, and Gazelka ALL voted to pass this illegal, immoral monstrosity!!_ **Why vote yes when we can simply say no to funding Planned Parenthood?** What makes a career politician is their belief about right and wrong as an elected official. Some think that legislators need to adopt a "go along to get along" attitude until the time is right (for them) to fight in earnest for conservative values. For many, that time never comes. **I reject this idea** , as do conservatives all across this state. Right and wrong do not change once somebody wins an election. In order to beat Walz, we need a candidate who understands this and puts principles over politics. If we are going to beat Walz it is going to take a united GOP base, disaffected voters that President Trump tapped into, Independents, free-thinkers, moderates, young people, and racial minorities that have been **duped** by the Democrats. Our team can bring together all those voices without sacrificing an **ounce** of principle. Senate Republicans voting for socialism in exchange for stopping imaginary tax hikes is not going to energize voters. People want Big Tax Cuts, and Less Socialism. Our campaign is the only one with plans to **Eliminate the Income Tax.** The People know it will take an Outsider to win and actually represent them! Check out the [Save Sota Plan](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rPi4oAUq_ZRBeNS3BqV5iPiTY_pAlR_NA1vq62axn4GC&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=strongest_to_go_against_walz&n=1) so you know how I will work to save our state from the disaster created by Walz. Be sure to sign onto the [Plan](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rPi4oAUq_ZRBeNS3BqV5iPiTY_pAlR_NA1vq62axn4GC&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=strongest_to_go_against_walz&n=2) so we know you are a Patriot we can count on! The **DFL** and **DNC** will pour Millions of Dollars and resources into getting the abortion-loving, race-baiting **radical left** to support Walz. They will exploit **blue -collar workers** by dangling their jobs and healthcare over their heads. Walz will Champion absentee voting and Fight Voter ID, causing massive fraud and more avenues for cheating. Our grassroots campaign grows everyday at an amazing rate. The overwhelming amount of support we’re seeing strengthens our resolve that we have the right candidate to beat Tim Walz. | [](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rDwg01bMOn9gGWui5cl2dLg&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=strongest_to_go_against_walz&n=3 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rDwg01bMOn9gGWui5cl2dLg&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=strongest_to_go_against_walz&n=3)
---
Your support for our campaign and participation in the State Convention will guarantee we capitalize on this Red Wave.
With your [contribution](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rDwg01bMOn9gGWui5cl2dLg&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=strongest_to_go_against_walz&n=4) we will continue the hard work of restoring our God-given Rights.
**Thank you,**
Dr. Neil Shah
Conservative Candidate for Governor
ElectNeil.com
-=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · 855 Village Center Drive #245, North Oaks, MN 55127-3016, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=strongest_to_go_against_walz&n=5). -=-=-
Created with [NationBuilder](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=strongest_to_go_against_walz&n=6), software for leaders.

clean_body: This will be a special opportunity to discuss how electing an experienced federal, state, and local prosecutor will make Baltimore safe. | Hi friends, **On Wednesday, April 13th, I'll be in Baltimore**for an evening reception atthe home of my good friends, Paula and Steve Silverman, on Greenspring Valley Road. This will be a special opportunity to discuss how electing an experienced federal, state, and local prosecutor will make Baltimore safe. If you would like to attend, RSVP by replying to this email or emailing: mailto:tom@ganslerformaryland.com?subject=4/13 Baltimore Event RSVP&body=. Please remember to include the names of all attendees in your message. If you're able, . For more details, check out the information below, , or call my team at: (410) 353-7072. I hope you're able to make it! This act shows just how desperate Katie is for Trump’s approval – even attacking former colleagues for not liking her! Her power-hungry aggression is pathetic and makes it clear how she’s the last person we need in Congress.

You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.electroddorilas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_s=afb3cbaa41794404bb3bd438fa36546f&_t=kZ_El4SUREhEpTc0IwC0Mo-QleNNZBY764K38Ab6ZZUkFzVBl38FAGUUdF2xhqeILOuCbGRnJIZEOxQu4m749qBC8G9Msfns5XS8HZ0GNVYzXrIe7LOsXuoilvAVYv6hDfiohIUnuF4Fq89err30pUuIulMXooOAnzxcKUd8vA8%3D).

---
Fellow American,

If you’re reading this email right now, then you’ve already made a donation to my campaign for the U.S. House.

I cannot thank you enough.

Since we started soliciting donations online, we’ve raised more than $260,000, which is absolutely remarkable.

I really don’t want your gift to my campaign to mean nothing in the end. **[That’s why I’m asking you to match your previous gift today. Let me tell you why.](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=afb3cbaa41794404bb3bd438fa36546f&_e=HdtFV7xQnoPd9EvIX66XvcWqyh_bhkissgTfBxAWsWwCZDI_hl8n6Z2_p084gV1BSnCb55Xc499Ijq1LOW7RbjmZ3W-RWGIkfpOw3VdIlSTFgtJ6nANzG8fRC0MPVyxG3awMTzJx8CxvdkzxBToe8dXFzZb1IoejYZgz0LWZ59rp4Grby3_q3Jaf4EF8vGJ2W-n6iADEnjccEp2YSPDOTFNptHZzU9MStz6Cxtax6kbYfzUzk0JX-snHsudGpOlL2-GiluYWfA2E7NiPFEhsSjmXGT72ySWcSSQjCwDtpdrDqf5dQ5NSsnMMdG4mYobJxKG8KGhYMfhFsan900bYnohTJR2J184wK4n9NCBwz0AwD6Imk2To03YN-lmetIwJ1ICK-1xntgNzsmw3qBTlyBf7KQxatyyN2FobVGyKuLWXlfcir549Oi8fY1_weBvra3u-hzeo-GhPchCP8lVJqA%3D%3D)**

**We’re $15,000+ short of hitting our Q1 fundraising goal.** I firmly believe we’ll be able to raise the money we need before the end of the quarter (**in case you’re not counting, that’s one week from today**). However, there is a scenario in which we don’t reach our goal; in that scenario, I’m going to have to do some soul-searching, which includes considering whether or not to stay in the race.

Running for public office is not only expensive, but also very competitive. I have a Republican primary opponent with unlimited resources. I myself cannot fund this campaign.

What I can offer is to bring a sense of diversity to the House Republican Conference. If I make it into the general election, then I’ve got a very solid chance of becoming the **FOURTH BLACK Republican in Congress.**
