| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=afb3cbaa41794404bb3bd438fa36546f&_e=HdtFV7xQnoPd9EvIX66XvcWqyh_bhkissgTfBxAWsWwCZDI_hl8n6Z2_p084gV1BSnCb55Xc499Ijq1LOW7RbjmZ3W-RWGIkfpOw3VdIlSTFgtJ6nANzG8fRC0MPVyxG3awMTzJx8CxvdkzxBToe8dXFzZb1IoejYZgz0LWZ59rp4Grby3_q3Jaf4EF8vGJ2W-n6iADEnjccEp2YSPDOTFNptHZzU9MStz6Cxtax6kbYfzUzk0JX-snHsudGpOlLbaojsWytJBfZCIVA6-yVnSUfiG0tUUcySxf6luNvHnTOgVapPZzKyB8h9J6zEEOP_4xwlqkGWwGmDzXXZIOGb_JLiSQVzaXwOvtIHty-Nf64aFwOgzt-mfubGlplQ8cDiXc8qC-DkDxYR5MECCnqSBWznSA2npl9q8giEXHi86Q8SIKJ_PHFwYpjMpU9CtktjM5vLoPs3A78KsavAAO4Rg%3D%3D)

clean_body: We're seriously behind and need your immediate help if we're going to hit our first quarter fundraising goal. | No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may . Fellow American, If you’re reading this email right now, then you’ve already made a donation to my campaign for the U.S. House. I cannot thank you enough. Since we started soliciting donations online, we’ve raised more than $260,000, which is absolutely remarkable. I really don’t want your gift to my campaign to mean nothing in the end. We’re $15,000+ short of hitting our Q1 fundraising goal. I firmly believe we’ll be able to raise the money we need before the end of the quarter (in case you’re not counting, that’s one week from today). However, there is a scenario in which we don’t reach our goal; in that scenario, I’m going to have to do some soul-searching, which includes considering whether or not to stay in the race. Running for public office is not only expensive, but also very competitive. I have a Republican primary opponent with unlimited resources. I myself cannot fund this campaign. What I can offer is to bring a sense of diversity to the House Republican Conference. If I make it into the general election, then I’ve got a very solid chance of becoming the FOURTH BLACK Republican in Congress. I’m sorry to email asking you for money at this time, but I really don’t want your to be all for naught. One single individual has already given **$50 million** to Republican PACs around the country – including **$5 million** to the super PAC supporting Republican hedge fund manager Dave McCormick here in Pennsylvania.

McCormick has already spent **$7 million** on this campaign – and that’s just since January.

And not to be outdone by a fellow out-of-state millionaire, Dr. Oz has already spent more than **$8 million** on TV alone – the most of any candidate in the country.

Those are the kind of numbers we're up against in this race. We have our own ad on TV right now and a lot of momentum on the ground – but Conor isn't a millionaire and doesn’t take corporate PAC money. So we rely on supporters like you to help us compete with the big money.

**[This campaign is in your hands, friend. Will you donate $5 right now to help us keep our ad on TV?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43336599/336763818/-993140480?refcode=em22_220324_mccormickozattack&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDBiNDQzOC1hOWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VesParkqRZIC5xpuBK0AnAzlv-CTmkmvxSsfcFa1eYQ=)**
[CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43336600/336763819/-993140480?refcode=em22_220324_mccormickozattack&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDBiNDQzOC1hOWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VesParkqRZIC5xpuBK0AnAzlv-CTmkmvxSsfcFa1eYQ=)
McCormick and Dr. Oz are trying to buy Pennsylvania's open Senate seat – and they probably can if we don't stop them. They have that much money, and they're willing to say anything, lie about anything, and spend anything to win.

But the good news is we have a candidate who can beat them. Conor has beaten the Trump machine three times in three years in three Republican districts – with Trump campaigning against him and Republicans spending tens of millions of dollars attacking him.

They have big money – but we have people, we have actual ideas, we have a campaign and a candidate that knows how to win. And most importantly, we have you.

Ever since Conor's first election – in a district Trump won by 20 points, when no one thought we had a chance – you stepped up to give us a fighting chance. Now the stakes are even higher. The Republicans are even wealthier. And we need you more than we ever have.

**[A lot of people in Pennsylvania and across the country are counting on us to stop these out-of-state millionaires from buying this seat – and Conor is the only candidate who can do it. name: Josh Harder
subject: Disrespect of Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/KaFrbTPSIYPeL15KptrEZIFhVJzgU7AIsLpe8zHW7AM=/APYTqY6H9IiwwfbHuQSwoFfQqpjVXUwtP9PnZb5wsJQ=?refcode=E14713-20220324-ConfirmationHearings-header-SCOTUS-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Peter, Have you been watching the confirmation hearings for Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson? I'll admit it's been a practice in self restraint for me as I watch these Republican Senators treat her so disrespectfully. _We are talking about one of the most experienced judges to ever be nominated!_ Josh Hawley (a different Josh, I promise), Ted Cruz, Lindsey Graham. All of them went after her with such vitriol - walking out of the hearing, asking ridiculous questions, interrupting her.**It was hard for me to imagine them treating her with such disrespect if she were a white man.** It's hearings like this that remind me of what's at stake for our democracy. Confirming a Supreme Court justice is one of the most important jobs the Senate has. And yet we have Republican Senators who view it as their audition tape for Donald Trump or their presidential run. Is that really what our democracy is about? Who can go most viral yelling at the first African American woman nominated to the Supreme Court? I can only speak for me and my team, but I can tell you that's not why we do the work. We wake up every morning looking for opportunities to better our community. That's what service is for us. And, that's why we're also under attack by national GOP groups. They know they have to lie about our service in order to win back this purple seat. [**If you 're as frustrated as I am watching the confirmation hearings, I hope you'll consider giving to our campaign before our End of Quarter deadline. We have to stand up to this nastiness and show a different way of governing.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/KaFrbTPSIYPeL15KptrEZIFhVJzgU7AIsLpe8zHW7AM=/APYTqY6H9IiwwfbHuQSwoFfQqpjVXUwtP9PnZb5wsJQ=?refcode=E14713-20220324-ConfirmationHearings-SL-SCOTUS-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$9](https://act.myngp.com/el/KaFrbTPSIYPeL15KptrEZIFhVJzgU7AIsLpe8zHW7AM=/APYTqY6H9IiwwfbHuQSwoFfQqpjVXUwtP9PnZb5wsJQ=?express_lane=true&refcode=E14713-20220324-ConfirmationHearings-EL-SCOTUS-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=9)**

clean_body: | | Peter, Have you been watching the confirmation hearings for Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson? I'll admit it's been a practice in self restraint for me as I watch these Republican Senators treat her so disrespectfully. We are talking about one of the most experienced judges to ever be nominated! Josh Hawley (a different Josh, I promise), Ted Cruz, Lindsey Graham. All of them went after her with such vitriol - walking out of the hearing, asking ridiculous questions, interrupting her.It was hard for me to imagine them treating her with such disrespect if she were a white man. It's hearings like this that remind me of what's at stake for our democracy. Confirming a Supreme Court justice is one of the most important jobs the Senate has. And yet we have Republican Senators who view it as their audition tape for Donald Trump or their presidential run. Is that really what our democracy is about? Who can go most viral yelling at the first African American woman nominated to the Supreme Court? I can only speak for me and my team, but I can tell you that's not why we do the work. We wake up every morning looking for opportunities to better our community. That's what service is for us. And, that's why we're also under attack by national GOP groups. They know they have to lie about our service in order to win back this purple seat. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Your support means all the difference, Josh * = =

name: =?utf-8?Q?Attorney=20General=20Steve=20Marshall?=
subject: Re: My Testimony Today on Ketanji Brown Jackson
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ATTORNEYS GENERAL ASSOCIATION
body:
| | | [ ](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=74e5aa2e30&e=edf8a4d16d)
---
| Friend-

This is Alabama Attorney General Steve Marshall.

_Today, I testified to the Senate Judiciary Committee on the confirmation of Ketanji Brown Jackson, Joe Biden's nominee to replace Justice Breyer on the United States Supreme Court._

As crime continues to rise across the nation - and with police facing unprecedented attacks - **it is critical for our leaders to stand with the men and women in law enforcement.**

Today, I spoke on behalf of a community of experienced and dedicated prosecutors concerned with the consequences of weak-on-crime policies promoted by Justice Jackson.

**Across the nation, Republican Attorneys General are defending the rights of victims and combating the lawlessness of radical left activists and judges. **

With a Supreme Court seat in the balance, the work of conservative, Rule of Law Attorneys General has never been more important.

[**Can you contribute $10, $25, $50 or more to support Republican Attorneys General today?**](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=acb6810e93&e=edf8a4d16d)
---
| [Donate](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=d3e93bf577&e=edf8a4d16d "Donate")
---
| | Thank you for joining the fight to defend victims and back the blue, Friend.

Respectfully,

Steve Marshall
Alabama Attorney General
---

name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: SPEAKER GINGRICH TO HEADLINE JAKE EVANS RALLY
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| For immediate release March 24th, 2022
---
| SPEAKER GINGRICH TO HEADLINE JAKE EVANS RALLY
---
| Former Speaker Newt Gingrich will headline a campaign rally for America First candidate Jake Evans, a leading Republican for Georgia's 6th Congressional District next Thursday, March 31.
"Jake Evans is a strong, conservative fighter who will stand up for us in Washington against threats to our constitutional freedoms and way of life," Gingrich said in his endorsement of Jake. "I was proud to represent the people of the 6th District, and Jake is a dynamic young leader who can deliver on the America First agenda for a new generation. I've known Jake his whole life, and he'll do a great job for Georgia and the country."
WHAT: The Great American Comeback Rally WHERE: Reid Barn, 6844 Majors Road Cumming, GA 30040 WHEN: Thursday, March 31, at 5:30 p.m. HOW: Register at [jakeevans.org/great-american-comeback-rally](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZtZ39wzOE84e9RvG-o3F1_w5kZEFyioVw1cS3iGr4ky74UmW5T7RkoXIURbDqo1wsr_bIECRD7Hbko3ZVdBQ0YtFzeh2FO1FBcwiw708o4zSqH6Js9sXb8sKLUerSPEuIx7Xml5ClkPoVl7P4DpwDPYB1c06YvGL_zBiNIHXk5L7jH2FoPw9SQ==&c=m5xPgtK2_TNPWDna0DUplwBEU8V55Opjc_G_xnzdKZG8EwU2EpmDiQ==&ch=kfXQ_1Az8uxnDZfzKSFugc2L7_JaEd3JR5G9J8e7lpxPCPZXZIWZdg==)
The rally will include a performance by Christian musician Natasha Owens and will be broadcast live on the John Fredericks Show.
"The momentum of this campaign is growing every day, and having the support of trusted conservative leaders like Newt Gingrich shows who the true, America First conservative is in this race," Evans said. "I encourage Republicans throughout the 6th District to join us for this rally."
---

"I was proud to represent the people of the 6th District, and Jake is a dynamic young leader who can deliver on the America First agenda for a new generation. I've known Jake his whole life, and he'll do a great job for Georgia and the country." WHAT: The Great American Comeback Rally WHERE: Reid Barn, 6844 Majors Road Cumming, GA 30040 WHEN: Thursday, March 31, at 5:30 p.m. HOW: Register at == The rally will include a performance by Christian musician Natasha Owens and will be broadcast live on the John Fredericks Show. "The momentum of this campaign is growing every day, and having the support of trusted conservative leaders like Newt Gingrich shows who the true, America First conservative is in this race," Evans said. "I encourage Republicans throughout the 6th District to join us for this rally." | | == == == | | | | | Jake Evans for Congress | P.O. Box 1483, Roswell, GA 30077 | | Sent by mailto:news@jakeevans.org powered by

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: respectfully asking: can you PLEASE contribute $3 before our FEC deadline ends one week from today?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Right now we are at a critical inflection point in our country’s fight to end gun violence.
#

Friends -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make your first contribution before our FEC filing deadline ends in one week to support our mission: to end gun violence once and for all. Please give me a chance to explain why this request is so important right now.
Here is the truth:
Over 40,000 people die from gun violence in the U.S. each year. This is a uniquely American problem—but it doesn’t have to be this way.
I co-founded Giffords over nine years ago to work with local communities, politicians, and families directly impacted by gun violence to save lives. Together—with your support—we’ve passed over 465 laws nationwide to do just that and keep our communities safer from gun violence for generations to come.
But right now we are at a critical inflection point in our country’s fight to end gun violence.
For at least two more years, we have a president who will sign gun violence prevention legislation into law. But we need more gun-safety leaders in Congress who will use all their power to get Joe Biden those bills.
So we must elect these leaders to Congress! We need to show that our movement is strong and that we will not back down until we finally end gun violence.
That is why our FEC filing deadline—which ends one week from today—is so important. We will publicly report our fundraising numbers for everyone to see, and a good report will show to our opponents and the gun lobby that the people are behind our movement.
So I am asking, because I cannot do this work alone:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Giffords before our FEC deadline ends one week from today? Help us show the strength of our movement and elect a Congress that will get gun violence prevention legislation to the president’s desk.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?refcode=em220324-1-30&t=1&refcode2=1733_3935704_NW-oja&akid=1733%2E3935704%2ENW-oja)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220324-1-30&t=20&refcode2=1733_3935704_NW-oja&akid=1733%2E3935704%2ENW-oja)**
---
****

---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220324-1-30&t=22&refcode2=1733_3935704_NW-oja&akid=1733%2E3935704%2ENW-oja)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220324-1-30&t=23&refcode2=1733_3935704_NW-oja&akid=1733%2E3935704%2ENW-oja)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em220324-1-30&t=24&refcode2=1733_3935704_NW-oja&akid=1733%2E3935704%2ENW-oja)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?express_lane=true&refcode=em220324-1-30&t=25&refcode2=1733_3935704_NW-oja&akid=1733%2E3935704%2ENW-oja)**
---
****
Thank you so much. Your support means the world to me.
All my best,
Gabby Giffords
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?refcode=em220324-1-30&t=26&refcode2=1733_3935704_NW-oja&akid=1733%2E3935704%2ENW-oja)**

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Protect Freedom PAC
subject: PRESS: Protect Freedom PAC endorses Nathan Dahm for U.S. Senate in Oklahoma
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: March 24, 2022
---
| Contact: Michael Biundo michael@ascent-strategic.com, 202-809-6014
---
| |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC Endorses Nathan Dahm for U.S. Senate in Oklahoma
---
|
---
| Athens, GA - Protect Freedom PAC, an independent organization dedicated to supporting pro-liberty and freedom-minded candidates, has endorsed Nathan Dahm for U.S. Senate in Oklahoma.
Protect Freedom PAC has had independent expenditure campaigns totaling $11.5 million since 2018.
Protect Freedom PAC spokesman Michael Biundo stated:
"Nathan is a proven fighter for liberty, and he has been ranked as the most conservative member of the Oklahoma Senate. As a State Senator, he defended the Constitution, fought for tax cuts, protected the Second Amendment, and stood by our veterans and first responders. He is a true America First patriot, and we need him fighting for us in D.C."
Protect Freedom PAC endorsed and supported candidates for statewide and federal offices in 2018 and 2020 and looks to expand its reach for the 2022 cycle. The organization was founded by a team of veterans of the Donald Trump, Ron Paul, and Rand Paul campaigns for President.
---
| | |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC was founded for the purpose of supporting pro-freedom and liberty-minded candidates using the tactics, technology, and strategy that best fits each race individually. PFP was founded by seasoned political veterans with decades of national campaign experience, which includes working on the campaigns of both Ron and Rand Paul.
---
| |
---
| ###
---
|
---
| | Protect Freedom PAC | 196 Alps Rd, Ste 2-244, Athens, GA 30606
---

body:
| Hey there — I wanted to share this critical Kildee for Congress campaign update with you as soon as possible.

We just heard that **a second Republican opponent** is joining the race against Dan in his run to represent the new eighth congressional district. _The next 24 hours are critical. All eyes will be on our team to see if we have the grassroots strength to fend off this newest opponent._

**Can you rush a donation right away to help us raise an additional $5K before midnight tonight to fight back:**

**_[https://go.dankildee.com/a/mar22-goal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43327523/336723768/-409930011?amount=15&contactdata=DgxBaQoO8cbhQisyGd0eLoFUR+EPCxay5UbvZfIVwSKA792W+2cNNskX+/yhEZTWT5p7MrgnxWgZKna/M0yd6UWUGCOnj/Mnf+Gz9JZHOf56pC4GeUrqNMIv4UoqueDeJuJJ0UFHx5iAPgx4zaK2Lg==&refcode2=0329d177-8bab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=DK_EM_FR_3MO_20220324_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzI5ZDE3Ny04YmFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=72LOU0ZgH6uughon0WUFH-aWhpg2NkFWH2xXRTQ-guM=)_**

You already know that this is the toughest race Dan has ever faced, and this “toss up” district is one of a handful of districts that will determine control of the House of Representatives.

With our first Federal Election Commission deadline of 2022 just a week away and a SECOND OPPONENT joining the race, it’s more critical than ever that we are able to report strong fundraising numbers when our books close on March 31st at midnight.

**_[Stand with Dan now that a SECOND OPPONENT has jumped in the race with a donation right away.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43327526/336723770/-409930011?amount=15&contactdata=DgxBaQoO8cbhQisyGd0eLoFUR+EPCxay5UbvZfIVwSKA792W+2cNNskX+/yhEZTWT5p7MrgnxWgZKna/M0yd6UWUGCOnj/Mnf+Gz9JZHOf56pC4GeUrqNMIv4UoqueDeJuJJ0UFHx5iAPgx4zaK2Lg==&refcode2=0329d177-8bab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=DK_EM_FR_3MO_20220324_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzI5ZDE3Ny04YmFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=72LOU0ZgH6uughon0WUFH-aWhpg2NkFWH2xXRTQ-guM=)_**

Thanks,

Danya

—
Danya Rafiqi, Campaign Manager
Friends of Dan Kildee

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Bernie Sanders and Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I introduced Medicare for All in the House last year. Now Bernie’s introducing M4A in the Senate.
#
Peter — my friend, Senator Bernie Sanders, tweeted some timely words about Medicare for All.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/m4a_senate_2022/?source=em20220324-1126&t=1&akid=1126%2E420207%2EXW4DQJ)
I introduced the House version of Medicare for All, H.R. 1976, last year with more than half of the Democratic caucus as co-sponsors. Bernie re-introducing M4A in the Senate will be a huge moment in our fight for single-payer health care in America.
[**Will you add your name in support of Medicare for All at this critical moment? Bernie and I are counting on grassroots supporters to step up and show the strength of our movement for guaranteed, high quality health care for all!**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/m4a_senate_2022/?source=em20220324-1126&t=2&akid=1126%2E420207%2EXW4DQJ)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/m4a_senate_2022/?source=em20220324-1126&t=3&akid=1126%2E420207%2EXW4DQJ)**
Medicare for All is the popular, necessary, and urgent solution to a broken, for-profit health care system that leaves more than 87 million Americans uninsured or underinsured every year. This bill ensures everyone gets the care they deserve. That’s health care WITH primary care, vision, dental, prescription drugs, mental health, long-term supports and services, reproductive care, and more. It’s health care WITHOUT copays, private insurance premiums, deductibles, and other out-of-pocket costs.
The pandemic has only highlighted our broken, for-profit health system that was already leaving out far too many people and sticking folks with huge bills and a lifetime of medical debt — even as they cut pills in half and make impossible decisions between paying for their rent or their care.
We can no longer allow profits to get in the way of people’s health and well-being in this country. **With your help, Bernie and I will continue taking on corporations, Big Pharma, and the status quo as we organize and build up support for Medicare for All in Congress and across this country.**
[**If you’re with me and Bernie in the fight for Medicare for All, please add your name to support guaranteed health care for all. This is an important moment in our fight to ensure health care is a human right. Let’s put people over profits and care over corporations.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/m4a_senate_2022/?source=em20220324-1126&t=4&akid=1126%2E420207%2EXW4DQJ)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/m4a_senate_2022/?source=em20220324-1126&t=5&akid=1126%2E420207%2EXW4DQJ)**
We will prevail in passing single-payer health care legislation in America, but only if we keep our fight going.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220324-1126-footer&t=6&refcode2=1126_420207_XW4DQJ&akid=1126%2E420207%2EXW4DQJ)**

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=1126%2E420207%2EXW4DQJ)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress
clean_body: I introduced Medicare for All in the House last year. Now Bernie’s introducing M4A in the Senate. Peter — my friend, Senator Bernie Sanders, tweeted some timely words about Medicare for All. I introduced the House version of Medicare for All, H.R. 1976, last year with more than half of the Democratic caucus as co-sponsors. Bernie re-introducing M4A in the Senate will be a huge moment in our fight for single-payer health care in America. Medicare for All is the popular, necessary, and urgent solution to a broken, for-profit health care system that leaves more than 87 million Americans uninsured or underinsured every year. This bill ensures everyone gets the care they deserve. That’s health care WITH primary care, vision, dental, prescription drugs, mental health, long-term supports and services, reproductive care, and more. It’s health care WITHOUT copays, private insurance premiums, deductibles, and other out-of-pocket costs. The pandemic has only highlighted our broken, for-profit health system that was already leaving out far too many people and sticking folks with huge bills and a lifetime of medical debt — even as they cut pills in half and make impossible decisions between paying for their rent or their care. We can no longer allow profits to get in the way of people’s health and well-being in this country. With your help, Bernie and I will continue taking on corporations, Big Pharma, and the status quo as we organize and build up support for Medicare for All in Congress and across this country. We will prevail in passing single-payer health care legislation in America, but only if we keep our fight going. In solidarity, Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Emily Mellits
subject: Jocelyn needs you to donate today, friend
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend, remember what I said about our finance goals? The sky won’t fall if we don’t meet them, but our pro-democracy movement will still take a serious hit if we fail to raise the money we need to.

That’s why today, I’m speaking with a bit more urgency than normal. Our campaign is getting ready to launch into high gear and we’ve set a $10,000 fundraising goal to help us get started on the right foot. We've already raised $2,624 toward our goal, but we still have ground to make up in the next 6 days.

Friend, Jocelyn needs you to contribute today. Rush a contribution to our pro-democracy campaign fund and help ensure that she has the resources to compete all the way through November,

name: Laurie Teper
subject: Last Call for Saturday! Still Need County Coordinators
body:
Hi Team!
**If you or someone you know** has an interest in being the Orange or Granville County Coordinator, we NEED you! The role includes the following:
1. Be the point person for volunteers who are canvassing on the day of the event
2. Pick a meeting location centralized on the walk book map for volunteers to meet at

3. The walk books are on the Campaign Sidekick app. Utilize the map to divide up the volunteers who are there to canvass on Saturday

4. Convey any important dates of Courtney's events and election day for volunteers to jot down
5. _Optional_ \- Purchase a small amount of food/water/coffee/plates/cups/napkins for volunteers for that day. Keep receipts. Reimbursed. Hopefully a volunteer will fill this role on signup genius
6. Search for community events that Courtney can attend and/or set up a "vendor" table in your county

Please let me know ASAP.

**This Saturday, March 26 we are Door Knocking in Alamance County from 8:00-12:00. Meet at Daily Donuts, 1067 S. Main Street in Graham. (See attached flyer)**

Sign up HERE: <https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0E4CADA629A3FACE9-canvassing>

We want everyone to be prepared so please arrive on time, wear comfortable shoes, look over the attached canvassing guidelines, bring car phone chargers, your enthusiasm and smiles! Light refreshments will be provided, instructions given including a review of using the app and we will head out about 8:45.

** _Don 't forget to download the free Campaign Sidekick App._** ** _When you do, send me a text or email with your first/last name, address, phone number and email. We need this information to activate the App._** To familiarize yourself with it, here is a link to a 6 minute video on how to use the Campaign Sidekick App for Door Knocking <https://vimeo.com/438191866>. We will also go over instructions the morning of the event.

Bring a friend to help! We encourage 2 people to stay together. Only one of you needs the App.

Print and bring the attached word document on issues that Courtney stands for. Familiarize yourself with it. If a voter has a question regarding a particular issue, you can refer to it.

WEAR YOUR COURTNEY GEELS T-SHIRT! If you don't have one, we will have them on Saturday (free). If you want to purchase a sweatshirt, the cost is $50, available as well.

Take photos while you are canvassing so we can get it out on social media. If you have a voter who is excited to vote for Courtney, ask their permission to take a photo while they hold a palm card or flyer and if we can post it on social media.

Brad Kirby is our Social Media Director. Please send him photos at _[m](mailto:bkirby7@gmail.com)[edia@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:edia@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)_

If you cannot door knock, phone banking is an option but it is secondary to our needs right now. ** _You still need the Campaign Sidekick App, I still need your information, and you need to sign up at the SignUp Genius link listed above_**. Here is a link to a 2 minute video on how to use the app for phone banking _<https://vimeo.com/496983629>._ I can also meet with you on a Zoom call to watch the video together and answer any questions you might have.You just need to let me know prior to Friday.

Please spread the word for volunteers and send them my way!

Follow us on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/courtneygeels), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/courtneygeels/), and give us a like on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/CourtneyGeelsForCongress) to keep up with Courtney.

Be sure to like and share!

I look forward to seeing some awesome volunteers this Saturday!

__Fighting for Truth, Justice and Unity Together!__
Laurie Teper
Volunteer Coordinator
Courtney Geels for Congress NC04
Email: [volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)
Cell: (847)212-5651
[courtneygeelsforcongress.com](http://courtneygeelsforcongress.com)

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Major Union Endorsement
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
I’m excited to announce that Unite Here! Local 7, a major union representing workers in the hotel, gaming, and food service industries across Maryland, has just endorsed my campaign for Governor.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Endorsement_UniteHereLocal7_1200x1200.png]
To our union brothers and sisters, I am deeply humbled by your trust and support. Maryland’s hospitality workers have been hit especially hard by this pandemic. If I’m blessed to be Maryland’s next Governor, I’ll proudly partner with our unions to ensure that no working family is left behind as we fight to build an economy that works for everyone. Together, we’ll strengthen the middle class by creating 100,000 new jobs that offer family-supporting wages, affordable healthcare, and concrete paths to home ownership.
This latest endorsement announcement is yet another indication that our people-powered movement continues to gain momentum. My campaign already has the endorsements of over 100 current and former elected officials, as well as the endorsements of several major unions within Maryland. And recent polls consistently show that our campaign has a strong lead over the rest of the field. With your support, we’re going to win this Primary Race, take back the Governor’s Mansion, and lift our working families into the high quality of life that they deserve.
Fresh off the heels of this major endorsement announcement, will you help spread the word about our growing coalition of support by sharing with your friends on social media?
Click here to view and reshare on Facebook. [https://www.facebook.com/photo/?fbid=539082137583852&set=a.422901372535263]
C lick here to view and retweet on Twitter. [https://twitter.com/peterfranchot/status/1507028726084784138/photo/1]
Click here to view and reshare on Instagram. [https://www.instagram.com/p/Cbfi9jrM-87/]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/403a7fdd-1aaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/edd966d1-8eab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGQ5NjZkMS04ZWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zTpt_o8BdF5QTqpfhh02fSbP5Q4t2-FkV1v5QVDSwDo=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: Liz G. from Team Andy Kim
subject: Why are we asking for donations this early?

Our goal is to tell voters about Andy's stellar work in Congress and get people excited about reelecting him. **It might seem early.** But the earlier we start, the better. Your support will help with essential campaign expenses like:
* Paying for campaign offices _(coming soon!)_
* Hiring field organizers
* Producing campaign materials

Andy's got a tough race ahead of him. Republicans think New Jersey's 3rd District is theirs for the taking. After redistricting, there are thousands of new voters in the 3rd District. We need to build our grassroots movement early and get as many people excited about Andy as we can. **[Give now. name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: 12 years of the Affordable Care Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/iHX2Qom9mUC_HXXFBY_wBg2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/iHX2Qom9mUC_HXXFBY_wBg2]
Yesterday was the 12th anniversary of the Affordable Care Act becoming the law of the land and expanding access to health care for millions of Texans and for people across the country.
Throughout the pandemic, we have seen firsthand the critical importance of access to affordable health care — especially in Texas, which has the highest rate of uninsured people in the U.S.. In the 12 years since the ACA was signed into law, we have also seen relentless efforts to dismantle it — even though better access to more affordable health care benefits everyone in our communities.
When I first ran for Congress in 2018, people told me often and unambiguously that protecting the ACA was essential to them. In fact, one voter stepped out of line at the polls to walk over to me and tell me she was voting for me because she was currently undergoing chemotherapy and would lose her coverage — and, therefore, her life — if the ACA was repealed.
And it is with her words in mind that, as a member of Congress, I have stood up to those threats to our health care and worked to build on the ACA’s historic coverage and protections. I’ve worked to cap health care premiums and expand protections for Americans with pre-existing conditions. And I led efforts to create even more financial incentives for hold-out states like Texas to expand Medicaid coverage to millions of Americans, including more than 1.4 million uninsured Texans, when my bill to expand Medicaid was made part of the American Rescue Plan.
And in a country where patients pay two to three times as much for the same medications as people in other countries, I’m working to lower the cost of prescription drugs — because no one should have to ration their prescriptions or choose between buying life-saving medications or paying rent.
So many people have shared with me how important the ACA has been for them and their families. Today, I want to hear your thoughts — will you take our survey and tell me what access to affordable health care means for you and your family? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/iHX2Qom9mUC_HXXFBY_wBg2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/iHX2Qom9mUC_HXXFBY_wBg2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/iHX2Qom9mUC_HXXFBY_wBg2]
Together, we can do anything,
https://www.mobilize.us/fletcherforcongress/event/437315/?emci=7b656f8d-2d89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=fc1a1d1a-4089-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=29495980 [https://www.mobilize.us/fletcherforcongress/event/437315/?emci=7b656f8d-2d89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=fc1a1d1a-4089-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=29495980]

name: Nina Turner
subject: You can bet I'll fight like hell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
Someone’s value in this world is not defined by their job or their paycheck.
#

Hi — it's Nina.
One of the most common questions I get when talking to voters, to reporters, or to anyone else is very simple: "Why am I running for Congress?"
I'll tell you why: **It's because I'm ready to fight like hell for the working people of Ohio.**
I’m a first-generation college graduate and a former community college professor. You can bet I’ll fight like hell for student debt relief and to make public colleges and universities tuition-free.
I grew up the oldest of 7 children in a working-class family and got my first job at just 14 years old to help pay the bills. You can bet I’ll fight like hell to make the minimum wage a real, living wage.
And I lost my mom at the young age of 42 in large part because she couldn’t afford the medical care she needed throughout her life. You can bet I’ll fight like hell for Medicare for All.
Every time I’m on the doors talking to my neighbors, or even just out and about in Cleveland, I hear similar stories. Hard working people are doing the best they can to get by in a system that was not designed for them to succeed, but they just can’t get ahead.
Someone’s value in this world is not defined by their job or their paycheck. But right now, we have a political system that prioritizes the concerns of the wealthy and well-connected over the needs of the rest of us.
This campaign is grounded in the belief that something different is possible — that together we can do extraordinary things and that our people-power will stand up and do what is right for ourselves and the generations to come.
**I’m incredibly proud of that fact, but it means that the only way we’re going to have the resources to win this race is if we stand together and _fight_ to make it happen, so I have to ask:**
**[Can you please make a contribution to our campaign for Congress? We’re up against a big FEC deadline just one week from today, and we’re counting on a surge of support before then to hit our goals and ensure we have what it takes to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43338495/336774569/-1971788355?refcode2=4d5ec5e9-b0ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220324-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDVlYzVlOS1iMGFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qdsMWyMrdJCo2XhCY1XFqJouZff0wGqEUuVX8uIYsNU=)**
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43338496/336774570/-1971788355?refcode2=4d5ec5e9-b0ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220324-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDVlYzVlOS1iMGFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qdsMWyMrdJCo2XhCY1XFqJouZff0wGqEUuVX8uIYsNU=)**
Thank you for everything.
With these hands,
Nina Turner

clean_body: Someone’s value in this world is not defined by their job or their paycheck. Hi — it's Nina. One of the most common questions I get when talking to voters, to reporters, or to anyone else is very simple: "Why am I running for Congress?" I'll tell you why: It's because I'm ready to fight like hell for the working people of Ohio. I’m a first-generation college graduate and a former community college professor. You can bet I’ll fight like hell for student debt relief and to make public colleges and universities tuition-free. I grew up the oldest of 7 children in a working-class family and got my first job at just 14 years old to help pay the bills. You can bet I’ll fight like hell to make the minimum wage a real, living wage. And I lost my mom at the young age of 42 in large part because she couldn’t afford the medical care she needed throughout her life. You can bet I’ll fight like hell for Medicare for All. Every time I’m on the doors talking to my neighbors, or even just out and about in Cleveland, I hear similar stories. Hard working people are doing the best they can to get by in a system that was not designed for them to succeed, but they just can’t get ahead. Someone’s value in this world is not defined by their job or their paycheck. But right now, we have a political system that prioritizes the concerns of the wealthy and well-connected over the needs of the rest of us. This campaign is grounded in the belief that something different is possible — that together we can do extraordinary things and that our people-power will stand up and do what is right for ourselves and the generations to come. I’m incredibly proud of that fact, but it means that the only way we’re going to have the resources to win this race is if we stand together and fight to make it happen, so I have to ask: = = Thank you for everything. With these hands, Nina Turner * Paid for by Nina Turner for Us Nina Turner for Us PO Box 91956 Cleveland, OH 44101 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, to unsubscribe.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: A few thoughts on why health care access is a priority for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
I firmly believe that we should all be able to access necessary treatments without worrying about the expense. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43338645/336775374/823540626?refcode=ea.7668ef2f-b1ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.7668ef2f-b1ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjY4ZWYyZi1iMWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FGOfDovMqptcl-v2NNP154ImAKXXvmxNOVGqJiorU4s=&emci=021987f2-7fab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7668ef2f-b1ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
Hi Peter, Over the past two years, North Carolina and the rest of the world have been through a lot. Personally, I expected many challenges as Governor, but a global pandemic was not one of them. But I knew it was my job to lead, and I have done that to the best of my ability. These last two years are putting a bright light on the fact that quality health care _must_ be accessible to all of us—not just some of us. I have a few more thoughts to share with you about health care access in our state, but first, **you need to know that my Democratic allies and I are working hard to expand Medicaid coverage to include more than 500,000 additional North Carolinians.** Unfortunately, Republican legislators have long been blocking our progress. Now the GOP has drawn districts to try and regain a supermajority in the legislature after our November election. If they achieve that supermajority, we won’t be able to continue our work on the issues—like Medicaid expansion—that matter most. **Partisan gerrymandering is already posing a major challenge to Democrats’ prospects. We all need to stand together to have a shot at blocking a GOP supermajority in November.** **[Click here to contribute and power our efforts to support Democratic candidates>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43338646/336775375/435245919?refcode=ea.7668ef2f-b1ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.7668ef2f-b1ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjY4ZWYyZi1iMWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FGOfDovMqptcl-v2NNP154ImAKXXvmxNOVGqJiorU4s=)** Keeping our state safe and healthy is a priority. That starts by making sure folks can pick up their prescriptions or visit the doctor without worrying about breaking the bank. When people are able to stay up-to-date on essential, preventative care services, their quality of life is improved and chronic disease rates are reduced overall. **Meanwhile, when an unexpected illness does occur, we have to make sure that families are able to cover the cost of a visit to the ER or any necessary treatment.** Peter, I know that Medicaid expansion is the right path for North Carolina. Studies of states that have already passed expansion have shown positive impacts on health outcomes and health care affordability. North Carolinians deserve accessible, quality health care. I’ll continue to advocate for Medicaid expansion in Raleigh, but we won’t be able to move the needle if Republicans gain a supermajority. **We _must_ elect Democratic leaders who know how crucial Medicaid expansion is. [If you’re able, consider a donation of any size to help power my work supporting Democratic candidates >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43338647/336775378/435245919?refcode=ea.7668ef2f-b1ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.7668ef2f-b1ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjY4ZWYyZi1iMWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FGOfDovMqptcl-v2NNP154ImAKXXvmxNOVGqJiorU4s=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43338650/336775381/435245919?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=ea.7668ef2f-b1ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.7668ef2f-b1ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjY4ZWYyZi1iMWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FGOfDovMqptcl-v2NNP154ImAKXXvmxNOVGqJiorU4s=)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: A Win for Judicial Watch…and the Voters!
body:
Judicial Watch just announced a major victory for cleaner elections! We settled our federal lawsuit against North Carolina after the state removed over 430,000 ineligible names from its voter rolls!

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch just announced a major victory for cleaner elections! We settled our federal lawsuit against North Carolina after the state removed _over 430,000 ineligible names from its_ _voter rolls_!
**This is a win for the voters in both North Carolina and across the nation, because clean voter rolls help ensure cleaner elections.**
The U.S. Election Assistance Commission released data in June 2019 showing that voter registration rates in a significant proportion of North Carolina's counties were close to, at or above 100% of their age-eligible citizenry - _statistics considered by the courts to be a strong indication that a jurisdiction is not taking the steps required by law to remove ineligible registrants_.
On _December 11, 2019_ , Judicial Watch sent notice-of-violation letters to the state and two of its counties, warning them that lawsuits would be filed if timely action were not taken to clean up the voter rolls.
We filed our lawsuit in _April 2020_ , and we argued that **North Carolina** , **Mecklenburg County** (Charlotte) and **Guilford County** (Greensboro) failed to make reasonable efforts to remove ineligible voters as required by the federal National Voter Registration Act (NVRA).
On _August 16, 2021_ , the federal government released data that showed North Carolina removed hundreds of thousands of names from voter rolls - after we sued!
In a settlement, Judicial Watch told the court;
**_" The total number of inactive registrations reported by North Carolina dropped from about 1.2 million in 2019, to about 765,000 in 2021 (a 36% drop)...Data for Mecklenburg County and Guilford County also showed improvement...In light of Defendants' substantial increases in removals of ineligible voters since this suit commenced, Plaintiff has determined in good faith that this legal action should not be pursued."_**
Because of our federal lawsuit, **North Carolina** removed hundreds of thousands of ineligible voters (people who have died or moved away).
**As I said ...this is a win for the voters of North Carolina, and for Judicial Watch!**
[And I ask for your support with a _special tax-deductible contribution_ today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58378&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=) for us to continue our investigations and lawsuits - including ACTIVE federal lawsuits to clean up voter rolls in Colorado and Pennsylvania!
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58378&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
---

Thanks to the commitment of our supporters, **North Carolina** follows Judicial Watch voter roll clean-up successes in **California, Kentucky, Ohio** and **Indiana** - _and we are right now prepping lawsuits against other states to force them to clean up their voter rolls_! _We 're doing_ _the legal work that the corrupted Justice Department REFUSES to do_!

The Biden Justice Department is run by appointees hostile to list maintenance and other election integrity effort...so it is up to Judicial Watch.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58378&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
---

We don't have the deep pockets of government to fund our independent investigations and litigation...instead, we rely on you and other Americans who share our commitment to upholding the rule of law.

Judicial Watch is breaking new ground fighting to keep our elections honest, but none of what we have accomplished would be possible [without the financial support we receive from our friends and supporters!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58378&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)

I urge you to join with us today!

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58378&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)

name: Bob Menendez
subject: I'm supporting an insulin price cap. Are you with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate Menendez for Senate
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43329740/336734234/309742506?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzgxNTJiZC05MWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u_CxwPWu1BQ7Ozib_LWAgyV5OrNfqR3kRjyUVRXcu8k=&emci=4ad7157d-8dab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7c8152bd-91ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=28243070)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43329741/336734235/1183759724?refcode=em22_220324_pricecapinactives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzgxNTJiZC05MWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u_CxwPWu1BQ7Ozib_LWAgyV5OrNfqR3kRjyUVRXcu8k=)
Friend – **every single American deserves access to affordable, accessible, and reliable health care. But for far too long, for far too many families, this has not been the reality.**

Over 37 million Americans – including 10 percent of New Jerseyans – living with diabetes, face exorbitant costs for the very insulin they need to survive. _Monthly costs can range between $200 and $600_. And because of that, the American Diabetes Association reports that 1 in 4 diabetic patients ration or even skip insulin doses. **_That's why I'm calling on Congress to pass the Affordable Insulin Now Act immediately._**

**The Affordable Insulin Now Act would ensure patients pay no more than $35 per month for insulin in all forms. This is a critical step in addressing the skyrocketing costs of health care that burdens far too many Americans.**

clean_body: | = Friend – every single American deserves access to affordable, accessible, and reliable health care. But for far too long, for far too many families, this has not been the reality. Over 37 million Americans – including 10 percent of New Jerseyans – living with diabetes, face exorbitant costs for the very insulin they need to survive. Monthly costs can range between $200 and $600. And because of that, the American Diabetes Association reports that 1 in 4 diabetic patients ration or even skip insulin doses. That's why I'm calling on Congress to pass the Affordable Insulin Now Act immediately. The Affordable Insulin Now Act would ensure patients pay no more than $35 per month for insulin in all forms. This is a critical step in addressing the skyrocketing costs of health care that burdens far too many Americans. Every day as I step onto the Senate floor, I'm fighting for New Jersey families, for vulnerable Americans across the country, and for access and affordability when it comes to health care. Because no American should have to make a choice between putting food on the table or accessing vital medicines and treatments. Thank you for continuing to stand with us. – Bob Menendez = *

name: John Fetterman
subject: New ad just dropped 👀
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This makes our job a lot harder and much more expensive.
#
Derek,
I ran for Lieutenant Governor to change things in PA.
They said I couldn't. But we won.
Now, we’re taking on Washington. _That’s what our brand-new TV ad is all about._
Check out our new ad, live *now* on screen in Philly (the 4th biggest media market in the United States), Scranton, and Erie 👇
**[With our primary less than two months away, we can’t afford to give up a single minute of airtime to the GOP. Help us keep this powerful new ad on the air so our campaign can reach millions of Pennsylvania households »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45900?refcode=em20220324-5112&t=1&akid=5112%2E434096%2EkEvz5c)**
**[WATCH + DONATE »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45900?refcode=em20220324-5112&t=2&akid=5112%2E434096%2EkEvz5c)**
Creating and launching ads like this isn’t cheap, Derek. From cameras to video editing to buying time in multiple PA media markets, launching these ads is a costly and labor-intensive component of our campaign. But it’s necessary to help us reach + mobilize the unlikely voters across PA.
Especially given the fact that our GOP opponents and their super PACs have just _surpassed_ $40 million on their TV and radio ad spending.** This makes it a lot harder and much more expensive to keep our ads up, especially in the areas we really want to reach.
**[That’s why it’s so crucial that you chip in what you can today to help us reach every Pennsylvanian, power our campaign, and send me to be Democrats’ 51st vote in the U.S. Senate. What do you say, Derek — can you spare a few bucks to keep this ad on the air?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45900?refcode=em20220324-5112&t=3&akid=5112%2E434096%2EkEvz5c)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45900?refcode=em20220324-5112&amounts=5&t=22&akid=5112%2E434096%2EkEvz5c)**
Thank you, Derek. Every single dollar we raise is going to be crucial to helping our campaign and its message reach every single community in PA.
More soon,
John Fetterman
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220324-5112-footer&t=23&refcode2=5112_434096_kEvz5c&akid=5112%2E434096%2EkEvz5c)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=5112%2E434096%2EkEvz5c)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=5112%2E434096%2EkEvz5c)

name: Morris Katz, Campaign Manager
subject: This is what running for real change looks like:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US
body:
We’re just days away from reaching our end-of-quarter deadline and we’re still behind — if we don’t turn things around soon, we’ll have to make some tough decisions.
#
Hi, it’s Morris, Erica Smith's Campaign Manager. 👋 I’m reaching out today because we’re currently **15% short** of our $40,000 end-of-quarter goal.
We’re just a few days away from reaching our end-of-quarter deadline on March 31st and it’s imperative that we meet this goal. That’s why I have to ask: [**_Will you donate $5 or anything you can to help us reach our goal, and have the resources Erica needs to continue pushing for real change in NC-01?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/46316?t=1&akid=1024%2E3698%2E1_GigX)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/46322?refcode=em20220324-1024&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1024%2E3698%2E1_GigX)**
**The stakes couldn’t be higher****.** If we don’t have strong fundraising numbers for our final FEC deadline before our primary election, not only do we lose out on one of the last times to show North Carolinian voters the strength of our movement, BUT we’ll also have to start making some tough spending decisions.
Now more than ever, we have to start ramping up our organizing, advertising, and hiring to reach as many voters as possible — but if we don’t get the small-dollar donations we depend on we’ll have to cut down on these critical efforts.
There aren’t many people in Congress who have lived the struggles that Erica has. **But there are millions of people in North Carolina who have.**
Erica doesn’t have generational wealth or wealthy donors in her back pocket to fund our campaign.
Erica has had to drop out of school due to unstable wifi. She’s had to navigate an unforgiving for-profit medical system that forced her to take on an additional job due to high medical bills. She’s struggled just to put food on the table. And that’s why she understands exactly what the NC-01 community needs.
_She was born and raised right here, and she’s lived through some of the toughest challenges communities across NC-01 face._
[**_Please, contribute $5 or anything you can to help us meet our $40,000 end-of-quarter goal and help us ramp up our campaign efforts before our primary election day._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/46316?t=21&akid=1024%2E3698%2E1_GigX)
Thank you for your support,
Morris Katz
Campaign Manager
Erica Smith for U.S. House

Erica Smith is a single mother, educator, and three-term state senator, who grew up on her family farm and spent her life fighting for rural Eastern North Carolina. Now, she’s running to represent NC-01 — _her home district_ – in Congress, where she’ll fight for economic justice and workers’ rights, universal healthcare, voting rights, and more. **[Add a donation to help us protect this competitive, open U.S. House seat and give power back to working people »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/46322?refcode=em20220324-1024-box&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1024%2E3698%2E1_GigX)** **[Donate](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/46322?refcode=em20220324-1024-box&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1024%2E3698%2E1_GigX)**
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220324-1024-footer&t=24&refcode2=1024_3698_1_GigX&akid=1024%2E3698%2E1_GigX)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=25&akid=1024%2E3698%2E1_GigX)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=1024%2E3698%2E1_GigX)

PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US

name: Shuwaski Young
subject: No snoozers here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shuwaski Young for Congress
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/91271/images/Young%20Email%20Header.png]
Friend,
Mississippi Today recently wrote that the congressional elections this November “are expected to be snoozers.” And that the no federal seat is “naturally ‘competitive.’”
This isn’t the first time that I have been underestimated. Or that I’ve taken a leap of faith where others would not dare to cross the path.
In our new politics, we cannot vote merely along party and racial lines. We must vote along our values to move the 3rd Congressional forward:
📚 Education
💡 Opportunity
💵 Community Investment
⚖️ Equity
🌻 Sustainable Growth
And to live out these values, sometimes that means taking chances.
I look at my own life. I joined the National Guard at 17. I jumped at opportunities to work on Barack Obama and Hillary Clinton’s presidential campaigns. I took a chance when I decided to dedicate my life to public service. And when I decided to return to Mississippi to raise my family.
I’m proud to say that those chances have all paid off in spades.
You’ve probably made your fair share of chances that have paid off, too.
We don’t snooze through elections here in Mississippi. Our neighborhoods are where we live, work, play, dream, and thrive, and they are worth every chance we can take. Can I count on you to chip in $15 towards our campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=express_lane_snoozers032422_15]
Can’t donate but still want to be involved? Check out my website and social media pages!
WEBSITE [https://www.shuwaskiyoung.com] FACEBOOK [https://www.facebook.com/shuwaskiyoungMS] TWITTER [https://www.twitter.com/shuwaskiyoung] INSTAGRAM [https://www.instagram.com/shuwaskiyoung]
Thanks so much,
Shuwaski Young
Candidate for MS-3
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?refcode=em_snoozers032422]
Paid for by Shuwaski Young for Congress
Shuwaski Young for Congress
PO Box 151
Jackson, MS 39205-0151
United States

name: Team Marcus Flowers
subject: Republicans are beginning to break with Marjorie Taylor Greene
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
|
---
[](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUyosYylZuqGIBXpM9vMs9_nqFFuDwoNXiQTmpA_0zRg8&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220324_beatable&n=1) Hundreds of people across the U.S. have reached out to our campaign to say that they support Marcus, but they’re concerned that defeating a Republican in Marjorie Taylor Green’s district isn’t possible. **Look, it’s going to be tough. But there are a few reasons to be optimistic:**
* The Georgia legislature redrew the Congressional maps, making the 14th District more Democratic and more ripe for a Democratic challenger.
* Republicans in Georgia’s 14th District are beginning to break with Marjorie Taylor Greene -- many are running against her or are promising to vote blue this November.
* Marjorie Taylor Greene didn’t have an opponent in 2020. In 2022, she is going to face Marcus Flowers.

[**Marcus can win, but he needs our help. Can you donate $20 or more to our campaign to help us send Marjorie Taylor Greene into political retirement?**](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUyosYylZuqGIBXpM9vMs9_nqFFuDwoNXiQTmpA_0zRg8&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220324_beatable&n=2) | [](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUyosYylZuqGIBXpM9vMs9_nqFFuDwoNXiQTmpA_0zRg8&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220324_beatable&n=3 "DONATE NOW >>") [DONATE NOW >>](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUyosYylZuqGIBXpM9vMs9_nqFFuDwoNXiQTmpA_0zRg8&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220324_beatable&n=3)

name: Roger Marshall
subject: Do you stand with America’s truckers?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL
body:
96https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/stand-with-truckers-ema
il?utm_campaign=2022march24hf&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgrc
Friend — I stand with Kansas and America’s truckers, not with
bureaucrats and their tyrannical mandates.

That’s why I was more than
happy to give truckers from Salina, Kansas a tour of the Capitol.
It’s sickening that some Democrats apparently thought these truckers
were a security threat worth reporting to the Department of Justice.

name: Glenn Beck
subject: We’re rushing support to Ukraine. You can help.
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentime
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zt5jqcc6iqp1igv6dunpkvb6g7ru8c9rfi1trbn0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkpqj3cpiekor9d1jmoqjcd9jm5p78cdjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr6apr4cjjjddpgstij1c36ear75cb6cdo72o9ks1rm9cpkc8qeap3lc5in4t5gcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti61j71d5lmgrr4sr66pgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5ge8pb5cdj61oh5u)
| | | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z789tj0kaaq3ovuqg7cbg1sdij05iaddnmqerv30_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shimaor6c3h2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z5lp28nru0lgri70nhfm9r6ibfsag2bhcf1sf8n0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shimaor6c3h2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zi7e0luvggjnolngha9ebmq4dsmdc1v35mtdg3c8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shimaor6c3h2bs)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zfae5dtmvnt3jffhsd1bh4bkoolnv94hbdfb6mlo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shimaor6c3h2bs)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z63jfo69o663b3s4vbk3og5is3ibcq33no352imo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shimaor6c3h2bs)

Friend,
Data from our recently published Greenberg poll makes one thing clear – I am the strongest challenger to Democratic frontrunner Peter Franchot.
As a candidate who has accepted public financing, who has spent NO money on paid media and who has the lowest “burn rate” among the leading candidates, this campaign has solidified our position as the main competition to a frontrunner whose support is startlingly soft after four statewide campaigns and 35 years in public office.
Nancy and I are going to change the way Maryland politics are done, but we can’t do it without your help. We are in a race against time to raise the resources we need to reach every corner of our blessed state. If we do that, we will win. Our message is what gets us across the finish line.
Will you donate today and help us? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

Peter,
Once again, _Liberal Lisa Murkowski_ is playing to the Radical-Left again.
This time instead of working to fix inflation, lower gas prices, fight for Alaska energy jobs, or care about our children's education, **Lisa is focused on killing pre-born babies.**
_Why fight for jobs or our future when you can just abort the Americans who would one day work in them?

clean_body: | | | | You have to see this... | Peter, Once again, Liberal Lisa Murkowski is playing to the Radical-Left again. This time instead of working to fix inflation, lower gas prices, fight for Alaska energy jobs, or care about our children's education, Lisa is focused on killing pre-born babies. Why fight for jobs or our future when you can just abort the Americans who would one day work in them? Liberal Lisa Murkowski has got to go! Kelly will fight for the lives of our future Americans, not work to kill them. As the ONLY Pro-Life candidate, it is clear where Kelly stands. We need a conservative in office who will fight for the rights of the marginalized. Thank you, Team Tshibaka STAY UP TO DATE WITH KELLY AND THE CAMPAIGN BY CLICKING THIS LINK: "ckq.io/yl3xzs" | | | | ==
