subject: Did you see this message from Kara?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43331632/336742964/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWQwZDE0MS05N2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J19sd5Hfm4wy6BYruLlfetU88TeBW9pNaXD1p8ornOE=)

Team,

We wanted to make sure you saw Kara's message about the fight for equal pay for women. It's an issue of basic fairness, and one we can't afford to ignore if we truly believe in equity and opportunity.

**[When keeping up is harder than ever, working women shouldn't have to operate at an unfair disadvantage. Can you join Kara in the fight for equal pay by signing your name to urge Congress to pass The Equal Pay for Equal Work Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43331633/336742966/-609160141?ms=em22_220324_equalpay2&refcode=em22_220324_equalpay2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWQwZDE0MS05N2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J19sd5Hfm4wy6BYruLlfetU88TeBW9pNaXD1p8ornOE=&emci=43973aa7-e1aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=45d0d141-97ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369896)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43331634/336742967/-609160141?ms=em22_220324_equalpay2&refcode=em22_220324_equalpay2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWQwZDE0MS05N2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J19sd5Hfm4wy6BYruLlfetU88TeBW9pNaXD1p8ornOE=&emci=43973aa7-e1aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=45d0d141-97ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369896) Unequal pay doesn't only affect women – it hurts entire families.

Far too many were already struggling to find affordable childcare, health care, housing, and eldercare. Unequal pay shouldn't be another burden on top of that load.

Kara is ready to take action, because it's the right thing to do, and because she's seen how important equal pay is first-hand. As a working mother on a budget, as a social worker with student loans, and as someone who has recently had to help care for her own aging parents, she understands the challenges that so many working families on Long Island face.

**[This is the moment for Congress to get the job done on equal pay. Can you show that you stand with Kara by adding your name to our petition urging Congress to act now on The Equal Pay for Equal Work Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43331635/336742968/-609160141?ms=em22_220324_equalpay2&refcode=em22_220324_equalpay2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWQwZDE0MS05N2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J19sd5Hfm4wy6BYruLlfetU88TeBW9pNaXD1p8ornOE=&emci=43973aa7-e1aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=45d0d141-97ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369896)**
[SIGN YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43331636/336742969/-609160141?ms=em22_220324_equalpay2&refcode=em22_220324_equalpay2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWQwZDE0MS05N2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J19sd5Hfm4wy6BYruLlfetU88TeBW9pNaXD1p8ornOE=&emci=43973aa7-e1aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=45d0d141-97ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369896) Thank you,

Team Hahn

\----- Begin forwarded message -----

Team,

We need to keep fighting for equal pay.

Last week, people across the country marked Equal Pay Day – and it was energizing to see so many calls for change on such an important issue. But if we're going to make real progress, we need more than one day to show why equal pay is so critical – and so urgent.

This is a moment when costs are rising on essentials: healthcare, housing, childcare, eldercare, and so much more. It's unconscionable that families have to face those increases while women are making less money for every hour they work.

**[Now is the time to step up. So, I'm asking you to join me today in showing your support. The Equal Pay for Equal Work Act is before Congress NOW. Will you sign your name, and join me in calling for its passage?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43331637/336742970/-609160141?ms=em22_220324_equalpay2&refcode=em22_220324_equalpay2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWQwZDE0MS05N2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J19sd5Hfm4wy6BYruLlfetU88TeBW9pNaXD1p8ornOE=&emci=43973aa7-e1aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=45d0d141-97ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369896)**

As someone who spent years as a single mom, I know how hard it can be to make ends meet – especially when everything from groceries to gas is getting more expensive. With all these extra costs, unequal pay makes getting by much more challenging.

We're also just beginning to emerge from a period of economic challenges that fell especially hard on working women, particularly women of color. Millions of women left the workforce during the pandemic. As the economy continues to bounce back, women shouldn't be put at a disadvantage.

It's well past time to say enough is enough.

**[We can rise to the challenge of this unprecedented time, close the wage gap and give families more of what they need to get by. Can you join me and urge Congress to pass the Equal Pay for Equal Work Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43331638/336742971/-609160141?ms=em22_220324_equalpay2&refcode=em22_220324_equalpay2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWQwZDE0MS05N2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J19sd5Hfm4wy6BYruLlfetU88TeBW9pNaXD1p8ornOE=&emci=43973aa7-e1aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=45d0d141-97ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369896)** [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43331639/336742972/-609160141?ms=em22_220324_equalpay2&refcode=em22_220324_equalpay2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWQwZDE0MS05N2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J19sd5Hfm4wy6BYruLlfetU88TeBW9pNaXD1p8ornOE=&emci=43973aa7-e1aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=45d0d141-97ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369896) And of course, this isn't just about the challenges of the moment.

I have two daughters. My oldest daughter is just getting her career off the ground and my younger daughter is working hard in school as she thinks about her future. They deserve to know that they'll earn equal pay for equal work. ALL our daughters deserve a future where their work will be valued equally with their male colleagues. And they should see that we're taking action to make it happen.

**[I'm urging Congress to pass the Equal Pay for Equal Work Act, and I hope you'll stand with me. Can you sign your name to call for equal pay?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43331640/336742973/-609160141?ms=em22_220324_equalpay2&refcode=em22_220324_equalpay2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWQwZDE0MS05N2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J19sd5Hfm4wy6BYruLlfetU88TeBW9pNaXD1p8ornOE=&emci=43973aa7-e1aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=45d0d141-97ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369896)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43331641/336742974/-609160141?ms=em22_220324_equalpay2&refcode=em22_220324_equalpay2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWQwZDE0MS05N2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J19sd5Hfm4wy6BYruLlfetU88TeBW9pNaXD1p8ornOE=&emci=43973aa7-e1aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=45d0d141-97ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369896)
Thank you,

Kara Hahn

clean_body: | = Team, We wanted to make sure you saw Kara's message about the fight for equal pay for women. It's an issue of basic fairness, and one we can't afford to ignore if we truly believe in equity and opportunity. Unequal pay doesn't only affect women – it hurts entire families. Far too many were already struggling to find affordable childcare, health care, housing, and eldercare. Unequal pay shouldn't be another burden on top of that load. Kara is ready to take action, because it's the right thing to do, and because she's seen how important equal pay is first-hand. As a working mother on a budget, as a social worker with student loans, and as someone who has recently had to help care for her own aging parents, she understands the challenges that so many working families on Long Island face. Thank you, Team Hahn \----- Begin forwarded message ----- Team, We need to keep fighting for equal pay. Last week, people across the country marked Equal Pay Day – and it was energizing to see so many calls for change on such an important issue. But if we're going to make real progress, we need more than one day to show why equal pay is so critical – and so urgent. This is a moment when costs are rising on essentials: healthcare, housing, childcare, eldercare, and so much more. It's unconscionable that families have to face those increases while women are making less money for every hour they work. As someone who spent years as a single mom, I know how hard it can be to make ends meet – especially when everything from groceries to gas is getting more expensive. With all these extra costs, unequal pay makes getting by much more challenging. We're also just beginning to emerge from a period of economic challenges that fell especially hard on working women, particularly women of color. Millions of women left the workforce during the pandemic. As the economy continues to bounce back, women shouldn't be put at a disadvantage. It's well past time to say enough is enough. And of course, this isn't just about the challenges of the moment. I have two daughters. My oldest daughter is just getting her career off the ground and my younger daughter is working hard in school as she thinks about her future. They deserve to know that they'll earn equal pay for equal work. ALL our daughters deserve a future where their work will be valued equally with their male colleagues. And they should see that we're taking action to make it happen. Thank you, Kara Hahn | Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a must win for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help. Make a recurring donation to sustain our movement for the long haul and send Kara to Congress! = = *

On the other hand, David Schweikert continues to vote against the best interests of working Arizonans. That's why it's time David Schweikert be removed from office. Delina will bring a no-nonsense, pragmatic approach to Congress as she fights for Arizonans. However, it's crucial we hit our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline to make that happen.
Can you chip in now to help us reach our goal? Any amount will help us finally move Arizona in the right direction >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/delina_disanto_for_congress?refcode=X_022422_EOQ_A&amount=25&recurring=1]

name: Herschel Walker
subject: We’re being attacked for our faith
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
While the country is falling apart, the media would rather talk about my religious beliefs and the fact that I go to church on Sunday. Three polls show we are leading this Georgia Senate race, but we need your help to keep our momentum strong. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e3dae84da2ef4b05a74480c1dbe84f96&_e=kWhy66giLdHA-TI5D8coCiAemHc1c_SGIxJfZgnlp_AQ8s6reIaQkJ81E-VSqWnVLbky7saP9JEGiaUt8WeHAoIa6TyVirSYNfx600laXM-EKELJGedgPyWU-tq79iSgYEj1zZRiM03EbVtirJcksidGgUFoOUqn7PT2nfwuzpH7fw1saKlPR8vOqiQRq5Rhe3sKRJAdsJ-FvB4egLbeIU63xrRHox204GmQ6uMGW6KIHe_1gNbVn5wMPfv8GQyUIelpHUNuFzhxb7wN3Eqp3MAXYxMQ5v0krVcuaBADR0nAa31yYxc_dOtx2dCls3cMxfPiCtcr7lN9SjP51O0NP_LrBwtBW-PqdL5GFXD6QM-y2RR_FUr0v3By-AKErkfoLq4ps5G5IJxeteVz4m1G5sGh-U34y1tHsOoN1BTxm3O2YQgy3u85DAzMl5ao3LNjizdxUuKC1TGuzWOug2O1aGHw0M9rPmSbiesouLduGaNF-gpOQGZwaWi_MSY2TFVfq1_vT29xFDGtAGJoqZBVtzyj5cg30lEsBqWERXRQh2wDOOpFJjz3oECzsbzMOs-1TBrGNNcyZDIp8aCBpl3MO8IsfEdiTqhEHDehqYeL_qpSqd36P31TUn_yGlm1UunH)

---
Peter,

Last week I was attacked by the Left for sharing my Christian faith in a church.

The country is unraveling thanks to President Biden and Senator Warnock, yet the media would rather talk about my religious beliefs and the fact that I go to church on Sunday.

_**No wonder our nation has problems.**_

I’m glad we live in America where you can practice any religion you want - or no religion at all. The United States was founded on the belief that any person could openly practice his or her faith without fear of persecution.

However, the Left only likes the 1st Amendment when the speaker agrees with _their_ position.

We’re reaching out to you today to ask you a few simple questions: **[Do you believe in the freedom of religion in the United States?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e3dae84da2ef4b05a74480c1dbe84f96&_e=kWhy66giLdHA-TI5D8coCiAemHc1c_SGIxJfZgnlp_AQ8s6reIaQkJ81E-VSqWnVLbky7saP9JEGiaUt8WeHAoIa6TyVirSYNfx600laXM-EKELJGedgPyWU-tq79iSgYEj1zZRiM03EbVtirJcksidGgUFoOUqn7PT2nfwuzpH7fw1saKlPR8vOqiQRq5Rhe3sKRJAdsJ-FvB4egLbeIU63xrRHox204GmQ6uMGW6KIHe_1gNbVn5wMPfv8GQyUIelpHUNuFzhxb7wN3Eqp3MAXYxMQ5v0krVcuaBADR0nAa31yYxc_dOtx2dCls3cMxfPiCtcr7lN9SjP51O0NP_LrBwtBW-PqdL5GFXD6QM-y2RR_FUr0v3By-AKErkfoLq4ps5G5IJxeteVz4m1G5sstsBxfFo-aeNgEcuStYhbuZf6KzEAdVI0-RTLEELAIZyOk8f5P77E7ckZqqfaDfJMrMQwdWwWN-2rv1G9o787tD3wD9vhkfzA38bgTpH87mkPGk7Z_gLzec0LJ7VM-SqkepeJ_8BaDlOB20VQehnzC3z1_YDk-s6ub_pG5htOm3GydmcsEPXEcBT8gsB_Y9NUgjR5s4nUPO73JdVY1XKzSvFqDVEspJGUt8sFi1gAJ)**

| [** Begin Religious Freedom Survey -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e3dae84da2ef4b05a74480c1dbe84f96&_e=kWhy66giLdHA-TI5D8coCiAemHc1c_SGIxJfZgnlp_AQ8s6reIaQkJ81E-VSqWnVLbky7saP9JEGiaUt8WeHAoIa6TyVirSYNfx600laXM-EKELJGedgPyWU-tq79iSgYEj1zZRiM03EbVtirJcksidGgUFoOUqn7PT2nfwuzpH7fw1saKlPR8vOqiQRq5Rhe3sKRJAdsJ-FvB4egLbeIU63xrRHox204GmQ6uMGW6KIHe_1gNbVn5wMPfv8GQyUIelpHUNuFzhxb7wN3Eqp3MAXYxMQ5v0krVcuaBADR0nAa31yYxc_dOtx2dCls3cMxfPiCtcr7lN9SjP51O0NP_LrBwtBW-PqdL5GFXD6QM-y2RR_FUr0v3By-AKErkfoLq4ps5G5IJxeteVz4m1G5hRzkODP9nd65a8hAQAl5u1J-rKqJxz0kNmtQRzCoyXkLlyRUtqvuNFYOEO73RK7jwNftpYeNtKSNKBg-_t85VKnabghegSldEVGFciew0X62T2xv50tIHmjqpUL4D7XFVyWtZuWanfgzdxPyfRaslepwkPa1uldgvPAbI0pRCudSCBAq7alFpNXRlHDJMNoo03XaudqbmrP_tXsNXC9ejX4S8U5e5A62KHSeF7gLlyC)
---

The Media’s attacks on my remarks show how out of touch they are when it comes to matters of faith.

Everyone is entitled to their own religious views, including candidates for office. It is critical that elected officials support and defend the Constitution of the United States - **[and that includes defending the freedom to practice religion openly without fear of persecution.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e3dae84da2ef4b05a74480c1dbe84f96&_e=kWhy66giLdHA-TI5D8coCiAemHc1c_SGIxJfZgnlp_AQ8s6reIaQkJ81E-VSqWnVLbky7saP9JEGiaUt8WeHAoIa6TyVirSYNfx600laXM-EKELJGedgPyWU-tq79iSgYEj1zZRiM03EbVtirJcksidGgUFoOUqn7PT2nfwuzpH7fw1saKlPR8vOqiQRq5Rhe3sKRJAdsJ-FvB4egLbeIU63xrRHox204GmQ6uMGW6KIHe_1gNbVn5wMPfv8GQyUIelpHUNuFzhxb7wN3Eqp3MAXYxMQ5v0krVcuaBADR0nAa31yYxc_dOtx2dCls3cMxfPiCtcr7lN9SjP51O0NP_LrBwtBW-PqdL5GFXD6QM-y2RR_FUr0v3By-AKErkfoLq4ps5G5IJxeteVz4m1G5q5gHxlNZZwzjwKyATVMm-gxfg8aE4-s6qm5otZ5LXeqD-oOmtrMz0peTWECONF_UsRgosSsuOOE6y8TKB2HMlo-zEhSucuNabxtsrwbBi66ofvZZdSfH0YGeQtGNBkET7N8IltwX7AN51RMUwRwoicSA2T66-4upPQ5nrVVy8iNOhg0-mIkSkby51IWpyzjnNrfxFTHobQSkyCdmdb4PHugPaqYvB5u8rOtWfaMBW29)**

Peter, I’m not going to back down from sharing my faith in God. _**It’s the most important thing in my life.**_

We’d like to know how you feel on the matter. **[Will you take our Religious Freedom Survey today?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e3dae84da2ef4b05a74480c1dbe84f96&_e=kWhy66giLdHA-TI5D8coCiAemHc1c_SGIxJfZgnlp_AQ8s6reIaQkJ81E-VSqWnVLbky7saP9JEGiaUt8WeHAoIa6TyVirSYNfx600laXM-EKELJGedgPyWU-tq79iSgYEj1zZRiM03EbVtirJcksidGgUFoOUqn7PT2nfwuzpH7fw1saKlPR8vOqiQRq5Rhe3sKRJAdsJ-FvB4egLbeIU63xrRHox204GmQ6uMGW6KIHe_1gNbVn5wMPfv8GQyUIelpHUNuFzhxb7wN3Eqp3MAXYxMQ5v0krVcuaBADR0nAa31yYxc_dOtx2dCls3cMxfPiCtcr7lN9SjP51O0NP_LrBwtBW-PqdL5GFXD6QM-y2RR_FUr0v3By-AKErkfoLq4ps5G5IJxeteVz4m1G5mf1Vn15okgv2mKfqERrYsYT1ffCpr23-w0rnGknDoadGsLvs_6f3XOm9X3rWBDQPcPI43iHXfK73p4D4UUM_ea80WOzlNLdw9Sy0O2aMNi1B9mGwqGFJVaCc1jydMmS_yxMzV-BxHtv8Jo4iNLFZ02pmn6G81-qEeOZQ2RgWahSkbQftYabYRyTPO0RUI19N7PkP3Iy8CFjt8YlxhgxCcqe0xqPJSoq8lXYZq-H5QVy)**

Thanks for letting us know where YOU stand.

God Bless,

clean_body: While the country is falling apart, the media would rather talk about my religious beliefs and the fact that I go to church on Sunday. Three polls show we are leading this Georgia Senate race, but we need your help to keep our momentum strong. | Peter, Last week I was attacked by the Left for sharing my Christian faith in a church. The country is unraveling thanks to President Biden and Senator Warnock, yet the media would rather talk about my religious beliefs and the fact that I go to church on Sunday. No wonder our nation has problems. I’m glad we live in America where you can practice any religion you want - or no religion at all. The United States was founded on the belief that any person could openly practice his or her faith without fear of persecution. However, the Left only likes the 1st Amendment when the speaker agrees with their position. We’re reaching out to you today to ask you a few simple questions: | The Media’s attacks on my remarks show how out of touch they are when it comes to matters of faith. Everyone is entitled to their own religious views, including candidates for office. It is critical that elected officials support and defend the Constitution of the United States - Peter, I’m not going to back down from sharing my faith in God. It’s the most important thing in my life. We’d like to know how you feel on the matter. Thanks for letting us know where YOU stand. God Bless, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. **[The fact is that Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson has consistently given softer-than-recommended sentences to child sex offenders.](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9y6nVng-MnpFmiUgrxDphbHbK8AEduu8Y2pwp6LPatbj2ulr7V7hTpamTq4d0t5RQNXWHqnQ1f4Ce1XAPuuHA2ze3F2-plVvodHoMNX6d7ydSf-1wP2l99LIFQ3hoIDjsnwk7h5dt4tgBH-YbT6_cuxYukcf1etu1ExnAUlYreb4yAD5jrCJJML-3DA-5WzrmZmCcI5hoHL1_ogKE6QrBMt-qHzHcGax6GzF_OEg7z_t-ZjB1H3ruy3dhqK9hsfyXcDhc6pBWSOcZDdEvgp7vKE0R71mZzWVTLEl8yq9YNSlDHfF8lcd8UizfsLT-6y_QxyqgBO0FnBQZON0rA9VAXHU9VOQ-X2BWKwrRucB_iyE&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=726106232637642063&n=5)** And the Democrats appear totally unbothered by that fact.

name: Greater Georgia
subject: GREATER GEORGIA EXPOSES LIBERAL INDOCTRINATION IN ATLANTA PUBLIC SCHOOLS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, MARCH 24 GREATER GEORGIA EXPOSES LIBERAL INDOCTRINATION IN ATLANTA PUBLIC SCHOOLS ATLANTA -- Today, as [reported](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dtr9xmF_KupFWTeuTA-NvhqRbcixgHAIb6Fh4srWf-FDQGv1sYebfPaqD0SCCOqMk2nhizL_UhKBT3QBw0Jb3jtIK9H6ivmjES5EEizsZrc6p2laALGNZOgz4Au2CbU6o2e3QflxNefyqVgNiahflol4yY0nI5aa67RfYKx3ZrSuI-fgL2ZuFAfUBKXDzsrMOLlqco2Mf8nxTlV3Eg64ew==&c=3Il43bcCGoR8yBVfXV-ogKkKRMkEv49LR8hyEvxc4vIk4JS7AxROwQ==&ch=OShZYkvuifti2-Gxxg5kLyIVKZJW7WsJOYTcZGUFo4w0VAavYlDJxA==) by Fox News, Greater Georgia exposed new evidence of indoctrination by the New Georgia Project (NGP) and other liberal groups, who are supplying a radical voting rights curriculum to high school students within the Atlanta Public School system. The curriculum, part of the "Democracy Class Atlanta" program, is designed to "train up the state's next generation of progressive champions," [according](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dtr9xmF_KupFWTeuTA-NvhqRbcixgHAIb6Fh4srWf-FDQGv1sYebfPaqD0SCCOqMNGzDkaGwOVdPNA-OIELUVHPGlYOAcN83kYKUXZUSRQb8WGX9mggnx0PVsZjHpzlSnVnojqxKYghcMMNV_Vb-FhT7UscEfTn3R76nR817Z8Uc2E3ajncRNjQkbhnkkXWMnDgx9mXzJDagZDh6K5ArUSbyrt_TLfxO1V0l6Ux0deZVUUHTKU094wTGp8_cYfww&c=3Il43bcCGoR8yBVfXV-ogKkKRMkEv49LR8hyEvxc4vIk4JS7AxROwQ==&ch=OShZYkvuifti2-Gxxg5kLyIVKZJW7WsJOYTcZGUFo4w0VAavYlDJxA==) to NGP COO Kendra Cotton. Founded at the beginning of the 2021 school year, Democracy Class Atlanta [represents](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dtr9xmF_KupFWTeuTA-NvhqRbcixgHAIb6Fh4srWf-FDQGv1sYebfPaqD0SCCOqMNGzDkaGwOVdPNA-OIELUVHPGlYOAcN83kYKUXZUSRQb8WGX9mggnx0PVsZjHpzlSnVnojqxKYghcMMNV_Vb-FhT7UscEfTn3R76nR817Z8Uc2E3ajncRNjQkbhnkkXWMnDgx9mXzJDagZDh6K5ArUSbyrt_TLfxO1V0l6Ux0deZVUUHTKU094wTGp8_cYfww&c=3Il43bcCGoR8yBVfXV-ogKkKRMkEv49LR8hyEvxc4vIk4JS7AxROwQ==&ch=OShZYkvuifti2-Gxxg5kLyIVKZJW7WsJOYTcZGUFo4w0VAavYlDJxA==) a partnership between NGP, Rock the Vote, and several other left-leaning organizations with the stated goal of teaching "civic education" to Atlanta's voting-age students. At least 2,000 students have enrolled in the program across about a dozen public high schools. According to documents obtained via an open records request by Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler, the Democracy Class Atlanta curriculum revolves around a consistent narrative that states like Georgia are actively working to "restrict the freedom to vote in the wake of record voter turnout...in 2020." The lesson plans teach students to support same-day voter registration, voting rights for felons, and abolishing voter ID requirements. The curriculum also promotes radical election laws like the For the People Act and the John Lewis Rights Advancement Act - and even encourages students to "take civic action," including by "signing up with Rock the Vote and New Georgia Project to help mobilize other young people." "Civics curriculum is an important part of an education that prepares students for lives of leadership and service," said former U.S. Senator and Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler. "But allowing partisan groups like The New Georgia Project to advocate for liberal policies in the classroom is wrong. Schools fail to serve the best interests of their students when they promote a political agenda and push them into partisan activism rather than academic success. Greater Georgia is shining a light on the Left's indoctrination - and encouraging parents to stay vigilant for the partisan groups that are infiltrating their classrooms and influencing their kids." NGP has a record of targeting young voters for activism, and has previously [stated](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dtr9xmF_KupFWTeuTA-NvhqRbcixgHAIb6Fh4srWf-FDQGv1sYebfPaqD0SCCOqMjomv7VdciJ5nxGMLMkD-0AHsQxZGnsuGTuCZJCnvSgdIgAIBqBnqNW481lshLTgckm7lbhvfuDjMEizj4_3z-yrH65tFPR7vKp19KsxCFFuHZO3edj8HPE_A2hpvf9ud2WiWv2GvQhvsu5-onCMvBQ==&c=3Il43bcCGoR8yBVfXV-ogKkKRMkEv49LR8hyEvxc4vIk4JS7AxROwQ==&ch=OShZYkvuifti2-Gxxg5kLyIVKZJW7WsJOYTcZGUFo4w0VAavYlDJxA==) its goal to create a class of "super voters" who will act as "members, activists, and organizers who show up with us on our campaigns."

clean_body: | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, MARCH 24 GREATER GEORGIA EXPOSES LIBERAL INDOCTRINATION IN ATLANTA PUBLIC SCHOOLS ATLANTA -- Today, as == by Fox News, Greater Georgia exposed new evidence of indoctrination by the New Georgia Project (NGP) and other liberal groups, who are supplying a radical voting rights curriculum to high school students within the Atlanta Public School system. The curriculum, part of the "Democracy Class Atlanta" program, is designed to "train up the state's next generation of progressive champions," == to NGP COO Kendra Cotton. Founded at the beginning of the 2021 school year, Democracy Class Atlanta == a partnership between NGP, Rock the Vote, and several other left-leaning organizations with the stated goal of teaching "civic education" to Atlanta's voting-age students. At least 2,000 students have enrolled in the program across about a dozen public high schools. According to documents obtained via an open records request by Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler, the Democracy Class Atlanta curriculum revolves around a consistent narrative that states like Georgia are actively working to "restrict the freedom to vote in the wake of record voter turnout...in 2020." The lesson plans teach students to support same-day voter registration, voting rights for felons, and abolishing voter ID requirements. The curriculum also promotes radical election laws like the For the People Act and the John Lewis Rights Advancement Act - and even encourages students to "take civic action," including by "signing up with Rock the Vote and New Georgia Project to help mobilize other young people." "Civics curriculum is an important part of an education that prepares students for lives of leadership and service," said former U.S. Senator and Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler. "But allowing partisan groups like The New Georgia Project to advocate for liberal policies in the classroom is wrong. Schools fail to serve the best interests of their students when they promote a political agenda and push them into partisan activism rather than academic success. Greater Georgia is shining a light on the Left's indoctrination - and encouraging parents to stay vigilant for the partisan groups that are infiltrating their classrooms and influencing their kids." NGP has a record of targeting young voters for activism, and has previously == its goal to create a class of "super voters" who will act as "members, activists, and organizers who show up with us on our campaigns." | ### Media Contact: mailto:press@greatergeorgia.com | | | | Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc. name: Team Booker
subject: Can you join us, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Charles launched this campaign because he was tired of seeing failed
leadership from people like Rand Paul. He’s running to represent the
hardworking, loving, and resilient people of Kentucky — not just the
biggest donors.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/sign/personal-endorsement-2022?source=em20220324-1684&t=1001&akid=1684%2E346206%2EKiC7bR ]It’s time to bring our commonwealth the change it deserves. If you
agree, will you personally endorse Charles’s campaign for U.S.
Senate?[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/sign/personal-endorsement-2022?source=em20220324-1684&t=1002&akid=1684%2E346206%2EKiC7bR ]Endorse Charles →

Charles is fighting for a world where every community in Kentucky is safe
and prosperous. Where everyone is healthy and everyone can get a good
union job. Where we all have the same quality health care as our
politicians and have more money in our pockets, where we can breathe clean
air and drink clean water.

But in order to get there, we need to defeat politicians like Rand Paul
who are standing in the way. But Rand knows that most Kentuckians aren’t
happy with his work, so he’s worked very hard to disenfranchise our votes
and suppress our voices. We can’t let him win.

We’re kicking this campaign into high gear in the final weeks before
Primary Day,
Peter. We’re hosting events,
we’re traveling across Kentucky, we’re reaching out online and in person,
making connections with voters who are fed up with Rand Paul’s excuses.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/sign/personal-endorsement-2022?source=em20220324-1684&t=1003&akid=1684%2E346206%2EKiC7bR ]If you’re with Charles in this fight to take back Kentucky’s seat in
the Senate — can we count on you to add your name and personally endorse
our movement?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/sign/personal-endorsement-2022?source=em20220324-1684&t=1004&akid=1684%2E346206%2EKiC7bR ]Endorse Charles →Once you’ve added your name to endorse our campaign,
be sure to forward this email to at least five people — we need to make
sure our message reaches far and wide, and the best way we can do that is
when supporters like you reach out to family and friends!

We’re so glad to have you with us in this movement,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220324-1684-footer&t=1005&refcode2=1684_346206_KiC7bR&akid=1684%2E346206%2EKiC7bR

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1684%2E346206%2EKiC7bR

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Sen. Grassley says women are afraid of hard work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
Trust me, women do not fear hard work – growing up, I watched as my mom and my grandma worked hard to care for our family and give back to their communities.
| | |
---
Peter,

With hearings taking place for President Biden's Supreme Court nominee, Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson, I wanted to take a moment to talk about Sen. Grassley (R-IA) and his role on the Senate Judiciary Committee.
This committee, which has existed for more than 200 years and is incredibly influential, was composed entirely of men until the 1990s.
If you ask just about anyone why so few women have served, they'll point to the historical barriers that women face and the out-of-touch elites who run far too much of Washington **–** **but when reporters asked Sen. Grassley, he told them it's because****women just don't want to do the work.**
**When I tell you his comments fire me up, I mean it.** **[Peter: I promise you no one is going to work harder than I will to defeat Sen. Grassley and fight for working families in Washington. Please, will you stand with me and chip in $5 right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43341262/336785677/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk823-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2FhMDQ1Yi1iY2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nCGMVFKCGTaJCgyv-HJNFeTwZWhmdhmjBbAKWBQjyKs=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43341263/336785678/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk823-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2FhMDQ1Yi1iY2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nCGMVFKCGTaJCgyv-HJNFeTwZWhmdhmjBbAKWBQjyKs=)
---
Beliefs like these have no place anywhere in our society, but especially not in the U.S. Senate. **Trust me, women do not fear hard work – growing up, I watched as my mom and my grandma worked hard to care for our family and give back to their communities. I took their work ethic to heart because I know that it takes many hard days’ work to win real victories for the people you serve.**
**First in the Iowa State House and then in the U.S. House, it was my priority to deliver for the folks who elected me.** Chuck Grassley, on the other hand, has made it his mission to politicize our courts: blocking President Obama's nominee for 293 days, ramming through Kavanaugh's controversial appointment and refusing to properly listen to Dr. Blasey Ford's testimony.
It's time for change. **With your help, this November, I'll become the youngest woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate – and I'll keep working every day to defeat the right's out-of-touch radical agenda.**** **
**[**So please, with all eyes on the Supreme Court nomination process this week, will you stand with me by making a $5 donation right now to defeat Sen. Grassley, flip this seat blue and move our country forward?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43341264/336785679/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk823-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2FhMDQ1Yi1iY2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nCGMVFKCGTaJCgyv-HJNFeTwZWhmdhmjBbAKWBQjyKs=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43341265/336785680/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk823-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2FhMDQ1Yi1iY2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nCGMVFKCGTaJCgyv-HJNFeTwZWhmdhmjBbAKWBQjyKs=)
---
Thank you for your support. Together, I know we can win.

– Abby

She intends to continue ensuring our elections are fair, free, safe, and secure when she wins reelection. We're here to deliver for hard-working New Mexicans, be bold, and move our democracy forward! They are just using the “Big Lie” as an excuse to restrict access to the ballot box and promote violence. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = In support of voting rights everywhere, Team MTO Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence. She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! Make a contribution today >> _____= Friends of Maggie PO Box 473 Albuquerque, NM 87103 United States | Paid for by Friends of Maggie Contributions or gifts to Friends of Maggie are not tax deductible. _

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: A real person wrote this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Most members of Congress fuel their reelection campaigns by dedicating hours of their time asking rich donors for $500, $1000, or even $2900 donations.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220324-2890-header&t=1&akid=2890%2E2526796%2Ep57nK3)
Can we be real with you for a moment?
We understand that a constant stream of emails asking for a contribution can sometimes get on your nerves. That’s okay. Real people wrote this email, we get them as well. We understand how people can get frustrated. _But let us explain why this is vital._
When we’re asking for your support, we don’t expect every person to give. But we ask because we know that when you can support the cause, you will. That’s how this transformative movement works.**It’s a whole lot of people doing their part to make something great.**
[Right now, we’re facing a key end-of-quarter fundraising deadline next week. The only way we can reach our goal is through the support of small-dollar donors chipping in whatever they can. If you have the means, can you donate $3 right now? It’ll go a long way.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220324?refcode=em20220324-2890-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2890_2526796_p57nK3&akid=2890%2E2526796%2Ep57nK3)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220324?refcode=em20220324-2890-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2890_2526796_p57nK3&akid=2890%2E2526796%2Ep57nK3)**
We’re not exaggerating. Most members of Congress fuel their reelection campaigns by dedicating hours of their time asking rich donors for $500, $1000, or even $2800 donations.
**Alexandria is different.** This whole movement is fueled by online contributions like the ones we’re asking for in this email. With these contributions, we’ve built a campaign that is...
1. Raising resources, recruiting volunteers, and making calls to help elect progressive allies across Congress, and build a progressive majority.
2. Reaching out to communities across NY-14 to spread awareness about the Green New Deal.
3. Raising money for community relief organizations from The Bronx to Ukraine, and closing critical resources gaps that the federal government has left unfilled.
4. Working day and night to reelect AOC, defeat our Republican opponents, and show the world what we can do.

[There are more than enough people reading this email that, if they just donated whatever they can spare, we’d reach our goals instantly. If this movement is the model of what you want in our politics, please donate today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220324?refcode=em20220324-2890-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2890_2526796_p57nK3&akid=2890%2E2526796%2Ep57nK3)
Thanks for reading,
Team AOC
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220324?refcode=em20220324-2890-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2890_2526796_p57nK3&akid=2890%2E2526796%2Ep57nK3)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220324?refcode=em20220324-2890-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=24&refcode2=2890_2526796_p57nK3&akid=2890%2E2526796%2Ep57nK3)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220324-2890-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=25&akid=2890%2E2526796%2Ep57nK3)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=2890%2E2526796%2Ep57nK3) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=2890%2E2526796%2Ep57nK3) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=2890%2E2526796%2Ep57nK3)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=2890%2E2526796%2Ep57nK3)

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: New district, by the numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220324&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220324&amount=28]
Team,
As we close in on the end of our first quarter of running in the new 7th district (made up of Ingham, Livingston, Eaton, Clinton, and Shiawassee counties as well as Milford, South Lyon, and 200 folks in Genesee County), I wanted to break down the numbers in this race.
secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220324&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220324&amount=28]
As you can see, we’ve got our work cut out for us.
The key to success? Meeting people where they’re at. That’s why I’ve spent this quarter hitting the ground in the new parts of MI-07.
This area has so much to offer! I’ve held local events to get to know folks in the new areas, spoken with passionate grassroots volunteer groups somehow doing the work of twice their membership, gotten a taste of some of MI-07’s (many!) breweries, thrown on my snow boots to knock doors in the frigid Michigan winter, and so much more.
And I’m only just getting started.
To win in this district, I’ll need to campaign like I’m running for mayor in 30 small towns at once. It means reaching more of the thousands of folks who have never seen my name on their ballot by showing up in their rural communities (that haven't seen a politician, much less a Democrat, in years) and purchasing advertisements to introduce myself to those I can’t meet in person.
It’s going to take a lot of time – and a lot of resources. That’s why I’m asking if you will contribute $5, $10, or even $15 before our March 31st end-of-quarter deadline [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220324&amount=28] as I keep my foot on the gas and continue building support in my new district.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220324&amount=28]
Elissa

About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

clean_body: Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220324&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220324&amount=28] Team, As we close in on the end of our first quarter of running in the new 7th district (made up of Ingham, Livingston, Eaton, Clinton, and Shiawassee counties as well as Milford, South Lyon, and 200 folks in Genesee County), I wanted to break down the numbers in this race. secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220324&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220324&amount=28] As you can see, we’ve got our work cut out for us. The key to success? Meeting people where they’re at. That’s why I’ve spent this quarter hitting the ground in the new parts of MI-07. This area has so much to offer! I’ve held local events to get to know folks in the new areas, spoken with passionate grassroots volunteer groups somehow doing the work of twice their membership, gotten a taste of some of MI-07’s (many!) breweries, thrown on my snow boots to knock doors in the frigid Michigan winter, and so much more. And I’m only just getting started. To win in this district, I’ll need to campaign like I’m running for mayor in 30 small towns at once. It means reaching more of the thousands of folks who have never seen my name on their ballot by showing up in their rural communities (that haven't seen a politician, much less a Democrat, in years) and purchasing advertisements to introduce myself to those I can’t meet in person. It’s going to take a lot of time – and a lot of resources. That’s why I’m asking if you will contribute $5, $10, or even $15 before our March 31st end-of-quarter deadline [] as I keep my foot on the gas and continue building support in my new district. CONTRIBUTE [] Elissa [#] About Elissa Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [] and Twitter. [] Contact Elissa P.O. BOX 244, HOLLY, MI 48442 campaign@elissaforcongress.com [campaign@elissaforcongress.com] [] [] Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress [] Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress Elissa Slotkin for Congress PO Box 244 Holly, MI 48442 United States Click here [] to receive fewer emails

**Peter,**
President Trump has been holding rallies across the country and they are always packed. Just this past week, President Trump held a rally in Texas for thousands of people who support the America First agenda.

And with Harriet Hageman being endorsed by President Trump, a rally featuring both of them right here in Wyoming would be TREMENDOUS!

Could you imagine, Harriet and President Trump both on stage in front of thousands of supporters, who are ready to restore Wyoming’s conservative values to our country?

We need 300 donations to our Wyoming Rally Fund before MIDNIGHT.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43342353/336790912/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTNiMzdkYi1iZmFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0QNoX4xzG9HJE-YhYuCmDtLXZMWFrks5JssQQlLf6jw=&emci=b3ad4845-baab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=193b37db-bfab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=11385749)

Hi Peter,

We're approaching our first FEC quarterly fundraising deadline of the 2022 election season, arguably the most important fundraising event of this campaign.

This is when our team lays out our big campaign plans all the way through**Election Day,** and informs what our best strategy will be to flip CA-27 from red to blue. **How much money we raise this first quarter will set the trajectory for the rest of the campaign.**

[**Donate $5 or more now to set up Christy for success for the rest of the campaign. >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43342354/336790913/-645842102?refcode=em22_220324_EOQ1-TestB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTNiMzdkYi1iZmFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0QNoX4xzG9HJE-YhYuCmDtLXZMWFrks5JssQQlLf6jw=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43342355/336790914/-645842102?refcode=em22_220324_EOQ1-TestB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTNiMzdkYi1iZmFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0QNoX4xzG9HJE-YhYuCmDtLXZMWFrks5JssQQlLf6jw=) That's why we're hopeful that you'll come through for us, Peter, just as you always have. **If we can reach – or better yet exceed – this first end-of-quarter deadline, we will be in the best possible place to give Mike Garcia the boot.**

And we're not messing around – we're setting our grassroots fundraising goal as high as it's ever been, at $25,000 because we know we can hit it.

That's because Christy's not messing around – not in her fight to protect abortion rights, not in her fight to protect voting rights and the sanctity of our democracy.

And she's definitely not messing around in fighting to protect trans youth and the fundamental right to gender-affirming care.

**[We can't afford to mess around and not hit this goal either. Every weekend from now until the June 28 primary, we’ll be knocking on doors and reaching out to voters to make sure they know that I will be a champion for working families like them. **These direct, face-to-face conversations in every corner of the district are what our campaign is built on — and your donation makes them possible.**
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43333788/336752766/573003782?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220324eoq1_YC_allop_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNThhNDgyMC1hMGFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FtKqF4PnPqlJVd2XXdDc-uOG6Y40pIXFGzFXONylkPI=)
---
It’s because of those conversations that I know how much families are hurting financially right now. Corporations are bringing in record profits at the expense of families struggling to get by, and we have to fight back against their greed.
In those conversations, I hear how scared so many Colorado women are that their and their daughters’ reproductive rights could be stripped away by a Supreme Court stacked with far-right Justices. We’ve taken steps in Colorado to protect those rights, but we _must_ codify _Roe v Wade_ into federal law.
These issues, along with climate, public safety, the unaffordability of quality healthcare, and more, are keeping families up at night. **And what ties everything together is a deep frustration with Washington**. That same frustration — of all talk and little action — is why I’m running for Congress. Because Colorado families _deserve so much more._
[_**Can you chip in TODAY to our $20,000 end-of-quarter goal before the March 31 deadline?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43333789/336752767/573003782?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220324eoq1_YC_allop_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNThhNDgyMC1hMGFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FtKqF4PnPqlJVd2XXdDc-uOG6Y40pIXFGzFXONylkPI=)

**Your donation will go directly to helping us reach voters and build support for our people-powered movement ahead of the June primary.**
Thank you,
Dr. Yadira Caraveo

| Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests.

Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. https://georgettegomez.org/ [https://georgettegomez.org/]
Hi friend — I'll be quick.
I'm matching any donation you make through this email up to $2000. With the election right around the corner, your generosity now will make a huge difference >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_032422_EOQ_A]
I've been a long-time friend and supporter of Georgette and I know that n o one is a bigger champion for affordable housing, tenant protections, and public transportation than her. We need her empathy, work ethic, and problem-solving skills in the State Assembly, fighting for housing solutions and our working families.
Next week is Georgette's final fundraising deadline. It could not be more important.
That's why I'm matching every dollar that is donated through this email up to $2,000.
There's no better time to give than now. Will you donate now to help Georgette before her final fundraising deadline of this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_032422_EOQ_A]
Together, we can make a better California.
-- Ginger Hitzke

Despite their efforts, I know that Senator Mike Lee will NOT go down without a fight. But here’s the deal - [**we need your help before midnight to stop the left from buying this election.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=4be31d40ecd64d97a339b9f09828b569&_e=rxF4b66B5cLQEREXEPtL18-qtoMOnlVa4_SZsB_Huc1hXmCJnTmtAl0K_6yEkVRdKQAM1zNXb3REV4XfgE72PAE-jYHtM1oHv1B7sgkovL1RI6FK1Bi5t3ZdzZ9n1-g6vAjk1cZypVLbfSKDQJdGamIiW7_qRxa2a61ZF3gpLB5OqktbnONEjDZk19qgFqwSIVB6UlR2YesPkQ7VwZ3UO5y9gomXu_ciSoa2mrFjaloe0-FzsyTi7Z8K7FNdmXMk-ZcnG79EfxssueT6klq7UeajYRn4SxeBS50pJ6G67sq5k-R1tfImMnli_-mW-x9yUwbIcNiWJ43fn3wD6RZQtjyRBcsBlksTefmzMY52580%3D)

body:
Inflation isn't the problem, Peter Willis. Corporate greed is what's hurting families. | | | _Melanie D'Arrigo is running for New York's 3rd District to take on corporate greed and stand up for working families. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support to hit our critical end-of-quarter goal.**[Chip in $10 or more to elect an unbought, progressive champion for families.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNrAmD5e2X3j_hFXNCxkksqc-Tp8qQ74nSf9376Zni2V7xIIVfaEyMsVRMIpEFPCE_1MWCgETFj3VtUJ6nPNBmdpLhg66p6LlToqpiQorb8re9FxThC9TfbRiWBkqRI5CDeEbKSL__ey5tTxAXG00FDIyaYVXhNUgBTISoRHrfwYjYB2oDtjCUZAdSu6UKSDTbPNWEYvUWjk_cktZekV-mwSx3dRZhFBdVdb8kesOWrGxlsTiHny-zPn6GlgIzrbaJHDRoeh6zUSN5S8Cxh172ZIcJchx_pnFplpzKbfZ-YSx8HqCBZGBfUpjoTaTctTsxwvlJps1jjDIS_oKKSx2APwKnIoPbTFg7Qzk04B62FED/3km/5ccaAYE3REC2C48Iwi7Njg/h0/bDLfVjOvz1q9B9usmmrhoZidA2i1xy_GcP1xQJMEF0k)** _ | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNrAmD5e2X3j_hFXNCxkksqc-Tp8qQ74nSf9376Zni2V7lBfTmBFnP7HfEmhr8EtWiZO2UNvq1yYi0KspXLx5JOi2Kl4HhFBofA-qNTc9-RP4neyuAIZ60GPEg2iNvuxUhyb2p5n5axgf0gRuR0pm-DodKS6DBEU6KWYkGSy9Tcs1BwHVMB6_AdE3WygpzK7YFf7JhC-VgmCeobc8vITZiA1ngyd4KYFR7mx1glYB5L9RU2FG5vPpPJ0c_zXg-RVK2wsKmLV6pmLsxv6k4vBW6exDdCCFY5Q-5j0NwCDCyaaQ_uH9MdvK6kP6vnvyEg-IOE_KYtXU3YOGpYu3gOCiQtbWQ8-_3uwXHXCXRMklJiRF/3km/5ccaAYE3REC2C48Iwi7Njg/h1/qzQkCI0a0e_88tkbJCwQfCA9jtVvlOgkNkdRJAdv5wE)

Inflation isn't the problem, Peter Willis. Corporate greed is what's hurting families.
From utility companies to gigantic global superpowers, corporations are taking in record profits at the expense of families struggling to get by.
Here in New York, utility corporation Con Edison reported _billions_ of dollars in profits last fiscal year — then requested to hike rates _by nearly 20 percen_ t while threatening shutoffs for the more than 400,000 New Yorkers who are at least two months behind on their energy bills.
Last year, Amazon saw a 75% increase in its profits (to a record $35 billion), while denying workers a $3 raise, illegally underpaying drivers, and blaming a $20 price hike for Prime memberships on "inflation."
**So let’s get one thing straight: Corporate greed — not inflation — is driving up costs and leaving families struggling to survive.[Can you pitch in today to send a champion for working families to Congress, who will fight back and hold big corporations accountable?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNrAmD5e2X3j_hFXNCxkksqc-Tp8qQ74nSf9376Zni2V7u53yK_qng7R9jjrbe41_mx_7dGcOoAZ5AJvCNGR-c7eV_V2rFIec7auGznLQ70RPwAzeRwRduajNryZGseP0c5xCaIu0pMfFHHCcptAHSJXRP9A9IZHsmP3SxQhcy-yt3oaZYSHs1gFh_bJDfz_lPLK0jhIVPoEIAXghuJMyQDWjw_1obJtgUTPRXQAPGZRHDz5j1JryHGTLo9fR6e9vCLV-iBhHgRkLSsG6yB2L2-tuJMXipYIiVMMXA09x1Wp4EZLxZH8OMZnMkctknD3zXcx50h72AlLm1g_gdFp7w1ZqFNRe9a-ThP43jQjJQDUU/3km/5ccaAYE3REC2C48Iwi7Njg/h2/-G7NfhYsnLr-LTB3vhayTG_01hvAMWXeSH749JaLEAI) **
[Donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNrAmD5e2X3j_hFXNCxkksqc-Tp8qQ74nSf9376Zni2V7jNh7oJrALiA3HPwlStfprfiD9cHUnUHSOUo4nJebPnCrM08vhcJhgcZJ4sNQ74PcpBLS5t6a_lyVv6eQ5gRr6lJIH3YZjmLf_gf3XcRGsGEqv8rc6zpIDIjexm81Tj3nQHGCwEktjYIhtk7kdQZfrMbXGrbVOM1TtmWe3Bod3hgEnU1kz7K-xX7GIMMuEAAaDc3RuKXF7Xqw9zIeuRPzX-WNwRghvifxm2-CP1N6UE1qrBq9vTfNkzIE6w_cotQlPrOYH_kffmB8VNEWx5t8B2_qbSMnAnW_bA6Dqpk5EHLTkYIjOtSHg3VkU3PWryXF/3km/5ccaAYE3REC2C48Iwi7Njg/h3/Otcej2RVpUXpBLRVTXTYLqTQHLqkf-85gcg_2whOM8s)

This is why it's so important that we elect candidates refusing to take corporate PAC money. Candidates who are backed by dark money won't fight for us if they're owned by corporations and lobbyists.

Melanie is ready to take this fight directly to them when she gets to Congress. Three simple policies would have an immediate impact:
➡️ Institute a Windfall Profits Tax to prevent price gouging
➡️ Create more aggressive antitrust enforcement
➡️ Pass a full ban on corporate and dark money lobbying

What's stopping us is infuriating and not that hard to understand:
[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNrAmD5e2X3j_hFXNCxkksqc-Tp8qQ74nSf9376Zni2V71UYvCv_eWcbzstFwTNkl7JCNbqSuIgj2cBXAqsFyYfbRjwKchKqz7d-WsATIALcvtD2AIduDHGSsG9pzauFbPM_eftP6j9Gq47t85CGSKrSlb0jt8WfAnvBxqNOEj88xwGnyJOPhH74ZabMJDKdzWqM-IsSg6GOhSvzAJneC9UmZcgh1R3Wu132ebsCEswpaxPbAr42A1aQCrczqnrPgzSFD6_hykw3dS70DFZx3mHNbKkW_toUACKy4MSX6ov34NtCTSKZWUm7Z4zhRKCGfGjgOL47r-qO6WKadppPHJNW7RH__FaJdRvbs9qwcR1xj/3km/5ccaAYE3REC2C48Iwi7Njg/h4/7D4DNImHZgjrt8ZRBDn1lFimjbMmoADKoah8Ya7-fs4)

clean_body: Inflation isn't the problem, Peter Willis. Corporate greed is what's hurting families. | | | Melanie D'Arrigo is running for New York's 3rd District to take on corporate greed and stand up for working families. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support to hit our critical end-of-quarter goal. | Inflation isn't the problem, Peter Willis. Corporate greed is what's hurting families. From utility companies to gigantic global superpowers, corporations are taking in record profits at the expense of families struggling to get by. Here in New York, utility corporation Con Edison reported billions of dollars in profits last fiscal year — then requested to hike rates by nearly 20 percen t while threatening shutoffs for the more than 400,000 New Yorkers who are at least two months behind on their energy bills. Last year, Amazon saw a 75% increase in its profits (to a record $35 billion), while denying workers a $3 raise, illegally underpaying drivers, and blaming a $20 price hike for Prime memberships on "inflation." So let’s get one thing straight: Corporate greed — not inflation — is driving up costs and leaving families struggling to survive. This is why it's so important that we elect candidates refusing to take corporate PAC money. Candidates who are backed by dark money won't fight for us if they're owned by corporations and lobbyists. Melanie is ready to take this fight directly to them when she gets to Congress. Three simple policies would have an immediate impact: ➡️ Institute a Windfall Profits Tax to prevent price gouging ➡️ Create more aggressive antitrust enforcement ➡️ Pass a full ban on corporate and dark money lobbying What's stopping us is infuriating and not that hard to understand: Our fundraising deadline is March 31st and we need to raise $20,000 before then to reach voters and win this race. Melanie isn’t backed by corporate PACs. She doesn’t have a network of establishment donors writing her checks. Our campaign is powered by everyday people fighting for change. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Thanks for your support, Team Melanie Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. * * *

**At face value, Biden's pledge to run an ethical government is a good thing...but in practice, it hasn’t happened. Hunter Biden, Fauci, Afghanistan, and the border have all been a NIGHTMARE.**

name: SCOTUS Alert
subject: What she’s saying
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
The Democrats want to put a RADICAL in the Supreme Court who will ignore the Constitution and pass their liberal policy wish list. |
---
Fellow American,

During her Supreme Court confirmation hearing - Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson said that she has a “methodology” she applies when she’s deciding cases. We’re going to sum it up for you here:
1. She’s soft on crime, even giving lenient sentences to violent sex-offenders
2. She embraces Critical Race Theory
3. She’s supported by groups who are anti-Second Amendment and pro-PACKING the Supreme Court.

We know we don’t need to tell you this – but the Supreme Court is the highest court in the land and is critical to protecting our rights and conservative way of life.

subject: Congressman Glenn "GT" Thompson Endorses Jeremy Shaffer for Congress
body:
Jeremy Shaffer, Republican candidate for Pennsylvania's 17th Congressional District, today announced the endorsement of Rep. Glenn "GT" Thompson (PA- | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jeremyshaffer/gt-endorsement?e=32107e7cf1)
---
| |
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Thursday, March 24, 2022
---
**CONTACT: Trevor Naglieri**
[Trevor@JeremyShaffer.com](mailto:Trevor@JeremyShaffer.com?subject=Jeremy%20Shaffer%20for%20Congress%20\(PA-17\))
---
| **Congressman Glenn "GT" Thompson Endorses Jeremy Shaffer for Congress**
---
| **Gibsonia, PA** – Jeremy Shaffer, Republican candidate for Pennsylvania's 17th Congressional District, today announced the endorsement of Rep. Glenn "GT" Thompson (PA-15), Dean of Pennsylvania's Republican Delegation to Congress.

"In order to take back the House in November, we need to remain competitive in seats like PA-17, and there's no better person to serve the people of western Pennsylvania than Jeremy Shaffer," said **Congressman Glenn "GT" Thompson**. "I'm proud to endorse Jeremy Shaffer for Congress. I know he will fight tirelessly for Pennsylvanians and his grassroots campaign will help lead us to a new majority."

"I am absolutely honored to receive Congressman Thompson's endorsement," said **Jeremy Shaffer**. "Congressman Thompson is someone I greatly admire – he's a proven leader and a tremendous champion for Pennsylvania. I look forward to working with him this election cycle and serving alongside him in the 118th Congress."

To see Jeremy's full list of publicly released endorsements, visit [www.JeremyShaffer.com/Endorsements](https://JeremyShaffer.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=168b3aab49521aba8263d07fe&id=bc87097599&e=32107e7cf1). ###
---

| | Hi Peter, Andy’s campaign is deeply personal — both to him, but also to his community. His family planted their roots in Michigan’s new Eleventh District five generations ago. **Today at 3 PM, the Jewish Democratic Council of America will be hosting Andy alongside his opponent for MI-11, Representative Haley Stevens, in Michigan’s 11th District Candidate Forum.** Ahead of the primary, the virtual event will cover issues important to Jewish Democrats and what that means for this year’s midterm elections. [_**Click here to register for the virtual event and show your support for Andy during this afternoon’s conversation.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43334689/336756087/1534858401?refcode=em_20220324_e_t_forum&ms=em_20220324_e_t_forum&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjFmZDMwZC1hM2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_7pRAgPbFrQWsEcua3wJuisIXcfYaA_CblJFAu9DHCE=&emci=49485caa-91ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=221fd30d-a3ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=22034926) Andy embraces his Jewish values every day in the House — fighting for economic and racial justice, pushing for affordable health care, and fostering a country that is welcoming and accepting of all Americans. This event is sure to be a lively conversation that you don’t want to miss. [_**Can’t make it to the forum? No worries! You can still support Andy and Team Levin by giving to our campaign today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43334693/336756088/882283677?refcode=em_20220324_e_t_forum&ms=em_20220324_e_t_forum&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjFmZDMwZC1hM2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_7pRAgPbFrQWsEcua3wJuisIXcfYaA_CblJFAu9DHCE=) Thanks! clean_body: Today at 3 PM, the Jewish Democratic Council of America will be hosting Andy alongside his opponent for MI-11, Representative Haley Stevens, in Michigan’s 11th District Candidate Forum. | | | | | Hi Peter, Andy’s campaign is deeply personal — both to him, but also to his community. His family planted their roots in Michigan’s new Eleventh District five generations ago. Today at 3 PM, the Jewish Democratic Council of America will be hosting Andy alongside his opponent for MI-11, Representative Haley Stevens, in Michigan’s 11th District Candidate Forum. Ahead of the primary, the virtual event will cover issues important to Jewish Democrats and what that means for this year’s midterm elections. Andy embraces his Jewish values every day in the House — fighting for economic and racial justice, pushing for affordable health care, and fostering a country that is welcoming and accepting of all Americans. This event is sure to be a lively conversation that you don’t want to miss. = Thanks! subject: looking good while doing good
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
It's here!

Team,
You might be a new member of Team Nan, or maybe you’re someone who has been here since day one – but no matter how long you’ve been a Nan Fan, there’s something waiting for you in the official Team Nan online store!
We’re coming up on the first big test of our campaign, and there’s no better time to check out the store and look for new ways to show your support for Nan.
**[You can help take down corruption in Ohio – and look good doing it! We’ve got sweatshirts, yard signs, t-shirts, and even bandanas for your furry friends. Check it out: www.store.nanwhaley.com>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43343021/336793722/1170221400?utm_source=nw_em_220324_1_t2&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWI3NjFlOS1jNWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=esz_djj9IgxbA9CmcecvrBO3omndOz3NIo-DSsNuKOU=&emci=753546bd-c5ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=1ab761e9-c5ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24357242)**
Ohio deserves better than Mike DeWine, and Nan Whaley is the person leading that fight.
People like you are crucial in helping get the word out about this campaign and making sure everyone knows what Nan is fighting for. As we head towards the next stage of this campaign, we need your help.
**[Whether you’re getting ready to volunteer or just looking for some new swag to rock around town, the Team Nan online store has you covered. Check it out!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43343022/336793724/1170221400?utm_source=nw_em_220324_1_t2&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWI3NjFlOS1jNWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=esz_djj9IgxbA9CmcecvrBO3omndOz3NIo-DSsNuKOU=&emci=753546bd-c5ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=1ab761e9-c5ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24357242)**
Thank you,

CHARITY BARRY
PRESENTS DUKE PESTA
A Critical Look Into Modern Education In America
Sunday April 3rd, 2022@ 2:00 p.m.
Darlington Inn
[201 Christensen Dr., Darlington](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CdJfOkDAkDaZXsBS00M6EPDlxc2zumE3yx1UFgJc8Py2bGIK5-9QETbnfdqcv_W5HOD37APxfkK8Lu7un6TFX8IbV2zgmdZ37UI1SmqIVc9hbreAGJyKCuKYbXZylsuuu-q2h248mUxuK9PyoD0936jNs6ea798-s23niHqa1ks=&c=NP3fA67SEYaKz2zP9Ek7HCjx75RnvNEcPQKgQ4LFjRDa3cfd4OoFjA==&ch=V-FGS55jO6JTbhQbJJjBjFuU1O0Y0N6YwZI1Yxi_jBRompRvQhUZYA==)

* Our Proficiency rates across Wisconsin, indeed the country are down and our leaders have deemed parents as "domestic terrorists."
* Divisive racial theories and Sex Ed. are being pushed down to Pre-K
* All School Board Candidates are invited free of charge. We want to know who you are and why you are running.

Dr. Duke Pesta is Director of Freedom Project Academy, host of the Dr. Duke Show podcast, and a tenured professor of English at the University of Wisconsin Oshkosh. He is one of America's foremost authorities on the dangers of Critical Race Theory, Common Core, and the federal takeover of education, having delivered over 1000 talks in 48 states. He has testified about educational issues in 22 states, and his collective videos and presentations top more than fifty million views online. Much of his work is available at [FreedomProject.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CdJfOkDAkDaZXsBS00M6EPDlxc2zumE3yx1UFgJc8Py2bGIK5-9QETbnfdqcv_W5N_TnKDzbIDKsRIux_gaeAMEZscpWVMozRm6p7RQf_oY-yY7PFXo3XZ_QpEBpEROGYPReamTxsGRohvOMRBb3aF8c2SKsII57&c=NP3fA67SEYaKz2zP9Ek7HCjx75RnvNEcPQKgQ4LFjRDa3cfd4OoFjA==&ch=V-FGS55jO6JTbhQbJJjBjFuU1O0Y0N6YwZI1Yxi_jBRompRvQhUZYA==) and [FPEUSA.org.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CdJfOkDAkDaZXsBS00M6EPDlxc2zumE3yx1UFgJc8Py2bGIK5-9QETbnfdqcv_W5GwLX7HZ9Xi3wI4-tmsmWYy1Owxx9jWGq1v5_niqa1vE1Zhyru9ES-0lVT9TdA10lti3My5_OvVI=&c=NP3fA67SEYaKz2zP9Ek7HCjx75RnvNEcPQKgQ4LFjRDa3cfd4OoFjA==&ch=V-FGS55jO6JTbhQbJJjBjFuU1O0Y0N6YwZI1Yxi_jBRompRvQhUZYA==)

body:
Read some of these endorsements Peter | | | [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=f9d338034f&e=fe4b890356)
---
| | Peter,

_We've come a long way since I announced my candidacy last April_. This has been a truly incredible and humbling experience, and since then, our movement has become **THE** grassroots campaign for Governor.

**Why?** It's not because of me, Peter. _**It's because of you.**_

We have proven to the establishment insiders and silver spoon elites that _WE THE PEOPLE_ \- ordinary citizens taking a stand for freedom - can do extraordinary things. That is why the endorsements I'm proud of are not from career politicians or from within the Lansing Swamp - they're from Michigan patriots all across this state who are ready for new, honest leadership in our government.

**Yesterday, I asked for citizen endorsements from our grassroots warriors.** Hundreds answered the call - below are just a few 👇🏼

name: Alex Coronado
subject: Correa's Betrayal of Immigrant Justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ortega For Congress
body:
Lou Correa claims to fight for immigrant rights - so why does he support Sheriff Barnes? | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43335562/336759824/-1122995658?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220110affhousing_TO_full_SLB_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmVhYzQwNC1hNWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nes1C00ia9OykbCDp-K7ElzNt7tCyiCJcz2eOUOFWZQ=)
---
Friends,
This week an annual forum mandated by the TRUTH Act (a bill that made deportations much more transparent) took place in our district. This year showed [the same results as years before](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43335563/336759825/1015149524?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmVhYzQwNC1hNWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nes1C00ia9OykbCDp-K7ElzNt7tCyiCJcz2eOUOFWZQ=&emci=6a385aed-a0ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=2feac404-a5ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=12523946) \- Sheriff Don Barnes' Orange County Police Department has turned over more undocumented people to ICE than any other department in California - even those with populations that are twice as large. The community forum pressed Barnes on the ethics behind his actions, and rightly so. Don goes out of his way to endanger immigrants and separate families. Our elected leaders need to be handling this situation - [NPR even did a write up](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43335564/336759826/-69873570?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmVhYzQwNC1hNWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nes1C00ia9OykbCDp-K7ElzNt7tCyiCJcz2eOUOFWZQ=&emci=6a385aed-a0ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=2feac404-a5ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=12523946) about how corrupt and incompetent his department is - but don't hold your breath for Mike's opponent, Lou Correa, to do his job. [Lou has said](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43335565/336759827/1321742383?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmVhYzQwNC1hNWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nes1C00ia9OykbCDp-K7ElzNt7tCyiCJcz2eOUOFWZQ=&emci=6a385aed-a0ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=2feac404-a5ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=12523946) in a formal endorsement, _"Don is an outstanding Sheriff for all the people of Orange County. He is a leader that will keep each one of us safe. clean_body: Lou Correa claims to fight for immigrant rights - so why does he support Sheriff Barnes? | = Friends, This week an annual forum mandated by the TRUTH Act (a bill that made deportations much more transparent) took place in our district. This year showed \- Sheriff Don Barnes' Orange County Police Department has turned over more undocumented people to ICE than any other department in California - even those with populations that are twice as large. The community forum pressed Barnes on the ethics behind his actions, and rightly so. Don goes out of his way to endanger immigrants and separate families. Our elected leaders need to be handling this situation - about how corrupt and incompetent his department is - but don't hold your breath for Mike's opponent, Lou Correa, to do his job. in a formal endorsement, "Don is an outstanding Sheriff for all the people of Orange County. He is a leader that will keep each one of us safe. I strongly endorse Don Barnes for Orange County Sheriff.” When Mike and Lou squared off and gave speeches besides each other, Lou said "My number 1, 2 and 3 issues as your representative are immigration, immigration and immigration." Why, then, is Lou supporting a Sheriff that deports more of our immigrant neighbors than nearly anyone in the country? We need leaders that will lead on principle and protect all of our communities, not just those in power. = Yours In Solidarity, Alex Coronado Campaign Manager | Our campaign is fueled by everyday people like you chipping in whatever they can. Can you give $25 or whatever you can right now to help us stay on track on our campaign costs? = | = | Paid for by Ortega For Congress Ortega For Congress PO Box 1271 Anaheim, CA 92815 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

CHARITY BARRY
PRESENTS DUKE PESTA
A Critical Look Into Modern Education In America

[1627 12th Ave., Monroe](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LhN2W-LFeyNgVgtqRjdaaqch1i4ElB8VHmw60QFsEKpBR5OFyrwuG5lDCXkbCgVrToGcL6cHDVk8xJTcjuggGE2fotKri-jEWxvjyqhhGnRbbAddbavaNhfivZpAGUzw4JLpFD0k79yYX33IFNAILjaBeE_g50Gf0ex4Xbn5-wU=&c=sOOZKARC5_5O40VSEMKi-KpY0BsONpZFuYm2Rhaz-YslxRqoQmkBCw==&ch=Lhh2Gk3i6-5OJ8ND9rpndkT9jzqS1Z_AKffS_4xB6QOp2U5C5yzsEA==)

* Our Proficiency rates across Wisconsin, indeed the country are down and our leaders have deemed parents as "domestic terrorists."
* Divisive racial theories and Sex Ed. are being pushed down to Pre-K
* All School Board Candidates are invited free of charge. We want to know who you are and why you are running.

Dr. Duke Pesta is Director of Freedom Project Academy, host of the Dr. Duke Show podcast, and a tenured professor of English at the University of Wisconsin Oshkosh. He is one of America's foremost authorities on the dangers of Critical Race Theory, Common Core, and the federal takeover of education, having delivered over 1000 talks in 48 states. He has testified about educational issues in 22 states, and his collective videos and presentations top more than fifty million views online. Much of his work is available at [FreedomProject.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LhN2W-LFeyNgVgtqRjdaaqch1i4ElB8VHmw60QFsEKpBR5OFyrwuG_VEx89Yl_5dRJ1uzFtK7TLMe1qrtuNTI4SZ-ytCH6RYLEQ09izi5dUqyWNzstrwXlCWAYT8nWvGST7PNO49S1j9QWl1S70xZ2sS-tlrsJ3y&c=sOOZKARC5_5O40VSEMKi-KpY0BsONpZFuYm2Rhaz-YslxRqoQmkBCw==&ch=Lhh2Gk3i6-5OJ8ND9rpndkT9jzqS1Z_AKffS_4xB6QOp2U5C5yzsEA==) and [FPEUSA.org.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LhN2W-LFeyNgVgtqRjdaaqch1i4ElB8VHmw60QFsEKpBR5OFyrwuG_VEx89Yl_5db6QT0TcBbKeMQUzwxCnmN4iW0MbIIcr2rnaKS2Vpr8AGQ--N4Btz4g1CphcClRi9bszqadvxjHo=&c=sOOZKARC5_5O40VSEMKi-KpY0BsONpZFuYm2Rhaz-YslxRqoQmkBCw==&ch=Lhh2Gk3i6-5OJ8ND9rpndkT9jzqS1Z_AKffS_4xB6QOp2U5C5yzsEA==)

* Our Proficiency rates across Wisconsin, indeed the country are down and our leaders have deemed parents as "domestic terrorists."
* Divisive racial theories and Sex Ed. are being pushed down to Pre-K
* All School Board Candidates are invited free of charge. We want to know who you are and why you are running.

Dr. Duke Pesta is Director of Freedom Project Academy, host of the Dr. Duke Show podcast, and a tenured professor of English at the University of Wisconsin Oshkosh. He is one of America's foremost authorities on the dangers of Critical Race Theory, Common Core, and the federal takeover of education, having delivered over 1000 talks in 48 states. He has testified about educational issues in 22 states, and his collective videos and presentations top more than fifty million views online. name: Glenn Beck
subject: How to help in Ukraine right now:
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvn6otugtdmqbc9hk4ja2qih27ktlhbhpupio5i0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shhm4o72clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sr4mooect5ksjhmddjieorrbd1ks9gm2or4siqj4pjgmmo76pj469rm7d72edo6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup30pjgm2qr2ptnc9j33c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zassbrn96qv292p9paio1ajlhjhmiavb38e6fp7o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shhm4o72clh2bs)
---
|
---
Fellow American,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z36dtfqek7q1akd1nkh8v98dh8ehpphukbldmb0g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shhm4o72clh2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsj4lu8toij8r74lgm6u7ts4a276s7ep6uaglt7o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shhm4o72clh2bs)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo80rohen1l7n8irmtnkpcn2qbb8uj9l2lm9id10_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shhm4o72clh2bs)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
