Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid. Fortunately, we are not powerless. Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help. | | Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians. To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future. And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support. Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act. Laus Deo, Glenn Beck Founder, Mercury One | | | | Copyright © 2022 Mercury One, Inc., All rights reserved. Mercury One, Inc. P.O. name: Tim Ryan
subject: the flippable four
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2968%2E3611125%2Ef576bW ][IMG]

Hello,

Despite our 50/50 “majority” in the Senate, Republicans have used the
filibuster to block important bills and stall our progress. It’s never
been more clear that we can’t just hold the Senate majority, we must
expand it.

The good news is we have four flippable seats—Ohio, Florida, North
Carolina, and Iowa—that are key to stopping Mitch McConnell and expanding
the Democratic Senate majority.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9701?t=1008&amount=4&akid=2968%2E3611125%2Ef576bW ]Can you rush $4 to help us overcome the GOP’s attacks, win this race as
part of the flippable four, and expand our Democratic majority so we can
finally make progress in the Senate?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9701?t=1009&amount=4&akid=2968%2E3611125%2Ef576bW ]Donate

Ohio is one of the most expensive and competitive races in the country.
The GOP knows this seat will determine Senate control, so they’re going
all in on defeating us. My opponents and their wealthy friends are already
spending $80 million to take down our campaign.

But despite their attacks, we’re neck-and-neck in the polls. This proves
we have what it takes to overcome their fundraising machine and win 2022’s
most important race.

I don’t have billionaire friends to cut me checks whenever I want.
Instead, I’m proudly relying on grassroots support and folks like you to
power this campaign. That’s why I’m asking:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9701?t=1010&amount=4&akid=2968%2E3611125%2Ef576bW ]Will you donate just $4 to help me, as part of the flippable four, win
this race so we can expand the Democratic Senate majority? 50/50 isn’t
cutting it. I wouldn’t ask if it didn’t make a difference.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9701?t=1011&amount=4&akid=2968%2E3611125%2Ef576bW ]Donate

Let’s get it done. Thanks.

—Tim

name: 4Patriots
subject: NEW 8-Pound Solar Generator is HERE
body:
Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zk8d3o0s7lkckbtvnbv5bv7pig4i1hffug5ouddg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shhm4o71c1h2bs)
# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
[**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zeck7spi3iliek79c7qb3sg4o9kt65i23osohnv8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shhm4o71c1h2bs) [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zohh5onaob4022ijpogk14bbm3tco9rq18ek2q58_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shhm4o71c1h2bs) If last year taught us anything... It's not IF you need a backup plan... it's **WHEN.** It's sad, but facts are facts... A deadly pandemic, blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. **Crisis mode has become the new normal.** And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're fully ready, even when the power goes out. Nothing feels more vulnerable than when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. Imagine all your critical devices, communications, comfort and protection, suddenly on borrowed time. That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS. **You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget.** Well now you can... Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that the first batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zvij1rrb0gj9d77o7h3ru8ir069kcbskr89foi68_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shhm4o71c1h2bs) [**> > Video: This mini solar generator powers devices and weighs less than a housecat**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z5hklklckhltbbuue431j5dunpc0jk0dsh2e4sn0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shhm4o71c1h2bs) _" I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer_ Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll also be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it 's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes.
* $190 in FREE Bonuses
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zg5bk30vjoqcsp0ghqapfkf3r44tv2h54uclngqg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shhm4o71c1h2bs) [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z26i65jgjdc7rak1euii30fooh4m08h9fafqj4v0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shhm4o71c1h2bs) **You 'll Never Run Out of Juice** _" You can charge your phone 28 times and still have some juice left over. It has no shortage of power. It's very reliable and very good. It's the perfect addition to all of your other 4Patriots products." - Dan W._ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zslhvld2gs3repbuinhutjj1fcdpho3t3su93oto_rp22sh2s8i66ob0shhm4o71c1h2bs)
---

__**FIRST:**__ A poll from the highly-respected Des Moines Register showed Chuck Grassley’s approval ratings at the LOWEST they’ve ever been.
__**THEN:**__ Political pundits began saying Iowa’s Senate race could be one of the closest Senate races in the country.
**__AND NOW:__ Tens of thousands of grassroots Democrats like you have chipped into Mike Franken’s campaign against Chuck Grassley – and we are so close to hitting our critical end-of-quarter FEC deadline goal!**
This is it, folks. 2022 is our best chance ever to end Chuck Grassley’s 46 year career in Washington. And we can expand our majority in the Senate with true Democrats like Admiral Mike Franken who will actually vote like Democrats!
**We’ve set a goal of raising $1,000,000 (our biggest and most important goal ever!) before Mike’s first FEC deadline of the year on March 31st so we can keep up the momentum, but right now we’re still $189,574 short.**

We’ve set a goal of raising $1,000,000 (our biggest and most important goal ever!) before Mike’s first FEC deadline of the year on March 31st so we can keep up the momentum, but right now we’re still $189,574 short. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Chuck Grassley has never been more vulnerable, but we cannot stop here or let up now – not if we want to actually defeat Grassley and turn Iowa blue this November. Thanks for chipping in and being a part of this people-powered campaign, Team Franken Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Morgan Harper
subject: My Republican opponents are still talking about how the 2020 election was stolen — seriously.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
We can’t afford to let ANY of my Republican opponents win this seat.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220324-839-footer-ak&t=2&akid=839%2E90090%2EnDxXin)
**I woke up this morning more determined than ever that we can and must win in Ohio in 2022.**
At the latest Republican debate on Monday ALL BUT ONE of the Republican candidates STILL agreed that the 2020 election was stolen from Trump, and that his supporters should continue to pursue their absurd idea of “justice”. **_[It gets worse but before I get into the rest, we are a few days away from our crucial end-of-quarter deadline and I need your help to stand up for the people of Ohio. Can you chip in $5 today to power this campaign?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29843?t=3&akid=839%2E90090%2EnDxXin)_**
Like I said, it gets worse. When reminded on stage that he said, "I don't really care what happens to Ukraine one way or another” in a previous interview, J.D. Vance instead pivoted to Trump’s border wall with Mexico to win political points.
Oh, and Mike Gibbons claimed that women have never been oppressed. He said, and I quote:
_“I don’t know if oppressed is the right word. It was a different world, that’s all...”_
I’ve said before that I’ll debate anyone, anywhere about the issues here in Ohio. I would love to meet Mike Gibbons on the debate stage so he can explain to my face what a “different world” it was when women and people of color had fewer rights and “didn’t face oppression.”
As you can see I’m up against some misogynistic and bigoted opponents. It isn’t an exaggeration when I say that we can’t afford for any of my Republican opponents to win this seat and stop any chance we have at passing progressive policy. We are building a movement to take them on but first we have to win on May 3rd.
[**_Can you rush a $5 donation to our campaign right now to help us fight back? Right now we’re still $16,557 away from our end-of-quarter deadline._**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29843?t=4&akid=839%2E90090%2EnDxXin)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29849?refcode=em20220324-839&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=839%2E90090%2EnDxXin)**
Unlike my Republican opponents I don’t take any money from corporate PACs or have million dollar donors in my back pocket funding my campaign.
We’re building a movement for the people and by the people. That’s why I have to ask: [**_Can you chip in $5 or anything you can before we reach our critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline on March 31? It’s imperative that we ramp up our fundraising to be able to fight back against our Republican opponents._**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29843?t=24&akid=839%2E90090%2EnDxXin)
Thank you for your support,
Morgan
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220324-839-footer&t=25&refcode2=839_90090_nDxXin&akid=839%2E90090%2EnDxXin)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=839%2E90090%2EnDxXin)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
clean_body: We can’t afford to let ANY of my Republican opponents win this seat. I woke up this morning more determined than ever that we can and must win in Ohio in 2022. At the latest Republican debate on Monday ALL BUT ONE of the Republican candidates STILL agreed that the 2020 election was stolen from Trump, and that his supporters should continue to pursue their absurd idea of “justice”. Like I said, it gets worse. When reminded on stage that he said, "I don't really care what happens to Ukraine one way or another” in a previous interview, J.D. Vance instead pivoted to Trump’s border wall with Mexico to win political points. Oh, and Mike Gibbons claimed that women have never been oppressed. He said, and I quote: “I don’t know if oppressed is the right word. It was a different world, that’s all...” I’ve said before that I’ll debate anyone, anywhere about the issues here in Ohio. I would love to meet Mike Gibbons on the debate stage so he can explain to my face what a “different world” it was when women and people of color had fewer rights and “didn’t face oppression.” As you can see I’m up against some misogynistic and bigoted opponents. It isn’t an exaggeration when I say that we can’t afford for any of my Republican opponents to win this seat and stop any chance we have at passing progressive policy. We are building a movement to take them on but first we have to win on May 3rd. Unlike my Republican opponents I don’t take any money from corporate PACs or have million dollar donors in my back pocket funding my campaign. We’re building a movement for the people and by the people. That’s why I have to ask: Thank you for your support, Morgan Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio | | Email us: contact@morganharper.org

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel=20Tripp?=
subject: ICYMI- Highlights From The MBA Gubernatorial Candidates Forum
body:
Bill McSwain distinguished himself as the pro-energy candidate at the Manufacturer & Business Association forum. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/icymi-highlights-from-the-mba-gubernatorial-candidates-forum?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**March 24, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# ICYMI: Bill McSwain will permanently cut the gas tax, harness PA energy resources
_ Highlights from the Manufacturer & Business Association Candidate Forum _
West Chester, Pa. -- Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, participated in the Manufacturer & Business Association Gubernatorial Candidate Forum on Wednesday.

Throughout the course of the forum, McSwain explained why he is the best candidate to revitalize Pennsylvania's economy and harness the full potential of the Commonwealth's energy resources.
---
|
> _**"I will be the pro-energy Governor. Under my leadership, we will literally turn on the spigot of our natural gas in Pennsylvania – and by doing so, we will supercharge our Commonwealth's economy, help our nation reach energy independence, and also contribute to global security by becoming a main source of oil and gas for our European allies who are currently forced to rely on tyrants like Vladimir Putin for energy. **_ _**Everything we need to become an energy powerhouse is right under our feet. Aggressively harnessing those resources will be a top priority for my administration."**_
---
| [ ](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=64f568d890&e=b1ec95759b)
---
|
---
| McSwain also reaffirmed his commitment to permanently cutting the gas tax and promised to create a business-friendly environment that prioritizes safety and encourages new investment, more jobs, and professional opportunities for generations of future Pennsylvanians:
---
|
> _**"Public safety and economic competitiveness go hand in hand - businesses simply won’t invest in high crime areas, and every Pennsylvania family deserves to live in a safe neighborhood. As Governor, I will permanently reduce our highest in the nation gas tax, cut taxes across the board for hard working families, reduce the regulatory burden on businesses, and restore law and order so that Pennsylvanians can build a life of prosperity for themselves and for future generations." **_
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **

Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=7176bb9eac&e=b1ec95759b)
###

name: Meredith, Finance Director
subject: Why I’m on Team Welch
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
I know Peter, and I know we have to work to elect him to the Senate.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=148%2E61531%2EyRtnKT)
Hello,
My name is Meredith, and I’m the Finance Director on Peter’s campaign for Senate. I’m in charge of keeping track of our fundraising, and we have our biggest deadline yet coming up at the end of the month. I’ll explain why it’s so important in a minute. [**But if you’re ready to chip in, you can click here and help finish March strong.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1678?t=3&akid=148%2E61531%2EyRtnKT)
I’ve worked for Peter for a long time, which means I’ve watched him serve the people of Vermont with dignity and grace. He’s exactly the kind of person we need representing us in the Senate: his kindness, his empathy, and his ability to listen all exemplify the best of Vermont.
But if we’re going to elect him to the Senate, we need to work together to get it done. With Mitch McConnell, Rick Scott, and national Republicans looking to buy this seat and retake the Senate, we have to show them that Vermont isn’t for sale.
[**We’ve only got one week left to hit our first quarterly fundraising goal of 2022. The numbers will go public after the FEC deadline, and Republicans will be watching how we do. Chip in to help close the gap and elect Peter to represent Vermont in the Senate.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1678?t=4&akid=148%2E61531%2EyRtnKT)
I’m from Richmond, and my favorite part of living in Vermont is the sense of community that surrounds us. That’s one of the reasons I’m so proud to work for Peter—he takes that sense of Vermont community to Washington, and fights for us.
Now, we have to fight by his side.
[**This is our first public fundraising deadline of the year—and if we’re going to elect a true public servant like Peter, we need to hit our goals. Can you pitch in right away?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1678?t=5&akid=148%2E61531%2EyRtnKT)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

Thanks!
Meredith

name: Mia McLeod
subject: How South Carolina addresses the climate crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIA FOR SOUTH CAROLINA
body:
Whether we choose to believe it or not, we must address climate change NOW. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ye1S9nEDEpSa-nXaAdXqpk_sDSXVo6IsdH8HyVK6TrtpYL7lsas6pF3-BptPgGmxNP_wLu41j5WZMxPbxNOtxdHN-pgsNABCfO8Pb2fkOFm5q_4Cy768Xk1QwgbZQC-CNFebfGFI3SlLikk2b1VWNW0hRToy8UhaP0TkdhMEpVnxJ6vGswiTDzpnFADeyuaXVdyfRs9fyZV_g7e8VzY6AWtgZ9_ad1ry0_x902kBFt9NgavsjHrV9RgvN_y24qBz9FLtrGk74ZqTeE47a37ED3szXRh5h2cSkgN-wm-Kh2L0pfNPXcRUJkaEhYAPmFVrnJGVOP0jcoHPaHt9vzXFzRT27ARlLrxZW6SeI57pOufxiqu7hWdsXlEHG0roTOioo/3km/POl9dHUSQbSRkL0WZz74_g/h0/b89SNVs22f-7qjrl4a6tsIBgMB20pybGjwgk9DAcxUU)
---
Dear Friend -
---
Over the last several decades, we've seen the devastating impact climate change has had on our communities. From the tornados triggered by Tropical Storm Frances in 2004 to the record breaking floods of 2015, our climate is destabilizing, and the people of South Carolina are paying the price.
Charleston's drinking water is among the worst in the nation. People across the Midlands and the Lowcountry are berated by devastating "once-in-a-generation" weather events year after year, and dangerous heat waves are putting vulnerable South Carolinians at risk. And it's no secret that impoverished communities and communities of color continue to be hit the hardest.
For far too long, South Carolinians have suffered without any action from Republicans. The GOP won't even admit climate change exists, let alone provide support for South Carolinians struggling to recover from these catastrophic events. Consequently, we're faced with crumbling roads and bridges, water contamination, and other infrastructural challenges that inhibit our state's economic viability and long term growth. I think you can agree, we can no longer afford their failed leadership on this critical issue.
As Governor, I will make addressing climate change and environmental justice an essential element of my agenda. For me, tackling the climate crisis is about coming together and considering what kind of world we want the next generation of South Carolinians to grow up in. It's about making sure kids have safe drinking water and that all South Carolina communities are equipped with the infrastructure to withstand these natural disasters. When I say I want to build a South Carolina where everyone thrives, that means building a state that is sustainable generation after generation.
I'm grateful to have you on my team as we take on this crisis.
With gratitude, Mia
---

For me, tackling the climate crisis is about coming together and considering what kind of world we want the next generation of South Carolinians to grow up in. It's about making sure kids have safe drinking water and that all South Carolina communities are equipped with the infrastructure to withstand these natural disasters. When I say I want to build a South Carolina where everyone thrives, that means building a state that is sustainable generation after generation. I'm grateful to have you on my team as we take on this crisis. With gratitude, Mia About Senator Mia McLeod: Senator Mia McLeod is a working mom, small business owner, and seventh-generation South Carolinian from Bennettsville, South Carolina. She is a former State Representative, current State Senator representing District 22, and is running as a Democratic candidate for Governor. Please, disregard if you are a registered lobbyist. | | | PAID FOR BY MIA FOR SOUTH CAROLINA | | Sent via . clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | Rachel Maddow is an incredible journalist and she has FINALLY returned to her show after a months long break! But right-wing Republicans her. They want to discredit her amazing work as a journalist because she isn’t afraid to expose Trump and his MAGA loyalists for the frauds they are. Thanks for your response, Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathleen?=
subject: Greg Abbott, Stop Attacking Children
body:
Governor Abbott attacks personal freedom in Texas, again. | |
---
| | | [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=128afe1873&e=4712f71bea)
---
| **Friends,**

It won't shock you to hear, but Greg Abbott continues to attack personal and bodily freedom here in Texas.

Abbott's latest executive orders dangerously impact young and LGBTQ+ Texans across the state.

Don't believe me?

Here's the _Washington Post_ : ["Abbott’s order, and actions in other states, accelerate conservative lawmakers’ trend ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=c5026ef69b&e=4712f71bea)[over the past decade](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=ca3a510ab2&e=4712f71bea)[ of increasingly targeting LGBTQ+ youths for state surveillance and exclusion. Denying ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=fa4c5d7fb0&e=4712f71bea)[trans kids](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=d3ab0f740e&e=4712f71bea)[ access to lifesaving health care ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=7dafe8fd37&e=4712f71bea)[runs counter to medical science](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=bb1007625d&e=4712f71bea)[. ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=5a5e9ea2d3&e=4712f71bea)[Targeting families with trans kids](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=8a05ec2fbd&e=4712f71bea)[ for ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=fba8660e32&e=4712f71bea)[criminal interventions and separation](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=b0db74b660&e=4712f71bea)[ is likely to ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=013ce73e4f&e=4712f71bea)[devastate vulnerable children](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=dd5c46961b&e=4712f71bea)[."](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=98a80affb2&e=4712f71bea)

The consequences of these hateful actions are clear:

[_**Republicans like Greg Abbott and my opponent Ronny Jackson constitute a grave threat to our children AND our democracy.**_](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=d6c946e8a9&e=4712f71bea)

My campaign will stop at nothing to make Texas a state that gives every child a chance to grow up safely, without fear of state surveillance.

That stance shouldn't be controversial.

[If you agree, will you please chip in $5 or $10 to stand up for trans kids in Texas? ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=a8961c323d&e=4712f71bea)

Thanks a lot,

Kathleen Brown
Democrat
TX-13
---

| | | Dear Peter,

As a former colleague in the state legislature, I know firsthand that Kevin Mullin is a relentless fighter for California families who has a formidable record of delivering tangible results in the Assembly.

Kevin is the leader Peninsula and San Francisco families need now, and I’m proud to endorse him. [Will you join me in supporting Kevin?](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=d59eab4548&e=292fde286a)

You don’t write and pass 60 bills into law by just talking about it. You roll up your sleeves, put in the hours, and work until the job gets done — the way Kevin does.

You can bet Kevin Mullin will bring that same tireless level of commitment to Congress to build on his record of results that families can count on to fight inflation, deliver real action on climate change, defend our democracy, and build an economy that works for everyone.

**I want to invite you to a special campaign fundraiser I am co-hosting for Kevin this Saturday, March 26, from 3:00-4:30pm in San Mateo (address supplied upon RSVP).**

To RSVP, please donate online at: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mullinmarch26](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=37f32ba75f&e=292fde286a)**.

Checks may be made payable to:

Kevin Mullin for Congress
P.O. Box 869
Belmont, CA 94002

I hope that you will join me in supporting Kevin for Congress!
---
| Sincerely,

Jerry Hill
State Senator (ret.)
---

body:

| [ ](https://d2p4X504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/OR+113/d2p4X504/VW2YQl1Yyx9-W7l0CHq32Z0g5VrHz2f4H2Bx7MZjDW93q8_QV1-WJV7CgP4BV1X9gD4PhnFxW4jT8NG8YWDL4W9hMbk93D-dCpW1Jj6jR2vvtlwW5F9-DJ5xtxlGN2v-p6YkTrFTW68g5vY8N0ZpFW9hpqGZ236wwRN93bDqfKQhp8Vk7q6340rsftW7Tgk3f7xKh7XN24MRlG9R87qW2lChwB16R-BpW3dz3JF98yfJ4W8m6zbR1ND6gZMTwVT9w4fK7N52ls1mtDvRmW63G0Ts7NYvmXW9hwcDp5Ldys4W8YN5kw4XB4RfW1_wYs98HYqmMVLJtCF7L1XBV3mg_1)

ICYMI – I was in Fox News again this week talking about women’s rights – read the article [HERE](https://d2p4X504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/OR+113/d2p4X504/VW2YQl1Yyx9-W7l0CHq32Z0g5VrHz2f4H2Bx7MZjDVB5nKvpV3Zsc37Cg-LLW4w30dJ2fpn78W95KTc_4kxJG6N5XqbZ3Q10KhW7S2dvy59zS2nW82-Bz1583wxNW2fk9z88VkBqWW4Ss9vj42s2dRW3FX9MS1swl7GW4hb8xF8J3WdTW6kKZ7W7gyfS-VWQt4m3l1-9dVh_TN228jx1ZW955GXq29N1hcW8Fx7RZ76CYMCN9hzNxbrnyrsW2-JXqM4DflZ1W5jLYDJ2vNdpmW3h99272twNjBW5hV7_X2vlLbSF8D3N42fb2-W1BJf8h1PxN2CMMqwH-2scT3W6B36_q3dNGs_W1mdXf95YTmC0N590XDy3Ljz_W11qKnZ4BQMRhW2ByHHj5nDtVcW2thFTt3Lb0cNW6jB0BH7bVFRYW8YKVWk1sRq5xV_kBXT5sGmZsW21PfXy2HYCsdW5S1QL57RDw1FW9kzYY62ynZ693mBk1) Friend, Serious question – if you can’t define a woman, how should anyone expect you to support women? Joe Biden’s U.S. Supreme Court nominee Judge Kentaji Brown Jackson could not define what it means to be a woman. When asked to do so, she replied that she could not define a woman because she was not a biologist. **Every woman’s advocate and feminist should join me in a collective, “WHAAAAAAAAT?!” ** Women have fought and continue to fight hard for equal rights. They earned Title IX support and protections a mere 50 years ago. Woke liberals are trying to diminish these accomplishments by prioritizing political correctness and wokeness above women’s rights. _If we are now at a crossroads where our political leaders and Supreme Court Justices are not even willing to define “a woman”, what does this mean for Title IX and other protections and rights that women have worked and fought to earn? _ It would not surprise me at all if a case comes before the Supreme Court in the near future asking the question of WHO Title IX protections apply to – biological women or biological men who identify as women. If Judge Jackson is appointed to the U.S. Supreme Court, I am extremely worried about her answer to this question and how she would rule on a case regarding protecting women’s rights through Title IX. Women’s rights advocates and feminists everywhere should join me in calling for her not to be confirmed. Friend, Judge Jackson could send the women’s rights movement back decades. If Judge Jackson is confirmed, I have NO confidence in her ability to protect women. **After all, how can you protect something that you cannot define? ** When I am in the Senate, I WILL DEFINE the difference between a biological male and female ... and I won’t need a degree in biology. Do you agree that Joe Biden needs to reconsider his nominee?
---
| [ **Sign Our Petition** ](https://d2p4X504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/OR+113/d2p4X504/VW2YQl1Yyx9-W7l0CHq32Z0g5VrHz2f4H2Bx7MZjDWt3q905V1-WJV7CgKXgV18FG136JkxSW5v-Rv73X_gJJV5lPln3MqX3bVMLXwX1q2mGSN5zBC2VW78sZW1S_FY26FjNYHW5l1JnD4x_N_4W72kzc-1Nn5xzW8J8YmX3G9fkMW3SmS5d5JlpHQW5TqyWq7WsmQTN70NWF6tT23LW8J9dBR8nSt0NW8DtPNm2lnBsmW7xPDpr5N2p7MW7MFcKd7_MykfW1MbcKj2cmd3PW5q5H6L6hfGG8W3wQv7n1kwb_PW3VnvRJ8cCWmPW674RnB39Q7N_W2jG-778bbwPYW5pSjv05VVbXhW2hzNbq6_tCzF3jtm1)
---
Thank you,
---
---
Eli Bremer USAFA Graduate, Olympian, Veteran, Republican Candidate for the U.S. Senate P.S. I have appeared in Fox News three times talking about women’s rights. You can find the previous articles [here](https://d2p4X504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/OR+113/d2p4X504/VW2YQl1Yyx9-W7l0CHq32Z0g5VrHz2f4H2Bx7MZjDWt3q905V1-WJV7CgWcqW2Np58R70MQCcN5124zkjrqBNW79gLZw7yfs7hW3762qZ6-vvHgW6fxCS62lV3HrW9057W33b5C4-N6R4PMchqQ2hW2-h_sx7VN1SmW351q2t5Rnn0cN1b3RlrdwvnmW49_Lnr2MCxXYW5PbTwj1L1WkgW24x9_L2H-RzgW3KcxqB4CJHHGW2bwDrk7clB47W4f_wD78ttGF5VdKlCx1kbG5MW4vw3wV7WwgKCW3wTPSf23f-VWW3y5X4N74WYpQVsg-h12l7G8yW2Nd6xn6chLzgW811h5v4DWt7-W95Vkp67Fk8KM3j0q1).

body:
We’re all-in to TAKE BACK THE SENATE and save our country. Read more >>>
| | | Peter,

One of the top 2022 U.S. Senate races is right next door in Georgia, and it’s heating up.

**Herschel Walker is running to DEFEAT Radical Raphael Warnock this November, and I could not be prouder to officially endorse him in this race.**

Like me, Herschel is an America First outsider who loves our great nation.

He has President Trump’s complete and total endorsement too.

He was a winner on the field and he’s been a winner in life, and I know he can get the job done to FLIP THIS SEAT!

Today, we’re launching a special 24-hour fundraising drive to rush Herschel Walker and his campaign team a big boost of support.

[**Follow this link to pitch in your most generous possible contribution >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/cbda4c26d712e135/b47a860fd0fdefd8c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---

---
I’ve seen Herschel in action. He’s an incredible candidate with an amazing work ethic.

_The latest polls show he’s made this a “Toss Up” race!_

The stakes could not be higher. Control of the U.S. Senate came down to Georgia in the last election cycle, and this race could very well mean the difference two more years of Chuck Schumer and his radical-left pals running the show or a new Republican majority.

[**Thank you for any donation you can send. Even just $5, $10, or $25 will be a big help.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/cbda4c26d712e135/0799415fd4601a6fc3d6b838967d376c/33013)

I know it will mean the world to Herschel to have you on board!

\- Coach

body:
I know a thing or two about winning tough races
| | |
---
Friend,

That's me you're looking at.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43344514/336799624/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2741-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDcwOTYwOC1jYmFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K1gTHp6bt8gc9_AarhdaPFU3_cIP7QstOMhj-5-Bohc=)I grew up poor in the segregated South, the daughter of a maid and a janitor. If you had told me back then, as a young Black girl, that I would become the first in my family to graduate college, the first woman to lead the Orlando Police Department, a congresswoman and a candidate for the U.S. Senate, well – I just don't know if I would have believed you. What I _did_ believe then – and what I carry deep in my soul to this day – is the lesson from my hardworking parents to "never tire of doing good."
It was my parents' words that inspired me to get into public service. It was their words that have driven me to do good every chance I get. From my time as a young social worker to my career as a law enforcement officer to my work representing my community in Congress – "never tire" is a mantra that I've held dear.
My unlikely story of opportunity is proof of what is possible and what should be possible for every American. **As Florida's next U.S. senator, I will _never tire_ in the work to make sure the greatness of America is accessible and affordable for all Americans. **I will _never tire_ in continuing to do more good for you and your family.
But when it comes to this race, the GOP won't tire either: The Republican National Committee chair is already attacking me personally, while Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are ready to dump tens of MILLIONS into Florida to defeat me.

This is already shaping up to be the most expensive Senate election _ever –_ and with Florida's last Senate race being decided by a narrow 0.12% margin, every dollar we raise will count tremendously. **I know a thing or two about winning tough races, but I need your help because I can't do this alone.**
**[I'm depending on your grassroots support to power this historic campaign and help me fight back against the GOP's attacks – and right now, I'm falling short of my midnight goal. Can you make a $5 donation today to help make sure I have the resources to defeat Marco Rubio and protect and expand Democratic Senate control?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43344515/336799625/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk2741-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDcwOTYwOC1jYmFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K1gTHp6bt8gc9_AarhdaPFU3_cIP7QstOMhj-5-Bohc=)**
Thank you so much for sharing this journey with me. It means the world to have you by my side.

Val Demings

clean_body: Hey Peter, I just wanted to sign on and quickly talk about why it’s so important that we hit our fundr | | | We only have a few days left in March, and we can’t afford to slow down now. Chip in now before it's too late! Hey Peter, Our state is desperate for change. Floridians are tired of watching their leaders turn their state into the national symbol for successful legislative bigotry. Floridians know that the Sunshine State is full of smart, compassionate, hard-working folks who love living here. But with Republicans like Rubio and DeSantis at the helm, we have been let down time and time again. They are radicalizing Florida and turning the state into a far-right playground. It’s time to remind politicians that homophobia isn’t normal. Racism isn’t normal. Misogyny isn't normal. Climate denial isn’t normal. Thank you Russell HQ Ken Russell is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Florida. He's a small business owner turned community activist who will clean up Washington and restore our country’s character. Support Ken with a donation today. - ** Paid for by Ken Russell for Florida

Please chip in now to bring Tim Ryan to the U.S. Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43337055/336767071/348098690?refcode=2022-03-24-ryansplit&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=b418e8b1-acab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDE4ZThiMS1hY2FiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GdGJw3yEC9jfSIRV2htWaq51vuh5iW6ZtaA8GmuL25I=)** One of Tim's biggest opponents? Josh Mandel. Let me tell you about him:
* Called Black Lives Matter activists "thugs" and "the transgender movement" "insane"

* Shared the conspiracy theory that COVID -19 is a bioweapon manufactured by the Chinese Communist Party to defeat Donald Trump.

* Described immigration at the border as a "seep" of "illegals"

* Believes there is no such thing as separation of church and state

Or, put much more simply:**By all indications, Josh Mandel is a racist conspiracy theorist who actively and proudly threatens the most vulnerable people in our communities.** Tim Ryan has worked tirelessly for progressive change: LGTBQ+ equality, affordable health care, women's reproductive rights, climate action, quality education. **Tim Ryan truly fights for working families and an economy that works for all of us.** We need more progressive fighters like him in the Senate. Not conspiracy theorists. **[Please join me in standing with Tim Ryan by donating to his people-powered campaign clean_body: | | | We need to talk about Ohio, where my friend, Congressman Tim Ryan, is running for the U.S. Senate. The stakes are especially high on this one. Tim's opponents are simply too dangerous to be in the Senate. = One of Tim's biggest opponents? Josh Mandel. Let me tell you about him: Called Black Lives Matter activists "thugs" and "the transgender movement" "insane" Shared the conspiracy theory that COVID -19 is a bioweapon manufactured by the Chinese Communist Party to defeat Donald Trump. Described immigration at the border as a "seep" of "illegals" Believes there is no such thing as separation of church and state Or, put much more simply:By all indications, Josh Mandel is a racist conspiracy theorist who actively and proudly threatens the most vulnerable people in our communities. Tim Ryan has worked tirelessly for progressive change: LGTBQ+ equality, affordable health care, women's reproductive rights, climate action, quality education. Tim Ryan truly fights for working families and an economy that works for all of us. We need more progressive fighters like him in the Senate. Not conspiracy theorists. = Ron Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Tim Ryan and Ron Wyden instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. ---|--- | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/31ba43af2ce7/conforti-for-congress-6801037?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Great News! I won the lottery!

The lottery was held in Springfield by the Illinois State Board of Elections yesterday to determine ballot order. And I won!!

As a result, I will be listed first on the ballot in the June 28th primary for the Republican nomination for IL Congressional District 6.

This is very exciting!!

Even so, there is still much work to be done - beginning right now! Feel free to respond to this email if you would like to volunteer for the Conforti for Congress campaign. It will take all of us working together to bring a victory in June - and then again in November.

If you want your US Congressional Representative to fight for you and your rights, vote Conforti for Congress 2022!
Please consider donating to the Conforti for Congress campaign. [Click here](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=a5e5079126&e=25f4fa3311)
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District
---

| | Dear Friend,

Your support for my campaign over the last year has meant the world to me, _and I need your help now more than ever_. We're entering the home stretch of the Republican primary, which is only a few weeks away. _**Will you help me finish this race strong so we can win this primary and finally end one-party rule in Salem?**_ Whether it's hosting a lawn sign, writing a letter to the editor, canvassing your neighborhood, or donating what you can, everything helps!

Please indicate the ways you are able to help by clicking the buttons below and filling out the form.

| [Get Involved!](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=b99c4b6390&e=7e91be8cad "Get Involved!")

Thanks for everything,

Jessica Gomez
Republican for Governor

name: Charlie Crist
subject: I’m disgusted and furious at the Florida GOP’s “Don’t Say Gay” bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
it’s vile and abhorrent
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7367?t=6&akid=1617%2E878179%2Edh96d7) I’m disgusted and furious.

This month, Florida Republicans passed the “Don’t Say Gay” bill – a proposed law that would ban all discussion of LGBTQ+ issues, history, people, and more in the classroom.

Let’s be clear: This a direct attack on our LGBTQ+ youth, who already face higher risks of bullying and suicide. This bill is anti-history and jeopardizes the safe learning environments that are so essential in our schools.

[I’ve pledged to build a Florida for All, and all includes everyone. That’s why I’m fighting to beat DeSantis and end this crusade against LGBTQ+ students once and for all. Peter,

I’m reaching out because we’ve got a serious problem on our hands in our battle to retake a Republican House majority in 2022.

Republicans only need a net pickup of 5 seats to win back the House. But redistricting has put us on defense in current Republican seats, making it harder to go on offense.

Four of the most vulnerable Republican seats we must now defend are in California (more than any other state):

**
* Rep. David Valadao in CA-22
* Rep. Mike Garcia in CA-27
* Rep. Young Kim in CA-40
* Rep. Michelle Steel in CA-45
**

**I and our team at Save California Now PAC played a key role in flipping these seats back to Republican in 2020.** But redistricting has changed the playing field, and now each of these new districts was won by Biden in 2020.

[**We need your help to defend these key Republican seats so we can win back the House in 2022.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c2ab5b1a066845e499fa4213a01e8dd9&_e=_FCtKyFwkQ25-vj_kUEdRYREtI5Bvd2ZpzFi-x4lIqRbapCaacKdtn8DJnlkAw_25ejUdTgWjMn78KleqACK-2IHJUWWUWcNXeklHGywzfT6G4He545fYwGFG4F2_dOxyVOTWtDdkOsTJ7JS2DzAZlGzILYKZ6ZVSe5sdutk1KmAVj1inYt314MbEJkwquPNiae2E3YqJO71FXPTINIzi1fCaXZxbzDApW2ZkYFMiADKfxO6V7VP56xxR5WeHzqFYO4Xfe-xn00FIPq-hKzTxGDcu9Un-dLS9v7zJxhcIExeKFdOdhEs2G_MxPB2DsLtG7EykIgwO0_HLnUUCq_pNfv7AWOPeKddaSR-MbQfHtrf1hAAP_FWrJYpluspROElpsCv6TnTMK9i3DptjSU9SAO4xh8oY1MvyvC054VXBY16phU0Z534FnemIMpqmYnEICUIZfJGqaZcpGaFQn6Qsg%3D%3D)

| [HELP REPUBLICANS WIN THE HOUSE »](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c2ab5b1a066845e499fa4213a01e8dd9&_e=_FCtKyFwkQ25-vj_kUEdRYREtI5Bvd2ZpzFi-x4lIqRbapCaacKdtn8DJnlkAw_25ejUdTgWjMn78KleqACK-2IHJUWWUWcNXeklHGywzfT6G4He545fYwGFG4F2_dOxyVOTWtDdkOsTJ7JS2DzAZlGzILYKZ6ZVSe5sdutk1KmAVj1inYt314MbEJkwquPNiae2E3YqJO71FXPTINIzi1fCaXZxbzDApW2ZkYFMiADKfxO6V7VP56xxR5WeHzqF7eSJJOIFxNv7XrPAxrbH42vJ061hgKyhdzDUkmjtOOvYPoDF14Lox6n8xM1AAw2364HcxgKh36b93ee1azy0sCNURGmi4fs5Te_5kX71LpdVR7x8-lyMRhEGBtRaag0ZbwfnYZgLGGkhevAuJo0KGnho2Hs4xrrX3E7jN_Xx-XCS0Kdt6HrChYAXIGWs-YzwQsDrfw67GFKMA56Mlq6poQ%3D%3D)

Our **final end-of-quarter fundraising deadline** before California’s primaries is coming up at the end of March – just days from now.

[**Will you rush $10, $25, $50 or even more to help us protect these critical Republican leaders and their seats from falling into the hands of Biden and Pelosi?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c2ab5b1a066845e499fa4213a01e8dd9&_e=_FCtKyFwkQ25-vj_kUEdRYREtI5Bvd2ZpzFi-x4lIqRbapCaacKdtn8DJnlkAw_25ejUdTgWjMn78KleqACK-2IHJUWWUWcNXeklHGywzfT6G4He545fYwGFG4F2_dOxyVOTWtDdkOsTJ7JS2DzAZlGzILYKZ6ZVSe5sdutk1KmAVj1inYt314MbEJkwquPNiae2E3YqJO71FXPTINIzi1fCaXZxbzDApW2ZkYFMiADKfxO6V7VP56xxR5WeHzqFLISOmimvRa0vjc-R93HSY_RQ7X4PTkmWcBdBRvqNsm5rlHt8BA9xA3WW0JF7GWm7qTbP5od4MduHDfg7P3YYNjCh7ikcNS4350iAb8u1F9k1jwW8ygu8QSuq9Xrhif-BoSccsnhRBy1FnuEy5KCPRzoi6H1wNw6t-EjC9b548F-Dgxx6zi6Xukb1oPqsGBbDUVI_8L3cBu4gDRrYyTWWgw%3D%3D)

If the Democrats flip these seats, they will use them to pass more of their destructive and failing Big Government Socialism agenda that is hurting American families, degrading our values, and threatening our freedoms. We can’t let that happen.

[**Anything you can give before our March 31st quarterly deadline - whether it’s $50 or $10 - will help us at Save California Now PAC support these Republican leaders and win back the House in 2022.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c2ab5b1a066845e499fa4213a01e8dd9&_e=_FCtKyFwkQ25-vj_kUEdRYREtI5Bvd2ZpzFi-x4lIqRbapCaacKdtn8DJnlkAw_25ejUdTgWjMn78KleqACK-2IHJUWWUWcNXeklHGywzfT6G4He545fYwGFG4F2_dOxyVOTWtDdkOsTJ7JS2DzAZlGzILYKZ6ZVSe5sdutk1KmAVj1inYt314MbEJkwquPNiae2E3YqJO71FXPTINIzi1fCaXZxbzDApW2ZkYFMiADKfxO6V7VP56xxR5WeHzqFokF9aZvGWK5mumQunXPgij3mmi4mq2gGgTY7Z1v8Oxu5gEj3lNyddn70n1zSkd4KCikuOrYeGlucTImpdUkoDUUPYZdj1taDecxYsowPrsRZa8ENsy2GYZ4lsChuhsiZt9UqGT3A4Lt4jfLDvnDKMGgDckP_1Ilrni0_pHWM9ELVTiNOdn3ntaJiVeaNFyPzXSLSqZakeRFz1JU1H75-LQ%3D%3D)

Newt Gingrich

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Are you still a Republican?
body:
Peter,
Your Senate Conservatives need to know if they can count on you this November.
**Are you still Republican?** [**YES**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=3eb7e9d2b7a54d4ca0dec927861239ce&_e=lYauwMK9tjEH-8mFK8WYNclYMIivG3fpF57MX_naeUj92LFGrcE_rkC-KlFevkOXxU2J9gOj97-KhM7CBtuLZBDqX-RtpjFWuDryq6DzpRU5LdLEeIVHFuHPxGMUujWfOGrZHRj4cyIDJ1EzCOdQT0rpVwbseM8Mm6obPfHZ0Ul0JnlKZhfHE81udYfaTiUuP3qELGjJZkUi7oC9n351mT9z5kMlGI6Vp2FKdu8icQ1AKz1cp9-8Zv_J9QIen0qkSMjydGQGd_DXOgfqgHqFqLKq3-iaMnPT9FNl_PviRvTwpTYU9MTDWPtoFjXVHGx6SrDW9GuNWZk2--omEuPXbJYNB3HF20x_AnTAxpQScgRPmyw8J_9pPtWX6bU7o_x_vo2mW4OuUCxHQJSLLFWLmXu0pk7H80hx8fdje8FmWyg%3D) [**NO**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=3eb7e9d2b7a54d4ca0dec927861239ce&_e=lYauwMK9tjEH-8mFK8WYNclYMIivG3fpF57MX_naeUj92LFGrcE_rkC-KlFevkOXxU2J9gOj97-KhM7CBtuLZBDqX-RtpjFWuDryq6DzpRU5LdLEeIVHFuHPxGMUujWfOGrZHRj4cyIDJ1EzCOdQT0rpVwbseM8Mm6obPfHZ0Ul0JnlKZhfHE81udYfaTiUuFQWqmy3J4D_fM20u1dCcQbnljg7dh5_sszZxY8U8f6LM1zTIlClLqb_8BjIHd_BxmNyPXeprCLQDLKdsmDT3wqC3xkgQO5c4ajPtBA4yRe5inzAz2qoDyzO6xZR0_S9xN5YVFSV4gQnf-bt8k4oxqkQ5g9GMlrhKyQviiMgtX2tniPbSMbc7dOrgqK308OQGHSmlkUhP0fQVu7HmLE4Haf_IxHczxULpdaXYnCQHwig%3D) If you’ve given up on us and joined the radical Left, we’ll take you off our list and give your name to the socialist Democrats.

_But if we can still count on you, we need to know that you’re on board to TAKE BACK AMERICA this November!_

[**Let us know today if you’re still a Republican!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=3eb7e9d2b7a54d4ca0dec927861239ce&_e=lYauwMK9tjEH-8mFK8WYNclYMIivG3fpF57MX_naeUj92LFGrcE_rkC-KlFevkOXxU2J9gOj97-KhM7CBtuLZBDqX-RtpjFWuDryq6DzpRU5LdLEeIVHFuHPxGMUujWfOGrZHRj4cyIDJ1EzCOdQT0rpVwbseM8Mm6obPfHZ0Ul0JnlKZhfHE81udYfaTiUuMBTNkUuVBraYFuepZNL0C17L5eXGztIdcVyVOCnrZSt5xvfrBEnaou_oGUaJfEfPbMccGtotul6PSsHOh3cD345LILoEXVr5yCJ8xImqS2YLXv3e7lYX27cNY7dnXkqeyLO_00Ejg98k4_exLJdmYpMXnklFBkYmEvBIBq4iLt9NpPz8NM0xzw_zwQufCHhpONy2rL5P3qSXxxhjQhm7rKeE4tHNDGiqvUxxIfX7lC4%3D) [**YES, IM STILL A REPUBLICAN PATRIOT**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=3eb7e9d2b7a54d4ca0dec927861239ce&_e=lYauwMK9tjEH-8mFK8WYNclYMIivG3fpF57MX_naeUj92LFGrcE_rkC-KlFevkOXxU2J9gOj97-KhM7CBtuLZBDqX-RtpjFWuDryq6DzpRU5LdLEeIVHFuHPxGMUujWfOGrZHRj4cyIDJ1EzCOdQT0rpVwbseM8Mm6obPfHZ0Ul0JnlKZhfHE81udYfaTiUuSvyF48HSVJH18ctDkbe3M1sPHuZqDJHZ7FUhfp1yi61NY1olJCJm3ZgUIdZTFfv6K9Bbrmrx2N5PE9OwCWjrctgbEji4bfWZLI6-hQNi0bRBk_euXkqj3h_6DjVxpe13zhUV56X8NTMQoHDgrXMy1CDJxbp9tD27Z5eKRox9CpEdLhW5Ul-Arr3Z2xWhg11aYsGfiuoGBrg-Rg0cMD05Vr8iA899TrV95o78EwNtk0g%3D) [**NO, I HAVE JOINED THE SOCIALIST LEFT**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=3eb7e9d2b7a54d4ca0dec927861239ce&_e=lYauwMK9tjEH-8mFK8WYNclYMIivG3fpF57MX_naeUj92LFGrcE_rkC-KlFevkOXxU2J9gOj97-KhM7CBtuLZBDqX-RtpjFWuDryq6DzpRU5LdLEeIVHFuHPxGMUujWfOGrZHRj4cyIDJ1EzCOdQT0rpVwbseM8Mm6obPfHZ0Ul0JnlKZhfHE81udYfaTiUuHnIZe8TTHePTRJpvERPIOgtCD13PYCaLCwY0rDYY_bqFCT_9V81GJTFghs93HXESqNBml4Dkq5fdcDPF7dfxn0lQIt6ELprCiAgXEFrlfUbWd-sbrhux57KJS8-2_P5A8ZVeTe77dcT0dI6vq6iUXio1I6FvefaGjDrN8_kADo6wMWneInVtCgOTc6Tkq77iU_ClqZrOj95vlX86A1M6BDK9auyHa02zRUU40naSGbA%3D) Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Friend,

Joe Biden nominated woke activist Ketanji Brown Jackson to the U.S. Supreme Court. _Jackson is a radical liberal who cares more about being a social justice warrior than she does upholding the Constitution and the rule of law._ With a troubling record of leniency toward child predators, defending terrorists at Guantanamo Bay, and pushing a woke agenda, it's clear that she is unfit to serve as a Supreme Court Justice.** ****Unlike my opponent John Boozman, I would never even entertain the nomination of someone with such a far-left record like Jackson. name: Beto HQ
subject: Can Beto count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

We only have one week until the 31st — when we’ll close the books on this
quarter’s fundraising — and we just set a goal to raise $1,200,000 before
midnight next Thursday. Here’s why reaching this end-of-quarter goal is so
important:

→ Greg Abbott’s campaign has publicly said that they are prepared to spend
$100,000,000 on this election. We need the resources to fight back.

→ We’re hiring organizers and opening campaign field offices to build the
biggest organizing program that Texas has ever seen. This is a major
expenditure.

→ Reporters are already reaching out to ask about our fundraising and what
we’ll be able to raise. The strength of our campaign will be judged by
hitting our goals.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54345?refcode=ema20220324-181902&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=181902%2E444211%2E2XyoZN ]Can Beto count on you to be one of the people who steps up to own a
part of this grassroots campaign? Make a $3 contribution
right now to help give us the resources we need to reach our
end-of-quarter goal and defeat Greg Abbott.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54345?refcode=ema20220324-181902&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=181902%2E444211%2E2XyoZN ]Contribute $3

Thank you so much for your support today.

Let’s finish this quarter strong!

— Team Beto

name: Wade Herring HQ
subject: Private Prison Group In District Funds Buddy Carter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43338426/336774336/673343869?refcode=whem032422&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2U4ODI3Yi1iMGFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X2fK1VZerinPV8Lub8AtZ7EhMOQtsLj9i-l1QDBWlBQ=)
---
| | Peter, every week Buddy Carter seems to stoop to a new low. Last week, in his FEC fundraising report, he listed a contribution to his campaign from GEO Group, Inc Political Action Committee. The GEO Group is one of the largest for-profit prison companies in the world and operates the Folkston ICE Processing Center – located in our own First District.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43338427/336774343/673343869?refcode=whem032422&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2U4ODI3Yi1iMGFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X2fK1VZerinPV8Lub8AtZ7EhMOQtsLj9i-l1QDBWlBQ=)
---
The GEO Group has been repeatedly sued for abuse, mismanagement, and neglect. Allegations include forced labor and requiring detainees to work for food. It is unacceptable to send a representative to Washington who politically panders to the lowest of the low just to gain a few campaign dollars. clean_body: | | | = | | Peter, every week Buddy Carter seems to stoop to a new low. Last week, in his FEC fundraising report, he listed a contribution to his campaign from GEO Group, Inc Political Action Committee. The GEO Group is one of the largest for-profit prison companies in the world and operates the Folkston ICE Processing Center – located in our own First District. = The GEO Group has been repeatedly sued for abuse, mismanagement, and neglect. Allegations include forced labor and requiring detainees to work for food. It is unacceptable to send a representative to Washington who politically panders to the lowest of the low just to gain a few campaign dollars. We’re ready for the challenge this November – it is time to vote Buddy Carter out of office. The residents of this district deserve better. Sincerely, Wade Herring HQ P.S. John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena, are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena, are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = =_ Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee CRANLEY FEDOR FOR OHIO COMMITTEE 545 EAST TOWN STREET COLUMBUS, OH 43215 United States Click here to

name: Dick Durbin
subject: My thoughts on this week’s Supreme Court nomination hearing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
There were moments when I expected Judge Jackson to stand up and walk out of her Supreme Court nomination hearing.
Four Republican Senators attacked her in ways that were unfair, unrelenting, and beneath the dignity of the Senate.
As Chair of the Senate Judiciary Committee, I gaveled for order and shut down the worst Republican offender.
But Judge Jackson – with her grace, dignity, and courage – showed America that President Biden made the right choice. She should be our next Supreme Court Justice.
She would not back down to the Republican attacks. She was standing up for what is right – she was standing up for us.
**[Peter, will you make sure Democrats continue to lead Supreme Court confirmations? Contribute $5 now to reelect our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43338819/336775875/1901419541?refcode=dd_em_220324_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjVhMzM5ZC1iMWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p6zAW6Yapazzi6SXL5Pq9Ur6gibojk1Hi1hb2XjaBfs=)**
I will be fighting for Judge Jackson because you fought for a Senate that can send quality jurists like her to the highest court in the land**. **
Let’s make history together.
My best,
Dick Durbin

clean_body: Peter, There were moments when I expected Judge Jackson to stand up and walk out of her Supreme Court nomination hearing. Four Republican Senators attacked her in ways that were unfair, unrelenting, and beneath the dignity of the Senate. As Chair of the Senate Judiciary Committee, I gaveled for order and shut down the worst Republican offender. But Judge Jackson – with her grace, dignity, and courage – showed America that President Biden made the right choice. She should be our next Supreme Court Justice. She would not back down to the Republican attacks. She was standing up for what is right – she was standing up for us. = I will be fighting for Judge Jackson because you fought for a Senate that can send quality jurists like her to the highest court in the land. Let’s make history together. My best, Dick Durbin **= Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

name: Team Gansler
subject: Do you want a leader who will make your community safer?
body:
With violent crime threatening so many communities across our state, it’s clear we need leadership that will vigilantly protect our families today, using a fair and just approach to create lasting change. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTj9hmS-8LvnA8qY7ch-DzuiOoV3GDq1inVo2RfvNOlcaGKgxprmYqn2KaVq5MYPOJm6At4ouJBe99UqPf1lzDhFWdGtUQqBKbDJdGuxohDWd_skRvWpgZgtwemDDDdURzuFOOUkHmBQCVUI1lip4mnu6fVzW1YoT0J_xb_Jp6D9Ad-eofNIC-iCWlT1RKeKz0TlXXhZSELfTpG0WAikqi3Gg79_qsLLaspbfCEswTVTl4xZmgAvnyyo74pjYgf2MlbiBxWMYCRcNrOp5Zt2aNBXY67PBvWjQwvFBJiwCTYOomr2rME7g_WzIkBPgUnpy5dhfUpMbK4IznrSGimwhOTg/3km/huHKn6GpQjORj9J7qSY66w/h0/VoV6CG2gv2I5h8lux94zZTFzpJ6Zvvt-DrvGXEQnCmM)
---
Hi friends, A recent state-wide poll showed that crime and public safety is the #1 issue Maryland voters want their state government to focus on. ** ** Now, we want to know what YOU think. Answer our quick poll here: Is crime and public safety a top priority?
---
[ ** YES! **
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wU4u8fRNsb1BaqkbIb_TioduwUMsQ8D51ZhYoVjsG4CdGJpoa8wp-ZtValk03z4KA1eWB7n2Br658uUZMFzxfBwL9pWxaU3Sn7Ad7fpZ986KZYkebzPSffk4Z-Q9jcqsdM-xLwGhpcIKgoQ0BhF7IjPCyAl-Rkv4UfKGKD5dC1CIlHJF1vk-hqw1XxxhQuCbiua1psLaLhDYztVA34mW9Zozxu1GrZSIbdwQhZAG8A-spbK4TjbKTmR_3spx8bxJIHiFV6Fn2_j9Za3HH59NmoAcFsf9OXcIAgmhHOHP5eApOTCc3X4dar6ShRZye8-n90fXpKVZ-8bq5kkJswrVOsMErblbH_lzgxML6pmPP9u2lfmcuET__-ZhMTnyGuxtQ/3km/huHKn6GpQjORj9J7qSY66w/h1/iFD-vSZ9e6t01w7w_lDegW3J63rBQiqmeKhdfCrhFoE)
---
[ **NO**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wU4u8fRNsb1BaqkbIb_TioduwUMsQ8D51ZhYoVjsG4CZxMG8_UIQkO1pq20YsTuuB_P-JcjGBBp5NILqhfQRtFiWyb3FQSxD5UQDXHYtb-6mrcVYEWAgeXs_EhOFyLZfACEHtzNTSaK3P7nwxGuxHeytOvZQLBBsYe1h0dwWR-gxoP7-8hdwkfcIQmSt2nADIDHX7sL2jxsueoTCJX9QPrlxx89ROEJw8MRF_eAFxPmdEy0AfMeLqQlYOK_pBKz8p16YvmPNoBqdNGkoIi1Lhy13HKa4ypTzYUJs0A_K4UdhEHMYUJVnfPJSs2YkXnLWbMAFK7JyobshXCgCRp36QlIz_ySxQzt0EoiLVVQjDDTmToflDw2LPmzvr33AOl3vI/3km/huHKn6GpQjORj9J7qSY66w/h2/RMD5sU83d0WajmhEqEQckMiMvxM_8-FqmRMLJVCmr1w)
---
At every step of his career -- from serving as a federal prosecutor, to Montgomery County State's Attorney, to Maryland's Attorney General -- Doug kept people safe. **His record of protecting our communities is unmatched.** In his 22 years of successfully prosecuting violent criminals, Doug created innovative solutions to target crime's root causes and keep us safe. He established Maryland's first drug and domestic violence courts, and led the first office in the country to fully implement community prosecution. ** ** With violent crime threatening so many communities across our state, it's clear we need leadership that will vigilantly protect our families today, using a fair and just approach to create lasting change. ** ** That's exactly what Doug will do as governor. Doug's top priority is doing everything possible to make Maryland a safer place to live. Take our quick poll and let us know if it's yours, too!
---
Thank you, Team Gansler
---
[ **DONATE**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTj9hmS-8LvnA8qY7ch-DzuuvFLuazxsQIgifUZlVaVfRwUm3Y14CX8Pc-pVbyltii3g2c3F90UzsG0fVfKC9hR-TcUwvTXahJ30sbKNSSY1Cn81OcBRMtdhjvvsxHqkOzWJpha049vVpvsHNXzSbS6B-NA1tRCpUcBEtmhMRJ7BrXGBbnavEnI-molTnxHQJ6lSNavarFQCLO4Z5z1b34UxwVu7D-UkOviTPE2_FYhEp039IZhQN7m9xE-jwKJHOTiDM0XfshezM4KlDkurBI57PxzDp7-ciJQiyU6d45fr53FeStfFj3Y-Yt4u2QwfROHdD2laXgG5wqZyt8KfDkYw/3km/huHKn6GpQjORj9J7qSY66w/h3/HxsopT5fvWgHNHAC7JeXdQ8LDxvtQriLGr3E1SB45vc)

name: Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
subject: Two game-changing developments:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
There’s so much on the line and zero margin for error.
#

Democrats have extremely narrow margins in the U.S. Senate and House right now. There’s so much on the line and zero margin for error.
But we have a huge opportunity in North Carolina to hold and even expand these majorities.
We’ve seen two major developments in the last month. First, the North Carolina Supreme Court rejected Republicans’ extreme gerrymandering and finally secured fair maps for North Carolinians. And then just recently, a second poll was released showing Cheri Beasley in a statistical tie with our Republican opponents.
This gives us a chance to actually flip a number of seats and increase the number of Democrats in the U.S. House and Senate — meaning we can get more done for the people. But first, we need your help to win in November:
[**Can you make a $3 donation to help us win and hold Democrats’ House and Senate majorities? Every dollar will go directly towards turning out voters across North Carolina, so that we can turn seats blue up and down the ballot.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220324-1-MA&refcode2=586.357359.upUPfd&t=1&akid=586%2E357359%2EupUPfd)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220324-1-MA&refcode2=586.357359.upUPfd&t=20&akid=586%2E357359%2EupUPfd)**

---
****
Cheri’s ability to consistently outperform most Democrats in rural communities gives us our best chance to flip a U.S. Senate seat.
And as our presumptive nominee for U.S. Senate, it is Cheri’s responsibility to lead our entire ticket in November. Our campaign must build the largest statewide organizing operation our state has ever seen in order to win.
If we work hard to organize and get massive turnout, this is the year we can flip a Senate seat with Cheri and actually send more Democrats to the U.S. House from North Carolina.
Some pundits want to say history is against us this cycle, but with Cheri’s historic candidacy and new fairer maps, Democrats can come together to defy history.
[**Pitch in $3 or any amount you can to Cheri Beasley’s campaign right now. Our campaign is responsible for the entire statewide organizing effort that could determine control of Congress, and we cannot afford to follow the old playbook and wait until right before Election Day to reach out to voters.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220324-1-MA&refcode2=586.357359.upUPfd&t=26&akid=586%2E357359%2EupUPfd)

Peter, David McCormick's hedge fund has given billions of dollars to China in his quest to make a profit on Communist soil. So much so that he has said “when China succeeds, the United States succeeds.” [](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYhRECXP9zpGAeiJcLx1o7CGWVDYl3NNMxCRnugW3_6KxUW-OLWfiR8azhcazZyNVGw&e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mccormick_email&n=1) Candidates for Senate in Pennsylvania should not have one foot in Beijing. The Communist regime is one of the greatest threats to American leadership. The regime that McCormick praises: **\- Poses a real and regular threat to our national security.** **\- Unleashed a deadly virus on the world.** \- **Is responsible for the one child policy that murdered millions of babies through forced abortions.** **\- Is responsible for human rights abuses against religious minorities and ethnic groups.** **\- Has consistently disappeared and murdered political dissidents and peaceful protestors.** These are not conservative values and there is no place in Pennsylvania for fake conservatives! I am fighting for life in Pennsylvania, for prosperity, for security and I will fight against the many abuses that China has committed across the globe. I will not kneel to Communist dictators like Dave McCormick. [I urge you to join me in my fight to bring real conservative values to Washington by signing my petition. Thank you for your continued support.](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYhRECXP9zpGAeiJcLx1o7CGWVDYl3NNMxCRnugW3_6KxUW-OLWfiR8azhcazZyNVGw&e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mccormick_email&n=2) For Pennsylvania, George Bochetto [P.S. clean_body: We were right all along about 2020. | Friend – you have to see this: The Office of Special Counsel’s report PROVES what we were saying all along in our lawsuit against the WEC for their unlawful guidance in the 2020 election. Now, to ensure future elections are FREE and FAIR, I’m counting on your critical support to win this toss-up governor’s race and take back Wisconsin from the radical Left. Even with the highest court in our state refusing to uphold the law and take up our case against the WEC, I vowed I would never stop fighting for what’s right: ensuring YOUR vote counts. That’s why I’ve already committed to creating a new Office of Election Integrity & Public Trust Unit within the state Department of Justice when I’m governor. But first, we must fire radical liberal Tony Evers who has VETOED every election integrity bill that has come across his desk. When I’m governor, you have my word Friend, our elections will be secure. But I can’t take back our state without YOU fighting by my side. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

body:
This has gone too far. **BREAKING: Michael Flynn DEMANDS apology from Mike Gibbons over insults to the U.S. Military veterans, in losing debate performance.** Peter, **_Mike Gibbons can’t represent Ohio in the United States Senate. _** He **ATTACKED** Josh for his service in the United States Marine Corps, claiming Josh’s two tours of duty were not “** _work._** ” General Michael Flynn had this to say: **_"Well, Mr. Gibbons, while you were making money as an investment banker selling U.S. businesses to China, Josh was serving in the United States Marine Corps in Iraq, fighting our enemies and working very hard protecting not only you, but our country."_**
Gibbons should be thanking Josh for his service, not launching an **OUTRAGEOUS** attack on Josh and every current and former member of the U.S. Marine Corps whose service and sacrifices he smeared. Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Under federal law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $2900 for the primary election, $2,900 for the primary run-off election, and $2,900 for the general election. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

clean_body: What if all it took was $3.80? | Friend, While Nancy Pelosi thinks she can simply buy Texas’ brand-new 38th district for her liberal puppet, let me assure you, she has another thing coming... If we hit our Q1 goal before we have to close the books at this FIRST FEC deadline, then we can hold our own against her barrage of smears and lying attacks ads. I know it may seem daunting to go up against Pelosi’s $100 million in cash on hand this election year, but time and again, she always underestimates grassroots conservative like YOU. With your support of even just $3.80, we will win 1 of the 5 critical seats we need to END Pelosi’s majority and take back the People’s House. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch. Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Under federal law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $2900 for the primary election, $2,900 for the primary run-off election, and $2,900 for the general election. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

Donald J. Trump March 24th, 2022
"A Radical Left lawyer who works with Chuck Schumer’s brother at a Democrat law firm is upset the District Attorney of New York has not yet pursued phony charges against President Trump. It’s troubling how politicized our justice system has become, where Democrats are loaned out to gin up crimes against their political opponents. President Trump built a great business, and did nothing wrong. New York should get back to solving their skyrocketing crime problem, rather than spending so much time and energy on partisan witch hunts.

"On top of everything else, their firm represents the DNC, Democrats, and is Hillary Clinton’s law firm. This is disgraceful behavior and how somebody like that and others from his firm can be let loose to become prosecutors of a great Republican President is disgraceful. So bad, in fact, that professional prosecutors resigned in protest of this presidential persecution. They thought it was very unfair. Will this Radical Left law firm be held legally accountable for what they have done?" \- Liz Harrington, spokesperson for Donald J. Trump

Donald J. Trump March 23rd, 2022
Mo Brooks was a leader on the 2020 Election Fraud and then, all of sudden, during the big rally in Alabama, he went “woke” and decided to drop everything he stood for—when he did, the people of Alabama dropped him, and now I have done so also. The people get it, but unfortunately, Mo doesn’t.

| | | Let’s prevent history from repeating itself | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xpCWIve9GsbFUV9FLdFflSE0BIpR1QuLcN2oIJdNTihTbOSeSxqMtc0CwXVzUrROSrtfTIlGcJMQpF76ALN52LVOAkM0OfCsjMvMa2D2bZRbPi-ysDML1yX-XB6sVLKraoYAIKXVIyzJQ7mdGdMKlPywRBNaYWA1Y2_avMK5-WsGXHWExY5TAfZIL5EtJ-o3EBGFFCAJpDTtBpr9Pk91o4ytYk83AnOYHQdqxPg5LqEhHDPDVIjVkfOuvLRz5Ue5c5xSGf1IjNVdtCzH-njwbtwYzHgTx3ROsXkRQcL6dVleYeH5QT9o19M5Q_qWCaP4wfkjyaGCUqgEhdMPKg-ysHRlUghE_fgLbduFfFFeCxPvFjEDRMTySKJgm-WfwK115_868pNShFFBVWgXHFjriq44mWMvUIrF4Owp4wSWpwdmsBpNt2B1Dl4_vfGuPWF13mAXVkKMDu-NxM8AjfMW5Viqe7tG0G8t1RbIhaZ9zBsm6naTCHst0oghYkmqCnmpn-k8OZ4TYv2APMHUGUAqBE/3km/_hQgFX_1TVex4tnv_QWT3A/h0/QGQspBX3_6dO__7I-LXZ0zTi3B67TSnQCzatcjHHi94)

| Team, this week is the 12th anniversary of the passage of the **Affordable Care Act,** landmark legislation that provided health care for millions.

The changes the ACA made have been life-saving, forcing insurers to cover those with pre-existing conditions, expanding Medicaid to those who need it, and many more positive things.

Despite that progress, Republicans are once again calling for a repeal of the ACA, including as recently as this month!

| [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xpCWIve9GsbFUV9FLdFflSE0BIpR1QuLcN2oIJdNTihTbOSeSxqMtc0CwXVzUrROSrtfTIlGcJMQpF76ALN52LVOAkM0OfCsjMvMa2D2bZRdQggrDVjkUKeRtQAxXU7LEX_aFeMIv055qK-inc6PNspOblPfO4mV7ABt4YGiZKF2y-U7KMQjmn80IutIUIC8d_8-390Fq_p6u-yFAUgqshdLi5nxaVW2mp-qE_EEifc37H4d6lHRHgN52UmUNIzNUrrF1pCT5NLEfUHFq6bvYWfR1D-Nz5GrivgqKYqH4oOgSHH3D2sCekUvjekk0-BJm8M_QhDa9tYtxxoNFadZ1jO_UMf9-R7mNNDQudEm1Jv0joFsjG3tKk3eA1owwmZpbI1eF-oX1yhmuiYo_ZgcBxYtJc6bl5i7hhzRhXkKBloT-4CFrKmTXM9FCLctd5FacvWMKMwHExz4hR2CmgOxMjmtCmI8YB7oQOnFO6AErvL1zbMjZ5VVr_C4KTERVJFWMTCoKIXRrhCqEqcgAtUinh/3km/_hQgFX_1TVex4tnv_QWT3A/h1/AschNemYd2ScfcjG7qAECaLkRwAt0FJKjfSmLXpizv0) [](?link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-this-is-the-biggest-week-for-voting-rights-in-arizona-3&email_referrer=email_1487756___subject_1946000&email_subject=the-12-year-anniversary-of-the-affordable-care-act)
**[Team, this is just another reason why it’s important to protect our Congressional majorities this November. Arizona is a key state in protecting our Democratic majorities. Can you donate $10 today to help us protect our AZ Dems in Congress so we can protect the ACA?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xpCWIve9GsbFUV9FLdFflSE0BIpR1QuLcN2oIJdNTihTbOSeSxqMtc0CwXVzUrROSrtfTIlGcJMQpF76ALN52LVOAkM0OfCsjMvMa2D2bZRU-A-WSTf6kKdiHzKLtdVf7qMTE9129Gr_z8HJADG0ZPx2_-zwNYPUVmm41ne3Lq51leDXYOruxcqC49JRKxZzZh_zi4p7VpmVwca45ZkoLxrbB4bnEfRV3M6sDOQOTtM6EwQzpENf5LRFw6JlmXlbD0sJu0ZRkST4dWCE4yn0-s2P50F1UpTnqpFAKsZmAkxg7PNf6rVJzVEM3NV-SGtQesNWpPnl1uzC069JETvJubFdbyTAgm5pvFsm-lYBb46M04HFHasQWnaQCk4nIBsmqRMINpGUmmZnJKIZEyODnx1C9QHaX5F6PUzsYkhBlq7RwFoXRT3V1_77aD39OLY2ne_80t-1hExj7br1OixQwjQEmQ3Z-2IcOlR8tqd6NBV_vLbMl8Ia1r9ZJoXtG_QSqCCesgVHuh6JQUf5IzRJrK/3km/_hQgFX_1TVex4tnv_QWT3A/h2/2qAQWGMPtBtJ2wZaM917KMSsJm87J-A7Xg5ryg-lBkg)** [

Senator Rick Scott’s GOP platform includes a full repeal of the ACA, and several of his fellow senators quickly echoed their desire to kick millions off their health insurance immediately.

That type of action is cruel at any point, but doing so as the world continues to deal with a worldwide pandemic and a virus whose long-term health effects are unknown is really extreme.

We need to protect our Democratic majorities, which means we have to make sure every single AZ Dem on the ballot this fall wins re-election – and we flip the seats we have an opportunity to flip.
