clean_body: | | | Let’s prevent history from repeating itself | | | Team, this week is the 12th anniversary of the passage of the Affordable Care Act, landmark legislation that provided health care for millions. The changes the ACA made have been life-saving, forcing insurers to cover those with pre-existing conditions, expanding Medicaid to those who need it, and many more positive things. Despite that progress, Republicans are once again calling for a repeal of the ACA, including as recently as this month! | ?linkid=2&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-this-is-the-biggest-week-for-voting-rights-in-arizona-3&emailreferrer=email1487756subject1946000&emailsubject=the-12-year-anniversary-of-the-affordable-care-act Senator Rick Scott’s GOP platform includes a full repeal of the ACA, and several of his fellow senators quickly echoed their desire to kick millions off their health insurance immediately. That type of action is cruel at any point, but doing so as the world continues to deal with a worldwide pandemic and a virus whose long-term health effects are unknown is really extreme. We need to protect our Democratic majorities, which means we have to make sure every single AZ Dem on the ballot this fall wins re-election – and we flip the seats we have an opportunity to flip. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Sincerely, Arizona Democrats For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . Our race is a must-win if we want to defeat National Republicans and hold the Senate. But my campaign is facing two serious challenges that could cost us the election: 1. Our official race rating by top analysts was recently changed from Lean Democratic to Pure Toss Up. 2. Even more troubling, Donald Trump held his first rally of the year in Arizona, and he came after me — personally. He’s serious about defeating me, so I need an immediate surge of resources to fight back and win. But right now, we're falling short of our critical midnight goal and failure isn't an option. subject: re: National Agriculture Week
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43341365/336786194/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzhkZmEwZS1iZGFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=evOPJy1P3PHJ9qpsAmRlQ7jKtWdir5C2iD-5x-XH8lQ=)
Friend, This week is National Agriculture Week. It is a week to recognize the historic, present, and future contributions to the United States by farmers, farmworkers, ranchers, foresters, and other agricultural stewards. Agriculture safeguards our Nation’s lands through sustainable management and generates prosperity and economic development throughout our district, our state, and our country. Our district has a rich history of farming, from the fields and orchards in the South to the forests and ranches in the North. We have been blessed by nature and by the work of the generations before us who cleared the fields and built the waterworks we rely on. Agriculture is always hard, but climate change is having an outsized impact on the sector. Our ongoing drought deprives crops of water and magnifies the risk of fires in our forests. We need a representative who recognizes the threat of climate change, a representative who will fight for farmers and foresters and not just fight for a Big Ag check. **LaMalfa farms subsidies and he sows his fields with tax dollars. This “welfare farming” is not what makes America great. It just keeps people like LaMalfa rich.** I fought for American farmers overseas as a U.S diplomat in Honduras. Send me to Congress. Help me fight for the farmers of the North State in Washington. There is so much to do, and LaMalfa has done so little. Thanks for your support, Max Steiner | **[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43341366/336786201/360059203?refcode=em-3.24.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzhkZmEwZS1iZGFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=evOPJy1P3PHJ9qpsAmRlQ7jKtWdir5C2iD-5x-XH8lQ=)**

clean_body: | = Friend, This week is National Agriculture Week. It is a week to recognize the historic, present, and future contributions to the United States by farmers, farmworkers, ranchers, foresters, and other agricultural stewards. Agriculture safeguards our Nation’s lands through sustainable management and generates prosperity and economic development throughout our district, our state, and our country. Our district has a rich history of farming, from the fields and orchards in the South to the forests and ranches in the North. We have been blessed by nature and by the work of the generations before us who cleared the fields and built the waterworks we rely on. Agriculture is always hard, but climate change is having an outsized impact on the sector. Our ongoing drought deprives crops of water and magnifies the risk of fires in our forests. We need a representative who recognizes the threat of climate change, a representative who will fight for farmers and foresters and not just fight for a Big Ag check. LaMalfa farms subsidies and he sows his fields with tax dollars. This “welfare farming” is not what makes America great. It just keeps people like LaMalfa rich. I fought for American farmers overseas as a U.S diplomat in Honduras. Send me to Congress. Help me fight for the farmers of the North State in Washington. There is so much to do, and LaMalfa has done so little. Thanks for your support, Max Steiner | = | = Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. Consider supporting Max's campaign by = If you'd like to receive less email, add your name We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . clean_body: Not Good At All | Folks, I am coming to you with an urgent plea. My campaign is running out of steam for our fundraising push. It does not look good for us and, if I’m being honest, it does not look good at all. I am reaching out to you specifically, because I know you would never leave me high and dry. You are always there when I need you the most. I need your help, now. | Thank you for always stepping up. Sincerely, Senator Kennedy Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808 If you would like to send donation by mail, Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

subject: Still looking for 1,616 donors by March 31st
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We’ve got real goals we need to meet in order to keep our campaign functioning at 100%. As of this writing, we’re still looking for 1,616 donors this |
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ed6e222ea1ef4adda4fe39a5ff379fa4&_e=tyjwrr6YzZwcdjaEIqDQx1ypdCFp6kHnwg4TwjmJMExVvL6JLeWtZrsLjo_7jjCIju9LlgSl_BEd6ecnrhEeArgMi3yUn3ZiYE2QieUerjyadsjRwahgVvYO-sHl2Q_yCaAAZtbsjSxuprkhOy6rJD2_PT8PznRQv6Zk9ypu75yNDM9uLvmuiDczNn35gRrQJRQuufIJZbTJm0qTLOb_X0sExL9mgMZ5LDO8KarVflO_UamSSDGeRrNw9UouEPI9sx83rJXzAn2qKacFBYCBiYIQjXEVJ47NC6X0y_zWXWRRti0Vrd_NP6sdq1p8bwnu0g_LBPcvXiEf37Cw6nDbxTalZlX846qu-uFYKZ6KI8K65xBUFmikigfM2_ZXQi1k6henSCtIz4LbHHJ8XmNGVHBQrdbY27r8sGqInIduilXrvktuDuaO1g2n77bP_PH4)

---
Fellow American,

Team Herschel has real goals we need to meet to keep our campaign functioning at 100%.
* **1,616:** That's the number of additional donors we need before March 31st. Why? Because it's crucial we identify more donors in the first quarter of this election year than we did in the last quarter of 2021. [**If 1,616 conservatives make a donation before March 31 st,**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ed6e222ea1ef4adda4fe39a5ff379fa4&_e=tyjwrr6YzZwcdjaEIqDQx1ypdCFp6kHnwg4TwjmJMExVvL6JLeWtZrsLjo_7jjCIju9LlgSl_BEd6ecnrhEeArgMi3yUn3ZiYE2QieUerjyadsjRwahgVvYO-sHl2Q_yCaAAZtbsjSxuprkhOy6rJD2_PT8PznRQv6Zk9ypu75yNDM9uLvmuiDczNn35gRrQJRQuufIJZbTJm0qTLOb_X0sExL9mgMZ5LDO8KarVflOpId-wJz6LEW3fxy_Yh1jFq9nFNBfBlwDMHBYdfNqRC_0AUJe-iyTfbY73dNi5WZG2G9porUONGQJtNCNToUZo3c67iT6JCVKr8zHrO-D5p337Uy9pUk-EmHg6UBkZEew28JGv8r-m1fSyEUJNlvBFUxvrYuNd4NU5mleY1wdiAYwzRr1fSDeJiQtDAjL_HaEbXWdCO34gTYhIHWC29VAn) we'll be in good shape headed into the 2nd quarter.
* **$23 million:** That's the amount of cash our Democrat opponent has in the bank to run attack ads against me. In fact, he's already spent more than $3 million airing TV ads in the last month. We hope to match his fundraising success, [**but we'll need your help to do that.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ed6e222ea1ef4adda4fe39a5ff379fa4&_e=tyjwrr6YzZwcdjaEIqDQx1ypdCFp6kHnwg4TwjmJMExVvL6JLeWtZrsLjo_7jjCIju9LlgSl_BEd6ecnrhEeArgMi3yUn3ZiYE2QieUerjyadsjRwahgVvYO-sHl2Q_yCaAAZtbsjSxuprkhOy6rJD2_PT8PznRQv6Zk9ypu75yNDM9uLvmuiDczNn35gRrQJRQuufIJZbTJm0qTLOb_X0sExL9mgMZ5LDO8KarVflPFmbsdBfrdUSJiwdAOJ5lobU4WWk85eUgJVZliCWi8y-y0lry7f6Qkz6UdTtk28lRG5tfdcCX-oX5mI5j4ArfuhiqJkhfCe--vPoSM5CYiNkoUzj3gYnGU4WpYPFKsBqcyKNBW-giYES2OtDSn5ZaORy-BsmcBvmCJAE6RFaMQL08sfjYK7uq4bdaXV_QJVUuJbThvRIjQf-0iNRsVmeuQ)
* **March 31 st:** Our 1st quarter fundraising deadline. We need every ounce of support we can muster before midnight on March 31st. After this date, we'll have to make public what our campaign raised from January - March. [**It's critical to get your buy-in before the end of the month and post big numbers.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ed6e222ea1ef4adda4fe39a5ff379fa4&_e=tyjwrr6YzZwcdjaEIqDQx1ypdCFp6kHnwg4TwjmJMExVvL6JLeWtZrsLjo_7jjCIju9LlgSl_BEd6ecnrhEeArgMi3yUn3ZiYE2QieUerjyadsjRwahgVvYO-sHl2Q_yCaAAZtbsjSxuprkhOy6rJD2_PT8PznRQv6Zk9ypu75yNDM9uLvmuiDczNn35gRrQJRQuufIJZbTJm0qTLOb_X0sExL9mgMZ5LDO8KarVflMoMa0ElTgJQIt9kPWptg9lL88iVZuMNAfPyTV7aug6RRtrimqisGSzTNRKQBxQPBoXyDfMggYpYkGYAX1FtUMigGBDCgJisGvKY5hU-WhKDlgzYDqwHkOm8G7H7jAndt0exbkEehjs6-sHo041Po4icUpZwgi3MBNjr4ZuOZ4BLD2oMrXf9wKny_v4c6RveGY5zAE_PH--SaJAU-m_9uQx)
* **162,043:** That's the number of donations we've received since launching our campaign last summer. It's incredible - especially since Herschel has never run for office before. We know there is more support out there, and [**we're asking for you to join our team today. If you've given previously, would you consider giving another donation - even a small one of $5 or $10?**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ed6e222ea1ef4adda4fe39a5ff379fa4&_e=tyjwrr6YzZwcdjaEIqDQx1ypdCFp6kHnwg4TwjmJMExVvL6JLeWtZrsLjo_7jjCIju9LlgSl_BEd6ecnrhEeArgMi3yUn3ZiYE2QieUerjyadsjRwahgVvYO-sHl2Q_yCaAAZtbsjSxuprkhOy6rJD2_PT8PznRQv6Zk9ypu75yNDM9uLvmuiDczNn35gRrQJRQuufIJZbTJm0qTLOb_X0sExL9mgMZ5LDO8KarVflPQvj62NHHaBXsTTwQrnUPDGOT9ul2G8ztY4Nk7h39QRKndbXNL_wsVHg5rrMxCMvxFzLkY1yzx-9wWCLrnThsFTMLYqhz8h97n-5ljAhYr6eLgmKo4MUweHFFSXXQN-jck-PxHPP870yal90WxPX4ewhp4BVlYW9SIb0y6O54pdkwCMj8Y4m97z9eT4TJDoUP0CdxT1blhxosqCAp9U3FU)

[**Please don't wait until March 31st to stand with us. We need your help right away.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ed6e222ea1ef4adda4fe39a5ff379fa4&_e=tyjwrr6YzZwcdjaEIqDQx1ypdCFp6kHnwg4TwjmJMExVvL6JLeWtZrsLjo_7jjCIju9LlgSl_BEd6ecnrhEeArgMi3yUn3ZiYE2QieUerjyadsjRwahgVvYO-sHl2Q_yCaAAZtbsjSxuprkhOy6rJD2_PT8PznRQv6Zk9ypu75yNDM9uLvmuiDczNn35gRrQJRQuufIJZbTJm0qTLOb_X0sExL9mgMZ5LDO8KarVflP0aSKcxJQwH13Ntr-_z4PEqrYGSZ2zZ3AixW0r81ZVxSzcy1lmGEEW8pz0GnSHT8bWY_hxouiTXcbTtuRJugZ2rLEA6CwrAskyNRkaHcCwLOBx-N_OPt1I1eNju1GS-POQYuuP5Up04RR56Sq6tYUPx0RWmBk9kfht0_SGxjsjFrfoGFbONnaf52JDLykcC0qb9fdQhlXOTOCCwtrLJRWL)

clean_body: We’ve got real goals we need to meet in order to keep our campaign functioning at 100%. As of this writing, we’re still looking for 1,616 donors this | Fellow American, Team Herschel has real goals we need to meet to keep our campaign functioning at 100%. 1,616: That's the number of additional donors we need before March 31st. Why? Because it's crucial we identify more donors in the first quarter of this election year than we did in the last quarter of 2021. we'll be in good shape headed into the 2nd quarter. $23 million: That's the amount of cash our Democrat opponent has in the bank to run attack ads against me. In fact, he's already spent more than $3 million airing TV ads in the last month. We hope to match his fundraising success, March 31 st: Our 1st quarter fundraising deadline. We need every ounce of support we can muster before midnight on March 31st. After this date, we'll have to make public what our campaign raised from January - March. 162,043: That's the number of donations we've received since launching our campaign last summer. It's incredible - especially since Herschel has never run for office before. We know there is more support out there, and Thanks, Laura Dunaway Finance Director Team Herschel | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Honoring Madeleine Albright
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
May her memory be a blessing and may her legacy continue to guide us as we work to protect and defend democracy.

| Friend,

As the first woman in our nation’s history to serve as Secretary of State, Madeleine Albright served as a trailblazer and inspiration for millions of Americans, myself included. I am deeply saddened to learn of her passing.

Madeleine Albright was a brilliant diplomat committed to using her platform to lift up other women. I am so grateful to have been able to count on her advice and guidance throughout my career.

May her memory be a blessing and may her legacy continue to guide us as we work to protect and defend democracy.

Sara
---

Chip in now to help me meet my goal before then.]_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43345727/336829382/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWQ0NDMzNi1lMWFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q_JzLe4u2jVluMJUg29ucf714IYlb2IvzcYBJS_hLZM=) One of the most common questions I get is, “Why are you running for Congress?” My answer: because in the richest country on Earth, no one should be hungry, homeless, without healthcare, or in poverty. The planet shouldn’t be burning while do-nothing politicians take money from oil companies. I’m running because we only have until 2030 to make the huge changes we need to avert the worst consequences of climate change. As a member of Congress, I would push for the end of the fossil fuel industry and a rapid transition to 100% renewable energy. I would fight for the creation of millions of new jobs in the process. I’d rather go big and lose the battle than go small and lose the war — especially on climate change. We’re out of time. [**Friend, if you can, please chip in to help me win. clean_body: | | | Hi there, [[Note: the quarter ends in 7 days. Chip in now to help me meet my goal before then.]](=) One of the most common questions I get is, “Why are you running for Congress?” My answer: because in the richest country on Earth, no one should be hungry, homeless, without healthcare, or in poverty. The planet shouldn’t be burning while do-nothing politicians take money from oil companies. I’m running because we only have until 2030 to make the huge changes we need to avert the worst consequences of climate change. As a member of Congress, I would push for the end of the fossil fuel industry and a rapid transition to 100% renewable energy. I would fight for the creation of millions of new jobs in the process. I’d rather go big and lose the battle than go small and lose the war — especially on climate change. We’re out of time. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: =. Thank you, -Rebecca ParsonCandidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to:Rebecca for WashingtonPO Box 111388Tacoma, WA 98411 | | Rebecca Parson for Congress PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 United States | | Paid for by Rebecca for Washington | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

all because they won’t get the vaccine.** _In America, you should NEVER lose your job because you refuse to put a substance into your body - especially when you’ve put your life on the line for our country._ **I’m leading the charge to END the military vaccine mandate, but I can’t do it without your help.** **[Join me today to STOP vaccine mandates in the military!](http://links.huntforgeorgia.com/u/click?_t=af56c613b6e04613b0408d69d59cb1ec&_m=68609fb1cfc7435aa707da93cd5e489e&_e=vyOEHDS44-dyO10R9rwN79wF7gnWTtpiRKB4oI72Y86YumaNUIisgDXNVmkOiGnGi26zS0nKhJZastTIPaK298zGDtl4qMEkoGwQlKEXYVvsCeqEjJYuyedn4nciq2XUyFKhRzTWVqI7JbyoHqxqN4jkE7ZTIFnymTuLNrHz5mt1EhOa93aWtZOmLYqA2t7EJwuv7qhshOqcnYwNemBG8pvtBZ6UgY8_EYxTTEB8XAk3xo6MEfaXlP6Lv5qRNpjtVl5qTVjrcMBC42JRm7px6-ftRbrUflSJcCZK53fTp1RqZP-n1c-TYZ_GW_x7haBp_8P5GVxuNPtOOLSfEbPpDm1yX4ReeJkeBSGN-O-EBIoHkJjyBSXYwjqjBph2tyj2h6iYIvzkwlj0uj1EDO_ADQ%3D%3D)** [**STOP THE MANDATES**](http://links.huntforgeorgia.com/u/click?_t=af56c613b6e04613b0408d69d59cb1ec&_m=68609fb1cfc7435aa707da93cd5e489e&_e=vyOEHDS44-dyO10R9rwN79wF7gnWTtpiRKB4oI72Y86YumaNUIisgDXNVmkOiGnGi26zS0nKhJZastTIPaK298zGDtl4qMEkoGwQlKEXYVvsCeqEjJYuyedn4nciq2XUyFKhRzTWVqI7JbyoHqxqN4jkE7ZTIFnymTuLNrHz5mt1EhOa93aWtZOmLYqA2t7Es1k1fv1RjfFfRcB-BlTbn3yeWn7zh-NJod4SDX9MdrFcedZpnVSbmwD_s1KHjoyKfnrCXMHfRn_TiGs0iVUJT_uNm4SAQbx8tq89UHC_rHT_O7rL3xMtRQjBTiNQox4Lg6X4WcAmGLAdgGOL9gcODT5c78dTJklMc8XoV1LdHbrdXA4u5vJNttC8Dl5KXOAIRBymHfdJEr4JI-qzHP9Emg%3D%3D) When I served in the U.S. Army, I worked with some of the best and brightest in America. _I can’t imagine how we could’ve continued our mission without_ every single _service member on our team._ But now, Biden wants to THROW OUT brave men and women just because they won’t get the jab. **As a proud, America first veteran, I won’t stand for it - and neither should you.** **[So please, join me today and END the tyrannical military vaccine mandate.](http://links.huntforgeorgia.com/u/click?_t=af56c613b6e04613b0408d69d59cb1ec&_m=68609fb1cfc7435aa707da93cd5e489e&_e=vyOEHDS44-dyO10R9rwN79wF7gnWTtpiRKB4oI72Y86YumaNUIisgDXNVmkOiGnGi26zS0nKhJZastTIPaK298zGDtl4qMEkoGwQlKEXYVvsCeqEjJYuyedn4nciq2XUyFKhRzTWVqI7JbyoHqxqN4jkE7ZTIFnymTuLNrHz5mt1EhOa93aWtZOmLYqA2t7EneaL_gv-33Lt6NDUAex4nRLDqKAfpPICMTYW7NpkE8Rn7Z7NA3u0QNdiAQI-YCvqYodhSBl3mqxdYG3a8xUTEVDSrNqLv4eVVymxgQeHg-HI0CbmuFA-1LeqSAio-IIWDr2t3GjVn5LqkZw59J0iR6Af9SalZUdVHUKMY3F8ydBOMH3afQKLI8kO6v_XXTr_AMOkE7_k_UqSBaaIysZrNA%3D%3D)** [**STOP MANDATES NOW**](http://links.huntforgeorgia.com/u/click?_t=af56c613b6e04613b0408d69d59cb1ec&_m=68609fb1cfc7435aa707da93cd5e489e&_e=vyOEHDS44-dyO10R9rwN79wF7gnWTtpiRKB4oI72Y86YumaNUIisgDXNVmkOiGnGi26zS0nKhJZastTIPaK298zGDtl4qMEkoGwQlKEXYVvsCeqEjJYuyedn4nciq2XUyFKhRzTWVqI7JbyoHqxqN4jkE7ZTIFnymTuLNrHz5mt1EhOa93aWtZOmLYqA2t7Ekmt1Uk4pmiicFdG5U7znfJPeSuhj9MYOasqLcsHefc8gbZ_hLCWkAaUTikd6qcA3-X-gDCQuh7mgWhAexvGRed9OMAiahb3dvl-YLJtrCGuAfEp9DhCBP4DHEV8cRhxS5et71-BHkWqLCuATK6S5uw8Db4tcq1ZAz3o_aiIKQ54QYFYj0BJDu9h_0eK6ye6ed_UEBwqjtih0D4kDLmGRwA%3D%3D) Thank you, [](http://links.huntforgeorgia.com/u/click?_t=af56c613b6e04613b0408d69d59cb1ec&_m=68609fb1cfc7435aa707da93cd5e489e&_e=vyOEHDS44-dyO10R9rwN79wF7gnWTtpiRKB4oI72Y86YumaNUIisgDXNVmkOiGnGi26zS0nKhJZastTIPaK298zGDtl4qMEkoGwQlKEXYVvsCeqEjJYuyedn4nciq2XUyFKhRzTWVqI7JbyoHqxqN4jkE7ZTIFnymTuLNrHz5mt1EhOa93aWtZOmLYqA2t7EJxLrd2f9hzUH69XXpy_77jS2Db8GJ4JzwXJAjUQEDNyLB-zgxBGLh9j9f-Uh8ek1pemj5bEtZjOhkx42W1eRTMVavN7RcMkcg2HbHAY2qJCWzL-EM7-Cd6r6dXr_T4q_iqI5c6kqFPNblqZJ3X2ZYw-PKeAPbElNm6ogji7oiH5a77F22vWkczJhdEjRk97CIMFdjJKG5RLTU24dWNRjvA%3D%3D) Jeremy Hunt Paid for by Jeremy for Georgia Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Fetterman HQ
subject: Following up because we don’t want you to miss this, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
People are really into our new ad.
#
Derek, John emailed you earlier today about our brand-new TV ad. We had to follow up with a super exciting update.
A _ton_ of Pennsylvania voters reached out saying they LOVE this ad — including folks who are hearing for the first time about John’s campaign for U.S. Senate!
This is a REALLY big deal, Derek — so **[we’re asking if you can pitch in right now to help us immediately put more spend behind this effective new TV ad.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45908?refcode=em20220324-5114&t=1&akid=5114%2E434096%2EFn0w3p)** _Full disclosure: If we can raise $5,000 from this email, we can get it in front of hundreds more PA voters in the coming days!_
**[Contribute Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45908?refcode=em20220324-5114&amounts=5&t=2&akid=5114%2E434096%2EFn0w3p)**
Thank you so much for helping us seize this opportunity!
–Fetterman HQ
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: John Fetterman
Date: Thursday, Mar 24, 2022
Subject: New ad just dropped 👀_
Derek,
I ran for Lieutenant Governor to change things in PA.
They said I couldn't. But we won.
Now, we’re taking on Washington. _That’s what our brand-new TV ad is all about._
Check out our new ad, live *now* on screen in Philly (the 4th biggest media market in the United States), Scranton, and Erie 👇
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45908?refcode=em20220324-5114&t=3&akid=5114%2E434096%2EFn0w3p)
**[With our primary less than two months away, we can’t afford to give up a single minute of airtime to the GOP. Help us keep this powerful new ad on the air so our campaign can reach millions of Pennsylvania households »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45908?refcode=em20220324-5114&t=4&akid=5114%2E434096%2EFn0w3p)**
**[WATCH + DONATE »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45908?refcode=em20220324-5114&t=5&akid=5114%2E434096%2EFn0w3p)**
Creating and launching ads like this isn’t cheap, Derek. From cameras to video editing to buying time in multiple PA media markets, launching these ads is a costly and labor-intensive component of our campaign. But it’s necessary to help us reach + mobilize the unlikely voters across PA.
Especially given the fact that our GOP opponents and their super PACs have just _surpassed_ $40 million on their TV and radio ad spending. This makes it a lot harder and much more expensive to keep our ads up, especially in the areas we really want to reach.
**[That’s why it’s so crucial that you chip in what you can today to help us reach every Pennsylvanian, power our campaign, and send me to be Democrats’ 51st vote in the U.S. Senate. What do you say, Derek — can you spare a few bucks to keep this ad on the air?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45908?refcode=em20220324-5114&t=6&akid=5114%2E434096%2EFn0w3p)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45908?refcode=em20220324-5114&amounts=5&t=25&akid=5114%2E434096%2EFn0w3p)**
Thank you, Derek. Every single dollar we raise is going to be crucial to helping our campaign and its message reach every single community in PA.
More soon,
John Fetterman
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220324-5114-footer&t=26&refcode2=5114_434096_Fn0w3p&akid=5114%2E434096%2EFn0w3p)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=27&akid=5114%2E434096%2EFn0w3p)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=5114%2E434096%2EFn0w3p)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

I am reaching out to you because we are closing in on the FIRST End-of-Quarter FEC fundraising deadline of the year. It’s the first real test of our strength as we build a grassroots campaign to take back the House Majority in 2022.

Once this deadline passes, we’ll have to report all of our campaign’s fundraising details to the FEC. That includes both the number of contributions we have received and the number of people who have pitched in to support our campaign.

**Having a strong showing at this deadline is extremely important.**

Having a strong showing at this deadline is extremely important. | | | ---|---|--- | | Thanks for your support, Colin Schmitt Republican Candidate in New York’s 18th Congressional District Paid for by Schmitt for Congress Our mailing address is: Schmitt For Congress PO Box 67 South Salem, NY 10590

name: Tammy Duckworth
subject: RE: my call with Dr. Kermit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress
body:
| Hey there, Senator Duckworth here. I recently talked 1:1 with Dr. Kermit Jones, the Democrat running to flip CA-03 blue. **We connected initially over our experiences serving in the Iraq War — I was an Army helicopter pilot, and he was a Navy surgeon.** I served as one of the first handful of Army women to fly combat missions in Iraq. When a rocket-propelled grenade took down the Blackhawk helicopter I was copiloting, it was a team of military nurses and doctors like Dr. Kermit who kept my heart beating. We talked about our time in Iraq, but also our experiences since coming home: the friends struggling to get VA appointments and jobs, the taboo around PTSD and the lip service from politicians that is too rarely followed with action. **By the end of our conversation, I knew we needed Dr. Kermit’s passion and insights in Congress.** It’s not often I talk with a candidate who has already published a 10-page plan on how he will advocate for Veterans — but that’s exactly the type of person we need in D.C. right now. [I’m proud to join VoteVets in endorsing Dr. Kermit Jones for Congress, and I hope you’ll join me by donating before his End-of-Quarter fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43345761/336829617/-682417230?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220326tammy_td_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2NkZjQwOC1lNGFiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iohCUR9-vsRkm1PI5fZ7rEfmfBsaWaN5zcBb5oMvLsQ=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: The most honest email we can send
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
This is the most honest possible email we can send about the importance of making your first donation before our FEC fundraising deadline ends.
#

Friends —
This is the most honest possible email we can send about the importance of making your first donation before our FEC fundraising deadline ends.
This is going to be one of the most expensive races in the country.
That’s a fact.
Corporate special interest groups and Super PACs are able to collect checks of unlimited amounts, and they’ll spend that money trying to beat Mark. They’ve already started.
But we do things differently. First, Mark won’t take a dime of corporate PAC money. He’s out to represent people like you — not them. And second, there’s a legal limit to the amount of money people can contribute to our campaign.
That means we need LOTS and LOTS and LOTS of donations if we’re going to be able to withstand the outside money.
So if Mark is going to win, he needs you to make your first donation to this campaign. It’s our only chance.
That’s why we are asking, respectfully:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election before this FEC fundraising deadline ends one week from tonight? We really need a lot of donations to hit our goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220324-3-7&t=1&refcode2=2435_6688874_QxBJs9&akid=2435%2E6688874%2EQxBJs9)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben=20Smilowitz?=
subject: Ben’s Birthday Blitz - Join Us Today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ben Smilowitz for Congress_
body:
In celebration of my 41st birthday... | | | |
---
| | | **Let's celebrate, Peter!**
---
| My 41st birthday is this Saturday. The past year has been challenging for everyone - and, for me, also uniquely special, as I’ve had the privilege to elevate my service as a candidate, build a strong grassroots campaign, and run for Congress. They say that the forties are the new thirties, and I couldn't agree more!

When I first started, I couldn’t fully appreciate how meaningful it would be to personally connect with thousands of voters. The candid conversations about tackling pressing issues facing our community, state, and nation are equally inspiring and motivating.

In honor of my special day, I’m asking all my family, friends, and neighbors to donate to my campaign for Congress. [_Please donate $41, $82, $123 or $410 (or more!) to help me win._](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=52100e8049&e=0faa9de128)

---
| [Send A Birthday Gift To Ben Smilowitz For Congress](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=57d93ca3e6&e=0faa9de128 "Send A Birthday Gift To Ben Smilowitz For Congress")
---
| Social justice advocacy and accountability have always been my driving force, and this campaign has made me evermore committed to continuing to advocate for the public interest.

_I’d like to raise an additional $5,000 to fund part of our digital ads strategy_ to reach thousands more voters. We’ve already raised $60,000 and need to raise (at least) another $120,000 before our July primary.

Thank you so much!
\- Ben
---
| [Send A Birthday Gift To Ben Smilowitz For Congress](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=61204fae96&e=0faa9de128 "Send A Birthday Gift To Ben Smilowitz For Congress")

| _(P.S. Your support helps us reach as many voters as possible. There are many other ways to give and participate! You can even sign up to[volunteer](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=b96f21815f&e=0faa9de128). We are growing fast and need support with canvassing, phone banking, and house / back-yard parties.)_

clean_body: In celebration of my 41st birthday... | | | | | | | Let's celebrate, Peter! | My 41st birthday is this Saturday. The past year has been challenging for everyone - and, for me, also uniquely special, as I’ve had the privilege to elevate my service as a candidate, build a strong grassroots campaign, and run for Congress. They say that the forties are the new thirties, and I couldn't agree more! When I first started, I couldn’t fully appreciate how meaningful it would be to personally connect with thousands of voters. The candid conversations about tackling pressing issues facing our community, state, and nation are equally inspiring and motivating. In honor of my special day, I’m asking all my family, friends, and neighbors to donate to my campaign for Congress. | "Send A Birthday Gift To Ben Smilowitz For Congress" | Social justice advocacy and accountability have always been my driving force, and this campaign has made me evermore committed to continuing to advocate for the public interest. I’d like to raise an additional $5,000 to fund part of our digital ads strategy to reach thousands more voters. We’ve already raised $60,000 and need to raise (at least) another $120,000 before our July primary. Thank you so much! \- Ben | "Send A Birthday Gift To Ben Smilowitz For Congress" | (P.S. Your support helps us reach as many voters as possible. There are many other ways to give and participate! You can even sign up to. We are growing fast and need support with canvassing, phone banking, and house / back-yard parties.) | | | Paid for by Ben Smilowitz for Congress

name: Brent Hennrich
subject: I just finished the debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
He’s worse than you could ever imagine. | Peter, I just finished up my second debate with Joe Kent, the MAGA-backed GOP candidate running against me and Republican incumbent Jaime Herrera Beutler (who did not join the debate) in WA-03. If you could believe it, this guy is worse one-on-one than he is when he's pandering to his far-right and Trump-aligned supporters online. I'm fired up, Peter. And I'm ready to do whatever it takes to ensure this "America First" Republican stays far away from Congress. Will you rush $250, $100, $50, $25, or ANY amount you can now to help me defeat Joe Kent? He's polling right behind me in this race putting our democracy at stake. Use this link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brent-hennrich-for-washington](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zdG1fUgG8aFKTw4TdAFcV3OYIkIXLeXYGdiD76HGOclWZYG428h3SLdZNmun5o9X561FRWgGPD58CFF3OHIf2SISFOrlIn_kNB6iJSPFinw3qZJ-brLoKbktCWBYf_SgcAXf9VsljG5CK_8od2j9ClcfTIGJWlcE9ltcqhBdr0-_PMdpsUR22j-vlFETzaZOVirrIA0b-9Ga20jF2P4fHdJuDFOAzkPW0lKcfHLcKOlxpdHDUZ-4n6QVLn3aNThp0GsX0vabO9_y6yMnjE1QBwIESJ1b1m3mxidQG_eSOTjglf3cJwmwRohbUM63FoARv7EuqjjaHkITRwdZAYhBdsHejaXgD_YKsIWl2OLoBLlw/3km/eOO7Jxo2R0a0f37Cop-czg/h0/HvyfpZcFMJTBenHnLB5VAI1kB8mKfT4lb-cfTF6Jh0Y)** The people of WA-03 deserve so much better than a leader who would rather play politics than improve people's lives. body:
We’ve got real goals we need to meet in order to keep our campaign functioning at 100%. As of this writing, we’re still looking for 1,616 donors this |
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e940be0d9da445c4a3e66813c9128cb1&_e=L_Bv64aCT8Paya1cc-VEEb4cPhgm-V4yFQnaxn71MMpkAcCxdiJqIfE4e7XIvVmlb5JFmYkeTLODvduDqJk3JSK0lm_0hML4i-pf9C1DXaZpmEoWCSn7l1Fbt71aZR1i51V4lULf4En9zfMMFfMEpnEpSzhnfxfVwyxTasyacX2OOKQiEco8bBg83z69sQQZCRi6nil4DInAC9Kwz9JklP8xjFq_H4NP2-LcuwCoStP_1PTwy3VWRdTdSfqHHXgayuSwg_u7_3uoVY_ojFv1MNQxxmvesKHBF-8AA-R0cEPTcM_n3kAqyawSQh3_5bB1ppIMPpLUo8PtWhE7VnDxBkKuijJhb2zAZ-GY9oDXTK6tEY1Nd6o_7ME1YZZs8KdLBRybzAyU4wWB-T3cvanwrZGhX6EuI0nyjTbdIx3HsRENaMHCrZU1PsTX5MpnQoqO)

Fellow American,

Team Herschel has real goals we need to meet to keep our campaign functioning at 100%.
* **1,616:** That's the number of additional donors we need before March 31st. Why? Because it's crucial we identify more donors in the first quarter of this election year than we did in the last quarter of 2021. [**If 1,616 conservatives make a donation before March 31 st,**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e940be0d9da445c4a3e66813c9128cb1&_e=L_Bv64aCT8Paya1cc-VEEb4cPhgm-V4yFQnaxn71MMpkAcCxdiJqIfE4e7XIvVmlb5JFmYkeTLODvduDqJk3JSK0lm_0hML4i-pf9C1DXaZpmEoWCSn7l1Fbt71aZR1i51V4lULf4En9zfMMFfMEpnEpSzhnfxfVwyxTasyacX2OOKQiEco8bBg83z69sQQZCRi6nil4DInAC9Kwz9JklP8xjFq_H4NP2-LcuwCoStMt7mtGWGI0aO4BVHBb8yL6sqvLUMmqdpbuO1kGkzjrz1NNm_M4CgLeGpziEvhst8Ue6PZQflyY87KT5NThmVKW6d_36UCbu2X8C_bvUSa_heNYV6ipWWUq6tk2B0rUnFZU4VI1IfAgCYcg7KTeyHPAWA7q4xPZ7SmnOozxllqjz4f3K5juWoZNkyK5OEY67chluksKfzrqju1RvQ9NUYNz) we'll be in good shape headed into the 2nd quarter.
* **$23 million:** That's the amount of cash our Democrat opponent has in the bank to run attack ads against me. In fact, he's already spent more than $3 million airing TV ads in the last month. We hope to match his fundraising success, [**but we'll need your help to do that.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e940be0d9da445c4a3e66813c9128cb1&_e=L_Bv64aCT8Paya1cc-VEEb4cPhgm-V4yFQnaxn71MMpkAcCxdiJqIfE4e7XIvVmlb5JFmYkeTLODvduDqJk3JSK0lm_0hML4i-pf9C1DXaZpmEoWCSn7l1Fbt71aZR1i51V4lULf4En9zfMMFfMEpnEpSzhnfxfVwyxTasyacX2OOKQiEco8bBg83z69sQQZCRi6nil4DInAC9Kwz9JklP8xjFq_H4NP2-LcuwCoStN5us9D1951LMH0tftpRkzzi0SqfVCJeHkfBr0_uKVTzS-Gwq-xhDqzGjH2dLlPmWSATdrB-BP7yZ_svBZqAGbh5vwTofq2JrpLR_bMmg4Go0XbPsFMUsOjc88vuaPagZI3_W5BiNuN_ZjUE7srwYbIgVoAx7duvCVTAryDai4Koh0eG_WWxmIT4B-ET5vv55azHRACdauRNA0ZTGG7gulb)
* **March 31 st:** Our 1st quarter fundraising deadline. We need every ounce of support we can muster before midnight on March 31st. After this date, we'll have to make public what our campaign raised from January - March. [**It's critical to get your buy-in before the end of the month and post big numbers.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e940be0d9da445c4a3e66813c9128cb1&_e=L_Bv64aCT8Paya1cc-VEEb4cPhgm-V4yFQnaxn71MMpkAcCxdiJqIfE4e7XIvVmlb5JFmYkeTLODvduDqJk3JSK0lm_0hML4i-pf9C1DXaZpmEoWCSn7l1Fbt71aZR1i51V4lULf4En9zfMMFfMEpnEpSzhnfxfVwyxTasyacX2OOKQiEco8bBg83z69sQQZCRi6nil4DInAC9Kwz9JklP8xjFq_H4NP2-LcuwCoStMesHSqiAlVBLJltICoO54p9lQIuNLfuIfI1VW2luvf72orW_dO7t_x1khnkxbD5nDGy2UJOnGYFeZ1_Q01XjNFqGgSVRNZ16KHGmFzP8keRdm-5n8ERw8IJLu-j2M_c-_Os0he4W-YxXFQUYaiEaty8DZvSX7uagxAAtta5r8Cx0H22SKUx49NoACQCiZSg5F6iG29POG2ZgpG5WEt76q_)
* **162,043:** That's the number of donations we've received since launching our campaign last summer. It's incredible - especially since Herschel has never run for office before. We know there is more support out there, and [**we're asking for you to join our team today. If you've given previously, would you consider giving another donation - even a small one of $5 or $10?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e940be0d9da445c4a3e66813c9128cb1&_e=L_Bv64aCT8Paya1cc-VEEb4cPhgm-V4yFQnaxn71MMpkAcCxdiJqIfE4e7XIvVmlb5JFmYkeTLODvduDqJk3JSK0lm_0hML4i-pf9C1DXaZpmEoWCSn7l1Fbt71aZR1i51V4lULf4En9zfMMFfMEpnEpSzhnfxfVwyxTasyacX2OOKQiEco8bBg83z69sQQZCRi6nil4DInAC9Kwz9JklP8xjFq_H4NP2-LcuwCoStO2iBKbJOlwrh7eZ3ABM3MseBCIVlHNPJEBRpR5wwVgrqpPxPmne2Le0vERsiTVPufoAMkcCuuoe-H36f-EkEGkxMYW_8cgwRx50ZNTXSkA9h7joZMDA93rc8Eqtxtg8EqPlWsbwDOoamR1HTu3ENVTNAyJ5wuZ1lM5h-w2JtXuErG4Ulg24WBwkTKjDe47p2P_SDrum74CQ1u1p4sjXVI5)

[**Please don't wait until March 31st to stand with us. We need your help right away.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e940be0d9da445c4a3e66813c9128cb1&_e=L_Bv64aCT8Paya1cc-VEEb4cPhgm-V4yFQnaxn71MMpkAcCxdiJqIfE4e7XIvVmlb5JFmYkeTLODvduDqJk3JSK0lm_0hML4i-pf9C1DXaZpmEoWCSn7l1Fbt71aZR1i51V4lULf4En9zfMMFfMEpnEpSzhnfxfVwyxTasyacX2OOKQiEco8bBg83z69sQQZCRi6nil4DInAC9Kwz9JklP8xjFq_H4NP2-LcuwCoStMrOEHn1Z1HRuyVz-x2BJ11KFs6q95mXJHX9VRcB6wONl0hRoggzOrzHE_kbq4gB9w5s6qyZr7dXetgNem_cO4zlu2cHD4wbp9RrgMRbSPWWTVHiIYQXIJbvVM2YTBbiKP3RSEhBmsOYwXZzqQ1s1QND0b7kjWn40zfQRRoVr_QOMnCPczcJowAJcP7LZJPsPICA1aGGaGB_UOBCpuOra-D)

I’ve been incredibly lucky to receive support from so many Conservative patriots since launching my campaign. And boy do I need it.

I am in the fight of my life to be Connecticut’s next _Republican_ Senator and to oust a career politician _with a massive (and growing) bank account._ It’s no easy feat, but I’m up for the challenge, because I know it will be worth it when a **red wave** sweeps through the nation this November.

**Which leads me to why I’m emailing you today:** [**I’m reaching out to each and every conservative warrior who is tired of politicians putting America last – and asking that they personally endorse my campaign for election immediately.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=a94504d03b6643ee8d36feed055699f3&_e=gHRLs11amE0IbAu3MqBk92zR-fTrLc-znqYfJ8SZNoTu5Wo6nMCxrLahnks8Xwo_V95GE-Tu8-hMTAd4E4gIeitJPJoBhdsqeTTem-JLe1NajmXXKxfqErIJFwDSmFgcP5HZ96BlfyorXcTy5a05-EykBei8k7nqU3ppjSeCMXf5nNX8q4nKSnmxAeEGHYf5NRlg58FRM-sjHqE-NwzjkLcQtTX7QDfx-MCoQz0iHZA49SQ7LVWmyStUYsp76wP7egyrEgpOApMllLhKa9ZlqRkDTe5bmOW4x9jS_CurbAN1TqNZMuzI4FRS1OJrDJHAOIRBuXcEYM3Z6WjA1uC4bFrDZx3IoLqyHR7faXO0B2hnTl5gevJHMPLI-uQEbODcthLr-G2157jFT0v4kuE7xVJCbuwbFyklqlExi93wM8CxTTIXEWJf4Av31_cGAvYqqHRAPc0VKO1X6DMFHYY5wtHEK3hb664o0WcksYKJg10wLa3uh3WDn7EI7_l3Zqi8LjmpxPjjE2eo58HyBCDir6mkuSY3Svv5foaJwVoKsLKC_Hs_QMNZiYXEc4K-ufl0)

| | Jimmy Fremgen is fighting for solutions to homelessness, affordable child care, to end corruption in politics, climate action, and a strong, stable, globally competitive economy that works for everyone. He’s standing up to corporate special interests and doesn’t take any money from corporate PACs or climate change, so we rely on grassroots supporters like you pitching in when they can. Make a contribution today.

| | Dear friend, This is the biggest progressive congressional campaign ever in Sacramento.So far, more than 300 people have come together to contribute before the primary election!But to fight back against the corporations that are trying to steal yet another election, we're going to need to take risks and try organizing strategies that no campaign has ever tried before. It's no small task, so that's where you come in.I will be laying out our plan to win on Monday's virtual organizing call while also discussing how folks like you can get involved! [Can you join Jimmy on our organizing call?](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/8bN_vGpC9/c?w=YsWA4MhHHTd_gRo6-P4pdDi4JNy0d8u_34NGjvyf56I.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubW9iaWxpemUudXMvamltbXlmcmVtZ2VuZm9yY29uZ3Jlc3MvZXZlbnQvNDQ4ODY3LyIsInIiOiJmNjYwMjk2Mi02NWY4LTQ0ZDgtN2Y2MC0zN2RhNWNjNGE4MzkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlOWVhYzY4OS1hYjhmLTQ1MDYtOTlkNi0wYzQ1YWNiYjliZjgifQ) [Jimmy for Congress Campaign Strategy Call](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/8bN_vGpC9/c?w=YsWA4MhHHTd_gRo6-P4pdDi4JNy0d8u_34NGjvyf56I.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubW9iaWxpemUudXMvamltbXlmcmVtZ2VuZm9yY29uZ3Jlc3MvZXZlbnQvNDQ4ODY3LyIsInIiOiJmNjYwMjk2Mi02NWY4LTQ0ZDgtN2Y2MC0zN2RhNWNjNGE4MzkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlOWVhYzY4OS1hYjhmLTQ1MDYtOTlkNi0wYzQ1YWNiYjliZjgifQ)[Monday, March 28 7:00 – 8:00pm PST](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/8bN_vGpC9/c?w=YsWA4MhHHTd_gRo6-P4pdDi4JNy0d8u_34NGjvyf56I.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubW9iaWxpemUudXMvamltbXlmcmVtZ2VuZm9yY29uZ3Jlc3MvZXZlbnQvNDQ4ODY3LyIsInIiOiJmNjYwMjk2Mi02NWY4LTQ0ZDgtN2Y2MC0zN2RhNWNjNGE4MzkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlOWVhYzY4OS1hYjhmLTQ1MDYtOTlkNi0wYzQ1YWNiYjliZjgifQ)[Get more info or RSVP](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/8bN_vGpC9/c?w=YsWA4MhHHTd_gRo6-P4pdDi4JNy0d8u_34NGjvyf56I.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubW9iaWxpemUudXMvamltbXlmcmVtZ2VuZm9yY29uZ3Jlc3MvZXZlbnQvNDQ4ODY3LyIsInIiOiJmNjYwMjk2Mi02NWY4LTQ0ZDgtN2Y2MC0zN2RhNWNjNGE4MzkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlOWVhYzY4OS1hYjhmLTQ1MDYtOTlkNi0wYzQ1YWNiYjliZjgifQ) Most campaigns guard this kind of information under lock and key, but we know we can't win without you. So I hope you'll join us on Monday's call to learn how you can participate. [RSVP now for Monday’s call to learn more about how you can help elect Jimmy and get someone in Congress that will fight for real people, not corporations.](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/8bN_vGpC9/c?w=YsWA4MhHHTd_gRo6-P4pdDi4JNy0d8u_34NGjvyf56I.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubW9iaWxpemUudXMvamltbXlmcmVtZ2VuZm9yY29uZ3Jlc3MvZXZlbnQvNDQ4ODY3LyIsInIiOiJmNjYwMjk2Mi02NWY4LTQ0ZDgtN2Y2MC0zN2RhNWNjNGE4MzkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlOWVhYzY4OS1hYjhmLTQ1MDYtOTlkNi0wYzQ1YWNiYjliZjgifQ) Then, forward this invitation to three friends — we want as many supporters as possible to be a part of this movement! (Just reading this now and haven’t RSVP’d? Join [here](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/8bN_vGpC9/c?w=MLsxMimuBdIF1LpuIgoUfKJ2D80UNtjH0kn6nPNYcZw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tZWV0Lmdvb2dsZS5jb20vcG9xLXRrZ2EtZGVwIiwiciI6ImY2NjAyOTYyLTY1ZjgtNDRkOC03ZjYwLTM3ZGE1Y2M0YTgzOSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU5ZWFjNjg5LWFiOGYtNDUwNi05OWQ2LTBjNDVhY2JiOWJmOCJ9) on Monday night) Thank you,

body:
Why haven’t you joined? |

https://secure.winred.com/ramirez-for-virginia-inc/become-a-digital-member?amount=20.22&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220322_teamtina_digital-membership
Friend,

Did you see our email about your Digital Membership?

We attached it to the bottom of this email for you. But we are concerned, why didn’t you make a symbolic donation of $20.22. Do you not support electing Republicans and stopping Virginia Democrats?

When you become a Digital Member you will be on the front line of our team. You will receive exclusive updates, be the first to know about new merchandise, and your opinions will be used to shape our agenda.

Please make a symbolic donation of at least $20.22 or more before midnight tonight. >> (https://secure.winred.com/ramirez-for-virginia-inc/become-a-digital-member?amount=20.22&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220322_teamtina_digital-membership)

Tomorrow morning we will be reviewing the list of every supporter who stepped up and made a symbolic donation. We hope to see your name, Friend.

Thank you,

Ramirez Finance Team

name: Tyler Kistner
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey Peter, it’s Tyler (the Marine who did four overseas tours and is now on a mission to secure a seat in Congress). | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c494c949a7c349d2a31656c4be62064a&_e=mG68bEDlbjRKeno2s6LQMbIEtg6WhtYCOkBtAEHYQfTmUipQYgwSIiPm3QgCg5FiE62wN8ayD_bH4GHA1V5xVwP6hWZxLdYmr3sgTJwCuG_wLZnt12JhHkUVL5zv-gGx7d1XBNWXBwCp70gyu3STRdCQjRDtv0xlUEjokrBdwd19oJCt_DrrlR3SCmX5WobD_JPP8ttYS3LCRNIIFzYNhLWEagH0bYfIe83UNHo1gHB4KgUVc9dimyZtUTG-4tDDg7omCei4IayauIsVqjJ6CJb6YS1p70oI3lAnUfusz0lxevxop_qsPOMZooJ3dut02e8mszGg-B-D-fTZ6YjhMAmxCiqxVgTuUyRaV45_vxhH8UIWA4qjN9uDEt2QPs5J)

---
Hey Peter, it’s Tyler (the Marine who did four overseas tours and is now on a mission to secure a seat in Congress). [**I need a quick favor.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c494c949a7c349d2a31656c4be62064a&_e=mG68bEDlbjRKeno2s6LQMbIEtg6WhtYCOkBtAEHYQfTmUipQYgwSIiPm3QgCg5FiE62wN8ayD_bH4GHA1V5xVwP6hWZxLdYmr3sgTJwCuG_wLZnt12JhHkUVL5zv-gGx7d1XBNWXBwCp70gyu3STRdCQjRDtv0xlUEjokrBdwd3vrJ1mu-9NAGc6Sb92xhWvU9bgidRpMhGYVuM_CNEICulIVCiORMPU51UsopLzaOIqNLCIUiHMgb-z6JmF4IHcRS1LDliAtPFrym_-4E8RWz7ywkdcBojZNoB6ntfQNI71Hp8Q9t4Nbjn0MF6gQz-qqzzKJMODHtXcUDeEkTW8bxJ53fnvQ54RerSd_q2FVuKs4U7XNMLpql1Tuw0uZawU)

**The short version:**
I’m facing my biggest deadline yet at the end of March, and I need to know if you’ll [**have my back**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c494c949a7c349d2a31656c4be62064a&_e=mG68bEDlbjRKeno2s6LQMbIEtg6WhtYCOkBtAEHYQfTmUipQYgwSIiPm3QgCg5FiE62wN8ayD_bH4GHA1V5xVwP6hWZxLdYmr3sgTJwCuG_wLZnt12JhHkUVL5zv-gGx7d1XBNWXBwCp70gyu3STRdCQjRDtv0xlUEjokrBdwd1rpIsUDKyniCD1__eNBVFOQukwbTiaGeGfrBAyQYyFpC41_mTggoRsBl9HUq8Smt-aaCckab_mJmRovk7oirjSETlej411JJf078bnNCgiNqkQN01X5m_sjJSyYA9fEZMswPlc3o8EhonKnP72K-J6Oo3gs2gGHYsdSdPSLmRdWMBPedj8vydCdr_OtujCV3TwoDdRVOdppADjt0MIpXNX) in the next 15 minutes.

**The long version:**
This is what I didn’t want to have to send to you, but my team and I are going over the numbers before our big end-of-quarter deadline, and essentially, I need to pick up the pace on our fundraising numbers. **We are 41% short of meeting our biggest goal yet** , and I don’t know what we’re going to do.

I’m sure you know how bad things are...

My super-DEM opponent and liberal media will be patiently waiting to comb through my next round of publicly accessible finance reports so they can spot potential weaknesses or shortcomings that they can use against me.

**Dark money groups have already poured MILLIONS into my opponent’s bank account, because they know she’ll rubber stamp Pelosi’s America-last agenda.**

This is the same far-left Democrat who beat me in 2020 by just 2% _and since then has voted with Pelosi 98% of the time._

So now you see why I had to email you and ask for your immediate support. [**Will you tap the secure link and make an emergency donation to help us pick up the pace?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c494c949a7c349d2a31656c4be62064a&_e=mG68bEDlbjRKeno2s6LQMbIEtg6WhtYCOkBtAEHYQfTmUipQYgwSIiPm3QgCg5FiE62wN8ayD_bH4GHA1V5xVwP6hWZxLdYmr3sgTJwCuG_wLZnt12JhHkUVL5zv-gGx7d1XBNWXBwCp70gyu3STRdCQjRDtv0xlUEjokrBdwd0TQ88HNzBV1vNMsoiRSaPWZO2h-Ba68NAIKH4wXf5ITERSVwJZk3PCr7XSvtpi5Q0gcbFWr75PEARDOnd_ptFrjvLrvbRzbP3KhGxFWVLQq2YaTpaxnmh-x1nvBj6rfqyX5C_YVfM0859YXVPX0v2GTJXRr1qRidU1j1m_ZjcDgTSxN26kkFArZLnxqEX9erNsEfaH1MISA1bX1iLYiEpn)

[**EMERGENCY DONATE**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c494c949a7c349d2a31656c4be62064a&_e=mG68bEDlbjRKeno2s6LQMbIEtg6WhtYCOkBtAEHYQfTmUipQYgwSIiPm3QgCg5FiE62wN8ayD_bH4GHA1V5xVwP6hWZxLdYmr3sgTJwCuG_wLZnt12JhHkUVL5zv-gGx7d1XBNWXBwCp70gyu3STRdCQjRDtv0xlUEjokrBdwd0TjMc6M9Lhx_fATClabg1N3K1b3RI6IrcNRj7jg9GRXdGQDr639tEZjIm6UvaUzsJ8pKYqSh0DOvo5z5_-ttBnYOr-1hFHOSwwklbSJfvr6bcSybMUsF86jFNFLghjBJdeKJ_PEb7URZj2UNsc6Svlu8upHAhclV-Y0XG4lhD5DJXgPYjdIr3ZPe8qHsjooGpYFob745lTE_Hj1m1e7P63)
All eyes are on this seat, Peter. Dems and Republicans have qualified this as **one of the most competitive races this cycle.**

If Republicans are going to retake control of the House, then it’s essential to win seats in suburban district like the one I’m running in. With just five seats needed to take control, we must PUT EVERY SINGLE SEAT IN PLAY.

If Dems hold the House majority in 2022, they’re going to go wild...

Winning this seat is the key to regaining the majority - [**which is why I’m asking for your help today. name: Alex Padilla
subject: Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s advice for young people:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
I was really moved by Judge Jackson’s response to my question
#

Hi there,
As a member of the Senate Judiciary Committee, I had the honor of participating in the confirmation hearings for Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination to the Supreme Court.
I also had the chance to meet with her privately, and I’ve studied her record closely.
**It is my belief that Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson will make a fantastic Supreme Court Justice, and I’m proud to support her nomination.**
Judge Jackson is eminently qualified and will make history as the first Black woman on the Supreme Court, and as the first public defender on the Supreme Court.
And over the past few days during the confirmation hearings, I watched Judge Jackson calmly handle outrageous attacks and lines of questioning from some of my Republican colleagues.
I also watched her confidently and ably address questions about the law and the role of the court. Her poise and expertise were inspiring to many people watching, including myself.
So for my last question, I asked Judge Jackson if she had any words for the young people watching. And I want to share her response in full, because it really moved me. [**Here's what she said:**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/424?t=1&akid=698%2E159979%2EIJ4AoO)
_I hope to inspire people to try to follow this path because I love this country, because I love the law, because I think it’s important that we all invest in our future._
_And the young people are our future. So I want them to know that they can do or be anything, and I will tell them what an anonymous person said to me once._
_I was walking through Harvard Yard my freshman year. As I mentioned, I went to public school and I didn’t know anything about Harvard until my debate coach took me there to enter a speech competition, and I thought this is a great university. It was basically one of the only ones I’d seen, and I said maybe I’ll apply when I’m a senior._
_But I get there and woah, it’s so different. I’m from Miami, Florida, and Boston is very cold. It was rough. It was different from anything I’d known. There were lots of students there who were prep school kids, like my husband, who knew all about Harvard. And that was not me._
_And the first semester, I was really homesick, I was really questioning. Do I belong here? Can I make it in this environment? And I was walking through the yard in the evening, and a Black woman I did not know was passing me on the sidewalk. And she looked at me, and I guess she knew how I was feeling. And she leaned over as we crossed and said ‘persevere.’_
_I would tell them to persevere._
Like I said, I believe Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson will make an incredible addition to the Supreme Court — both because of her obvious qualifications, but also because of the power she has to inspire the next generation of Americans.
It’s my honor to support her nomination to the Supreme Court.
Thank you,
Alex Padilla

* * *

Alex Padilla is the first Latino ever elected to the U.S. Senate from California. Now, he’s fighting every day to reform our broken immigration system, protect our planet from climate change, and guarantee health care as a human right for ALL Americans. So with our first FEC deadline of 2022 just a week away, we have to ask:
[**Can you please make a contribution — of any amount you can afford — to keep Alex Padilla in the Senate? Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, so every donation means a lot.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-mar22?refcode=em220324-1-120&t=2&refcode2=698_159979_IJ4AoO&akid=698%2E159979%2EIJ4AoO)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-mar22?refcode=em220324-1-120&t=3&refcode2=698_159979_IJ4AoO&akid=698%2E159979%2EIJ4AoO)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=698%2E159979%2EIJ4AoO)
